# Combined OCR Output

The Source HERITAGE CODEX SPECIAL EDITION
Issue 1-80
copyright © 1980 L.Christine Hayes
Because of the unique material which will be presented in future issues of "THE SOURCE," I
feel that it is necessary to compile the Quarterly No. 1 as a Heritage Codex Special Edition, an
outline of the resources from which the proceeding issues will draw. We will be viewing the
customs, social structures, spiritual symbology, scientific perspective, and historical origins of a
world within our own, independent of us in visible ways, yet interdependent with us in the
essential, and often invisible, bonds of human/earth symbiosis. In this latter regard, we are not
exploring a world separate from ours, but our own heart in which the most volatile expressions
of our ancestors still was genetic memory into our bloodstream. We share with them the mind of
Earth and the generations of past experience to which we once committed ourselves in a mortal
plunge, submerging our souls into the baptismal fire and ice of living matter. We are the fruits
of the same vine, harvested in different fields of the one soil. The people of the Central Earth
Cultures in sanctuary beneath us are, in a sense, ourselves had we not chosen the harsh existence
in which we now abide. These advanced human beings, dwelling within the Earth's sphere, have
become living shadows of the Lost Races of Antiquity, whose civilizations once thrived upon the
ground which we now walk. In future Quarterlies, I will focus in magnification upon the varied
knowledge now accessible to us within their vaults of time. These, our Inner-Earth brethren, say
to us, "Mankind of Earth cannot hope to visit distant portals of the stars until he is granted his
inheritance of the lost generations on Earth... an inheritance which awaits him through the
acknowledgment and communion with his brethren of the Heritage of One, in sanctuary within
the Central Domain of Earth."
"The Ultra-terrestrials whose origins are one with Earth have worked in harmony with the Inner
and Outer Earth Worlds so that the two are one world, together in the heritage of their common
ancestors. Only then will mankind of Earth be presented before the throne of Universality and
be received among the Congress of the Equilibrant Worlds. Long a silent chord, the Heritage of
One now arises from the sea, for time has given her voice in the New Day."
These "people" of the Central Earth cavity are our human family, much closer to the highly
intelligent and spiritualized ancestors of our past than are we. They are physical, living,
ensouled beings, whose molecular structure is attuned to a more rapid atomic oscillatory rate
than our biosystems, and is therefore in a subtler state of spiritual-physical evolution. The Inner-
terrestrial humans addressed by "THE SOURCE" as the Central Earth Cultures of Subterranea
are not associated with or in any way related to the de-energizing forms which manifest into sub-
human biosystems within pockets of mal-generated energy node anomalies of this planet. This
type of energy-warped phenomena is independent of and not in harmony with the ensouled and
spiritualized humanity on or within the Earth. It is not within the projected scope of "THE
SOURCE" to delve into such digressive latitudes. We act solely as a channel for the Heritage of
One... the collective cultures of the Tribes within the Central Domain of Earth who carry within
their genes a cosmic mixture of Earth and other planetary origins.
The language structure of the Central Earth subterraneans is vastly different in many respects to
the English language. Although I strive for the closest direct translations possible, in many
instances I have had to relate through analogous representations within the surface Earth's field
of reference.
The Culture-Rama newly constructed beneath the Grand Canyon, the Cultures of Subterranea,
began its service officially on January 1, 1980, although a special festival ceremony was held on
the night of December 24, 1979. The basic purpose of the Culture-Rama is the NOAH
PROJECTION, a long range massive project to refurbish, revitalize and regenerate the surface
territory of this planet. It is an attempt to offset the portending cosmic changes which will wreak
havoc on the unprepared surface dweller, and to subdue the increasing self-destruction of the
outer domain intelligences as they play out their karmic tragedies. NOAH will work on the
synthesis of Outer and Inner Earth harmony, finding means to seed depleted surface forests with
the rich, incubated flora of Subterranea; and cross-breeding surface with inner dwelling fish,
fowl and mammals to provide sturdier, less mutated genetic stock adaptable to the ultra changes
that this planet as a whole faces in the near future as colossal cosmic occurrences encroach on
our protective ecosphere. Pollution reversal is also a main concern to the scientists of the
Culture-Rama. Decontamination techniques must be perfected before much physical contact
between the two life support environments can be safely realized. The ultimate in synthesization
of the two spheres is to be the regeneration of the "homo-sapien" surface inhabitant. The human
being of the outer domain is not going to fare well in his rapidly accelerating environment. As
etheric density is elevated, geological pressures will implode his fragile, polluted and genetically
deviated bio-system. The Subterranean Earth Cultures are the caretakers of a reservoir of
regenerating plasma, genetic restoration and knowledge leading to perpetual constitution. They
are not beings from some distant planet as are our Ultra-terrestrial cousins. The Inner-World
Cultures are our close relations, both capable and willing to act as genetic and consciousness
donors to their lost brethren of the Outer Domain. First, sociological bridges must be spanned
and a parity of consciousness recognition and understanding must be reached. This will be
begun through: (1) re-evaluation and research into the geologic, ecologic and sociologic patterns
regulating cause and effect upon the surface habitat. (2) Enlightening the surface dwellers to the
inner civilization and to the shared history and sciences in the keeping of the Central Earth
Cultures. (3) Familiarizing and instructing the Inner World populace in Outer Earth orientation.
The latter effort is given sensitive consideration as the subterranean have been very hesitant in
making contact with the Surface World. They quite naturally fear our aggressive and self-
destructive nature, and unlike the Ultra-terrestrials, the Inner Tribes cannot leave us behind.
The Culture-Rama is composed of three separate complexes, each situated on a different earth-
level and connected through air vacuum tubes in which shuttles are sped to link the triune of
buildings. Beginning from the Central Earth cavity upward, I will attempt to give you a mental
picture of the complexes. Atop a plateau, overlooking the Central Sea, is the entrance building,
the "Arc Pavilion". It is a many pillared edifice, gleaming white beneath the ever-pervading
Central Sun. The structure registers a graceful Grecian beauty and is decorated with few but
large striking Incan and Mayan symbols. They are painted in the predominant colors of most of
the symbols and murals of the Culture-Rama, blue, red, black and yellow. Highlighting touches
of gold and silver, as well as violet and green, accent many of the designs. There are brilliant
murals on the floor of the mostly open-air structure, interspersed by twenty-six elaborately
chiseled pillars. The Arc Pavilion is laid out upon the plateau in an arc or half-circle. Portions
of the sides are roofed with flat stone, imbuing it with a Stonehenge effect. At the center of the
arc is positioned a large altar stone. It is squared, with a carved sun motif on each of the side-
facings and on the top. Beneath the stone is the entrance into the labyrinth of the first level.
Inside the antechamber the walls glow a soft blue-white. When walking down the narrow halls
there is no feeling of claustrophobia. Instead there is the pervading sense of space and serenity.
At the end of the labyrinth, in the center of the network of hallways, the floor slowly moves
downward until the individual finds himself within a crystal web, pulsating with laser-frequency
sparks. Through this process, the body of the subterranean is regulated for a change in density
pressure. After fifteen to thirty minutes the webbing disappears and the Inner-World inhabitant
is free to step into a shuttle inside a transparent tube-line. This air trans-accelerator will soon
place the occupant upon the second level of the Culture-Rama. Here, a period of days or weeks
is spent, depending upon the individual's bio-system. The second level contains a calming
atmosphere of spacious rooms terraced with terrarium gardens. The light is supplied within the
caverns by a form of micro-biotic algae. After a stay in this complex, the traveler is again
whisked through the air trans-accelerator to the third and main level of the Culture-Rama. The
caverns which contain the largest of the three complexes are partially natural. However, the
greatest area has been artificially hollowed through laser-sonic tunneling beneath the floor of the
Grand Canyon. Directly atop the complex is a mountain plateau into which the main structure of
the globe, large enough to encapsule the Super Dome. It is partially buried in the floor of the
largest hollowed cavern, allowing only the upper half of the sphere visibility to those on the
grounds of the "Grand Plaza," encircling the immense dome. The submerged half contains the
energy life support system for the entire triune of complexes, a circular opening into a cavity
within the mountain's base. Here is located another cavern, replete with flowering gardens,
small waterfalls and a winding stream. Some small animals such as deer and rabbit live within
the re-created natural environment. This mini-preserve is not maintained for its beauty alone, but
for research purposes as well.
To focus attention on the ground level once again, this area also contains flowering plants and
small trees, but is landscaped in a structural pattern. The plaza is a circular wheel of colored
tiles, flecked in gold, spanning out from the center dome in a splendor of mural expression.
Each of the Central Earth Cultures have their history and symbols traced upon the plaza floor
and etched into the stele and low walls bordering, and occasionally intercepting, the Grand
Plaza. The plants and trees grow from green patches surrounded by tile and polished stone. In
the four mid-points of the plaza are design squares known as "Diatons." There is a fountain
within each of these squares which are the Fountains of the North, South, East and West
respectively. Each Fountain is polarized to that direction through a means of "gyro-copic
system.” These Fountains are far more than symbolic expressions. Their use will be detailed in
a future issue.
About the Grand Plaza are the housing structures where residents and visitors to the Culture-
Rama reside. The walls of this cavern chamber are of a natural quartz formation. There are
hollows within the walls in which buildings have been set and actually blend as one with the
crystalline formations, reminiscent of the American cliff dwellings. The whole of the Culture-
Rama is a balanced mixture of many cultural styles, yet bearing a homogenization unique unto
itself.
Since all surface cultures began upon the same staff of heritage, as did the Inner-Earth
inhabitants, the familiar styles woven between the two are not surprising. The essential
difference arises in the knowledge preserved by the Inner-Earth Tribes as to the meaning and
purpose that spawned these cultural ties. This beacon of light is lost from most surface dwellers,
with the exception of some American Indian Tribes and a few other ancient peoples who still
maintain the embodiment of the Creation Genesis upon the wheel that turns once again to the
Source.
PEOPLE OF THE ARK *** The Central Earth Subterraneans are divided into tribes and clans
within tribes, but altogether they are the "Ayria," the Surviving People or The People of the Ark.
THE CLANS AND CONGRESS OF THE HERITAGE OF ONE *** There are twelve tribes
within the interior of the Earth. These tribes are not now as they originally were in the beginning
of the Earth habitation. However, these genetic tribes with their accompanying cultures have not
changed appreciably since their abandonment of the surface world. They strive to maintain a
partial stand-still in time until the complete unity of the Earth's peoples can be achieved. As the
Caretakers, they hold the genetic bonding to the past. Their generations have maintained a
genetic proclivity to natural enlightenment, a trait most surface dwellers no longer contain within
their genes to pass to their offspring.
The Surviving People, the Ayria, uphold their laws out of spiritual unity and not out of fear or
through force. There is a freeness of spirit among them that is not confined in dogma. With this
natural seeking, the twelve tribes have formed Clans within each Tribe. A brother and sister in
our society rarely "fall in love" with each other because of the centuries of cultural structuring
which does not include such a union. Therefore, a different kind of love fills the space between
brother and sister, father and daughter, mother and son. The cultural order of the Central Earth
People has a similar yet farther reaching code. In order that they maintain a genetic parity with
their Spirit-Life activity, and not mutate their race out of existence, they have devised a Great
Family Order in which each Tribe has become a large genetic family. The Clans are units within
the families. As an example of this Order or "Grand Totem," a woman from the Clan of one
Tribe would not consider marrying a man from another Clan within her own Tribe any more than
she would wish to marry her uncle. To marry within her own Clan would be equivalent to
marrying her brother. Instead, the young woman would quite naturally be attracted to a
husband/wife relationship with a man of a Clan in another Tribe.
The Twelve Central Earth Tribes are: (1) Sky-One Point, (2) Sky-Two Point, (3) Sky-Three
Point, (4) Sky-Four Point, (5) Sky-Five Point, (6) Earth-Six Point, (7) Earth-Seven Point, (8)
Earth-Eight Point, (9) Earth-Nine Point, (10) Earth-Ten Point, (11) Earth-Eleven Point, and (12)
Earth-Twelve Point. To a civilized surface human this, no doubt, sounds like a football
scoreboard, and there is a record kept of these titles, but it is an ancient record of previous
"absolved" cultures. The numbered "points" refer to the number of absolved cultures taken to
create the one Tribe. This means, for instance, that there was only one complete cultural cycle
absolved or completely assimilated within Sky-One Point before it retreated from the surface
world into the subterranean sanctuary. At the opposite end of the scale, Earth-Twelve Point has
twelve absolved cultures in its surface past. Since entering the inner region, no culture has been
absolved totally. The Tribes are divided into Sky and Earth. The Sky Tribes contain a genetic
dominance which is directly related to the Earth's Ultra-Terrestrial lineage. The Earth Tribes
contain a Stellar lineage as well, but of a lesser strain. Upon the Grand Totem all of the People
are seen as equal members of the Family Order and equal inheritors of the Sacred Spirit-Life
Medicine Wheel, which represents the Equal Rights of the People to Life, Liberty and Spiritual
Inheritance. Yet the principle of "Spiritual Inheritance" embraces the idea of a culminative
design, in which the Spirit-Life of all the People, as spokes of a wheel, rush to the central axis
and, together, create a superior focus, which is an equal part of them all. This, then, is the belief
which upholds the Great Thirteen Point Family, not considered a Tribe, but the culmination of
the Twelve Tribes. This special "Family" has no divisions or Clans, but is called the "Wind
Pipe," which could be translated as Calumet. The Great Thirteen Point Family is a perfectly
balanced combination of the genetics of the other Twelve Family Tribes. This "Wind Pipe"
Family is sometimes referred to as the "Grandfather Family" as all other Tribes are matriarchal
in lineage in that the husband is accepted into the tribe and Clan of his wife. In the Thirteen
Point Family the mate from outside the 'Wind Pipe" is accepted into the Great Family, regardless
of sex.
The physical territory of the Inner Realm is much more limited than ours. In addition, it takes
more cubic space per person for environmental stability than it does in the Outer Realm because
of the difference in pressures and the compactness of the condensation cycles. The Interior
World is highly vulnerable to human toxicity and must be protected at all times. There is no
margin for carelessness as there is upon the surface. In addition to this basic environmental
protection, birth control is an essential in maintaining this balance. While Subterraneans engage
in a spiritually balanced sexual activity, conception is kept to a minimum and is extremely
selective. This is not achieved through artificial birth control but is accomplished by the will of
the genetic mind. Among the People a condition for conception is rendered non-viable with the
power of mind over body. While there is a great deal of selectivity in matrimony and conception
within the Central Earth Cultures, it must be realized that these highly evolved humans are
capable of controlling their own births, (barring certain karmic complications.) Thus, two soul
mates can time and direct their births into the proper channels so that marriage between them
will be almost a certainty.
All phases of human expression evolve within the unifying field of sky and earth through the
interchanging properties of wind, fire, water and land. People of the Ark find a total harmony in
their communication with these properties and their allegiance to all creative elementation. This
basic aspect is reflected in the direct and singular participation of individual Clans in all of their
Spirit-Life Orders. It is the service of the Great Thirteen Point Family to regulate the flow of
such harmonizing energies through a Congress, composed of members of the Wind Pipe. This
Central Earth Congress, called the Congress of the Heritage of One, is an assembly which
genetically and spiritually represents the whole of the Twelve Tribes as the "Heritage One." Yet,
no member of the Congress is a member of any of the Twelve Tribes. Each is a balanced
mixture of all the Central Earth People. It is the designated duty of the Central Earth Congress
to maintain a guiding presence for the established spiritual law, and to enforce the regulation of
the resultant physical law through a "Common Assembly" with the Tribes or individuals in
question. The Congress does not interfere with the government of the separate Tribes unless the
Spirit-Life harmony of the People as a whole is threatened. The Congress of the Heritage of One
deals exclusively with the civilization of the Central Earth, and seldom turns its attention to the
Outer World. This focus is usually relegated to the "Hermeneutical Council," composed of
members of the Twelve Tribes of Man. However, with the construction of the Culture-Rama and
the accompanying NOAH PROJECT, the Congress is increasing its field of presence to
encompass some aspects of Surface Earth attention.
THE EXO-CULTURES ... Cultures which were brought directly from other worlds into the
Central Earth and have never surfaced since that ancient entrance are known as "exo-cultures,"
existing outside the Tribal framework yet equal under the Law of One.
THE CULTURE FRAMES ... While all in one Tribe are genetically similar, there are several
civilization remnants expressed within any one Tribe. Some of these "Culture Frames" are:
Lemuria, Atlantis, American Indian, Inca and Maya. These cultures are scattered among the
Tribes and no culture frame is contained solely within one Family Tribe.
CENTRAL CITIES ... There are no state or national divisions within Subterreanea, but a
network of cities has been established within the culture frames. These culture cities are
scattered and not collected in groups of the same culture behind boundary lines. The remnant
cultures of the Lemurian, Atlantean, Incan, and Mayan claim the largest percentage of cities
within the Earth. These cultures together with the American-Indian and Egyptian culture frames
also share dominance in the Great Medicine Societies. The predominance of these six Culture
Frames is due to three main factors: (1) among other culture remnants there is less knowledge of
their ancient cultural past remaining; (2) in many instances the individual cultures are less
populated, as with the remnants of the ancient Britons, who because of their few genetic links
within the Central Earth, must conform to the Great Family Order and keep their procreation to a
minimum level; (3) the North-American Indians of the Central Earth prefer bringing their people
together in fewer but larger complexes, and therefore do not build as many separate cities as do
the other prominent Cultures. The prominent presence of these six Cultures has been created by
natural circumstances and is not an imposed element of the majorities' sublimation of the
minority Cultures. Every effort is taken by all Culture Frames to preserve the Culture memory
and practices of the smallest remnants among them.
The Tribes with their divisions of Clans flow freely through the cities of the Culture Frames.
The Tribe and Clan indicates the heritage and spiritual inheritance upon the Grand Totem of the
subterranean of the Sky-Earth Tribes, yet he does not feel the need to congregate with only those
of his Tribe or Clan. The opposite is encouraged through the Inner-Tribal Societies. Inner-
Tribal relations are well realized. The people do tend to stay within their own culture frames,
but this is not out of any feelings of separatism or superiority. They are dedicated to keeping
their culture distinct in memory, as we on the surface strive to keep rare species from extinction
and preserve ancient ruins for future generations to pay homage to what has been before. This
patriotism to one's Culture among the People of the Ark does not preclude the existent harmony
between Cultures. All the Central Earth Cultures are brethren of the Great Family Order. One's
Tribe is his genetic vine. One's Culture is his matrix for preservation of a singular cultural
experience, never to be achieved again in exactly the same conduit of human expression. Unlike
the ruins which cling to the shell of the planet as bodiless shrouds, they are living entities of
ancient consciousness reaching out of the endless sea to give depth to purpose and reason to
being. In order that the genetic tribes survive, so must the Cultures survive long enough to be
assimilated into the whole earth spectrum of both inner and outer domains. It is only then that
the genetic circuits of above with below will be linked once again and this planet will receive the
holistic charge necessary for its spiritual evolution through time.
THE GREAT MEDICINE SOCIETIES ... The mechanism for inner-tribal and inner-cultural
unity among the Surviving People are “The Great Medicine Societies." They are eight in
number, each involving a particular branch of Spirit-Life energies. The Societies are channels
for shamanistic association with the Devas or Nature Spirits.
(1)
(2)
(3)
(4)
(5)
(6)
(7)
(8)
Rain Society - centered upon the meteorological nature spirits such as air, cloud, thunder,
lightning, rain, wind, etc.
Dolphin Society - focuses on the nature powers of the seas, rivers, lakes.
Butterfly Society - acts within the vestments of the Devas of all flying creatures.
Willow Society - harmonious with the earth's trees and flora.
Fire Stone Society - concerned with internal powers of the earth, stone, lava, tectonic
plates and acu-nodes, and with the alchemical knowledge and healing energies of
crystals.
Sacred Corn Society - active in the generative energies of the domestic harvest.
Bear Paw Society - the most secret in doctrine, dealing with the Devic presences and
powers of all land mammals. In its "Medicine Power" beliefs it encompasses much more,
having evolved into the understanding of man's role as a mammal of the Earth.
The Society of the Blue Mantle - This, the most sacred of the eight societies, deals with
the Christ Flame and its evolution upon and within the Earth. The combined power of
the eight Medicine Societies is released through the symbol of the Thunderbird. This is
the masculine symbol of the germinating seed carried in the ether. The "Perfect
Principle" of Spirit-Life is seen in the Spruce Tree, which is the matriarchal density of
the elements taken root in and committed to the Earth. Thus, the Thunderbird as the
Medicine Power, the Germinator; and the Spruce Tree as the Perfect Principle, the Spirit-
Life Crucible; together are the archetypes of all morphic projections within the
homogony of the sky-Earth Tribes.
A prospective initiate to the Great Medicine Societies must gain a certain amount of insight, and
exhibit good deeds through word and action before he or she is received into any of these
Societies. Most adults of the Central Earth belong to at least one of the Societies, and many
belong to all of the first six listed here. The latter two cannot be joined until the initiates have
been received into the other six in whatever order they deem appropriate. Then only through
spiritual testing can initiates be gathered into the Bear Paw, and finally the Blue Mantle.
Societies are guided by "Illuminaries," those personages from among them who have become so
far advanced spiritually that they are variably “elemented,” meaning that they can act on the
manifesting plane. They are thus able to lessen their physical density at will and transform their
bio-system as they so choose, both for limited periods of time. The Illuminaries are still attached
to a system of genetic and atomic elemental grouping, yet they are able to exert far more control
over their bodies than most Subterraneans and certainly far more control than surface
inhabitants. Most of the Illuminaries have not been physically born, but have manifested their
physical bodies through their own knowledge of atomic solidarity. Often they assume a genetic
system in which they were contained in a previous life which is harmonious with their present
Spirit-Life purpose. While an Illuminari must maintain a "bio-matrix," or a specific bio-system,
for the most part of his "life," he can change this form at will to any other form compatible with
his Spirit-Life being, including other past incarnations. But always he must return to his chosen
bio-matrix after a limited time period, until a future date when he chooses another bio-matrix to
sustain him. Such choices are not random or whimsical but comply with the sensitive karmic
and spiritual flow of the individual Illuminari's soul pattern. Through the Illuminaries, the Great
Medicine Societies are guided by the understanding of the principles of Nature and the Nature
Spirits, both subordinate and sublime, of the Veiled Garden of the Devas, yet another world
within our own.
ESOTERIC ORDERS ... There are a great number of Esoteric Orders woven into the life system
of the Sky-Earth homogeny. The People of the Ark are the central thread in the weave of the
many colored Earth Blanket. Each Culture Frame has its Sacred Orders which have been
watchfully preserved throughout the centuries. This esoterica is not as open to the People as are
the Inner-Tribal Medicine Societies. Only those initiates selected through several life missions
of experience are received within these orders. The initiate of a Central Earth Sacred Order must
himself be a Master through the ages within one or more areas of spiritual service. The Sacred
Orders do serve the People as a whole by establishing special services of humanitarian and
spiritual import.
There are two major Esoteric Orders within the interior world which are the most ancient of this
entire planet and which spawned the most sacred of doctrines for Holy Surface Orders of Old;
the Masons and Rosicrucians among them. One of these primary orders is THE ORDER OF
THE MASTER BUILDERS. They are the Master Architects of such awesome design as the
Pyramid of Giza, and through their blueprints, was erected Stonehenge and other scientific
clocks in stone. From out of the mouth of the "ILLUMINED" came all Holy Orders of Earth
consciousness. It is the Greatest of Esoteric Orders on or within the Earth. Only the Illuminaries
hold stations within the "ILLUMINED." There are special recognitions bestowed on the more
mortal humans by this Highest Order, but such is a rare honor. Surrounding the core of the
"ILLUMINED" is the "College of the Illumined" into which most seekers of enlightenment, who
are earnest in their effort, are accepted. The "College of the Illumined" is not a physical
gathering but a condition of spirit and mind visited upon the initiate by the Illuminaries of the
ILLUMINED as a cloak of protection and guidance by the spiritual power. It is difficult to
comprehensively describe the ILLUMINED, as it is unlike any other spiritual Order of Earth's
subscription. It is, in actuality, not an "Order" unto itself, but the inertia of all spiritualized
esoterica. It is not related to the use of the words Illuminoid or Illuminati as is given on the
Surface World to represent a negative element of esoteric power. Sacred words and symbols are
sometimes stolen from their gilded cages and attempts are made to pirate their rights to ancient
sovereignty. This was true of the symbol of the Four Sacred Directions known to the North
American Indian for centuries, yet claimed by the Nazis in the 1930's as their banner to inflict a
blazing scar on the Earth. Disgraceful acts, hidden behind sacred scrolls, do not vanquish the
sacredness of the original intent of the Holy Word or Symbol. Spiritual ties cannot be violated in
truth, but only within the mind's own perception. The ILLUMINED is this planet's single most
pristine Guardianship for the Heritage of the One.
PRIESTHOOD... The Great Medicine Societies extend the understanding of the Sacred Nature
Plane, which is synonymous with the Great Source of Being, into every phase of the People's life
Experience. The Esoteric Orders supply the guardianship of ancient records and powers so that
they may be executed wisely for the benefit of present and future generations. The Priesthood is
then the last face upon the spiritual totem. The Priests and Priestesses are placed in service
through the College of the Illumined to administer to the People in their personal spiritual needs.
This service revolves within each separate Culture Frame and differs slightly according to that
Culture.
EDUCATION.... The whole process of the Spirit-Life Medicine Wheel, which is the most sacred
symbol of the Sky-Earth Tribes, is a progression of education. For specialized learning in such
fields as physics, history, music, etc., there are Centers of Learning or Universities open to all
people of all Cultures and ages. There is no requirement for entrance. These Centers are largely
self-educative, containing vibra-records, three-dimensional photographs, motion pictures, vision
projectors and other varied selections through which self-instruction is possible. In addition,
there are Master Instructors at each Center to administer personal instruction when needed.
For the children there is the "Circle of the Rainbow," a preparatory education assembly for
youths to ready for entrance into their first Society for which they are eligible at the age of
twelve. Even when a twelve year old is accepted into his or her first Society (although eligibility
does not ensure immediate acceptance) he is continued through the "Circle of the Rainbow" until
he reaches the age of sixteen. There are also special "Circle of the Rainbow" Masters at the
Centers of Learning to guide children in their self-learning at these Universities open to all ages.
GUILDS ... The Guilds supply the Craftsmen (and women) skills from a heritage Craftsman
before them. Most of the crafts have been continued in their original form since the days in
which the Lemurian and Atlantean Empires shone in the light of the Solar Sun. There is a very
strong sense of esoterica connected to the Guilds which binds them to the Sacred Orders in so far
as the application of the Secret Principles are applied in Ancient Crafting. Ship Crafting, for
instance, is one of the most treasured arts, relying heavily on the Secret Principles. The sea ship
is considered by the Surviving People as a most venerated and almost sacred vessel; for deep
within their genetic emotions turns the memory of the great cataclysm which devoured kingdoms
of the surface world, leaving nations powerless, casting the ancestors of the People into the black
rage of a wounded sea. Had it not been for the sea ships, given strength and power by their
crafters, the Spirit-Life of the People would not have come into the Sanctuary beneath the
Central Sun. Each Ancient Craft is held in reverence for its continued contribution and
faithfulness to the People. It is as if the Crafts were in themselves entities of their ancestor's
Spirit-Life, entwined like an umbilical cord through the birth canal of the generations proceeding
them.
STARCRAFTERS ... Starcrafting is an unique skill which does not operate within a Guild and is
not ancient to the Central Earth Tribes. It is a combined effort of the Central Earth inhabitants
and their Ultra-terrestrial cousins, guardians of this planet, through which the building,
maintenance and operation of Star Crafts (space ships) is accomplished. The Sky-Earth Tribes
do not have an advanced understanding of stellar travel simply because they have no desire to
accelerate in that field of knowledge. However, their Ultra-terrestrial relations did convince
them centuries ago that certain form of "sky travel" would be beneficial to the People. As a
result of the co-operation between the two parts of Unimanity, the personages from other worlds
and the People of our interior planet, selected Inner-Terrestrials who showed advanced
comprehension of stellar sciences to be accepted into the apprenticeship of “Starcrafting:” Since
that first union of effort many Inner-Terrestrials have achieved the status of Master Crafters in
this ultra skill. While Ultra-terrestrials still maintain a guiding presence within the Starcrafting,
Inner-Terrestrials have by now assumed most authoritative positions in the Starcraft Legion.
This Legion is the nearest resemblance to a military force within Subterreanea. However, the
Spirit-Life structure of the People of the Central Earth does not include the kind of militaristic
forces prevalent upon the surface world, nor is this included in the Ultra-terrestrial's spiritual
code. The Starcraft Legion operates as a surveillance system and an input-output assembly for
geological and atmospheric study of both inner space and the immediate space surrounding the
planet Earth. Their defense deployments amount to camouflage devices, deterrents and stunning
rays. Also the decontaminating force field is a prime invention kept on alert against the time
when the brethren of the Central Earth People should discover an easy route into the planet's
interior. This is the single nightmare that plagues the Surviving People. If the surface world
were to experience a scientific breakthrough in the understanding of the earth force fields, they
would find it relatively simple to penetrate the two natural fields at the poles of the planet, and
enter into the interior world. It is near the natural openings of the poles that the starcraft bases
are located. The protonic beam starcraft in use by the Legion is capable of only short distance
space travel. Like the giant tortoise, the People carry us on their backs, and contemplate our
future along with theirs, for ultimately, the two are inseparable. They call us "The People of the
Tortoise Shell."
GOVERNMENT ... Most of the governing of the People is relegated to the individual Tribes.
Each Tribe assumes responsibility for the "family" of their Tribe. However, the "Law of One,"
which encompasses all Sacred Law established when enlightened souls first sought this planet as
an enclave for creation, is the law accepted throughout the Grand Totem of Tribes. Within each
city there is a Court of Inquisition and a Court of Restitution. If the legal problem concerns
several persons of different Tribes, Court appointed representatives of these Tribes involved will
hold seat upon the Court. The representatives, or Justice Ministers, must also be from the same
Culture Frame and the same city as the defendant and plaintiff. All Justices and Ministers are
required to be familiar with the background of the members of his group, or Rue, within his City.
The Central Earth system of government prospers because of the spiritual enlightenment of the
individuals. Each member of the Sky-Earth Tribes is respectful of his participation within a
sanctified collective unit of humanity, and he carries through with responsible actions in his
commitment to his fellow man.
HEALTH AND REJUVENATION ... There are very few illnesses known to the Central Earth
Tribes, most of them are seen as the individual's karmic wish and are curable. Old age is non-
non-existent as through a rejuvenation process none suffer from this worst of maladies. Their
natural environment is a great aid is slowing cellular deterioration. The light spectrum is
different from the surface world's and not as hard on the physical system. Illuminaries are
exempted from rejuvenation techniques as they are able to mentally control the cells of their
ultra-bodies. When a Subterranean feels that he has accomplished enough in one body he
ascends that form to continue his being on another place of experience, or to be re-born.
POPULATION ... Because of the aforementioned birth regulation, and the smallness of the
enclosed territory of Subterreanea, the populace is maintained at approximately twenty-five
million persons, which does not include the populace of the Colonies and Lost Cities existing in
the Caverns between the Surface and Interior Worlds. The reproductivity of the flora and fauna
is controlled through the High Order Devas, who sustain a communing harmony with the People
through the Great Medicine Societies. This is a vital communion to the Interior Civilizations.
The purity of the environment is rich in oxygen and negative ions, producing vitality and
longevity. It is blanketed by thick mineral-laden soils, and an abundance of the deepest, purest
spring water known to this planet. Consequently, the lands of Subterreanea are a fertile
terrarium of life. In the Outer Realm the door of understanding between the Nature kingdom and
the Human kingdom has been closed. In the Interior World this door is open and a full bright
river of the outpourings of nature's spirit rushes through into the human embrace. This is as it is
meant to be, for mind is the artist whose design is woven into every crest of nature. Yet the
Surface brethren have abandoned their gifted craft and shut themselves away from that part of
their Spirit which moves the Earth through Natural Order.
MIGRATION ... Throughout the Earth's tumultuous history, Cultures have entered and surfaced
upon the planet in waves of human tide. These migrators left the sediment of their impressions
on the Surface World like the mineral rings in a tree, leaving behind seed for new civilizations,
taking with them the primary knowledge of humankind. The last major migration was during the
final dissolution of Atlantis as she plunged her fiery heart into the fathomless well of the
Atlantic. From this Great Migration many paths were taken, several of which ultimately led into
the Inner-Earth Domain.
COLONIES AND LOST CITIES ... There are several Colony Cities located in the caverned
regions between the surface and Inner Domain on both sides of the "Skull Plate." These
Colonies were formed from displaced Surface-Dwellers in the many migrational surges to the
core. For differing reasons, groups of migrators never journeyed as far as the Central Cavity.
These Colony Cities are still a part of the Central Earth Homogony.
There are several Lost Cities which became isolated from the other Colonies centuries ago.
These City Kingdoms are minute empires unto themselves and their people are no longer a part
of the Great Family Order of the Central Earth Tribes. Some of the Lost Cities are not even
aware that other Colonies or the Central Earth Cavity of the planet exists. The Central Earth
Tribes have chosen not to encounter the People of the Lost Cities until a future age, when the
widening of their world dimension would be more acceptable to the inhabitants of these solitary
dominions.
In order to understand how the Central Earth interacts with us, we need to draw our attention to
the core of the planet and move upward from that center through the layers of matter, space and
consciousness to the surface of the globe. Within the very center of the sphere there is a brilliant
mass of atomic particles known as the Central Sun, the "Atoma". Much smaller in dimension
than our Solar Sun, it differs also in its atomic reaction. While the solar orb is without
atmosphere, suspended in airless space, the Central Atoma is within a field of density at the very
heart of a matter-sphere. This causes a compression within the chain reaction of colliding
particles of the small sun. The whole process of hydrogen changing into helium occurring in the
Solar Sun is followed at a much slower and less violent pace within the Atoma. The strong
magnetic field of its placenta, the earthen ball surrounding it, makes a complete chain reaction
within the Central Sun impossible. Therefore, it is in a constant process of folding inward, much
like the first stages of black hole formation. But the yin and yang balance of the earth's magnetic
field does not allow for this process to complete itself, and so the Atoma enfolds itself to the
point of the "inward falling," that stage in which a plunge in density seeks the center of itself
continually, creating a black hole. As the magnetic flux of the Central Sun approaches the
inward falling, the opposite current carries it back to its beginning cycle. The sun of the Central
Earth is thus suspended between the two extremes of violent chain reaction and inward volution
into the black hole vortex. The Atoma appears to be a dense brilliant cloud, the photosphere
(disc portion) being much smaller in comparison to its whole body than the proportion of the
photosphere of the Solar Sun to its whole body. The mass of the Atoma is less dense than the
solar orb, but more stable because of the controlling earth gravities about it which the space sun
lacks. The Atoma is surrounded by space, however. It is suspended in the central space of the
planet, but this space is an atmosphere and not a vacuum. In many ways the Central Sun acts in
reverse to its solar brother. The atmosphere becomes more dense as the Atoma is approached.
Within a few miles of the Corona the atmosphere is so heavy that a thick hydrogen vapor is
present, which bursts into illumination. As the Earth rotates on its axis, variations occur in the
density of this vapor or Helia, causing different intensities of light. These changes in the Helia
are most prominent at the apex of a ten hour cycle during our seasonal period of July through
January and a twelve hour cycle from our February through June. While there is a gradual
altering of the light produced from the Atoma during the day, or the ten to twelve hours, the
twilight comes much faster than does ours and with greater kaleidoscopic splendor. It lasts for
five hours after the ten hour cycle and three hours after the twelve hour cycle. After twilight, or
"Muiria," comes the beginning of another day's cycle. No God of the Night places its dark cloak
over the Subterranean World.
The atmosphere of the Central Earth is stable with little variation in climate. However, there are
violent storm areas in which great magnetic storms fester above vortexes in the Earth. Near
these vortexes, climatic extremes are often found, either intensely cold ice regions or arid
deserts. The magnetic trauma of the area either blocks the warming rays of the Atoma or
intensifies them, depending upon the polarity and flux of current. Yet the inner lands and seas
are, in the majority, a paradise sought, temperatures fluctuating between 70 and 80 degrees. No
noticeable variation in climate occurs in any region as the Solar Sun draws nearer or recedes
from the planet. The center is insulated from the effects of surface warmth and cold. Only the
magnetic pull of the Solar Sun is felt. Since the Atoma is stationary in its inner space, seasonal
change is not present. There are climatic changes caused by the magnetic variations of the
planet, and the Solar Sun does effect these variations, but by the time the magnetic emanations of
the sun interact with all of the other layers of the Earth, the effect on the climate of Subterranea
is weakened.
Beyond the central cavity, as we progress upward toward the surface domain, there are the many
caverns both natural and man-made, until we arrive at the Levan, the "Skull Plate." This is a
solid rock layer separating the upper sphere and the lower sphere. As geologic "kingdom" the
upper sphere is "Attica” and the lower sphere is "Ison." Through the rock layer, or Levan, are
natural fissures at certain junctions where the several parts of the giant plate meet. The inner
region of Ison is much more honeycombed than Attica, these natural pockets and tunnels
descending or ascending, depending upon the perspective, to the solid rock. In many instances
there is a thin atmosphere within these pockets pressing against the "Skull." On the other side of
the rock plate, however, there are massive build-ups of hot gases and liquid lava set between
rock walls, these rock partitions being extensions of the Levan and the cataract walls, or solid
rock portions, up into the cooler honeycomb strata and openings upon the surface Earth.
Because of the variant pressures of the inner atmosphere which, in some form, descends to the
Skull Plate and the Earth pressures beyond the Plate, the two Earth spheres maintain their
separate pressures despite these connecting tunnels. In fact, without these tunnels the variance in
pressure would explode the planet as rotational and solar changes occurred. Although the two
different pressures are held, there is an exchange of energy current and subtle variations in
pressures are found between the two realms which forms a major part of the breathing process of
the planet. On both sides of the "great wall" of Levan, pockets can be found containing caverns
of crystal created through the extreme pressures near the rock wall which is caused from the
weight of both spheres as they press down in a worm-like undulation upon the plate. The Skull
Plate is actually several plates divided by the fissure lines, moving against each other. All of this
tremendous action created fantastic micro-worlds of crystal in every conceivable color and
shade, rich in minerals. Some form diamonds, emeralds, and many other precious crystals not
known to surface human's greed. Other crystal sites are as soft as sugar candy, yet so rich in
minerals that they are taken internally by the Subterranean People. On the Ison side of the wall
are frozen channels of hydrogen which cause tremendously cold temperatures in relatively small
areas. Because of the nature of these cold zones (which is too scientifically complicated to
explain here) they are surrounded with high magnetic fields. The cold zones begin at frozen
fissures and move upward on the Ison side to the Subterranean surface. Within a few yards of
the magnetic barrier encompassing the cold zone, the temperatures can become sub-tropical.
Beneath the surface of Ison, within these frozen areas, there are the rare ice caves with both
white and colored ice and frost. The greatest of these is Zubora with approximately three square
miles of underground interconnecting caverns.
While there are many small tunnels, naturally formed, that trace through the fissures of the Skull
Plate between the lava and gases of the upper-sphere and open to the surface, the majority of
these, unless artificially enhanced, are not practical entrances to Subterranea. The pressure
changes are too extreme for the descending of the human body into its depths, and such tunnels
are usually too small to enter. Most of them, while breaking to the surface, are located in deep
caves for the openings are blocked by eons of erosion and rock slides. Most of these passages do
not remain open continuously from one end to the other. As the Earth moves, they are blocked
and re-opened again and again. Those which are artificially enhanced by the Subterraneans are
also hidden and protected from intrusion. There are four massive natural openings into the
Central Earth. These are known to the Sky-Earth Tribes as the Northern, Southern, Eastern, and
Western Doors. The Northern and Southern Doors are the natural openings at the poles of the
planet. These opulent shaped space areas ARE the magnetic polar vortexes of Earth. Because of
the type of magnetic pulse in these regions, it is difficult for a traveler to wander into the
openings. The magnetic field interacts within the individual's brain pulse, impressing an illusion
upon the magnetic and physical systems that a straight course exists where actually there is a
curve in space. Despite this natural protective field, there are surface dwellers who have
wandered into the polar opulence. For those who know the mechanics of spectral-polar
magnetism, as do the inhabitants of the Interior World, traveling through the magnetic veils is a
simple process. The Eastern and Western Doors are located in the Himalayas and beneath the
Titicaca Plateau of the Andes in Brazil, respectively. While these were originally large,
naturally hollowed passages, they have been maintained and enhanced through the centuries.
There is a fifth natural passage, known as the "Sacred Knot" or "The Navel," where the merging
energies from the Four Doors passes through. The tunnel is located in the Four Corners region
of the Southwestern United States. This natural passage, also enhanced, has a fascinating history
which will be revealed in future issues of "THE SOURCE." There are other natural, smaller,
closed passages which are artificially maintained and large enough for human passage. Some of
the more prominent of these are: Mount Shasta in Northern California, Mt. Teton in Wyoming,
Mt. Hood in Washington State, Mt. Robson in British Columbia, and the still active volcano of
Mauna Loa on the Island of Hawaii. Many of these natural tunnels, which are large and stable
enough for human entrance, are the remains of volcanic shafts. Because of the change in
pressure and the possibility of blocked passage at any time, only those passages which are
enhanced and maintained by the Central Earth races are safe for entrance, yet these secret roads
to the interior of our world are well guarded and protected from foreign intrusion.
The People of the Ark have ascribed their lives to the flow of nature. Their birth, marriage and
death cycles are harmonized to these natural pulses. There is no genetic manipulation among the
Tribes. The advancement of genetic stability is achieved through spiritual understanding and the
synchronizing of the human experience with the resonating Earth and its Nature Kingdom.
While perfection does not reign anywhere on or in our planet, the Cultures of our ancestors who
now abide beneath our land and seas have maintained the concordance of Spirit and Natural
Order bestowed upon them by the Ancient Ones. We were also given this Heritage, but failed to
keep the flame.
"Worlds within worlds within worlds... the mind reels but the heart beats in a sympathetic
cadence, for infinity is the child of endless harmony."
From "Exesusteas" - Subterranean Script
***
Through "THE SOURCE" seekers will be enlightened, not only to the ancient knowledge in the
keeping of the Central Earth Tribes, but to the application of spiritual harmony and the
advancement within their own lives. The quarterly publication of "THE SOURCE" is released
by The Rainbow Earth Dwelling Society (TREDS) founded by Christine Hayes as so directed
through the Unaminity Pact Among Equilibrant Worlds.
**
DEFINITIONS OF WORDS IN THE "HERITAGE CODEX" ISSUE OF “THE SOURCE”
Ultra-Terrestrials ... Spiritually advanced universal humanity who are capable of dimensional
travel and experience... Human-type sentient beings from other world spheres whose molecular
structure is attuned to a higher frequency than is our own, yet who are related to Earth's
humanity.
Inner-Terrestrials ... Spiritually advanced humanity directly related to us through common
ancestry who dwell within the interior of the Earth... Their molecular oscillation is attuned to a
higher frequency than is our own.
Mind Records. Magnetic ingrams of thought consciousness pulsing about this planet (or any
sentient sphere) which contain wave lengths decipherable to the human brain/mind complex...
The entire knowledge frame of Earth is contained within this library of memory.
Horizon Emancipators ... A symbolic term used by the Central Earth Tribes to describe those
personages, of whatever grand or humble origin, who eternally seek knowledge for the purpose
of liberating the world from ignorance and sustaining the truth for a future reality... this is a
selfless quest for all unimanity.
High Council of the Inner and Ultra Terrestrial Hierarchy ... All the Sacred Offices or Seats of
Justice of the more advanced Unimanity presiding over the lesser spheres as beneficent council
and service to all who follow the path of Divine Order.
Place of Emergence... There are several "Places of Emergence" upon the Earth. These are
passages from the interior of the planet to the surface habitat, through which Migrational
ascensions and de-ascensions of humanity have taken place in ancient times.
Elektic Center of the Americas ... Where the geo-cosmic energies of the Earth merge with the
human energies and are pulled outward across the land from that acu-point.
Heritage of One ... All members of the Central Earth Tribes... In a broader sense this term is
occasionally used to encompass all of the Earth's humanity through the perspective that the
Surface Dwellers are from the same direct ancestry as are the People of the Inner Domain. In
usual terminology, however, it is the nomenclature assigned as title of the Central Earth Tribes.
Equilibrant Worlds ... All worlds related through the same creative cycle that formed both the
spiritual and physical Earth.
...
Culture-Rama A triune of complexes put into operation in 1980 by the People of the Central
Earth for research of the differences in Inner and Outer Earth habitats through the developing
research project of NOAH... Also, to provide an orientation center for mainly Inner Earth
dwellers to become familiar with the conditions of the Outer Domain... Through "THE
SOURCE" and other avenues, surface humanity will be given specific Central Earth orientation.
These complexes are located on three separate levels, from the Central Cavity of the Earth to
directly beneath the Grand Canyon.
People of the Ark ... Surviving People ... Ayria ... All names for the People of the Central Earth
Tribes as a whole.
Great Family Order ... Grand Totem ... The interconnecting family tree of the Central Earth
Tribes... The order and planning of the genetic pairings which instigated and maintains a genetic
balance among Tribes.
Sky-Earth Tribes ... Central Earth Tribes as divided into Sky Tribes and Earth Tribes.
Spirit-Life Medicine Wheel ... Sacred symbol encompassing the principle of the Spirit-Life
cycle, which is exemplified as the Equal Rights of the People to Life, Liberty and Spiritual
Inheritance.
Spiritual Inheritance ….. The accumulating spiritual power of the People built through generations
of inheritance left them from the Spirit-Life of their ancestors.
Great Thirteen Point Family ... Wind Pipe ….. Camulet ….. Grandfather Family ... A family of the
People who genetically and spiritually represent the Spiritual Inheritance of all the Tribes... A
group of Central Earth humanity which is set apart as being the sublime culmination of all
others.
Congress of the Heritage of One ... Central Earth Congress ... An assembly composed of
members of the Great Thirteen Point Family which genetically and spiritually represents the
whole of the twelve Central Earth Tribes... The highest governmental power of Subterranea.
Heremeneutical Council ... Composed of representatives for the “Twelve Tribes of Man"... A
Council which relegates services of many offices toward the spiritualization of Earth Man.
Tribes of Man ... This title encompasses not only the twelve Sky-Earth Tribes, but some of the
close relations on other Equilibrant Worlds as well. The number remains twelve as the Ultra-
Terrestrials involved are grouped within the Sky-Earth count to form the "Tribes of Man."
Exo-Cultures... Cultures which were brought directly from other worlds into the Central Earth
and have never surfaced since that ancient entrance... existing outside the Tribal framework, yet
equal under the Law of One.
Law of One ... The Divine Plan of Order by which all lesser laws are established.
Great Medicine Societies ... Inner-Tribal Societies through which initiates learn the Secret
Principles of Nature, and gain the abilities of communing and harmonizing with the Nature
Spirits or "Devas"... Healing power is registered, received and released.
Illuminaries ... Subterraneans more advanced than the average who are able to manifest any
spiritualized form at will... spiritual Masters in highly atomically accelerated bodies capable of
many multi-dimensional feats.
Order of the Master Builders ... Most ancient of architectural Orders.
Illumined ... Greatest and most ancient of esoteric Holy Orders of the Earth from which all other
Spiritual Orders arose... The inertia of all spiritualized esoterica.
College of the Illumined ... A condition of spirit and mind visited upon the initiate by the
Illuminaries of the Illumined as a cloak of protection and guidance.
Circle of the Rainbow ... A preparatory education assembly for youths to ready them for entrance
into their first Society.
Starcrafters ….. Subterranean builders of limited space craft.
Starcraft Legion ... A surveillance system and input-output assembly for geological and
atmospheric study of both inner space and the immediate space surrounding the planet Earth...
Also a defense force used solely for self-protection through camouflage, deterrents and stunning
rays.
People of the Tortoise Shell ... Surface Earth inhabitants.
Court of Inquisition (First Court) ... Court of Restitution (Second Court) ... Courts of Justice
within the Central Earth Tribes.
Justice Ministers ... Court appointed representatives of the Tribes assigned to rule on cases of
personages within their Tribes.
Rue... A group of personages to which a Justice Minister is responsible... The Justice Minister
must familiarize himself with the background of each individual within his "Rue," so that in the
event they are brought before the Court as defendant or plaintiff, he will be knowledgeable of
them in his ruling.
Supreme Minister ... A member of the Great Thirteen Point Family appointed to office by the
Congress of One to serve as absolute judge in the Second Court.
Common Assembly ... Where the Tribes convene at appointed times with the Central Earth
Congress as a course in governmental decision making.
Atoma. Central Sun of the Planet.
Helia ... Thick hydrogen vapor surrounding the Central Earth Sun.
Muiria... Twilight in the Central Earth ... where the Sun is stationary and never sets. Twilight is
brought about through the cyclic pull of vaporous clouds toward the Central Sun and then
dispersed from it, causing a twilight condition to replace night every ten to twelve hours.
Levan ….. Skull Plate ... Tectonic plates forming a skull dividing the Central Earth cavity from the
upper portion of the Earth sphere.
Attica ... Ison ... The upper world above the Skull Plate and the lower world below the Skull
Plate, respectively.
Neuro-Cataracts ... Massive build-ups of hot gases and liquid lava set between rock partition
extensions of the Skull Plate.
Northern, Southern, Eastern & Western Doors ... North and South are the natural polar
openings... East and West are large natural openings in Himalaya and beneath Titicaca Plateau
in the Andes, respectively.
Spectral-Polar Magnetism ... Magnetic vortexes of both poles which cause illusionary spatial
properties.
Sacred Knot ... The Navel ... Where the energies of the Four Doors pass through, converging
properties in transit ... located at the Four Corners of the Southwestern United States.
Unimanity Pact Among Equilibrant Worlds ... All Ultra and Inner Terrestrials who are dedicated
to the spiritualization of Earth humanity through holistic balance of mind, body and spirit.
BRUCE WALTON

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 2-80
copyright © 1980 L.Christine Hayes
"All the ends of the world shall remember and turn unto the Lord; and all the kindred of the
nations shall worship before thee."
"A seed shall serve him; it shall be accounted to the Lord for a generation. They shall come, and
shall declare his righteousness unto a people that shall be born that he hath done this." ...Psalms
27, 30 and 31.
*****
This, the second issue of "The Source," is being released from the Rainbow Earth Dwelling
Society's new location of the "Sacred Four Corners," providing a veritable gold mine of telluric
and cosmic forces in the natural homogeny of Earth and Sky. In Issue Number Three we will be
exploring the esoteric and geo-cosmic manifests of the region and its synthesis with the present
and future projection of The Rainbow Earth Dwelling Society.
The issues of "The Source" are in the form of initiatory knowledge lessons, and therefore each
subscriber will receive them in the order of first to most recent issue, regardless of when they
subscribe.
*****
To the Inner World inhabitants the Earth is a living manifest of Spirit. It is rationale mutable,
conceived by the Immutable One of Divine Register.
"That which cannot be separated is all places at once"... it is written in the Narabu, text of the
birth of the first Heaven from the Indivisible Solic. The Solic, or Immutable One, "births"
archetypes of mutable, morphic form.
Earth archetypes are energy consciousness created by continuous groupings of mind illumination
through the ages, focused on a specific set of archetypical principles. The arcane principles
directing the cosmic and nature archetypes have long been lost from the surface temples, yet they
are known and revered by brethren of the Inner Domain.
The three Crown Archetypes of Nature are Isis, Serapis and Orpheus. These three form the
Triune for the planetary mutability of Earth. All other Earth archetypes interrelate through these.
Most archetypes of this sphere were originally begun through a living experience. There was,
for instance, a living man, Serapis, whose life design became so interpolated with the principles
of mind governing Earth, that a consequent archetypical crystal of consciousness was built upon
the single altar stone of his life. This same soul which began the Serapis morphia was also
incarnate as the great Thoth Hermes Trismesgistus, who in turn initiated the Hermetic archetype.
Thus the Hermetic archetype is a transmutation of the Serapis in that the alchemical Hermes is a
"mutable" of Serapis. Serapis governs the law of division from immutable to mutable, from non-
polar to polarized, from nutronic to electronic-protonic. Hermes is the archetype of purification
through transmutation. In order that an element be transmuted, it must change form through
division and reunion. The Serapis and Hermetic archetypes are then "mutables" or symbiotic
designs of law.
Into the lap of the Serapis archetype falls the order and principle of human/earth relationships
and symbiotic "virtues." Within this perspective, virtues are the good of elementation, the
progressive stimulus of the Four Primaries: earth, fire, water and air, toward the non-elemented
being as opposed to the discord or breakdown of progressive pattern. The latter is an entropy of
retrograde configuration, altering the pure form.
"So as a seed is taken to the bosom of Isis, a flower rises in the heart of purified man." ...from
Isis Nostra. "Purified man" is that essence dormant in every human to rise above disorder and
become, in every sense, virtuous. To achieve this sublime resistance to distraction from pure
form, earth man must submit to natural order and align his bio-system to the sensor field of his
birth planet, Earth.
The center of the planet is the most sacred portion of the sphere. It is recognized by its
inhabitants as the "Mater-Womb," in which matter is justified to the persona of spirit. The
properties of Earth undergo purification in a re-birth through the cyclic action of the Central
Atoma. The veneration of the Earth Atoma as a sepulcher of Holy Spirit is evidenced in the
following testament:
Morning Star
"From the sepulcher of foremost brilliance the Morning Star doth enjoin the sky. It flares the
Eternal Day for all time. Forever wakeful, it passeth the temptations of sleep among the
coverlets of cloud and mist. We, of the haven deep in the dark earth, seek our light in thee, our
Morning star, whose spirit doth not depart from us at eventide. Ye art the Guardian of the Realm
of our Coventry until the day of our ascension into the world of endless sky.
"Every fold of the hallowed earth doth quake in the flood tides of thy eminent presence as ye
penetrate the internal ethers and generate life to stir the womb. Ye bring forth living constitution
from stone. Seed is blossomed in the fullness of chambered beams which spiral down from thy
body and shimmer upon the face of the sea, biding life to resurrect from memory and cling to the
staff. Everything that has perished in the days before shall rise again at thy summoning. Lo, we
of the Hidden World, await thy command to came forth from the depths and to mount to the
stars.
"Morning Star, thy sign is in our heaven. It is thy mark upon the foreheads of the Lost Children
who have not forgotten. May we know thee in thy Place once again and forevermore until thy
resolve has struck the close of time."
*******
The testament to the "Morning Star" is from the Sacred Text "Rasha," which means "Light
Dream." Dreams are held as sacred instruction by the Central Earth Tribes. Their sleep is not
plagued with the karmic densities and stress factors of everyday living as are their surface
companions in space. Thus they are freed in consciousness to receive Angelic direction through
true "Spirit-Dreams," with greater frequency and purity. The Morning Star referred to in this
testament is two-fold. It appears to be a description of the Central Sun, but evolves into a
recognition of the "Christ," which to the Sky-Earth Tribes is a divine emanation of the Great
Source permeating from the whole of the Earth and Centered in mind within the "Cosmorphia"
or Nature Image of the Central Sun.
Through the initiations of Serapis, Central Earth initiates are entreated to harmonize their body
chakras (energy nodes) with the correlative chakral functions of the internal Earth. The
correlative nodes are as follows:
Body Chakras
Heart - Most Divine and closest to spiritual attunement.
Solar Plexus - Most powerful.
Forehead (Third Eye) - Greatest cosmic and far reaching.
Between Navel and Pelvis - Most in tune with body's health.
Center of Palms - Most directive in channeling energies in outward projection as a healing beam
(for others) or protective shield.
Center of Arches in Feet - Supply channel for the inward current of energies for body
purification as a whole.
Throat - Greatest karmic knot. Often excess energies and tension of both karmic and non-karmic
origin build up here first. Release can be achieved best through this chakra first.
Top of Head - Channel to other dimensions of self, where the chain in consciousness is linked.
Second God-based next to heart.
Base of Spine - Generative energies.
Earth Chakras (Major)
Heart Central Sun
-
Solar Plexus - Atmosphere of Inner Earth
Forehead (Third Eye) - Core Magnetism
Between Navel and Pelvis - Inner Surface
Center of Palms - Northern Polar Vortex
Center of Arches in Feet - Southern Polar Vortex
Throat The Great Natural Tunnels from Subterranea to the Surface Earth
Top of Head - Central Mountain of Subterranea
Base of Spine - Energies between poles (spinal current)
The Serapis (double) helix or dual spiral is the register of energies along the spine (dually
functioning in both bio- and geo-systems, i.e. the spine of man and the spine of Earth, between
the two poles.) It is not merely the Kundalini force emitted from the base of the spine, but the
sum of all chakra focus and balance in the body. The initiates of Serapis are taught that the
Kundalini is an effort of the body (man's and earth's) to override the retrograde of disorder;
whereas the Serapis helix, or "Serapis-Atma," is the maintenance of the balanced field of gravity.
In this light, Kundalini is "becoming," while Serapis-Atma has "become"... distribution of mass
is equal to distribution of energy, creating harmony.
In the initiation of Serapis, initiates visualize the Atma, the helix of protonic (blue) and
electronic (red) spirals turning about the "silver cord," the nutronic (silver-white) Spirit Life
which is the reconciler of above with below (Hermetic principle). They then visualize the
electronic current carrying their body's force toward the Central Atoma. The protonic cord
transmits the earth force, upward, toward the body. Together they are being justified to the other
through the silver cord of the neutron ray. The student synchronized one chakra at a time with
the corresponding chakral earth energy field. As an example: focus a beam of light form the
heart chakra down the electronic cord of the Serapis helix. As the heart energy descends, so the
corresponding energy of the Central Sun is to be visualized as ascending the protonic cord of the
helix. When the two energies reach midpoint of the Atma, they are to be mentally frozen,
allowing the nutronic balance within the silver cord to reconcile the two opposite energy rays
(human/earth), engendering a greater refinement in the qualities of both (electronic and protonic)
fields. A sensitive initiate "feels” the right moment to release this bonding and allow the retreat
of the forces back into their respective houses (i.e. the heart and the Central Sun). The upper
never descends, then, completely into the lower nor does the lower rise completely into the
upper, but rather the two find a reconciliation of ascent-descent at mid-point, where that which
contains the germ of both focuses (nutronic) advances the symbiosis to a state of purification.
The mid-point is actually dual in itself, as it is registered on both sides of the Atoma, between the
Central Sun and the North Pole and between the Central Sun and the South Pole.
This is but the first stage in the exchange generation of the Serapis-Atma. The succeeding stages
are given only to those who have mastered the first.
The Order of the Waking Grace
The Order of the Waking Grace is a cloister of Subterranea within the Central Earth cavity. The
Order's origins lie in England, being founded in the Court of King Arthur, the true King of the
Round Table, whose rich history has been laid waste to a mythological accounting only. During
the reign of this most unique King, the Order of the Waking Grace was composed of the wives of
the Knights. It was kept secret from their husbands in fear that they, in their stern chivalry,
would forbid it. The principles of the Order were wreathed in symbolism and spiritual goals. In
their possession was an ancient text which guided them in communications with highly spiritual
entities. After the dissolution of King Arthur's Court, through the conquering armies of an
enemy alignment, the Sacred female order was taken literally "underground." Through their
sacred knowledge of communications, these women were allowed sanctuary within the Central
Earth. However, this came about through a long process of acceptance, which in itself would
take a book to detail. They were first allowed only in the upper caverns, then in the middle
catacombs, until finally they found their home with the Stellar-Earth Cultures in the central
cavity. Now they serve many young of Subterranea. They offer a haven for the seeking of their
personal grace for periods of time in cloistered solitude. The Order has come to resemble a
convent in which there are two sects involved. There are the continually cloistered "Madonnas,"
who never leave the convent, and the Mary Rose, the young women who come to the sanctuary
for twenty-six days once a year until they reach mid-age. (Note: it is difficult, if not impossible,
to give the ages of Subterraneans as they live in a regenerative cycle which ages them at a much
slower rate. When they reach what would appear to us as an age of approximately forty, they do
not mature further. After a period of time which varies greatly, depending upon their personal
karma and life mission, they "transcend." They do not die of old age and seldom are of ill
health. The most frequent cause of death is accident, although this is also rare.) The women
received as Mary Roses are mainly descendants from the British Isles cultures. Their reasons for
going to these retreats are not wholly self-serving. They accomplish much for both inner and
outer humanities. They execute energy functions which could be interpreted as "ultra-prayer."
They attend the people in various services of humane conduct, and foster, teach and guide young
children. They are also invaluable in aiding the select surface dwellers who have been allowed a
new life within the center world, in their adjustment to their new habitat.
The appearance of the Madonna are truly Madonna-like in beauty. There are only five to seven
of them and there is only one convent within the Order. The Madonna wears a white robe,
loosely bound at the waist by a white cloth band with gold embroidery in an ivy pattern. Her
head scarf is long, much in the fashion of a nun. It is also white with the golden embroidery
about the hem in a wide band. Worn about the forehead in the manner of a crown (much like
that of a sheik) is a rolled white cloth. However, it seems to be a part of the entire head scarf and
not a separate piece of material. About the neck is suspended a strand of pearls similar to a
rosary design. The cross is a complicated form with which I am not familiar. The Mary Rose is
attired also in white robe of similar style, but with a narrow light blue sash at the waist, and a
blue head scarf. Both the sash and the scarf have the ivy pattern embroidered in a darker blue
and in a much narrower band. They do not bear the rolled cloth about the forehead.
The sanctuary, Camellia, is situated in the Mar Mountains, a range of mountains that cascade
down to the edge of the sea. The Camellian Gardens are known as one of the most beautiful in
the Subterranean lands, containing over one thousand varieties of flowering plants in beautiful
landscaping. It is the smallest of the Grand Gardens of Subterranea, but is imbued with a natural
grace and ethereal presence that entrances the senses. Even the largest of the Grand Gardens,
the Gardens of Sheba, which are several gardens divided by spokes on a giant turning wheel,
causing the gardens to rotate slowly, do not overcome the Camellian Garden. It is a rare gift of
love. The landscaping is such that each tree, flower and bush is symbolically placed. An
example is the crucifix tree with a species of small red roses on a vine, called "trine flowers,"
trailing about the tree, winding up into its branches. These small roses represent the blood of
Christ.
In the world of the inner domain there are many cultures existing in harmony, sharing the
richness of their beliefs and ceremonies, yet never losing their separate identities.
*****
Quoting from Max Heindel in the Rosicrucian Conception:
"Even among occult scientists it is counted among the most difficult problems to investigate the
mysterious constitution of the earth. Every occult scientist knows how much easier it is to
thoroughly investigate the Desire World and the Region of Concrete Thought and bring back the
results into the Physical World than to investigate completely the secrets of our physical planet,
because to do that fully one must have passed through the nine lesser Mysteries and the first of
the Greater Initiations."
