# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 3-80
copyright © 1980 L.Christine Hayes
The Hopi Indians say: "And in the whole world, only FOUR CORNERS will be sanctuary, for it
is to this place that all good people will come when the day of Purification arrives."
I.
For centuries the First Americans have held to their belief that the region of North America, now
known as Four Corners (where the four corner boundaries of the states of Utah, Colorado,
Arizona and New Mexico meet), is the sacred ground so dedicated by the Great White Messiah
who came into their midst in the Ancient Days and promised them that he would once again
return. From an objective geo-cosmic perspective, Four Corners is not the only such energized
landmark on the Earth or indeed within the North American continent, but its position and
spiritual cosmic purpose is unique in that it forms the Sacred Knot of Purification and
rectification for the energies of the two most luminous areas of the surface world, the Antiplano
of Peru and Bolivia, where the placid lake of Titicaca reclines high above the mountains of
South America, and the great Tibetan Plateau where Priest-Llamas live still, in the ashrams of
Hidden Sanctuary.
In the Four Corners region, known to the Inner Earth inhabitants as the Medicine Wheel, are two
main energy fields working in such balanced harmony that they act almost as one. The most
ancient of these is the before mentioned Sacred Knot, which is a centralizing vortex acting as a
magnet in its ability to rectify and balance the energies attracted to it. The second field is
actually more a property of the first than a field unto itself. This is the "elektic center," a
relatively new formation or power caused by the changing geo-cosmic fields of the planet. The
elektic current is a combined force of sentient thought, stellar emanations striking the earth and
inner stresses and telluric movements of this planet. These energies come together and are
drawn to an equalizing center of least resistance. At this time, the Sacred Knot has become this
center. It has been the elektic center for perhaps no more than one hundred years and will be for
several more centuries at least. The original plateau of the Four Corners was extensive and
reached a great height. The main remaining pinnacle of the "Great Golden Table" is the Mesa
Verde Plateau, titled by the Central Earth Tribes as "The Emerald Table." The irradiation of this
plateau extends farther than does the actual Table, tracing the old strata of the Great Golden
Plateau, including all of the Medicine Wheel with the Emerald Table being the amplifier of the
total mechanism.
The three plateaus serve the earth's harmonic resonance like vast vibrating discs, sending,
receiving, and maintaining earth energy. The Tibetan Plateau is the ascending, focusing upon
the earth's central sun, Atoma, up through the vibra-plane of that plateau and uniting frequencies
with crucial stellar balance points. The Titicaca Plateau registers as the descending plateau,
gathering currents from the outer ethers and transferring them into the central earth cavity, which
are received by the earth Atoma. The Plateau of the Green Table (Mesa Verde) is the table of
balance, maintaining charge equalization between the two and thus possessing the qualities of
both (in a less intense form) as both systems pass through the Sacred Knot, the elektic center of
the Americas. The Medicine Wheel of Four Corners is formed of two distinctive halves. There
is the core center and the revolution field surrounding the central core. They both fluctuate
horizontally (across the land) and vertically (into the earth), but the core's degree of fluctuation is
much less than the revolution field's amplitude. These fluctuations, as with most geo-conditions,
are largely influenced by stellar/solar/inter-planetary motion. When sentient thought interrelates
with these three influences, elektic current is formed. The core oscillates between poles, these
being the center of the core and the central earth sun. The revolution field oscillates around the
core in revolutions and carries no polarization of its own, but is dependent upon the Sacred Knot
core's polarization state (between the core of the Knot and the central sun Atoma).
On the subliminal atomic plane, the ASC-PL (ascending plateau) is in protonic motion (blue ray)
sensitive to the supermonic (ultra-frequency) pulses of the brain chakra bio-system; the DES-PL
(descending plateau) is in electronic motion (red ray) sensitive to the submonic (infra-frequency)
pulses of the brain chakra bio-system; and the TRANSM-PL (transmedium plateau - Emerald
Table) is in neutronic motion (white ray) sensitive to both supermonic and submonic pulses.
All manner of habitation within and upon the earth sphere exists through the interpenetrating of
spirit and matter. Thus, as the solar wind of the earth Atoma moves through the vibra-plane, via
the surface earth chakras, both major and minor, it must pass through a receiving station within
the central habitation, and this station is the Sacred Center of all earthen matter, the great
mountain of the SAF-FIRE, which could be analogous to the aorta of the heart (Atoma). All of
the sacred lands of the earth (especially the high plateaus and mountains) are channeled through
the Subterranean Mountain of the SAF-FIRE. It is within this holy mountain that all earth's
nature forces are united with Spirit.
II.
After the collapse of the original Great Golden Table in North America, two stages of that Table
remained, the Colorado Plateau and, atop this, the Mesa Verde Plateau. There are, of course,
other precipices on the Colorado Plateau which are remnants of the original, but only the Mesa
Verde is still active through its grounding with the Colorado Plateau. This latter plateau is
roughly circular and approximately 350 miles wide. Ringed by volcanic mountains, it
experiences a very high concentration of lightning activity, and consequently a high degree of
negative ion charge, which is essential for biological vitality through ionic energizing. This
potency is increased by the vast subterranean water sources and the large amounts of sunshine.
It is a region of "Sacred Breathing Mountains" which contain tunnels that, like lungs, intake the
underground waters and again release them in continuous cycles. The positive ion count of the
dry desert air is reversed as it rushes into the cool cavern system and is turbulently blended with
the foaming underground stream to obtain healing negative ions. Then the air surges to the
surface, vitalizing all life.
There is a solar magnetic shell and a lunar magnetic shell enveloping the entire planet. These
shells remain in place as the earth rotates underneath. At 110 kilometers above the earth lies the
lunar magnetic shell. There are four fields in the four quadrants of the Northern Hemisphere.
Within one quadrant a lunar magnetic current flows in a clockwise direction while in the
neighboring quadrant there is a counterclockwise flow. The clockwise direction yields a positive
overall charge of energy while the counterclockwise motion yields a negative overall charge.
Similarly, there is a solar magnetic shell at 120 kilometers which houses two magnetic current
fields. Again, one flows in a clockwise direction while the other follows a counterclockwise
direction. The center of each current, solar or lunar, positive or negative, is termed the Focus
and is the stillest area of current. It has a diameter of, practically speaking, 350 miles which is
the same as the Colorado Plateau passing underneath. The diametrical distance defines a band of
influence between 20 and 40 longitude on the Northern Hemisphere which bio-electric life
experience is unique in several ways, one of which is the highest concentration of summertime
lightning activity. At certain times of the year, as the Four Corners passes under the Focus of the
clockwise solar current, the ancient Tibet, which is opposite to it on the Northern Hemisphere, is
passing under the Focus of the counterclockwise solar current. Twelve hours later the
experience of the effects is reversed for the two land masses. While Four Corners passes slowly
under the Focus of a clockwise lunar current, Tibet is also experiencing a clockwise lunar
current. Simultaneously, Holy Jerusalem, the Pyramid of Giza, and the "Sacred Breathing
Mountains" of Hawaii are experiencing the Focus of the counterclockwise lunar currents. Six
hours later the lands have shifted approximately 90 degrees to the next set of lunar currents. As
with the Four Corners, which contains the largest concentration of Ancient American ruins,
ancient structures were erected upon a global grid synchronous with the earth nodes of energy
transformation. (Cosmo-geologic information in this section is in portion taken from reference
material by several contemporary parascience researchers.)
III.
Four Corners is called, by its native inhabitants, "The Heart of the Beast." Prophetically,
Highway 666 intersects this enigmatic territory. while this may seem like an ominous omen,
according to the first level interpretation of the scriptural "Beast" of Revelations, and the number
666 which is to be burned into the forehead of the unrighteous in the Last Days, esoterically,
there is a completely reversed intention within this Biblical code in the deeper layers of
translation. The "beast," in its undefiled state, is represented by the Lion, which is the power
within the Lamb or Christ made flesh. Six is an inverted nine, a number of Christed unity within
the elements. Inverted and tripled, it is a triune of spiritual replication or continuation through
atomic bonding... viability of Spirit through elemental engendering of consciousness. Only the
most righteous of humanity will be able to sustain the traumatic completion of such a
configuration when the inversion of cosmic law actually changes our dimensional reality to
reveal spirit in matter. The unseen will become the seen and human evaluation of reality will be
dramatically altered. In this revelatory age to come, those who are not prepared for the alternate
realities will become as "beasts," possessed of their own finiteness. So there is revealed a
distinct separation between the beast of the resolute consciousness in man, which through the
power of the spirit shall overcome the lesser world, and the Beast of the disintegration of matter,
the decay of moral aptitude which becomes violent in its death throes. In Corinne Helene's
"New Age Bible Interpretation, Old Testament, Volume II" she states: "The Master Jesus at the
age of thirty-three had recapitulated all of the 3X3=9 degrees of Mystic Masonry and had
followed the Path of Enoch which leads to the Center of the Earth and reveals the sacred powers
of the Ineffable Name. Both the Grand Masters Hiram Abiff and King Solomon, having
traversed this same path, were reborn to receive from Christ through the strong grip of the Lion's
paw, the first degree of the new Christian mysteries."
Through the arising of the spiritual Lion in man, the power of energy will no longer subscribe to
become the tool of the War of Worlds, but will be emancipated from gross manipulation and
ascend unto the regencies of Glory... the ultimate transmutation of the profane to the sacred.
IV.
Here, in the Four Corners, the ancient subterranean passage of several major Tribal Migrations to
the Central Earth is located. Still traversable, it is maintained and guarded by Inner-Terrestrials
with the additional service of some Ultra-Terrestrials. A subterranean complex called the
Solarterria has been built in stages through the centuries beneath the mountains, valleys, high
country and deserts of this contrasting region. Some of the structures are pre-deluge, others are
still under construction. Each compartment is relatively small (in comparison to the Culture-
Rama of the Grand Canyon), being more on a scale with the facilities beneath Mt. Shasta and the
Tetons. However, the Solarterria is stretched out over a greater territory than the other two. Its
purposes are many. It is not open to the public Subterraneans, as is the Culture-Rama, being
primarily a network of laboratories for geological, cosmic, biochemical and solar sun research
and progressive science application. The actual tunnel to the Central Cavity is under the
authority of the Chieftains of the Four Doors. These four inner-terrestrial beings are appointed
from the American Indian Central Earth Tribes, and are dutifully assigned as mediums between
the Nature Spirits of the Inner Earth and the outer domain, so as these communications affect the
land area of the Four Corners and its management of earth energies.
Those in this seat of power at this time are:
Path of the Light (Ejecswejeh)
True Elk (Psatwas)
Corn Husker (Mais Tac)
Bonnet of the Rainbow (Seche LaSentba)
Northern Door
Eastern Door
Western Door
Southern Door (female)
As trustees of Nature communion bands (actual color-sonic bands radiating about and through
the planet through which all nature communicates instantaneously) these Chieftains assume
much more than symbolic roles of guardianship. They are true esoteric scientists and spiritual
priests.
V.
As with all active energy nodes of the earth, the Four Corners is visited not only by the highly
spiritualized Ultra and Inner Terrestrials, but by those of other dimensions and worlds who are
not especially concerned with earth's spiritual progression, but are merely attracted to the vast
amounts of energy which can be tapped for their purposes. However, such energy concourses as
Four Corners, Shasta, etc., are also points for angelic penetration, where the Hierarchies strike
their golden rays against the earth and into the core of the planet. Spirals of angelic coils are
affixed to the earth through the Nature color-sonic bands which form prominence in these
especially charged regions. They are, therefore, sacred temples of earth wherein no evil may
truly trespass. Only contingent abstractions of darkness may be attracted as a moth to the flame,
so that certain negative activities will take place sporadically on the physical plane. Within the
strong current of the Light or the spiritual plane of such a region, these anomalies are not
present. So the seeker must be seeking the spiritual aspects when he enters the Sacred Earth
Temples, and not have his heart against the stone of material benefit.
VI.
In the Autumn Equinox, the Sacred Knot of the Four Corners will be at a peak emission, as the
Ascending and Descending Plateaus reverse their synchronous pattern and pass through opposite
shields within the Emerald Table. It is a time, then, to prayerfully concentrate one's energies into
the Sacred Knot to aid in the engendering of the full revolution of the Medicine Wheel so that
the Earth will be calibrated to the new cycle of etheric receptivity. This occurs with each
Autumn Equinox in preparation for the Winter Solstice within which the period of Grace or
Golden Mean is reached. Then, with the Spring Equinox, the new revolution of tectonic currents
are vibrated off the Plateau discs, this new revolution being heightened to its full amplitude with
the Summer Solstice. The approach of the Autumn signals again the current reversal for another
year. Inner Earth inhabitants ascribe to the Sacred Calendar of Tomes: which is inclusive of the
transition of the cycle within the Plateau resonances.
To quote once again from the New Age Bible Interpretation: “...the Autumn Equinox, when the
sun is crucified upon the cross of the celestial equator and the heartbeat of the Earth is stilled
momentarily as the Interior Light touches upon it."
Also revealed in the same text, is the ancient Oath of the Master-Builders: "We must not take
the work superficially, but dig to the center of the Earth, knock and seek."
Source8003.doc
In another passage from the New Age Bible Interpretation: "...by the way of the Path of
Initiation that leads to the center of the Earth and is most easily found at the time of the four
Sacred Seasons marked by the two equinoxes and the solstices."
VII.
The Central Earth Tribes see the particular Emergence Place of the Four Corners through
extremely symbolic vestments. To them, it is by no accident that the boundaries of four states
merge in this region. Like the surface ancients they believe the land is the most precious
substance of man other than his very soul. Both house the Spirit. Edifices such as temples and
dwellings are morphic extensions of the natural hearth... Earth. From the very cohesive nature of
the elements, the ensouled human is able to create design from fragmented experience, and mold
from the Earth likenesses of his own rapture with God. So long as man mirrors the Spirit of soul
he is in harmony with the Earth unto which he has cleaved. Once he removes himself from the
circle of the "Golden Hoop," the Spirit-Life Medicine Wheel upon which all uniformness is
aligned, and penetrates the conflagration of ego, he is consumed in a will separate from his First
Being, or "Mahathma," meaning "Coming out of the Earth, forever." While we would view the
Subterranean as locked away in the bowels of our planet, he recognizes himself as existing
within the "Light Womb" where there is never darkness, closer to the Divine throb of the Mother
Pulse. Thus, to "come out of the Earth" for him, is not to exit into our world but into his own,
from the depths of his parents' communion with the Earth, as a holistic whole. This then is
Mahathma, one of the first ideograms given the Inner World child, that he is bound to the Earth
in constant rebirth through the Earth. From Arizona Highways, 1980,: "To the Indian, time is a
circle. The past is not irrevocably past. It is eternally present. What the Indian calls beginning
time (or legend or sacred time) is not at the end of a long line stretching back into the past. It is
not linear at all. It folds back on itself. Further, chronological time, in the generalized view, is a
trap that results in loss of purity and potency. To get out of touch with beginning time is to
become ill or unbalanced in mind, body or spirit."
Much like the Indian Races remaining on the surface, the Tribes of the Interior know that
separation from the First Being, or Beginning Time, is the first step in the ultimate decay of
Spirit-Life structure of ensouled humanity. Because the Earth, then, is a sacred trust in their
hands as protectors and guardians of nature, the geomancy of the land and the buildings erected
thereon are a sacred science, designated in great reverence, tied with the silver cord of symbolic
recognition to the past... that burning light which guides them into the future, Mahathma... never
parted from them. The surveying of land, the implementing of measure in order to declare a
position of space within the mass-ness of the Universe, is a most Holy rod in the mind of the
Subterranean geomancer.
Returning to our point of demarcation concerning the boundary lines of the four states meeting at
Four Corners, since all events correspond, either obviously or hidden to the corporal reason, the
boundaries given within the United States of America are each bound symbolically to a point of
measure in the Beginning Time. The Four Corners carries the additional title of the "Four
Square Corner Stone." In gnostic writ the "Corner Stone" and its counterpart, the "Foundation
Stone" represent mass and space co-existing in perfect balance, establishing the First Being of
the total Temple... the prototype or point of judgment by which all else that follows is given its
dimension and mass. From the New Age Bible Interpretation, the Corner Stone of Solomon's
Temple is revealed as "...a double cube, with every side inscribed except the base on which it
stood. It is said that the first face of the cube was inscribed by Noah with an instrument of
porphyry when the Ark was being built, the second by Abraham with the horn of the ram which
was substituted for his son on Mt. Moriah, the third by Moses with a porphyry tool, the fourth by
Joshua, and the fifth by Hiram Abiff before it was deposited in its final bed at the northeast angle
of the Temple. Although this Corner Stone is not to be confused with the so-called Foundation
Stone concealed in the Holy of Holies of the Third Temple, yet its intrinsic meaning is the same.
It is the characteristic of esotericism that many different forms of an identical symbol are used to
denote one particular aspect of spiritual truth. Thus the Corner Stone of the Temple had the
same symbolic meaning as the Foundation Stone of the World." Of the Foundation Stone this
same text states: "The Foundation Stone which is one of the most important of all Masonic
symbols (without it no permanent Temple can be erected), is of equal importance as the
Foundation Stone in the building of the perfect body temple... This stone bore the form of a
double cube and engraved upon it was the Ineffable Name of God. This name became the Lost
Word of the people during the dark days of the Babylonian Captivity. To the people's
forgetfulness of this Stone and its sacred word was attributed the eventual demolition of the
Temple, the dispersion of the tribes, and at last the complete destruction of Jerusalem." The
Foundation or Corner Stone, then, is the anchor of humanity to the sphere of uniformity.
Without uniform flow, First Being becomes chaos. The Earth is our somewhat rounded
"Foundation Stone" in the Heavens. Without land, Emergence into organized Being cannot take
place in this dimension. The land upon which we forever return (via reincarnation, soul travel,
mental transcendence, etc.) is, in this spacial aptitude, our first and last prerequisite in our efforts
to trace the Golden Mean, like a slender thread, to the Source. The Earth is a living thing,
duplicating our spiritual needs, our physical chemicals and our mental patterns. This
imperturbable region known as Four Corners, a co-existing amalgamation of golden-red deserts
and cool green mountains, assumes its place as a responder to the vibrations of the parabolic coil
of time, and becomes a viable Corner Stone in man's retracing of the Lost Word, the act of
solvency through which he can denounce his static state of mind and soar through the ascending
scales of the Homeward Light Melody. "Free" comes from the Egyptian word "Phree," meaning
Light. To be truly free the inner light must be ignited through the initiate's contact with all
elementation which the souls created in the First Generation, and in sleep continue to create.
The sacred lands of this planet are a vital link to this procurement of freedom.
As the Foundation Stone is the building of the perfect temple body, so the vibrations of the Four
Square Corner Stone (Four Corners) is naturally charged with health-giving negative ions. This
area claims the highest live birth rate per thousand in the nation. Each sacred place upon and
within the natural Earth is circumscribed by invisible walls of sanctuary, and raised upon its soil,
suspended in the depths of memory consciousness, abides a great Temple of harmonic
proportions, aligned to the zenith of the mystic Foundation Stone, the Corner Stone of
Solomonic Quest, the anchor of our celestial ark through time. In truth, all the Earth is sacred,
both the pinnacles of heritage, which have been bequeathed us by the savants of gnostic virtue,
and the most mundane residences of the globe. So long as we strive to receive from our First
Beginning, we will not be lost from our future Birth.
VIII.
The meeting of Central Earth Tribe representatives known as the TAU Conference, which was
held on August 24, 1980, established a new precedent for the Twelve Tribes. Certain actions
will not be taken to aid the surface earth and establish viable channels for knowledge
dissemination as a result of the thorough discussions of the Conference and the willing
participation of several surface inhabitants. Here, in the Four Corners, was held a meditation
service as requested by the Noah Summit of the Culture-Rama to coincide with TAU.
A surface Dwellers American Indian ceremony was held on top of the Sleeping Ute Mountain a
few miles south of Cortez, Colorado. The ceremony, called the "Sun Dance", was closed to non-
Indian Americans. Native Americans from several states came together for this ceremony,
which coincided with another ceremonial by the Great Medicine Societies of the Central Earth,
called the "Oshashne," meaning “The Earth Gatherer,” which was in progress within the
Ceremonial Grand Kiva of the Culture-Rama, beginning August 22nd and lasting continuously
until the beginning of the TAU on the 24th. Whether or not the Sun Dance participants knew of
the Inner Earth ceremony being held synchronous with theirs I do not know. It is likely that the
time was a "window" for such earth oriented ceremonies. I did not hear of the Sun Dance until I
met with the local meditation participants for the lending of our prayers and energy to the TAU.
The Central Earth Ceremony of the Oshashne included symbolic and energy dances, chanting,
earth toning, display and ritual using sacred relics, and oratory of the "Chathretabera," which is a
highly symbolic recitation of both spoken word and chant. It is a canticle form of earth-cosmic
knowledge relating the phases and resultant happenings in the past, present and future of the
"Sacred Calendra," the calendar of the Medicine Wheel. The Chathretabera oratory is as sacred
to the Central Earth Tribes as is the saying of the rosary to the Catholics. It is a multi-layered
series of canticles, only a few of which novices are to recite. The greater the initiated the more
of the oratory is allowed and learned. In the Oshashne of August of 1980 Master Illuminari
Mirthrahphe recited the final and most sacred of the canticles of the Spirit Rama, a ritual of
Egyptian origin and so led by the Egyptian Culture in ceremony. This is the releasing of the Sun
Spirit from the earth (Atoma) to merge with the Sun Spirit of the sky (Atana). Symbolically, a
silver-cast torch statue of a falcon is lit and a live falcon is released into the sky. Since this was
the first Oshashne to be held on the upper half of the Earth Sphere, a special torch statue of an
American Eagle was cast in gold for the occasion. Instead of a falcon, a live eagle was freed in
the Ceremonial Grand Kiva at the highest level of the Culture-Rama Heliosphere. The large kiva
room has a comfortable capacity for five hundred people as well as ample space for dancing.
This room is entirely muraled, depicting the most prominent events of the Sacred Calendra. The
heritage participation of each Tribe in the Sacred History of the Spirit-Life Wheel is shown in
pictorial display. In the center of the kiva the floor rises in tiers. On the highest tier is the Most
Holy of Holies, the "Aphra" or altar, symbolic of the "Altar at the Top of the World" which is the
etheric manifestation of the subterranean "Mountain of the Saf-fire." For the Oshashne, the
golden torch statue of the eagle was placed upon the Aphra. Directly above the Aphra of the
Grand Kiva is a hole in the domed roof, allowing the light created in the immense cavern to
shine into the kiva chamber. The focus and intensity of the light shining into the room is
controlled by a latticed aperture of thin crystal in the opening of the ceiling. Through remote
control, the degree of light entering and the design it takes can be changed. One of the most
dramatic light designs is the pyramid of rays which is displayed down upon the altar and reaches
throughout the room when the Spirit Rama is enacted and the "Thunderbird" (falcon or eagle) is
released. The bird then flies up through the light pyramid and out the "entrance" to the Fifth
World, as symbolized by the aperture in the ceiling. The fowl is guided through the telepathic
mind of a Master in the Butterfly Society (regents of communication with all winged creatures).
Now that a connection between the two earth realms is truly beginning, more Spirit Ramas will
be enacted in future Oshashnes within the Culture-Rama.
"The Kiva at Casa Rinconada (Chaco Canyon, N.M.)... has a huge T-shaped door... (this) "TAU"
shape has a very special religious significance to the Hopi and is even found on the major
pyramid in Peru."
--from recent issue of "True UFOS" Magazine.
TRIBAL SUNSET EXPERIENCE
July 25th, 8:30 P.M.
Cortez, Colorado
*********
The signs of a storm were building in the east. A gentle, cool wind rushed about us like a
billowing sea-sail as we stood outside our home, gazing in fascination at a sky in rapture.
Brilliant colors penetrated the skyscapes of clouds on the eastern horizon. Crimson, deep pink,
and tangerine swept across the Mesa, transforming steel grey into light fantasies before our eyes.
Bandit plumes, like purple desert sages, arose against white massifs of cumulus in the south.
Blue sky faded the shadows around the moon, which shimmered beneath a baby's breath of mist.
We turned suddenly to view the northern scene. An avalanche of dark cloud boulders, silent yet
advancing, confronted us in the midst of each contrasting panorama. Soundless lightening bolts
traced their images through the high places.
As if striving to diminish the somber mask of the northern summits, a golden orange burned deep
a passage of light in the east, even more devastating to the senses. It streaked into vast arms, a
mighty fist of luminescent anger. The cumulus pyramided upward, each layer filled with color.
Wisps floated and separated at the crown of the immense head… the feathers of a mighty war
bonnet. Features began to appear against the night... a Chieftain emerged from the profusion,
fierce in wonder, ready for battle against the threat from the north. At this amalgam in
consciousness, when one is transfixed on the delivery of some messianic message from a primal
world, truths which are beyond us can suddenly become a close encounter for our minds. It
takes but one harmonious moment with nature to transcend the finite into the internalness of
being. That note struck us when, as we viewed the Chieftain approaching his glory, to our ears
came the oratory of ancient voices, chanting a synchronous cry for nature and her great empires
of the universe. From somewhere in the distance, the song of life continued. A male voice rose
and fell in Indian tome. Other voices in crescendo with his and drums descended in muffled
paces to the depths of the earth. It was indeed real. A sunset ceremony was occurring out of our
sight, yet we were sharing the closeness of the sacred communion. As the Chief of the Sky paled
into embers of a once great council fire, we retreated into our lodge, our senses having drunk
deeply from an endless well of spirit. Night reclaimed its dimension in time.


<!-- END FILE S80-03.md -->

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 4-80
copyright © 1980 L.Christine Hayes
"I believe in the immortality of the soul because I have within me immortal
longings... I believe in the life to come I shall have the senses I have not had here and
that my home there will be beautiful with color, music and the speech of flowers and
faces I love.
"I walk unafraid toward the enchanted wood where the foliage is always green.
"I believe that life is given us so that we may grow in love, and I believe that God is
in me as the sun is in the color and the fragrance of a flower - the Light in my
darkness, the Voice in my silence." - Helen Keller
One of the major sciences of the Central Earth Races is that of “lumni-optics,” the science of
interactive light waves in space/time/ether. The main force of this study is upon the dimensional
capability created when interacting light waves act as independent variables, altering existing
time frames and ether states. To the surface bound, lumni-optics would be a complex and
difficult science to comprehend, and so we will dispense with the full scale explanation here and
concentrate on one aspect of lumni-optics which is germane to the Interior Earth and essential as
well to the holistic properties of the entire planet. The Atoma, or central sun of earth, is like the
heart of the planet. It contracts and expands in a pulsing action, sending energy waves through
the space of the central cavity and out into the many arteries in the stone - the caverns, natural
tunnels and "pores" of the planet. Within the Atoma, there are four polarity chambers. They are
composed of atoms which contain "inverted nucleus, caused by the incomplete chain reaction of
hydrogen changing into helium (see Source 1-80, on black hole effect). To get a mental image
of this, picture a living, human heart inside a sphere. The heart is composed of what we will call
here "hyper-atoms," atoms with inverted nucleus. The rest of the sphere is composed of non-
hyper atoms, or atoms with normal nucleus. Within the heart see the four main heart chambers,
the right and left auricles and the right and left ventricles. This then, is the scenario for
examination of the heart center of the Atoma, the "regula aspa." The two chambers on the right
side of the human heart are in harmony with the positively polarized side of the regula aspa. The
left side of the human heart is synchronous with the negatively charged hyper-atoms of the
Atoma heart's two chambers on the side opposite to their positively charged counterpart
chambers.
Now shift your gaze to the Solar Sun, giver of germination and warmth to our surface domain.
This radiant orb is the "Atana." Star suns contain a center of pulsing reflexes or atomas as well,
but they differ in structure from the heart of earth Atoma (which are usually found in planetary
spheres). Our sun has an atoma which is in a less advanced spiritual "fire" than some of the
hierarchical stars, as Orion or the Pleiades. These stages of advancement cannot be detected
with physical scientific acquisition of data. It is accessible in terms beyond our known
determination of universal laws. The atom seed (Atoma) of the solar sun interacts with the
earth's atoma through the medium of light waves, which is the optic evidence of magnetic and
other advanced energy waves. As discussed in Source #1-80, the natural polar openings of earth
are not obvious to surface dwelling consciousness or optical spectrum, unless an individual were
to enter a window, or more closely defined, an angle synchronous to the spectral-polar magnetic
lenses capping the windows Southern and Northern Doors (polar openings). Once something
enters through these windows, it must suddenly adjust to a different etheric field, one of much
higher frequency than the surface ecosphere's etheric matrix engenders. Some human beings
would be capable of surviving this (as well as the change in atmospheric density, higher level of
oxygen purity, etc.) although it would register as a shock to his sensory and nervous system. A
beam of light from the sun, however, would go through quite a different experience than a living
entity. As light travels from our sun toward the earth, it locates the polar field's intensity of
etheric current through a collective mind or spontaneous quanta directive. The light waves
become excited by intense streams of etheric "motion" and flare into "novas" or sudden bursts of
intelligent harmony. This is evidenced to scientists in the puzzling particle versus wave effect of
light. The particle effect is a result of discrete units of "thinking" waves, not on the level which
we reason, but nevertheless a cognate response to the ether stream. Ether streams are created by
intense concentrations of dimensional pull, opposite attraction, or several other functioning
modes of existence through which ether accepts energy and advances that energy. Ether, very
simply defined, is a module for dimensional receptivity of space and time. Ether states give the
command to form, to expand, to reduce. The ether is commanded by the universal laws of the
Harmonies... discussions and definitions along this line could go on indefinitely, so let us return
to the perimeters of this issue's context.
The various programs of the ether computer or command pulse are defined as x-grams. Each
x-gram supplies a line or continuity band for a specific entity of function. These lock together to
produce the whole working body of image-form-function-replication-assimilation-absorption
back into the etheric computer to be reprocessed. Thus, as the light beam traveling from the
solar sun toward the earth attaches its directive code to the earth stream of the earth's solar
vortex, the incoming light beams migrate their etheric quality toward the polar doors of the
planet. As the light beam approaches the polar door, say the northern apex, it has become
"special" in that its etheric x-grams are active at the amplitude of the energy package's quality.
This energy package is the light waves as well as the magnetic properties and other refined
energy types of the whole energy beam. When the energy beam enters through the Northern
apex (and this it can do easily as its x-grams have adapted its function for harmonious reception
by the spectral-polar lenses) it enters the Rega Passage, a funnel of sensitive particles, so high in
etheric bonding as to be almost inter-dimensional. This passage leads straight to the Atoma and
into the regula apsa. The passage from the Northern Door into the Atoma enters the positively
polarized chambers of the Atoma heart.
The Southern Door passage leads into the negatively polarized chambers. Within the regula apsa
there is an intricate exchange of current or purifying of blood, which causes a transformation of
their x-grams within this "Seed Flame," the Anii. The inner most holy of holies within the
Atoma is the Anii, which is a bursting of transformation, a nova of completeness. Here, where
the light beams of both Northern and Southern passages of the Rega meet, the energy inherent to
the carriage which brought it to the center of our planet, the solar light beams (inclusive of other
light sources, such as distant stars) is transmuted from gross to subtle in a wave of the alchemical
wand. Most of this refined gold is received inter-dimensionally, but some are taken through the
pulsing of the earth-heart and speeds throughout the arteries and veins of the planet. How much
is retained for earth's etheric refinement, and how much is transfigured to the state of ascension
into the higher realms, is determined by the etheric x-grams bonding our world planet at the time
of this internal heart nova. The x-grams of earth change in accordance with the determination of
the spiritual evolution of the planet as a whole. Solar light beams do not enter into earth's core in
a constant procession. While some refracted light is filtered through the polar lens, the
procession of the Rega Passage occurs only at the equinoxes and solstices of the year.
As the purified and upgraded energies which are captured by the ethers of earth are circulated
through the planet via the resonate cavity effect of the central hollow, all nature receives its
portion of this elixir of regeneration. Certain topographical conditions create special conduits
for the re-charging of these refined energies as they are distributed upon the surface of the
planet. The Mesa Verde Plateau is one of the major receiving stations on earth, the major station
for the North American continent. As explained in both issues of #1-80 and #3-80, the Mesa or
Emerald Table is like a resonating disc, where the geo-cosmic energies of the ascending
(Himalayan) and descending (Titicaca) plateaus converge to exchange current within the Sacred
Knot of the Emerald Table. The Mesa Verde, then, acts as a giant dolmen in its function within
the esoteric Temple of Earth. In Louis Charpentier's, "The Mysteries of Chartres Cathedral", he
writes of the large, table-like dolmens of the sacred temples. "The remarkable instrument which
is a dolmen, a stone table resting on two, three or four supports rather resembles the metal strip
of a xylophone. The table submitted to two contrary forces, its cohesiveness and its weight, is
thus in a state of tension and is susceptible to vibration like the stretched piano string. It is at the
same time an accumulator and an amplifier. Thus, the potency of the telluric wave attains its
maximum force in the dolmenic chamber which acts like a resonant drum.”
As the refined energies released from the nova within the earth-heart pass through such dolmenic
stones as the Mesa Verde Plateau, they are fortified with original intensity and sent forth again to
reverberate throughout the Earth Temple. Mountains perform a function similar to the flat-
topped plateaus, but different in that they retain more than they re-emit in an immediate sense.
This serves an equally important purpose in that mountains release the energies received through
internal seepage or radiation rather than direct power waves. They also draw directly from the
interior and emit, like a pyramid, from the zenith of their summits. These summit emissions are
thin streams which are taken into the atmosphere to charge clouds.
The planet in its entire structure and function can be viewed as a beautiful and complex temple,
simple in its divine cosmetrics (the order of measure), function and symbolic relationships
through which the Universe enacts its Harmonic Principle. The Cosmetric Order is a "dance," a
symphony in concert with its internal memory of Divine birth. It is both the creative essence and
the created form. It is the motion of function and it is, conversely, the stillness of a sacred
knowledge, too infinite to submit to the moving rush of its founding intelligence. We can see the
mirror of this logic in the brilliance of light. To the human eye, light is a revealer of obstacles,
an enhancer of space and dimension, a regulator of contrasts and colors. To the soul of the
human complex, light is the beauty of hidden sound, the dissolver of distance between the Divine
and the seeker. It is a communicator of indwelling mind superseding space and time. Light is
our refuge from darkness and our sanctuary of hope. It is our brilliant oracle, interceding for us
in the offices of the Most High. We unconsciously seek luminosity as we do the heights of
mountains. Whether or not our reason is illuminated with the quest, our hearts are surely lifted
to the voice of light. Be there no soul so entrenched in the mire of retribution that it does not
respond lovingly to light? The pupils of the eyes contract, the senses stir. Our mind is lifted in
its resolute consequence to the bridled rays of our star-sun as it imbues this orbiting sphere with
the kiss of light.
The human heart houses the heart chakra which is intimately linked from conception to the
regula apsa of the earth atoma. We and the earth are literally one. The light that travels in grand
procession upon the Rega Passage, entering the earth heart, reaches our pulsing organ as well.
Through etheric bonding time and space are eliminated, and the light serves as a vessel of
communion between man and his earth.
The sacred temples of Subterranea, like the ancient temples and great Gothic cathedrals,
recreated the Rega Passage (in earth and in man) in the placement of their windows, halls, shades
of stained glass, so that the passage of light into the Temple is symbolically equivalent to the
journey of Light upon the Grand Procession of Rega. A single beam of light, a translucent
essence, symbolizing the soul, housing therein the spirit of fire, is diffused through the
intricacies of mind. Harbored in the most regent channels of space, it approaches steadfastly the
point of mergence with matter. In the Temple this act of consignment is registered in the
harmony and beauty of a perfect coupling, the light and the stone, the space and the time. The
very hollows of the Temple respond to the sacrament of twining, the rose of light with the thorn
of matter, which pricks our consciousness and spurs us through our material existences.
Among the Holiest of Central Earth Temples is the Temple of the Twining wherein the splendor
and sacred geometry of the Rega Passage, the physical-spiritual functioning of the earth-heart
and its mergence in twin flame with the heart chakra of man, is displayed and enacted through
ceremony.
"Go sweep out the chamber of your heart, make it ready to be the dwelling place of the beloved.
When you depart out, He will enter in. In you, void of yourself, will He display His beauties."
...From Mahnud Shabistari, Gulshan-i-rax, as quoted in "The Sense of Unity - The Sufi Tradition
in Persian Architecture."
Within the most esoteric of doctrines abides the Secret of Ages revealed only to the highest
initiates of the Temple. Inner Earth Priest Craft, however, do not regard this most Holy doctrine
as a secret. It is unfolded to the mind and heart of the child in the earliest years of wonder. In
the Great Medicine Societies, and within the Sacred Orders, this basic knowledge is expanded
within the understanding of the initiate. It is called the "Magda" or "Anii," both of which mean
the Holy Center. In Hebrew the word Ani means both ship and me or myself. In the "First
Language" of Earth (the Sacred) "ii" was used to denote the personal God-self within the human
soul. It is closely related to the word "Anii," meaning Holy Seed or Seed Flame. The Anii is the
innermost part of the regula apsa within the central sun Atoma. It is here the transformation of
energies takes place. The "Magii" is the Christ Flame. It is that which permeates and rises out
of the Anii, analogous to the Phoenix arising from the ash. The symbol of the Phoenix
represents to the Subterranean the "Christ Flame" or "Magii." The word "Sorcoui" means Holy
Ashes, and is identical with the Sacred Pyre or Fasmitima (also Holy Nest). The Phoenix is seen
as the lifting of the Kundalini fire from the base of the spine. The fact that this magical bird
represents both the rising Christos and the Kundalini, reveals that the Subterranean initiate
acknowledges the action of the Kundalini as viable only when received through the Divine Fire
of the Christ. The use of the word "Christ" here is not wholly in the context of Christian
theology. It embraces the God Spirit in the Earth which culminated in the God Spirit in
humanity through the vessel of the Master Jesus. The flame or spiritual cord of the Christ Spirit
dwells within the Atoma of this planet. The Solar Sun also contains the Christ presence, but the
true unifying flame is within the Earth. The Solar Sun is the masculine charge and the Earth Sun
is the feminine charge. The masculine ray penetrates the mother egg (anii) to ignite the living
fire.
As the Divine Presence merged with the many aspects of Earth through the human element (via
many incarnations within the carriage soul of Adam-Jesus). The actual Christ Flame was within
the core of Earth rather than within the core of the carriage soul, only serving to illuminate the
carriage soul for the ultimate purpose. Upon the baptism of Jesus by John the Baptist, the
carriage soul and the Christ Flame, for the first time since before the Adamic experience, were as
one. The Christ had then become centered in both the atoma of Earth and the atoma of Jesus.
Consequently, after the crucifixion and entombment of Jesus' body, His astral and etheric body
fulfilled the final stage of purification for mankind within the epochs of Pisces. (There were
other fulfillments of the Christos in later epochs.) He returned into the Central Earth to travel
upon the Rega Passage, as He did the road to Jerusalem and to be received into the Sacred Heart
of the world. This was necessary to complete the journey of the "God born of man," which
began when the Magii was lifted from the Anii, joined with the carriage soul (while still within
the atoma) and sent upon the Earth into the genetic bonding of karmic man, to begin the Adamic
race. The return engaging of the carriage soul with the Central Holy released the "original sin"
which the carriage soul had assumed for all mankind when it became necessary for Illumined
Man to become Karmic Man. After the purification of the carriage soul, the astral and etheric
body of Jesus walked among the people of the Heritage of One (Subterraneans) before the
ascension.
"For as Jonas was three days and three nights in the whale's belly, so shall the son-of-man be
three days and three nights in the Heart of the Earth."
- St. Matthew, ch. 12 vs. 40
"I went down into the countries of the earth unto the people of the past."
- From the television motion picture, "Jesus of Nazareth"
In the doctrine presented within the Temple of the Twining (which is under the auspices of the
Blue Mantle Society) there is depicted the "Rosari," a symbolic pattern of Christ Passage within
the Earth represented by seven roses. The Rosari was originally brought from Venus by the First
Generation, which was before the presence of Karmic Man, before the Adamic Race. It is a
prophetic unfoldment as petals of the rose given forth from the Crystal of Records and guided by
the Illumined of Earth. The atoma is completeness, registered in the number Seven. Each rose
upon the Rosari is a color in harmony with the Seven Harmonies of the Universe. There is an
eighth Harmony, the Christ Tone, as there is also an eighth rose on the Rosari, an Invisible Rose
represented in the center of the seven as a brilliant light within a triangle inside a circle (the
points of the triangle extending outside the circle).
"The Rose doth grow through love. No chalice lifts so sweet a wine as that which shall descend
when the Plague of Roses begins."
Verse from the Talithwa Canticle - Temple of The Twining
There are few souls of the Earth to have received the "Full Bloom" of initiation within the
Temple of The Twining. One of these is now dwelling within the Earth in the form of his
previous existence as Thoth Hermes Trismegistus. He is an Illumined of the highest order,
holding many regent life charges on the Earth, among them being C. Hiram Abiff (King
Solomon's Master Builder); Imenhotep (Pharaoh Zoser's physician and architect); Quetzalcoatl
and Hiawatha. He merged with the higher consciousness of St. John the Beloved and Enoch
(although he was not the body-soul of these two life experiences). Together with the souls of
Solomon and David, his archetypical energies form the Great Archetypical Seal which governs
over all administration of image, design and symbolic form on Earth. This Grand Archetypical
Seal of the Three is the "Royal Abras" (not to be confused with the crown archetypes which are
the mixers or mutables for all Nature Archetypes).
All knowledge which are channeled through me to be translated come through the Office of
Hermes, the shield of light which discerns and filters out the dross about me is created by his
archetype. Through this soul, now embodied as Thoth Hermes, the Christ ray is focused in Full
Bloom. These few Illumined souls such as Hermes, who have attained that frequency of charge,
assume the highest spiritual presence in the Earth humanity at this time. They are not Christ
Vessels in the same sense as was the Master Jesus, but they are open channels for the expanding
of Christ Consciousness upon the planet, receiving within them the closest of Divine Encounters.
The following is an inscription on the Tarot cards of the Egyptians, number XIV from "The
Book of Thoth" - "Vista Interiora Terrae Rectificando Invenies Occultum Lapidem." (Visit the
interior parts of the Earth. By rectification thou shall find the Hidden Stone.)
The "hidden Stone" is the physical mountain of the Saf-fire within Subterranea, focus of the
Most Holy Nature Spirits. It is the ultra-physical Foundation Stone of the Illumined, a crystal
squared, with six faces and a seventh esoterically being the completeness of the six; and it is the
knowledge of the Law, supporting principle and justice. The Foundation Stone or Holy
Cornerstone is suspended within the inner sanctum of the First Temple, the Most Holy of
structures on or in the Earth, erected upon the bottom of the subterranean ocean. This First
Temple, or Temple of Centauri, contains many records of energy engraved by high laser beam
(inter-dimensional) into thought crystal talis, sheets of crystal formed by thought waves into
material elementation. The "Holy Stone" within the center of the Temple contains the most
Christed of constancy flames, fire eternal, in the center of the stone which emanates a Christ
spark. Each facing is engraved with a sacred symbol which is recorded in the ethers as one of
the creative motions or x-grams which formed the Earth.
At the time of the Winter Solstice the Magii within the Earth Heart novas in brilliance
harmonious with and spurred by the Birth of the Christ in the prayers and memory of man. It is a
reliving in consciousness for the Earth, as so many human bound souls remember the unique gift
of the Christ Child. Although in reality, the Babe was born closer to the Spring Equinox, the
thought-energy of man focuses that memory chord into the Winter Solstice.
In the New Age Bible interpretation, Volume II, it is given: "It is the sacred season of the Winter
Solstice, when the sun of the astronomical new year is born and the emanations of the Cosmic
Sun Spirit enfolds the Earth. In the northern hemisphere this is the longest and darkest night of
the year, the time when material activities are at their ebb. The spiritual forces are, on the
contrary, then at flood tide, the radiations of the Invisible Sun being at their maximum. A part of
all inner Temple work is the preparation for beholding the mystic Midnight Sun at mid-winter.
The "Mystic Midnight Sun" is the sun of Ether Spirit brought together by the Rega Passage,
which is amplified in the pinnacle of Oneness of the Spirit Earth, reached by the Ether Planet in
its journey through the Spring, Summer and Autumn phases of transfiguration. The zenith of
this procession is achieved with the Winter Solstice when the Rega Passage carries its Missile of
Light into the Cradle.
ADDENDUM
As it often happens, after completing this fourth issue, I found a meaningful passage in another's
work which is especially correlative with my recent translations. From "Bible Interpretations":
"The Sixth Epoch, or New Galilee, follows the present Fifth or Aryan Epoch. In that period
initiation will be the common experience of the race. Only the stragglers will remain outside the
door of the Mysteries. By then the majority of mankind will have been led through the first
initiation at least, and therefore, will know the truth about the rebirth and life after death. Also,
they will be more or less conscious of the Christ Fire burning at the core of our globe. During
the Sixth Epoch the Master Jesus will once more appear publicly, not in physical form but in an
etheric body of sufficient density to be visible to all. He will lead the human race to its full
flowering; and by the end of the Sixth Epoch most egos will have trod the Path of the nine Lesser
Mysteries, whereby they will have met the Christ face to face at the heart of the Earth. To
Initiates of the Sixth Epoch this Divine Being will be worshiped as closer than hands and feet,
the indwelling planetary logos of the Earth, while the Divine Man, Jesus, will be adored as the
flower of the human race, the Christ Bearer."
Surface Earth esotericism tells us that we are about to enter the Sixth Epoch. My sources refer to
our entering the Fifth World. Like the Hopi Indians, and other ancient American tribes, they
speak of our present world or state as the fourth. This apparent contradiction can be explained
thus: the Karmic Man had his first root race in the Adamic generation. As Karmic Man he is
now approaching his Sixth Root Race. The Illumined Man began his Earth zodiac in what is
termed the First Generation, before the Adamic Man. The Illumined epochs are assuming
divisions in spiritual-cosmic illumination of man, while the Karmic Root Races are divided
through the trials of the karmic consequence on its path to the Source. The path of Illumined
Man is therefore one to the Illumined Christ within the center of the Earth. The path of Karmic
Man is to the crucified Divine within the carriage soul of the Master Jesus. Karmic Man is then
the image of purification crucifixion (sorrows - Pisces) while Illumined Man is the sign of
transfiguration through Grace (alchemical - Scorpio). In every human soul there abides both the
Illumined and the Karmic Being.
Prayer from the Noah Summit of the Culture-Rama :
We beseech the Archangelic Hierarchies of the Divine House, governing this planet (zodiac) to
issue forth streaming chords of Light upon this manger sphere in the time of remembrance of the
Holy Birth. May the worlds of Earth (inner and outer) unite in the Blessing of Nature as the
Midnight Sun arrives at the center of the Earth. May the dwellers of this volatile sphere be
quieted to hear the celestial chorus in the resonating hollow with joyous Hallelujahs in memory
of the Child of Christed Love. May their sight be opened as the stable gate, and may they be
given vision of the Holy Procession to the Cradle of Eternal Birth. Leading this March of Glory
is the Mother Grace of the planet, indwelling in the Virgin Soul. Also among them that touch
the Earth at this time are the nature souli (animal "souls") who have received the Edict of
Transformation raising them to passage from the Nature world into a condition of Holy Spirit.
The souls of the children who have passed from the Light habitation this year will be present in
the Procession to experience the Christ Light in its glorious luminescence. May all Earth's kind
receive, as these children, in the warmth of this Divine Re-birth which is given to the Earth each
Winter Solstice. May Earth come to the threshold of Sacred Destiny and receive her escort of
the Ten Thousand (Angelic Guard). May her Madonna Beauty gaze upon the humanity she
suckles. In Mercy may humanity be restored to its Throne of Stars.
We testify for those who have been muted by their generation. We speak for them that they may
be lifted from the Pit's edge and so receive their peace.

<!-- END FILE S80-04.md -->
