# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 1-81
copyright © 1981 L.Christine Hayes
A GOLDEN LION reclines on the limb of a giant Baccha tree. Slits of amber peer from his
mantled face, intent on an approaching form. A lone young man walks under the tree. Such a
dramatic confrontation to us is most certainly the prelude to a violent recourse and will end in a
likely death for either the man or the lion. But this scene is not taking place in the wild habitat
of the surface world. It is, instead, a not uncommon moment of communication within the
Nature Kingdom of the Central Earth Domain. The young man and the lion have never seen
each other before, yet there is no exchange of fear. They co-exist through a mutual regard for an
inter-species alliance. Through the ability of the inner Earth inhabitant walking toward the lion,
he projects ahead of him an auric chord, a silent tone which is received by the large cat. This is a
signal to the beast which gives him immediate cognition of the intent of the approaching human,
and that human's unique character blueprint. The lion responds by an auric entonement of his
own. The two are now entrained to begin a mental communication. This scenario is an
everyday occurrence in Subterranea.
THE FLORA AND FAUNA of the Central Earth are maintained by the High Order Devas
(Nature Spirits) of Earth through the vital flow of communication and rapport with the human
population of the interior world. There are two main factors which are essential considerations
in the maintenance of the subterranean nature realm. These are . . . the limited ecosphere of the
Earth's inner cavity, which is more fragile than the surface counterpart because of several
fundamental differences in the outer and inner ecospheres, and the vegetarian existence of the
entire human and wildlife population within. Not only are the human Subterraneans of the
Central Earth Tribes strict vegetarians, but their animal companions are also. It is difficult to
imagine the "King of Beasts" gnawing on a carrot and blanching at a rare gazelle flank, but as
comical and almost emasculating as this would seem to our orientation with wild animals, a
meatless society, whether in the animal world or the human civilization, is the only natural one.
In the true Genesis of this planet, eons before our scientists can imagine life to have combusted
upon the murky shores of Earth, many of the present species were existent and were vegetarian
in their consumption. The lion of the Central Earth varies little from the ancient lions of
Atlantis, who until the latter part of the Atlantean epoch, dieted on legumes, radishes and thick
inland marsh seaweed of the Atlantean rain forests.
BECAUSE OF THE initial fragility of the inner Earth Nature Kingdom, a control of propagation
is enacted by the High Order Nature Devas. This is accomplished through the Great Medicine
Societies of the Central Earth who commune with the "Noshas" or High Devas, requesting
certain growth controls, temperature adjustments, etc. Much like the American Indian Rain-
dancers, the Central Earth Medicine Societies join with nature to create a harmonious exchange.
The interior peoples do not neglect or abuse their terra firma. It is regarded as sacred ether.
Each Society of the Medicine Wheel is entrusted with a specific nature channel (as listed in
"Source" 1-80). The communications between the human and nature worlds are a prayerful and
loving revelation. It is a bonding of auras between two rivers of Earth's radiant field. Like
genders in consciousness, the nature and human aspects are thought of as female and male,
respectively. The topic of the Nature Realm within our Earth is so vast in its illumination, so
absorbing in its revelation of an entirely unique understanding, that I cannot possibly do justice
to the scope of this subject within the pages of this issue. Instead, I will touch upon the
outstanding points, and discuss a few of the more intriguing animal species. First, certain
qualifications need to be stated.
THE SCALE OF SIZE for all living things within the central hollow of this planet is larger than
it is among surface life. This is due to the aforementioned differences in the interior ecosphere,
the major difference being the increase in the "ether contact" which produces a more rapid
stimulus of the atomic structure closer to the core of a rotating sphere. (In caverns between the
surface and central hollow, because of various magnetic pockets, there are several races of
dwarfed peoples which are not a part of the twelve Central Earth Tribes.) Although it differs
among races within the Tribes, a women of Subterranea is considered of average height (in most
cultures) at 6'2" to 6'3" and a man's average height is from 6'4” to 6'6”. There is a proportionate
increase in size of animals and vegetation also. For example, we return to the young man and
the lion. Although this inner Earth lion would make his surface cousin appear runted, he is no
larger in proportionate difference to the young man standing near him than would be a surface
lion to a surface dwelling man. On the rare occasions when surface humans are introduced to the
interior civilizations, they are given treatments of "magnetto-reflex" to aid them in their gradual
growth. As an atomic weight nears the core of a planet, it will decrease, causing an increase in
the oscillation of the particles' atomic parts. This will, when interpolated with several other
factors, all inter-connective to the same stimuli, such as oxygen density, etc., cause an extension
in the growth ratio of the life mass. While I am focusing here on living mass, there is also an
expansion of mass in non-living matter, causing numerous, usually subtle differences in erosion
and thus soil composition, etc. (Clarification of interest: I use the word "non-living" here with
some misgiving. The Subterraneans do not consider any form of matter "non-living".) The
magnetto-reflex then, is a means to guide this growth expansion which would otherwise deplete
a living organism suddenly placed in the interior environment, and eventually kill that life form
experiencing the trans-chemical change.
IN DISCUSSING the animals of Central Earth, I will divide them into three categories: (1)
Those species (and breeds) which are a preserved form of an original species of the ancient
surface world, such as of Lemuria and Atlantis, and are almost identical to surface counterparts.
This is due to the fact that many of our modern animal breeds are actually recreations of ancient
types. Through the cycle of reincarnation, humanity assumes repeated confrontations with
himself and other life he affects. (2) Ancient species of the surface world which have not been
reintroduced through the cyclic wave to the outer Earth. (3) Animal species originating in the
inner realm, which are solely indigenous to that realm. There are realms of Subterranea which
do not conform to any of the above divisions.
ONE OF THE MOST BEAUTIFUL creatures existing within the perennial floral gardens of
Subterranea is the original Bird of Paradise, once flourishing upon the continents of Lemuria and
Atlantis, in the light of the solar sun. It bore a name which meant "beautiful" - Marie - a delicate
swirl of shimmering feathers and glorious colors. The Marie Bird is a large fowl whose lacy
wings could not support it in flight through the mechanics of aerodynamics, yet this elegant bird
does fly, the larger ones capable of carrying a grown man in flight. The Marie's gift of flight is
bestowed upon it through the gravitational field of Earth and the power of the sun. On the tip of
each wing feather there is enthroned a magical sun cell. When vibrated by the bird as it shivers
its fanned out wings, each of these cells absorbs photonic waves from the sun and then employs
these waves as synthesizers for the attraction, modification and amplification of the current of
Earth's magnetism flowing through the mass of the bird. This enables the Marie to fly, but it
also sustains its most elementary life functions. Without the process of a somewhat advanced
photosynthesis within its sun cells, the large Marie would expire. The Marie's entire
neurovascular system is bound up in this process in order for the body as a whole to absorb the
charge stimulus created by the photo-magnetic process. Thus, the Marie's presence under the
eternal sun of the Central Earth is ideal for its propagation, although its number is carefully
controlled, and it does not roam outside the gardens which provide its special diet. There is no
night in the Earth below, but there is a period of dusk, as the cycle of the Earth's interior gravity
and the inner sun's pulsing pull the vapor clouds toward the central sun atoma, causing a
beautiful aurora borealis of sun colors in the sky, bringing the day to a close with a twilight
lasting for several hours before the full light returns once again. In the “mornings” and
“evenings," after the total impact of twilight and before its departure, the Maries can be seen
performing an elaborate sun dance, fanning their bright colored wings in fluid form, gracefully
bending, dipping and strutting, as if in mating ritual. It is a type of mating dance in that this
performance is integral to the continuation of their species. In order to survive they must court
the sun. From the beak of the Marie there curls an extension of ivory. The ivory tusk of this
majestic fowl is a symbol of its unequaled sovereignty among the pilgrims of the sky.
THE CAT is an especially treasured animal of the Inner Tribes. It would not be quite correct to
differentiate between "wild" and domesticated among the breeds interior world cats, for a tiger
and a "pussycat" of this inner domain are equally responsive and loving toward humankind,
although the created breeds are more adaptable to the constant companionship of humans. The
smaller house cat type breeds which we refer to as domesticated, were bred by man into that
form. The same is true of the inner Earth domestic breeds. Many of the interior breeds are
almost identical to their surface counterparts. One of the most prized of these created types in
Subterranea is the Tapas, which on the outer sphere is known as the Himalayan. The surface
Himalayan was originally bred from Persians and Siamese. It was named after the Himalayan
rabbit, and has no conscious connection with the Himalayan region of the upper world. The
Tapas, or inner Earth Himalayans, first became a breed in Lemuria eons ago. Eventually they
became popular in Atlantis also. The breed had been created especially for an ability to manifest
defense shields of psychic energy. While these shields were not super powerful, they were
developed in the Tapas to be effective in the protecting of prayer chambers, or other holy places,
from the diffuse and disruptive retrograde energies that are of a lower nature. The Tapas were to
serve as psychic clean-ups for those common lower vibrations which naturally occur in the
breakdown of the elements (increased by negative thought and action) and are attracted to the
opposite charge of Holy Places. The ancient generations of the Himalayan cats became, then,
the guardians of the temples. Before the dissolution of Atlantis as a nation, Himalayans were
exported to Egypt, but they did not fare well in that land. They did survive in the heights of the
Himalayan Mountains because of the special care given them by the lamas. It was through the
great subterranean passageways of this Tibetan Range that the Tapas were transported into the
central hollow to become guardian cats for the inner temples. After Atlantis' demise, the Tapas
were no more upon the Earth. Yet, in the core of the planet, they, like other remnant kinds
would survive. Many centuries later, as man's incarnation cycle reached into the creative
potluck of the past, the breed of Tapas was re-created on the surface once again and
subsequently given a name corresponding to its demarcation point of entrance into the interior
world. The Central Earth variety of Himalayan still sustains the genetic ability to project shields.
This is no doubt a latent talent of the surface breed, which could be developed. The greater cats
such as lions, tigers, panthers, etc., harbor an even stronger ability of this nature.
SINCE CANINES have a genetic tendency for disorientation when subjected to strong magnetic
fields (more so than other species), there are few members of the dog family residing within the
hollow. This does not diminish the love of the central dweller for those canines who do share
the terrarium environment with him. One of the most adaptable breeds which has been re-
introduced on the surface world is the Lhasa Apso, which bears the same name in the central
cavity. History tells us that the Lhasa Apso, a terrier, came originally from Lhasa, the capital of
Tibet. In Lhasa it was used as a watchdog, even though it is about ten inches high. A large dog
guarded the door outside, while the little Apso stayed inside to warn of danger. Departing from
historical records, the Lhasa Apso was created through the breeding of subterranean canines,
Tsbasca, with a surface terrier variety. Since the city of Lhasa is over one of the main passages
into the Central Earth, the High Lamas wished to have a sacred dog which would represent the
two streams merging as one under the great vaults of the Lhasa Temple. The small Apso did not
"stay inside to warn of danger," but instead had the honor of guardianship over the entrance to
the inner passageway. Gradually the diminutive Lhasa Apso was introduced into the interior
world, where it became somewhat larger through the natural growth stimulation; it still does not
match in size its Tsbasca relations.
NOW WE COME TO A FAIRYTALE creature, a mystic mantra of light and legend. A being so
long in our imaginations that it will be difficult to come to terms with its reality; but, indeed, it
does exist as it once did in the Ancient Days upon the outer world, and now remains within the
bosom of the planet, awaiting a new Age of Light to usher it into the solar accolades once again.
This is not the legend but the truth of the unicorn. This blithe spirit whose nature-soul (termed
"Souli" in animals) expresses the purity of unconquered love is not an original of this sphere. Its
home is borne on the wings of starlight, wefted of a galactic age beyond our nurturing ground, in
the constellation of Orion. The first unicorns brought to this world were from the Planet of
Enthropia (known by several names, including Faustia and Kolob). Eventually, the Earth variety
changed in certain markings from the original. In order to survive, the unicorns require a strong
magnetic charge (which is separate from the pull of gravity), so many species who depended on
that charge, such as dinosaurs, could no longer exist without it. Thus, the unicorns were brought
into the protective greater magnetic field of the Central Earth. There are now within the planet
two types of unicorns. The rarest is the original Enthropian breed with the slightly curled horn.
(The later Earth type displays a straight horn.) At this point I will quote from my unpublished
manuscript "THE BLUE STONE":
"The symbol for the Order of the Mastership is the horn of the unicorn, the spiraling force of the
spirit performing the action of the Vestal Law. The unicorn is also a symbol for healing as it is a
creature of extreme vibrational power, often used by those of other worlds (Ultra and Inner) to
purify certain energies and aid as a neutral channel for some forms of spiritual healing. Hermes
wrote in detail on this beautiful animal, as he believed it to be closely associated with the
biological principal of health. The following is his description of an Enthropian unicorn: “The
unicorn is a roaming form who searches for the love of humanity. He is the gentle heart of a
dove that beats with the tears of the forsaken Earth while the wings of the dove soar far above
the tribulations of man as an oracle of the air. The unicorn must live the plight of the prophet
who is not known in his own land. With his golden horn he intercepts the distortion to penetrate
the truth.” The Enthropian unicorn (as it exists on the planet of Enthropia) is the purest of its
genetic line. It is the size of a large pony (relative to the humans of its domain) with a white
body and flowing mane and tail. Tufts of hair grow above its cleft hooves. The color of the
mane, tail and tufts range from gold to dark red, with varying shades in between. There are also
the unicorns of flawless pure white. The eyes of a unicorn are usually blue. On the forehead of
the male is the magnificent unihorn, spiraling upward, piercing the sky. The horn of the female
is less than half the size of the male." Animals of solitude, they travel alone, a male nearing a
female only for the ritual of conception. "There is no rivalry among males, as the female
summons the male that she wishes to sire her foal. The male's sound is issued as a high pitched
whinny, the tone of a shrill but calming whistle. The female possesses no vocal chords,
communicating with her mate through telepathy. The male also communicates through
telepathy, using his voice as a tonal register only. Through his call he stimulates the womb of
the female to produce an immaculate conception, resulting in an eventual virgin birth. The horn
of the male acts as a tuning element, transferring the tone to the receiving horn of the female.
This triggers a chemical code within her brain, charging her womb with the pulse of life.
Because of the unicorn's sensitivity to tone, it is drawn to the melodic sounds, especially the high
vibrato tones. Its movements are as a dance."
This excerpt above, from "THE BLUE STONE" is a description of the unicorn in its habitat of
Enthropia. The Central Earth Enthropian species and the later Earth species are more varied in
colors. The horns of those unicorns existing on the planet of Enthropia are a golden color.
Those within our planet have either the golden or the white ivory-like horn with thin pink vein
markings. The Central Earth unicorns are kept within the maintained gardens, for like the Marie
Birds, they now require special attention in order to survive. Some of the most excellent
specimens of the unicorn are cared for at the Aura Healing Garden where their beneficial healing
tones are used in treatment of imbalanced bio-streams. (Originally used the word "infirmed"
here, but the translator advisors of Central Earth aiding me objected to this term. There are no
infirmed within Subterranea as we would associate that word. There are conditions of imbalance
in the body which cause certain external symptoms, but these are all mild by comparison to our
surface ailments and can always be rectified.) The subterranean unicorns are not as solitary as
are their relative on Enthropia, yet they maintain a distant nature and are not quite as accessible
to the mental and physical touch as are the other inner world animals. However, once a being,
whether human or animal, is accepted by a unicorn, there is a close bond between them. No
other animal species possesses the depth of love and purity of soul as does this enigmatic one of
the etheric melodies.
IT IS WITHIN THE CRYSTAL OCEANS of the indwelling domain that the animal species
most linked to humanity resides. Like their sea-surface cousins, the dolphins inspire the human
mind to seek an ever closer passage through the shallows of genetic division and explore the
deep pools of thought in which the dolphin is nurtured. In their world of embryonic fluid there
remains the cognitive splendor of the creative plunge, down into the darkness of indigo through
rushes of breaking consciousness as that first moment expands into a shaft of light, casting
holographs into the sea and prisming from imbued understanding, a multiple perception in color.
Turquoise, aqua, and violet gardens of reflective power are sown, diminishing sameness,
strengthening oneness. "And the spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters." So the
dolphin is forever one with the ritual of Genesis, bringing its frictionless form into morphic
harmony with the traceless paths of the sea, leaping in quantum to the intoning music of the
shifting Earth. In endless experiencing of "Mahathma" - I am coming out of the Earth forever."
(Source 3-80)
The subterranean dolphin, or "Shapa," is of two types - the golden and the blue. The blue is
almost identical in coloring and markings to the surface species, varying only in a slight blue
coloration to the grey tones. The golden dolphin is of a brain tone with a slight golden
coloration, acting as a highlight to the skin. Both the blue and the golden are proportionately
larger than their outer ocean relatives. In addition, the subterranean dolphins participate in
active communication with the human element of the inner world. This communication with the
dolphin, is, for the Central Earth Tribes, the capstone in the "Inter-Species Alliance." ISA is
both a pledge of alliance and a working organization of communicators with the Nature
Kingdom. To exchange thoughts and concepts with other species is not a single breakthrough or
achievement. It must be constantly sought and continuously evolved. The conceptualization,
rationalization, interpretation and even imagination of a whale varies dramatically from those of
an eagle, and even more so from the human reason. Each species has its own "source-nova," that
moment of bursting being that brought it to the surface of living reality as a communal whole. A
species is a nuclear family within the many-frequencies of bands of intellect. To truly exchange
knowledge and perception of that knowledge, beyond the automatic response of
acknowledgment that the other exists, there must be assembled an associate pattern of concepts,
a vector through which one idea-form may migrate into another spectrum analogous to its
integral meaning. Frequencies upon the intelligence bands must be correlated to the point of
intimacy that initiates the united cry of oneness which echoes through the remote chambers of
the infinitesimal, those paths of atomic bonding threading through the ether and causing our in
separateness with all existence.
THE INTER-SPECIES ALLIANCE combines the shamanistic power of the Medicine Societies
with scientific astuteness and technology to turn keys in the doors between worlds of the mind.
Their finely tuned plasma-based computers create encyclopedic graphics which are arranged to
project homogeneous interceptions between consciousnesses. Holographic beams of advanced
light forms reveal common associations and build bridges of awareness which differ from both
source points, being an amalgam of the two frequency directives and a new nuclear field in its
own right, termed a "creation," an atomic rhythm of consciousness created from the balance of
its former nuclei. Communications with dolphins is a perpetual reach into this science of shared
relations among living beings. The mind of this remarkable mammal is unique in its
employment structure, in the way it receives, sorts, perceives, assimilates and transmits
knowledge. Although all species operate in similar subliminal channels for basic input-output
function, they do not possess the multi-faceted degrees of holonomic (holographic in nature)
pattern response. Cradled in the micro-crystalex of the dolphin's brain is an especially
developed holo-center through which all in-going mind current is reprocessed back into its
original pure field, which is an holograph of infinite dimension. In order for any brain to process
knowledge data, it must be transposed from simple to complex as the mass of living matter
functioning as a placebo for the mind (I am, therefore I think... I think, therefore I am) is
incapable of grasping the simple, which exhibits no associate factors, being in itself contained as
an isolated sperm of generative thought, in which one burst has access to the other, stringing
together a train of illumination. The complex pattern must emerge from the simplistic cocoon.
We think, then, through the break-down of the One into infinity, returning, through our primal
attraction, to contemplate the immutability of our birthing chamber. The dolphin, too, must
distribute its thought in packages of multiplicity; but through its specialized nature it can bend
the light of reason backward and form a separate reality in the instantaneous knowing. While all
sentient beings must view their world through a holographic lens, the dolphin can think both in
complex structure and simple image. This enables them to communicate directly with all beings
in four dimensional sequence (sonic, optic, complex mental and simple mental). While the four
dimensional powers are retained by Illuminaries (highly spiritualized beings of the Central Earth
Tribes - Source 1-80) the dolphin performs this feat without the accompaniment of spiritualized
intelligence. While certainly intelligent and of the Earth's spirit, animal "souli" differ from
human souls in that they do not extend their will beyond the service of the Earth Mother.
Human souls are not so incorporate. They are both mutable with the Earth and possessors of
divine stewardship over the Earth. Thus in the dolphin, is found a living pulse registering in four
dimensional synchronicity, yet unlike advanced humanity, is not subjective to the knowledge
tapped. It cannot sit in judgment, and therefore, is an objective channel. Through the study of
the dolphin's holonomic assimilation of Earth waves, the very core of Oneness may be glimpsed.
The Shapa, or Central Earth species of dolphin, is especially attuned to the Earth rhythm, living
within the hollow of the planet, in the higher-frequencies of ether contact. Inner dwellers learn
from the dolphin the impending changes in Earth-flow such as the shifts of the tectonic plates,
which can be detected as a future event by dolphins even before the sensitive Subterranean
computers can discern these movements. Like the unicorn, the dolphin is a healing messenger.
Since the dolphin uses sonic vibration as its matrix of senses, it can affect the atomic line within
cells and cause regeneration of tissue. Most people are aware of the loving and playful nature of
the dolphin. Unlike the unicorn, who is selective, the dolphin is eager to touch both physically
and mentally its human companions. The souli of the cetacean (family order of dolphins and
whales) is the most advanced on the evolutionary ladder of the animal kingdom. The Dolphin
reclines at the summit of the nature experience on this planet. We, of the outer world, must
come to the edge of our ensouled sea and span the distance already bridged by our inner
brethren. Until we recognize ourselves in nature, we cannot cast our light out into the heavens,
where stars are exceedingly brilliant and our minds are yet too small to shine.
I cannot end this discourse on the Nature Kingdom of Subterranea without mention of the
"Nosha Hovers." In the untrampled forests of our terrarium Earth, there are to be seen misty
clouds of light hovering about some trees. The High Nature Devas, or Noshas, who govern and
preside over the Nature Kingdom, are able to become visible about an organic center where they
manifest as "Hovers," remaining for indefinite periods of time, connecting and communicating
with the region in their care. (It is true that the nature sparks of all vegetal life can be seen by the
aware on occasion but not in the glorious and consistent manner as the Nosha Hovers.) It is a
truly awesome sight to see such a light mist enshrouding a majestic tree. It is to these Hovers
that the emissaries of the Medicine Societies make pilgrimages in order to commune with the
forces of nature.
Some Noshas have continued to hover in one place for thousands of years. The most ancient of
these Hovers is found in Azmaquotl, a designated Prayer Garden. The garden was landscaped
around the Hover so that those who wished audience with the Nosha could have a meditative
setting for the encounter. While much of the land in Subterranea is landscaped to a subtle
geomantic order, conforming to the natural force lines and curves of the Earth, the regions not
managed by human inhabitants are still not "wilderness" as we define the word. Vegetation
grows abundantly, but does not battle and crowd for space. Trees are not so thickly proliferate
as to blot out the light on the forest floor. Because of the commanding presence of the High
Nature Devas within the interior World, abundance does not breed chaos. Life abides in
controlled symmetry. Pervading, is a splendor to the eye of the fullness in nature, without an
encroaching density to threaten that very profundity that is so impelling to our senses. The
Noshas long ago relinquished their sovereignty upon the surf ace of the planet. They await a
future age when their healing force may be allowed to restore our diminishing wonderlands.
Until then, they continue to faintly touch our natural world. So beautiful is this touch! Hermes
Trimegistus, as he lived as an Egyptian, centuries ago, exclaimed of our Earth, "Oh, the
beauteous bosom of life! 'Tis immortal longing becoming of substance before my sight. Upon
every leaf is inscribed the ancient verse. Beneath the paling moon is suspended the Garden of
the Lord, full and ripe for the receipt of His hand. I lower myself to kiss thee, sweet Mother, as
the sun finds root above thee and the stars proceed before thee. Grace is thy name, holy is thy
place before the Lord." -- from "The Blue Stone"
IN THE SUMMER OF 1981 the Mesa Verde National Park will host a celebration of its 75th
anniversary. The park was established by an Act of Congress on June 29, 1906. The crowning
ceremony of the observance will be the dedication of the park as a WORLD HERITAGE SITE.
To quote from a Cortez newspaper concerning this title, "The park was given special recognition
and named a World Heritage Site by the World Heritage Committee, the working body of the
Scientific and Cultural Organization. The intent of the World Heritage list, as designated by the
committee, is to provide international recognition to natural and cultural areas of outstanding
universal value... There are over forty sites worldwide on the World Heritage list, including
cultural areas Mesa Verde National Park and Independence Hall; and natural areas as
Yellowstone, Redwoods, Grand Canyon and Everglades National Park and Wrangell St. Elias
National Monument. Olympic and Mammoth Cave National Parks and Wright Bros. National
Memorial have been proposed for inclusion on the World Heritage list. The many and varied
countries participating in the program reflect an active interest in preserving their cultural and
natural heritage. As the United States' first World Heritage Cultural Site, Mesa Verde National
Park serves as an outstanding example of historic preservation of the world community.
(Referring to the ancient ruins in the park.) As details concerning the various activities are
developed, additional information will be provided by the park." (For further information, write
to Mesa Verde Park, Colorado 81330.)
The establishment of World Heritage Sites is unconsciously guided by the NOAH SUMMIT (of
the Culture-Rama beneath the Grand Canyon) and is a part of the remote projections of the Noah
Project (Source 1-80). This is not a mission of control employed by the Central Earth Councils
over the surface cultures, but an open channel on the subliminal plane, through which elect,
attuned, outer Earth individuals accept in their higher awareness to implement select courses
beneficial to the holistic entirety of the planet Earth. These courses are described by
Archetypical Identities (Source 2-80) and brought through various Earth offices, the main artery
of which is now the Noah Summit, into modulated patterns of defined action. This action must
be sensitive to the possible future directions Earth's course would take both with and without the
intercession of the Archetypes.
WITHIN THE NOAH PROJECTION is the Office of the Clarion, assembled to prepare for the
release of Vibratory records long held within ancient relics, works of art, etc. These pieces of
history's past have been hidden from world view for many ages, some being crusted beneath the
ever-concealing sands, others sequestered in undefiled chambers or guarded in remote
monasteries. They have not been revealed to present outer Earth civilizations because the
vibratory patterns they contain in their atomic records are not yet to be exposed to our life
patterns. Through the Clarion many of these articles will be prepared to confront the present
age. It is never an accident that a piece of the past is found, whether meticulously sought as
Schliemann discovered Troy or carelessly revealed by the kicking over of a stone. These
"restorations" are brought to the surface at appointed times, determined through the Cultural
Spirit, or collective consciousness of that specific civilization to which the fragment belongs.
This determination is, in turn, elected by the Archetypical Identities guiding the planet. The
Clarion was established in 1978 as the newest phase in Ultra and Inner-terrestrial Earth
restoration. The Clarion assembly has accepted the task of identifying these relics and art
masterpieces now ready for re-absorption into the living, cultural flow. The atomic records they
contain must then be translated into the Recording Crystals of Earth, as separate and individual
parts of the whole. The Recording Crystals automatically record all Earth events, but the
layering and faceting is left in some degree, to human precision. By personally submitting these
artifacts to record, the Clarion is able to facet specific layers which will later serve mankind, and
at present protect the atomic records of the relic. One of the most publicized and truly the most
holy of relics to be taken under the authority of the Clarion is the Shroud of Christ, called "The
Holy Shroud of Turin." There has also come to light a composition by Mozart at the age of nine;
and another intended "find," to quote from a recent newspaper clipping, "A huge treasure of
ancient manuscripts has been uncovered at a monastery in the Sinai Desert and may be far more
important than the Dead Sea Scrolls, according to a distinguished Biblical archaeologist. He
said the parchments and scrolls include some of the missing pages of the British Museum's
fourth century copy of the Great Bible, one of the earliest known texts of the Scriptures. Other
texts include not only religious writings but a copy of Homer's 'Illiad,' works of Aristotle and
other ancient writings in many languages, he said."
The following quotation is an Oath from THE BLESSINGS OF ABRAHAM - A work compiled
by Mormon, based on the ancient documents handed down from Abraham. Much of the original
material had been written by Abraham in an incarnation in Atlantis, and was recalled by him in
his life as Abraham. This work now lies buried in a cave in Arizona.
"In the sign of the Christ of Tomorrows, I am blessed by the light of today. I am restored to the
purity of the dove, through the baptism of fire and water. Through the golden Lamb, through the
break of day, through green fields of Earth's land, through violet flowers of morning, all are
blessed as I, and are embraced in the heavenly scent. As suckled milk, the sweetness of life is
passed from the sea to the river's rush. Goodness is life. It is the hallowed Earth and all therein.
It travels in whispered light from sun to luminous cloud and perpetually fills the world in faint
laughter, lighter than tears, stronger than the beating heart of human surf that fondles the shores
of God's many islands. I, as one of man's kind do take sacrament in the deliverance of His love.
I know I shall walk in this land through His goodness. I know not myself nor from whence I
come, but surely I shall again, and every stream will I one day know, for each stone will be laid
bare to me in time; and when all worlds meet my eyes, and when the cities still and the birds are
refreshed by the greater song of angels, then I shall know myself to be a clear, crystal surface, as
a transparent angel's wing, in which God sees His own eye of truth. But until that day falls into
my airy sea as a burning star from heaven, I will rest in peaceful knowledge that time shall know
me in God's house. I shall chant unto Him that He has given me a freedom eagles envy, for all is
unto me that is unto Him. My sins are but scales on the eyes to be melted away with the warmth
of His love. In the midst of such precious gifts, I shall not tarry in a barren field of broken
dreams where night is ever present. I shall rejoice with the butterfly and the meek and the brave
of heart, and I will forever see the sun until that great day of brighter light. I do not fear the evil
for they have no root in my valley, nor do they seed for harvest, or bloom for love. I am the
child of God, yet I am the master of the Earth, and I will not concede to death or to shadows of
death. I will not acknowledge the presence of darkness. I will not be vanquished by false
gospel. I shall reap carefully the truth of God's hand, and find sustenance in the grain of nature;
in all things of natural being, for this is His making and my learning. May I become His making
for the learning of others."
This particular piece was difficult for me to translate, as several minds had been involved in its
creation. Some of the original sentences were awkward and not too clear, such as, “I shall not
tarry in a barren field of dreams no more," which I took the liberty of rephrasing, "I shall not
tarry in a barren field of broken dreams." It is inevitable that the soul of the translator will touch
the reckoning of the words he or she translates.
A LOST VERSE OF WILLIAM SHAKESPEARE'S:
"Oh, to absolve the mercurial forces of men, so that naught is laid waste to the draft of time."
FROM THE KORAN (not a translation by me): "We offered responsibility to the Earth, the
Heavens and the Mountains, but they declined to bear it and felt unequal to it. Man bears it."
"A large fraction of the species of the cetacean (family order of dolphins and whales) have brain
masses one to many times that of humans... there is no warfare, even 'limited' between individual
cetaceans nor between their varieties of species... the main purpose of our research is to test the
hypothesis that dolphins and whales are sentient, intelligent creatures with communication
capacities beyond our own... the JANUS SYSTEM is a computer communication with its
recognizing unique sonic symbols... if language as we know it can only develop when the brain
is large enough in the silent areas, could it not be that these creatures with larger silent areas than
humans have a superior communication system than ours? Are we intelligent enough even with
the help of computers to break the communication barrier?..." --THE HUMAN/DOLPHIN
FOUNDATION
Cetaceans are to play an intricate and vital role in the future consciousness of mankind on Earth.
This link has long been perpetuated among the sentient relationships of the Central Earth
habitation. Further development of the human/dolphin communicative channel is a part of the
NOAH Projection of the Culture-Rama. "THE SOURCE" will detail human/dolphin
relationships in future issues.
For more information on THE HUMAN/DOLPHIN FOUNDATION and their membership,
write: THE HUMAN/DOLPHIN FOUNDATION, P. O. Box 4172, Malibu, CA 90265.

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 2-81
copyright © 1981 L.Christine Hayes
IN THEIR COMMITMENT to the regeneration of the planet Earth, the Tribes of the Central
Earth cavity, known as the Heritage of One, are striving to maintain the energy nodes of the
Earth as places of power through which needed recuperative vibrations will stream forth and
form an envelope of sustaining light about the world sphere. One of the major efforts of the
Noah Projection (Issue 1-80) is the maintenance of the "sacred places"... those regions of the
surface planet that are radiant with telluric and spiritual energies. Through surface humanity's
abuse of its terrain and resources, and by the spiritual misconduct of our masses, such areas as
these, the life-support batteries of the Earth, are being diminished in their true purpose and
potency. The physical and symbolic purposes of sacred Earth regions were discussed in Issue 3-
80, with special focus on the Four Corners area. In this issue, I wish to touch upon several other
major regions which harbor acu-energy resonations which we, as Earth dwellers, should be
aware of and to which we should become attuned.
FIRST, A BRIEF LESSON IN "GEOCHRONISM": The entrainment of Earth and its life
inhabitants to the universal condition of change, creating new states of reality and resultant
advanced modes of energy conductivity. All being is charged by the reaction of its own
existence. This cognitive factor impels the "being" to replicate its space-time existence in a
sequential order. Elemental matter is a resultant vehicle for this replication. Within the matter
of being (both living and what surface scientists consider non-living matter) is an etheric neuro-
pulse, an electrode of programmed reflex which is not physically ordained in an elemental shell,
but is an intelligent command present in the whole of the matter-form. The universe itself is the
archetypical neuro-pulse, acting like a wave continuously rolling beneath its own force in
undertow fashion. All being is entrained to this cosmic pulse. Planetary spheres and their
habitation abide by a specific condition of this entrainment - geochronism, which is the most
controlled, gravitational type of "unitrainment." Because a planet sphere is subject to the
multiplicity of the many-bodied state, in its solar orbit and its axial spin, its unitrainment is
complicated by many more variations of the time-gravity system than are other being-forms.
This greater need for diversity produces the geochronomatic phases of quanta-like "clicks,"
much like a stopwatch, accelerating and de-accelerating in a helix of time, each click initiating a
change in the reality spectra to accommodate the "difference" between the universal pulsing and
the neuro-pulse of the planet. Since the matter-body of a sphere has many variant parts, each
individual in type and function (inclusive of all planetary life structure), the neuro-pulse of the
total body is sub-divided into the multi-billion plus neuro-pulses of the individual prototypes,
divisible down to the smallest micro-impulse, which registers the harmonic of the entire matter-
body of the planet like a micro-vision of the world. While each neuro-pulsed particle acts
independently in the sense of selfness, it is not divided in the incorporate consciousness of the
system as a whole, i.e., a phase-locked planetary body. The inspiring document which reads,
"Indivisible, with Liberty and Justice for all," is a testament to the cosmic sovereignty of the
planet as it resides among the Temples of a Universal Doctrine. Each particle of being registers
a hologram of the universe, yet in its fragile decimal of existence, it commands a perfect
presence of selfness, unique in its self-containment of spirit.
WHILE THE TWO MAJOR matter-form distinctions on Earth are geologic and biologic, they
share a symbiotic condition of change and are thus both unitrained to the whole neuro-pulse of
our ether planet, the true quality of this sphere, which is greater than the sum of its physical
parts. Life is not a mere attachment to Earth, but the greatly specialized and vastly replicated
amplitude of its geochronism, the advanced nodes of energy conductivity. Life is the vehicle for
the infinite progression of realities necessary in order for the planet to keep in unitrainment. The
degree of advancement along the time helix determines its phase-lock on the geochronic scale.
When we view, for instance, the planet Venus via our phase-lock which is not changed by our
form of space travel (we take it with us) we see the Venusian sphere out of geochronomatic sync
with Earth. We perceive it then, through an altered state, one which has been determined by our
geochronism. Our light-space-gravity-time spectras are not at a proper dimensional angle to
synchronize perspective balance between the two worlds. The zenith of the Venusian reality is
removed from us when approached through our limited programming.
THE FOLLOWING LISTINGS ARE SEVERAL MAJOR GEO-COSMIC REGIONS -
SACRED LANDS WHICH RADIATE THE ELIXIR OF EARTH:
MT. SHASTA, CA. - Like a sentinel guarding an ancient Dwelling Place, the mountain of
Shasta lifts its sword-like peaks to a confrontation with the sky. A Mystical Matriarch, this
mountain shields her territory and those initiates who seek her flame, from the trespassers of
fleeting passage. She strikes an eternal gaze beyond the reach of men whose logic is chained to
mortal stone. This region, replete with cosmic proportion in space and time, beckons only the
most reverent followers of light to the song of her summit. The sacred land of Shasta, part of the
wounded scallops of lava Earth which erupted in a molten sea eons ago to form the Cascade
Mountain Range, is an inter-dimensional portal. This term defines the etheric bonding of the
region, which is especially elastic in its non-conformity to the more porous Earth envelope. This
condition creates a special sensitivity to the fluxes of the dimensional-transition field. Thus,
many different channels of receptivity are attained at Shasta.
VARIOUS LEVELS of the reality spectrum move in holonomic (named for or in the nature of a
hologram) accord. Like Ghost ships glimpsed by sea-weary sailors, entities float into Shasta's
seascape of holographic light screens, awaiting recognition by the inner eye and ear of the
seeker. There are numerous cities beneath the shoulders of Lady Shasta's crown. Space is not a
consideration, as each "city" is held within a frequency of its own holonomic line. That is not to
say that these cities are any less real than the ones we construct upon the surface. In fact, their
reality is more acute than the din of Los Angeles or the somnambulism of New York.
Vibrations, frequencies, atoms, space and time are all real essays of inter-design holomony - it is
the approach of our senses to different states of frequency that cause these factors to disappear in
our understanding.
THE CITY which is the closest to the vibration of our surface-human oscillation is within the
genetic frequency of the Central Earth Tribes, making it approachable through our standards of
interpolation. A perceptive surface dweller could physically encounter this city. Because of the
aforementioned elasticity of Shasta's etheric current, there are certain lower elemental life-wave
entities which, though the holonomic process active there, touch the mind vapor of the more
elemental mind/body complex of those who allow themselves to become receptive to negative
mental impressions. To some degree, this is always a factor of any highly charged land area.
All the most elect places of Earth are attuned to the Archangelic tides which must in turn be
sensitive to the entire field of realities which souls carry through the Endless Journey. When a
door is opened, the shuffling of a thousand heedless feet shall follow. There are appointed
Angelic Guardians for the purpose of discernment - of select registration in order to perpetuate
the Angelic Tone in the specific sacred place. It is a tone for that area alone, yet, like a
hologram, it mirrors the full spectrum of the planet in each facing. It is left to the ensouled
neophyte - the individual seeking the flame - to fasten his or her attention to that beacon of
higher illumination when entering the door of a sacred place; and to disassociate their presence
with the lesser images that cluster at the threshold.
MT. TETON, WYOMING - Another inter-dimensional portal which resides under the hierarchy
of the Guardians is this region near Jackson Hole. The etheric bonding of the area is not quite as
elastic as Shasta's, therefore it does not register as great an amplitude. The etheric shield for the
Tetons is especially polarized to a grounded magnetto, meaning that it is phase-locked into the
geologic power of the magnetic Earth. Consequently, there is a gravity differential which is
unique in its special geo-conductive properties. The dimensional laws of Shasta apply in basic
modulation to the Tetons as well. There are always variations between elect land areas, but
Shasta and Mt. Teton do share in the non-conformity of etheric bonding which allows the
holonomic "rapture" to dominate the engramic phasing of their etheric fields. There are multi-
complexes beneath the tawny hide of Mt. Teton, reaching outward under the area. One of these,
harbored in a frequency range closest to our surface vibration, is a Central Earth complex opened
to surface dwellers who have strong genetic inner Earth links through descendants who were
originally inner dwellers. Even though surface individuals are admitted, they are selected not
only for their heritage ties, but for their stability and spirituality as well. This is not the only
entrance which will receive surface inhabitants, but it is the only complex in North America
containing the genealogic records necessary for admittance. It is a "clearing house," capable of
sending "trace records" to any other inner Earth orientated complex throughout the world.
GREAT SALT LAKE / WASATCH MOUNTAIN RANGE - Located in Northern Utah, this
historic region was the divined destination for persecuted Mormons, led by Brigham Young, into
the then barren valley surrounding the Great Salt Lake. Encircled by mountains, this land gave
to a wandering people a place of purpose and continuation of their seed in the Earth. The
Recording Crystals reveal this area as a designated central point for the future "New Jerusalem."
A Holy City shall arise from where there is now a city composed of the common peril of our
society - crime, pollution, and urban blight. The once undefiled depths of the Salt Lake, where
only crane bowed head and seagull pierced the still waters with hungry forethought, are, in this
age, darkened with man's refuse and ill-timed, unsought encroachment on the balance of natural
rhythms. A pall of smog often claims the visual beauty of the Wasatch's mountain majesty. Yet
mankind cannot, in all its infant fury, dismantle the inner strength of a sacred land. Given decree
by a power to which all the trivial pounding of the tiny hammers of humanity's folly must yield,
this region of America remains a royal throne for a yet-to-be-fulfilled prophetic reign. Its mark
shines on the Archetypical blueprint as one of the designs for a future Earth-Temple.
WITHIN A CANYON of the Wasatch, ten minutes from the roar of a city devouring itself, is the
"Trigate" - a point of telluric charge which receives the Three-Fold Flame of the Planet into the
Central Sun Atoma. This Sacred Flame is received only on the inner-planes. In the Golden Age
it will be taken fully into the planetary frequency. Underneath one of the Wasatch mountains,
one of the largest Ultra-Terrestrial bases in North America is sheltered. It is also one of the
newest complexes, having been built in 1973.
HALEAKALA CRATER, MAUI, HAWAII - The Recording Crystals reveal this moonscape
crater as a former major vibratory disc (plateau) upon which the Earth resonances were received,
attuned and recorded. Because of changing pressures in the etheric bonding field eons ago, the
plateau collapsed, inverting its auric charge into the center of the planet. The Nature Guardians
of this region speak of its designation as a future Garden Preserve, which will be established in
the Twenty-first Century under the Noah Projection of the Inner Terrestrials. By that time, Noah
will have met its major goal of working with the surface dwellers to re-seed and regenerate the
surface of the world. Research is already underway on the island of Maui, conducted by David
Boylan and his associates, involving communication with plants and the seeding, growing and
harvesting of vegetal crops through guidance supplied by the residing Nature Hosts. Mr. Boylan
has this to say about Haleakala:
"HALEAKALA IS ONE of the Earth's special places. It contains within it the seeds of every
civilization that has ever been on Earth. It is a major energy point in both the old energy web of
the planet and the new energy web that is beginning to form. It is a translation point which takes
people from old to new. It is a place where inner teaching is the curriculum, and the professors
are of universal intelligence. It is a place where one goes to meet themselves, and to look past
into the point of cause."
AMISTAD (near DEL RIO, TX) - A site of ancient history and legend, this semi-desert plateau
is one of the frequent mysterious sightings of "lights in the sky." The Recording Crystals of
Earth hold this area to be tellurically active, with strong currents shifting from positive to
negative poles. Riddled with caves, the walls bearing petroglyphs of a Lost People, Amistad
contains hidden chambers of the Ancients and a tunnel leading to an inner-cavern colony, the
passage to which has been blocked for over a thousand years. It is a region of high negative ion
charge, housing deep aqua caverns, which serve to create a breathing effect similar to the Four
Corners. The chakral activity for Amistad is prominently the base of the skull with phasial
pulses for forehead (third eye) registers.
FOUR CORNERS / MESA VERDE PLATEAU - This region has been covered in previous
issues of "The Source" (most thoroughly in Issue 3-80), therefore renewal members will find
some of the following material repetitive. However, I feel this brief summary is an important
inclusion for the benefit of new subscribers.
FOUR CORNERS is the region where the four states of Utah, Arizona, New Mexico and
Colorado meet. The energy web of the "Foursquare Cornerstone" reaches approx. 200 miles in
each direction, although this matrix is connected to other nearby force fields - the combined
energies often forming "special fields" during certain geo-chronic phases. In the Colorado
portion rises the Emerald Table - the Mesa Verde Plateau - atop the Colorado Plateau. From the
Recording Crystals, the geologic history of this region tells us that the Colorado Plateau was
once a part of a giant plateau, or “Golden Table”, collapsed, the Emerald Table (Mesa Verde)
stood as the strongest resonance point of this once towering plateau. There are several
interchanging elements of telluric force in this land area, combining to form the "Sacred Knot"
through which the electronic and protonic currents of the ascending and descending Earth planes
(emanating from Tibetan and Titicaca plateaus respectively) pass as a balancing and stabilizing
effect for the planet. It is a Place of Emergence from the hollow of the Central Earth and
contains the Inner-Terrestrial complex, Solar-terria, beneath the Mesa Verde Plateau, with
offshoots of the main complex extending throughout the immediate region. Ancient vaults lie
sequestered within the primal cliffs of the desert and beneath the verdant mountains of Four
Corners. A land of extreme contrasts in nature, it receives from the nadir to the zenith in Earth
harmonies.
FROM THE APPOINTED GUARDIANS of the Emerald Table is given the following
information: "The Foursquare Cornerstone (Four Corners) assumes the position and the Mark-
Place of the Solomonic Foundation Stone for the Zionic Balance (Z-ionic; "Z" being the Coptic
letter of the Helix Flame, which is the dual circulation of positive-negative Serapis Fire of the
Earth-force exerted equal to the force restrained - equal in ionic charge - sustained in both
polarities). As the Sacred Knot (an activity flex of Four Corners) it is also the "Door" in a Four
Manifold Plane. (1) Physical - under the astrological register of Leo. (2) Astral/Conic mind -
under the register of Aries. (3) Etheric/Higher mind or Pyramid Mind - registered under the
regenerative power of Scorpio. (4) Theta or Fulcrum of the Illumined mind - assumed through
the sign of Capricorn, the Grail Cup."
THE MESA PLATEAU serves Earth as an involuted heart chakra (in that the heart ray is
received into the Central Atoma from the Solar Ray) and also as the spinal base chakra for the
lifting of the Serpent Fire to the Crown Chakra, also within the Wheel of the Four Corners. This
sacred land is high in negative ionic charge, which is the vitality-lifting charge of the planet.
Underground waters form a breathing exchange effect with the air ions, constantly purifying the
region. Altitude ranging from 6,000 to 11,000 ft., the solar emanations strike the "Cornerstone"
creating a special tone of Angelic concordance in the Planetary Harmonies, the octave a B
minor.
****
********
THE SUBTERRANEAN CULTURES of the Heritage of One are the guardians of cosmos-
geologic blueprints mapping the planet's energy structure on all levels of its existence. The
Earth performs the functions of a many-faceted crystal, creating dimensions of reality through an
intricate network of telluric force lines - a crystal grid encompassing the planetary sphere. The
following information is printed in "EARTH-FIRE 1," a publication by Jalandris: "In 1973, three
Russians, historian Nikolai Concharov, construction engineer Vjacheslav Morozov, and
electronic specialist Valery Makarov, announced in the science journal of the Soviet Academy of
Sciences, 'Khimiya I Zhinzn' (Chemistry and Life), their discovery of a geometric 'grid' pattern
which spans the globe. The lines of this grid pattern, they revealed further, are the lattice edges
of a great crystal - a crystal that is nothing less than the Earth itself. The structure of the
planetary crystal form an icosahedron, made up of twenty equilateral triangles, interconnected
with a dodecahedron, composed of 12 pentagons, or an 'icosa-dodeca' for short. In the esoteric
wisdom of the Pythagoreans, the icosa and dodeca are the fourth and fifth of the “five sacred
solids" known to geometry, each having special characteristics associated with it, which reflect a
hidden understanding of energies resounding throughout. The icosa symbolizes water, perpetual
regeneration, and the color blue. The dodeca, on the other hand, vibrates to the element Aether
(an all pervading substance known to the Ancients but neglected by modern science), which
unites and shapes all material elements, and is the color white-yellow. We are reminded of the
'blue dragon' and the 'white tiger' of the Chinese lung-mei Earth energies, with their New World
counterparts, the blue-green feathered serpent Quetzalcoatl and the yellow jaguar Tezcatlipoca
of the Aztecs. As these two 'polarities' were remembered as continually seeking balance
together in the world's subterranean currents (underline mine - CH) so the two crystal forms are
also harmonized within the structure of Planet Earth."
THE SUBTERRANEAN CULTURES perpetuate the belief of their (and our) ancient ancestors
that all physical being is the geometry of Spirit, actualized through the impaction and
compression of thought. Without sentience, there would be no physical dimension. The energy
of mind is also the seed-current for the life-waves on this planet. The viable planetary energies,
or life-waves, are generated in the Aether, and therefore, are in associate relationship to the
dodecahedron geometric form. Yet without the regenerating, sustaining fluid of water, the
continuity of the life-waves in the matter realm would not be possible. It takes fluidic
conductivity to bring together the very opposite conditions of dynamics and inertness into a
symbiotic harmony. The icosahedron geometric water-form, then, provides the line of action for
this emulsification. On the crystalex planetary grid, the icosa-dodeca charges the Earth with the
two creative genders - icosa-water-female and dodeca-Aether-male.
AS DISCUSSED in previous issues of “The Source”, the central sun Atoma of the Earth
contains a variant energy field, expanding and contracting as it responds to the outer solar orb
and to its own magnetic atmosphere, as well as the many other universal influences. As the
Atoma conducts its energy dance, the atmosphere of the hollow cavity in which it is suspended
becomes "rich" in conductive ethers. I have used the term "conductive ethers" to encompass the
etheric conductor or charge which is the adhesive quality pervading all substance - the "Aether."
There are various degrees of charge within the Aether, depending upon the presence of sentient
awareness or Spirit factor. Within the central hollow, all the spiritual powers of the planet come
together in the Atom, where much of it is transformed into a physical charge. The central hollow
of the planet acts as a resonant cavity, "A space enclosed by electrically conducting surfaces, in
which electro-magnetic energy may be stored or excited. The frequency of the oscillations
within a resonant cavity will depend upon its physical dimensions." -- definition from the
Penguin Dictionary of Science. As the conductive ethers in the hollow build in pressure about
the Atoma, they are channeled through the "nervous system" of the planet - the many fractures
and veins of ore - to the Earth's surface membrane, the crystal grid. Viewing the Earth from a
crystalline perspective rather than a biological one, the icosa-dodeca facings of the crystalex grid
pattern act as the opposing facings for the resonant cavity of the central Earth hollow (a
piezoelectric effect). As the energy migrates from the center of each frame to the lattice edges,
the pressure is relieved and replaced by a tension along these lattice edges. The P-N charges are
then reversed. The ether body, or auric body (two perspectives of the same condition), of the
planet acts as a soul-shell surrounding and involving the Earth. As the pressure of the resonant
cavity effect builds upon the icosa-dodeca facings of the crystalex grid, the planetary soul-shell
expands through a process the Central Earth scientists call "Second Form Manifestation." For
the sake of condensation, I will not attempt to explain this principle here, but suffice to say, it
does occur and in doing so, allows the transformation of the pressure build-up on the crystalex
facings into tension along the lattice edges. As the tension is equalized on the lattice edges, the
size of the crystal "function-body" of the planet (not the physical size of the sphere, but the
performance of its dynamics as a crystal) increases. The results are manifest in an inverse piezo-
electric effect. This completes the crystallic cycle begun within the central sun Atoma. The
Penguin Dictionary of Science defines piezo-electric and inverse piezo-electric effect as follows
(beginning with the former): "A property of certain asymmetric crystals. When such crystals
are subjected to a pressure, positive and negative electric charges are produced on opposing
faces; the signs of these charges are reversed if the pressure is replaced by a tension. The inverse
piezo-electric effect occurs if such crystals are subjected to an electric potential, an alteration in
size of the crystal taking place."
THE CRYSTALEX GRID is one of universal dimensions, extending far beyond the icosa-
dodeca facings of the Earth's surface, and reaching far into the smaller and smaller Earth
chambers of geometric pattern, down into the quartz of rock, to the minute lattices of inter-
dimension. Without this entire energy process, our planet, as a physical body, could not exist.
Dynamics is the condition of the universe and all of its components. Through geometries, the
holonomic mirror is conceived within each facing, each micro-particle, reflecting the entire
moving picture, complete to the nth degree.
**
***
IN THE SCIENCE DIGEST, July, 1981, an article by Gerrit L. Verschuur, entitled "Is The
Cosmos Alive?" discusses what researchers call the "Gaia hypothesis." To quote from the
article, it is "the notion that the earth's biosphere plus its atmosphere equals a living entity." Mr.
Verschuur continues, "Within a protective membrane of atmosphere, earth's life form and that
atmosphere are continuously sharing chemical products - as do the parts of the body - in order to
maintain an ecological, living balance... The earth absorbs sunlight; a waste product, heat, is
radiated out into space. This conversion of energy of substances from one form to another in
order to maintain the functioning of the organism is its metabolism. The earth is alive, why not
the Universe?" Mr. Verschuur concludes, "We must think seriously about relocating the line
between living and non-living organism. I no longer believe that it is at the edge of the body's
epidermis or at the edge of the earth's atmosphere. It is at the edge of the Universe."
**
*******
AN ENGINEER, now living in Golden, Colorado, has worked with implanted crystal and poly-
crystalline devices for bone replacement. He is presently constructing glass-cut containers in
energizing shapes such as the dodecahedron. The container, when filled with water, releases air
from the subsequent condensation, raising the vibration in the atmosphere where the container is
located. Placed in direct sunlight, these energizing modules prism light into a myriad of colors -
also beneficial for uplifting of the chakral balance when gazing at the-spectrum produced or
allowing the prism-light to be reflected directly on the body. Engineer Brian Starling hopes to
create advanced meta-healing techniques through further experimentation with energizing
structures.
OF INTEREST... In Issue 4-80 of The Source, I translated a quote from the "Talithwa Canticle"
(of the subterranean Temple of the Twining) which is a symbolic intonation of the Christ
transfiguration through the Earth in the many stages of receipt. I later read in the New Age Bible
Interpretation, Vol. V, of a similar world to "Talithwa" - "Talitha," Aramaic for "Little Lamb" -
used by the Christ in his incarnation as Jesus.
***
********
I was informed by my sources that the pupils of the eyes of the Ultra- and Inner-Terrestrials
dilate when exposed to light. This is due to the fact that their body sensors are in harmony with
light, whereas ours are not. Since we receive only the physical, frictional degree of light, it is an
irritant to us even though we cannot live without its radiant bath. Thus, only small amounts may
enter into our bio-systems at a time. The pupils must contract to keep these frequencies to a
minimum. The more illuminated body-soul complex is in parity with the entire spectrum of
light, and upon encountering it, the body embraces it fully.
RECOMMENDED MATERIAL....
JALANDRIS publishes books and research information on cosmos-geologic data, ancient
civilizations, Earth sciences, future prophecy, etc.
JALANDRIS is the spiritual name of Dr. Joe R. Jochmans, who has been doing private research
into a wide spectrum of geo-cosmic topics for the past two decades. For the past 15 years, Dr.
Jochmans has traveled throughout the United States and Canada, and to Europe, to leading
museums and libraries to pursue his studies. He has had articles and citations published in
several leading New Age periodicals in the U.S., England, Australia, and was recently featured
in the cover story for Egypt's national magazine, October Weekly. Dr. Jochmans has given
lectures in twenty states across the country, and has spoken on both radio and television talk
shows. I found his "EARTHFIRE" series by far the most complete compilation on geo-cosmic
sciences, (ranging from world megalithic monuments to the famous crystal skull), that I have
read to date. For further information on Jalandris Research - the Earthfire Series, Earth Energy
Directory, and other related materials by Dr. Jochmans, write to: Joe Jochmans, P. O. Box 1731,
Vinyard Have, MA 02568.
*****
**********
GEO-HOLLOW RESEARCHER Bruce Walton has compiled several volumes on inner Earth
material collected by him from various sources, dating back into the 1940's. Mr. Walton's
editions serve as an excellent review of the surface world's perception of the whole inner-Earth
phenomena. As editor, Mr. Walton leaves to the reader's discretion the separation of fact from
fancy. While some of the stories are doubtful, and others deal with anomalies of the sense
world, which feed off of negative thoughts to create entities of a lower elementalized nature,
there are many experiences described which correlate to the Central Earth frame, or to the C.E.
Tribe colonies and "Lost Colonies" discussed in The Source Issue 1-80. All stories and
documentations in these volumes are fascinating reading as seeds of truth reveal themselves
throughout. For price list and index on Mr. Walton's four "Inner-Earth Entrances" volumes,
write: Bruce Walton, P.O.Box 1942, Provo, UT 84601.
