# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 3-81
copyright © 1981 L.Christine Hayes
IN PREVIOUS ISSUES, the unity of the subterranean tribes / cultures has been viewed through
their spiritual ideologies and interactions with nature. All segments of the Society of the People
of Subterranea are appendages of the "Grand Totem" (Issue 1-80) and find their base principle
rooted in the Spirit-Life Circle (Issue 1-80). Yet the avenues of technological accessibility for
the people are greater, the progressive excellence more stable among the inner civilizations than
we find it in the midst of our surface confusions and moral decay. Our technology has become
an indispensable nightmare, its talons clutching the throat of our survival. It feeds our left brain
with computer programs telling us we cannot exist without technology, which cannot be
maintained without a gradual decomposition of right brain responses. This, the science
visionaries prophesy, will lead regrettably, yet inescapably, to the de-spiritualization of the world
and our ultimate disposal into the cosmic garbage heap. This is the illusion which alters our
ability to find alternative connections between technology and spirit. The inhabitants of our
planet's interior are not reconciled to the feeding of one child and consequentially starving the
other. Their technology is most evident within their society, but in comparison with ours, there
are several essential differences which create totally opposite approaches when contrasting the
above world with subterranean:
(1) Subterranea is free of artificial pollution. Their technology is equipped with "Earth
power." The natural currents of the Earth, the magnetic waves and inner solar rays are
tapped as the major source of energy for the inner Earth's populace. For specialized
situations, star power and bio-power are employed. All power needs are met through
natural non-pollutant means that do not harm Earth's ecosphere (outer and inner).
(2) The machinery used by the Subterranean is less diverse in types than on the surface. There
are fewer models but they are of greater flexibility in the performance range of their
components.
(3) Like their surface counterparts, the subterranean technology is computerized, but their
psychological approach to computer technology is quite different from ours. Computers, to
them, are seen as extensions of living senses. Since they are composed of circuitry far
more biological than are our computer units, (the central component being bio-plasma)
computer to the inner dweller is perceived as a matrix for controlled bio-systematic
responses. The key word here is "controlled." Because of the strong spiritual vision of the
Central Earth Tribes, their own abilities of cognitive awareness into greater dimensions of
being, they do not fear the might of the thinking machine. Within the Society are the
Illuminaries, whose powers of mind far surpass any computer, bio-plasma or otherwise.
The computer, then, for the inner Earth inhabitant is no more than an expedient tool. The
mental attributes of the Illuminaries are spared the tedium relegated to the computer, and
freed to assume their role of spiritual masters to their races.
TRANSPORTATION - The main form of transport for the masses is vacu-transit. This is an
elongated capsule transported through a clear tube vacuum in a tunnel underground (although
there are a very few "vacs" that run through surface tubes). Beneath the tube is implanted
crystalex cells, somewhat resembling the photon cells of our solar devices. In fact, they act very
much like solar cells, but their source is not the sun in this instance, but the magnetic currents of
the Earth. These specific magnetic cells, which provide regulating conduits for the Earth power,
supplying the locomotion for the capsule train, are "current floats." They are designated this
identification as these magnetic cells are designed to suspend themselves in individual cocoon-
like cavities in a state of levitation. Within each shell or cocoon a wafer-thin cell floats through
a multi-faceted vibratory dance, creating an absolute precision in the transposing of Earth current
into locomotive power for the train. Without the floating effect of the magnetic cells, the
differential of force between the Earth's natural spasms of current and the needed delicate
maneuverance of the capsule train would be too great. The in-depth technology employed in the
current floats and the whole mechanism of the vacu-transit would require many more pages than
I can spare here. I must limit myself to sketches of basic engineering, and leave the intricacies to
future textbooks. The vacu-transits are in the majority among transporting vehicles of
Subterranea because they are more easily constructed, contain greater capacity for speed and are
far safer than air transit. (Inner space is more difficult to navigate than outer atmosphere.)
AIR VEHICLES or inner-spaceships are in use mostly by the Starcraft Legion, a surveillance
system and input-output assembly for geological and atmospheric studies for both inner space
and the immediate space surrounding the planet Earth. This Legion is also a defense force used
solely for self-protection through camouflage, deterrents and stunning rays. (See Issue 1-80.)
Individual spacecraft transportation for the Subterranean is reserved for special circumstances.
Other modes of transportation are horseback, horse drawn carriages and walking (there are also
some inner-city “moving sidewalks”). These are considered pleasurable experiences which are
not performed solely in leisure, but employed whenever the need to get from one place to
another within a reasonably short distance arises.
One of the most contrasting ingredients between the mental makeup of the outer and inner
dwellers is the state of rush by which we are perpetually driven, and the atmosphere of calm in
which the Subterranean exists (although the interior commuter is not adverse to the convenience
of the speedy vacu-transit). There is no invisible dragon lurking upon the horizon, ready to
devour each second as it is expelled from the clock. To them, time is a fragrant bath, washing
them in ritual purification. Perhaps a portion of their attitude about time is derived from the fact
that their sun never sets or rises, or that fast transit, free of congestion, is always available to
them. Yet, it is more the spiritual oneness that pervades among the Society and filters into their
conception of their place in time, rather than time as an individual and usurping entity. Despite
this stress-free acceptance of time, the interior world paces the Earth's cyclic changes, order and
events with far better precision than does the outer world populace. Their "clocks" operate much
like the magnetic cells defined as current floats in that the basic mode is the same, that of
suspension and vibration. However, these do not float their currents. Instead, their suspension is
centered in the chamber by polarized light. Inside the "shell" of light, the actual time counter is
housed, levitated to the center of the inner chamber. The time counter is a single atom. Through
computer decimation the vibrating frequency of the atom is monitored. While the outer world
possesses atomic clocks, the inner versions are infinitely are accurate, as surface atomic clocks
obtain their information from a moving beam of atoms, whereas the inner world clocks observe
an atom at rest. Without interpolation of motion, the actual pulse of the atom is more precisely
revealed. One of these super-atomic clocks can contain many thousand individually chambered
atoms. The number of atoms monitored depends upon the type and complexity of sequence
being timed. It is known by the Subterranean scientist that different sequences register in
slightly variant time frames from one another.
IT IS THROUGH THEIR ACUTE KNOWLEDGE of these time frames that another form of
transportation is elicited. Beam transporters (yes, Star Trek fans) are used for those trained in
the ability to withstand the molecular transfer of living cells through the transformation of matter
into energy and then back again into the same matter-form once the transportation of the energy
beam has been completed. Such a transfer requires specialized participation and yoga-like body
control, otherwise the ectoplasm of the body would not rejoin the mass. Consequentially, beam
transportation is reserved for adepts in this medium.
MR. ISAAC N. VAIL (1840-1912) developed a concept which he anointed as the "Canopy
Theory," postulating the presence of a high atmospheric cloud covering and encircling the Earth
in prehistoric times, consisting of ice crystals. To quote from the publication "Earthfire 2" on
the subject: "Just how plausible is the idea of a water canopy once existing at such a high level?
There are several likely altitudinal candidates which even today exist as possible ‘remnants' of
the prehistoric canopy: at the 22 mile and 50 mile levels, thin, pearly clouds of ice crystals are
sometimes seen, called nacreous and noctillucent clouds, respectively. Atmospheric conditions
are right at these altitudes for the creation of much larger suspended ice crystal formations, if
water vapor could somehow be ‘pumped off' and 'held' in those regions. Still higher, above the
stratosphere, is an area called the troposphere, which borders on the edge of space, and here,
between 80 and 85 miles above the Earth, is a specific layer called the thermosphere. Here, the
temperature reaches well above the boiling point of water, and remains constant day and night.
This layer has the potential for holding indefinitely a vast quantity of water vapor, and there is
evidence that it may have done just that, for traces of water-cluster ions have been discovered at
that altitude. As to what happened to the ancient water canopy can be found in the Genesis story
of Noah's flood. Genesis 7:11-12, 19 reads: 'On that day the windows of the heavens were
opened and rain fell upon the earth forty days and forty nights.' Clearly, no normal rainstorm in
the atmosphere could have created so vast a quantity of water, the only answer is that the
'windows of heaven were opened' refers to a collapse of the old water canopy and the sudden and
tragic precipitation of what would have been perhaps millions of tons of water from high in the
sky onto the surface of the Earth."
SUBTERRANEAN RECORDS confirm the existence of this water canopy in what the inner
inhabitants of this planet call the "crystal veil" above the surface of the Earth in ancient times.
For the dwellers of the interior, the canopy is not so removed from them by time, for their
atmosphere still harbors a similar canopy... a crystal veil. In Issue 1-80 of The Source is stated...
"While the solar orb is without atmosphere, suspended in airless space, the Central Atoma
(central sun) is within a field of density at the very heart of a matter-sphere. Within a few miles
of the corona the atmosphere is so heavy that a thick hydrogen vapor is present which bursts into
illumination. As the Earth rotates on its axis, variations occur in the density of this vapor, or
Helia, causing different intensities of light."
Between the Helia and the interior surface of Subterranea, there exists a form of ice crystal
canopy, which interacts with the effects of the Helia to create beautiful geometric impressions in
the ether. However, the inner canopy is somewhat different from the ancient outer crystal veil.
The inner version is not as consistent a layer, but forms more in circular patterns in the sky, like
giant lenses placed in grid fashion throughout the inner heaven. As the Atoma pulsates, so the
intensity of the inner veil canopy increases and decreases. The clouds of the canopy consist of a
different composition than the ancient outer in that there is a greater etheric charge and more
hydrogen and oxygen contained within the crystals. This, combined with the vastly different
polarity fields and gravity-constant of the central cavity, create unique properties not present in
the ancient canopy. Yet, the basic conditions and effects of the two canopies are the same.
Continuing from "Earthfire 2" on the ancient outer canopy "...if the 'heavenly' covering was
composed mostly of hexagonal-shaped ice crystals (just as 'remnant' clouds found very high up
in the atmosphere are today) it means that the sun's and moon's rays passing through the crystals
have been refracted, creating halos and other spectacular atmospheric phenomena. Today we see
these 'light shows' on rare occasions when conditions are just right, and they take the form of
'mock suns', rings, light circles, arcs, 'sun pillars', 'crosses', and 'sun-dogs'; but thousands of years
ago, with a crystalline sphere in place overhead, such halo phenomena would have been an
every-day occurrence, and prehistoric man could not have failed to notice them."
Such megalithic stations as Stonehenge were, among other geo-cosmic purposes, observatories
for the geometric form evidenced through the crystal veil of the Ancients. At the poles, the light
formations refracted through the crystal veil would have been especially prominent, as they are
at the polar windows within the planet. In the publication "Stonehenge Viewpoint" - "The reader
will recall the claim made on a former page (of S.V.) that all canopy 'portions' must eventually
pose in the polar sky as majestic archways; that these forms though fiery and lurid under the
blaze of the hidden sun would appear like a great mountain heap of concentric curves, and each
curve would conceal a portion of the true sky, and the whole mass, as we learn from the Book of
Job, is represented as something 'stretched' or arched over a small portion of 'empty space'... a
number of these arches would make a stupendous 'arcanm' or cosmic depository. The upper
portion of this mountain heap, being vastly nearer the observation of southern Europe, would
appear to be made up with a congregation of portions whose lower parts would run together and
unite as in a vanishing-point in the north horizon, or perhaps below the horizon. A very
appropriate name for such a heap would be the 'Mount of Assembling' or the 'Mount of
Congregation."
In Issue 3-80 of The Source - "All manner of habitation within and upon the Earth sphere exists
through the inter-penetration of spirit and matter. Thus, as the solar wind of the Earth Atoma
moves through the vibra-plane, via the surface Earth chakras, both major and minor, it must pass
through a receiving station within the central habitation, and this station is the Sacred Center of
all Earthen matter, the great mountain of the SAF-FIRE, which could be analogous to the aorta
of the heart (Atoma).
All of the sacred lands of the Earth (especially the high plateaus and mountains) are channelled
through the subterranean mountain of the SAF-FIRE. It is within this holy mountain that all
Earth's nature forces are united with the Spirit."
The Mountain of the Saf-fire is composed of the polar concentrations of the inner crystal veil
and a density of the ice crystals so matter-orientated as to be attached to the plain of the inner
world. The "Mount of Assembling" is seen within the central cavity at both polar openings as a
reflection in the heavens, appearing mirage-like at certain periods during the contraction and
expansion of the Atoma cycle. Since the inner world geo-symmetry is concave and not convex,
as is its outer shell, the refractive and reflective power of the Central Earth's ice canopy triggers
a greater transportation of image through its light-wave medium, focusing its polar light at a
common center between the poles.
THE ACTUAL LOCATION of the Saf-fire Mountain - the point where it densifies to attach
itself to the inner planet, is in the "center field" or "travex" of the inner plain. The travex is the
point which is geo-cosmically (according to all planetary relative fields of association) the center
of the terra firma of the interior world. (Not to be confused with the center of the Earth as a
hollow spatial cavity - the center of this space being the Atoma.) The Saf-fire Mountain or
"heap" is the cosmic surveyors' golden mark of the travex. In the upper reaches of the inner sky,
the Saf-fire is refracted light - haloing, arching, cascading in the heaven - a glory of color, a
melody of light as it pirouettes in sun dances with the changing Earth Tides. The middle portion
of the Saf-fire is denser, less brilliant and more diffused. The lower region of the Mount
becomes more and more solid as the ice crystal lattices bind into closer geometries, forming the
glacial heap attached to the Earth. Because this Assemblage is focused through a strong
magnetic field (the central sun using the crystal Mount like a conductive coil), temperatures are
low only within a narrow radius of the mountain.
SIR JAGADIS CHANDRA BOSE, botanist of India, discovered in the early 1900's, the
similarities between the human and vegetal condition. In "The Secret Life of Plants", Bose's
work is related... "He designed a special optical lever with which he was able to demonstrate
visually that all of the characteristics of the responses exhibited by animal tissues were also
found in those of plants."
"Bose held that the isolated vegetal nerve is indistinguishable from the animal nerve; 'So
complete, indeed, has that similarity between the responses of plant and animal, of which this is
an instance, been found,' wrote Bose, 'that the discovery of a given responsive characteristic in
one case has been proved a sure guide to its observation in the other, and that the explanation of
a phenomenon, under the simpler conditions of the plant, has been found fully sufficient for its
elucidation under the more complex circumstances of the animal.””
IN THE GREATER SCIENTIFIC UNIVERSITIES of Subterranea, the biological relationship of
man and animal with the vegetal kingdom, and the subsequent symbiosis of all living systems
with the geologic condition of the planet, is a supreme knowledge developed to embrace the
qualification of the entire human sojourn on and in Earth. At the center of this knowledge is the
human brain/mind complex. This ensouled network of neuro-impulses and cognitive imagery is
both the instigator and ultimate receptor for all Earth processes. As we think, so we are. The
elements are impacted thought-waves infused with the wisdom of creation. We see and hear
through a limited spectrum designed by our brain/mind complex to accommodate the finite range
of our awareness of spirit, which, in turn, is our ability to comprehend the infinite.
One of the most essential branches of Human/Earth sciences, and certainly one of the most
complex, is "geo-cerebral alignment." This is the function of the brain in which it is attuned to a
particular amplitude of the Earth's geo-dynamic register - through the rotation of the cerebral
matter of the brain, within its liquid-cushioned cavity, to a "critical rotational position" (CRP) in
sync with a particular geo-register. From the center of the Earth's inner sun is emanated a pulse,
which, in turn, is emitted as a frequency up and down the polar "spine" of Earth - that polarized
field between the poles, running through the planet. This frequency is radiated through the inner
and outer ecospheres of Earth by the inner and outer resonate cavities. The inner resonate cavity
(ecosphere of the hollow Earth) charges the surface crystalex grid of the planet, which
interchanges frequencies with the outer resonate cavity between the Earth's surface and the
ionosphere. The entire process brings about a holistic media of attunement, through which all
life becomes the sensor system of the planet. In order for biological species - human, animal and
vegetal - to maintain the life-wave energies, they must focus their neuro-sensors upon various
frequency amplitudes on the geo-dynamic spectrum. This spectrum is a complex, computer-like
scale, registering codes or packages of cognitive directives created through the assimilation of
various Earth / solar / stellar processes. These code-packages are "xgrams". (See Issue 4-80,
Xgrams.) They are like energy programs for the Earth's ether computer print-outs, giving the
exact vibratory patterns of the many different parallaxes in which the neuro-activity of a
brain/mind complex can align itself by cerebral rotation. The inner world inhabitants can,
through a series of tonal frequencies and/or light patterns, command brain alignment to whatever
geo-dynamic parallax chosen upon the spectra.
As an example: should there be presented to a Subterranean physician, a patient whose left arm
was paralyzed as a result of an accident, the physician would treat the patient by submitting him
to a tonal / optic computer, which would locate the geo-dynamic parallax needed to restore the
neural control of the left arm of this individual. Then, through tonal and/or optical stimulus, the
patient's critical rotational position for that particular amplitude on the geo-dynamic scale would
be activated. This treatment would almost certainly recover the complete use of the once
paralyzed arm. However, it is not as simple as it sounds. Were the programs, or xgrams, easy to
decode, our brain centers would be accidentally stimulated into major CRPs by a succession of
honking horns or Beethoven's Fifth Symphony. In order to protect our brain/mind centers from
violation of their own genetic response codes (which, when triggered, fit like keys into the
"locks" of the xgram), the programs of the Earth's ether computer are complex and require
intricate maneuvering of vibratory frequencies to elicit a major CRP.
Minor CRPs are constantly being stimulated in our brain by sunlight, inaudible and audible
sound waves, the motion of the Earth and other sense factions of our world. These minor or
lesser CRPs are critical in the creation of our reality. The major or greater CRPs are intended to
serve as major adjustments for our sensors when our bio-systems become radically out of step
with the geo-dynamic spectrum in some aspect. The activating of major critical rotational
positions perform much the same function as a circuit breaker's in recharging de-activated neuro-
pulses and reestablishing the proper circadian rhythms in erratically cycled neuro-pulses within
our body's schematic. This process is also evidenced in the vegetal world. The CRPs of plants
have been radionically detected. In "The Secret Life of Plants", this movement is stated as -
"Apparently established by the Earth's magnetic field as seed sprouts out of the ground. If the
seedling is transplanted in such a way that it continues to grow in its CRP, it will thrive better
than plants which have been transplanted out of that orientation... because of this apparent
relationship with the geo-magnetic field, a plant has a pattern of radiation around it. Node points
within this pattern or web which seem to concentrate the field of radiation can be located by a
portable detector with a probe and a rubbing plate similar to that on their radionics device."
Like plants, animals and humans also radiate a pattern about them. Through sophisticated
plasma-based computers, inner terrestrial technicians can locate not only the node points within
the pattern but their coded message, giving them the CRPs connected to the body's acu-points.
"PARAGRAMS" ARE VISUAL AND TONAL image refinements of the aforementioned
xgrams. While the xgrams are the coded programs of Human / Earth symbiosis - the directives
of organization - the paragrams are the images created by the xgramic function we see in our
world as a constant procession of signs and symbols. A "Stop" sign is a paragram of our design.
It is a form of communication through visual display - a product of human thought and
recognition. Erosion lines upon the side of a mountain are also paragrams, if they relay a
symbolic picture to us, whether definable as the shape of a cross, bird, etc., or indefinable - an
unknown symbol that is nevertheless noticeable to the recipient in a way that triggers an etheric
association within the brain/mind. Any sign, symbol, form or color variance is a paragram or
associate link to the geo-dynamic spectrum. These, in turn, can stimulate minor and sometimes
major CRPs in the modular performance of the bio-cerebral unit.
THE SUBTERRANEAN bio-technicians utilize the paragram displayed by the crystal veil of the
interior atmosphere, in their geo-cerebral alignment techniques. These paragrams, called "helia-
centric" paragrams, are the most profound image-relators displayed to human cognizance by the
Earth xgrams. In a balanced, whole-Earth system, the crystal canopy initiates a multiplex of
purposes, one of the most fundamental being the supplying of our thought centers with the feed-
back from our own bio-Earth interactions, in order that we may continue to retain and evolve our
psikenetic human systems in step with our inherited spiritual soul-body. At present, surface
dwellers receive only a small portion of undistorted images necessary to our holistic growth.
The inner world adherence to the "sacred images" and their naturally retained crystal canopy
with its accompanying helia-centric paragrams, promotes a greater understanding of the human
journey in and on the Earth, and the subjective rationale of this planetary abode. Through the
stages or initiatory layers of awareness, they strive to breach the confines of three-dimensional
relativity and approach the summit, the flawless diamond of sight that is perceived only through
the Eye of the Divine. Although the Central Earth Tribes have yet to reach such heights in
spiritual ecstasy, their foothold upon the Sacred Mount is more substantial than is ours of the
outer skies.
WITHIN THEIR MARVELOUS plasmitholic computers are the designs of Man and Earth - the
pageant of mental magic through which humanity reflects the Diamond Eye in its own tapestry
of sequins and dust. While the dominant form of paragrams are visual in our realm of
consciousness, tonal symbols are of equal benefaction to our communal parts. Within every
neuro-impulse of every cell of the biological organism is a magnetic field acting as a tuning fork.
The sounds of the universe, audible and inaudible, strike these magnetic forks, procuring the
precise pitch needed to maintain the life-wave within that cell and to unite it in harmonious
decree with the millions upon billions of other singing cells in the bio-system. The critical
rotational position of the brain determines the channelling of the sonic nuances to the individual
cells. The positioning of the skeletal frame, organs, veins, nerves, etc. determines the
distribution of the flow of blood through the body. In like manner, so the CRP of the brain/mind
is the regulator of tonal / visual receipt in the cells of the body. The inner Earth computers
which work with the geo-cerebral alignment (GCA-C) are put to use in many areas of action.
For instance, the computers involved in the Inter-Species Alliance program of inter-species
communications, mentioned in Issue 1-80 of The Source, are a type of GCA-C unit.
IN 1977 I TRANSLATED from the Earth Crystal Records, some information concerning two
ancient cities once located in the Salt Lake Valley of Utah before Adamic Man. These cities
were erected and populated by a humanity from the stars. The information I received was never
published, but I would like to share it with you now, as it bears a seemingly strong relationship
to some material from another medium which I came across recently.
From my 1977 translations: The Star Bow Clan made the long pilgrimage on foot to the Sacred
Mountains of Char (Wasatch), which had been designated as the area in which the first and the
last Holy Cities would be erected at the base of this mystic stone in the Valley of Char (Salt Lake
Valley). The ancients entered the Salt Lake Valley, Utah, containing in that era a lake much
larger than the present Salt Lake. It was fed by an immense flowing river of salt water from the
Atlantic Ocean. Here, near the base of what is now known as Mt. Olympus, they raised small
dwellings in which to live while they built their magnificent city. The plans for this city, named
Terabel, were drawn from the coordinates of laser beams penetrating the Char Valley from a
great distance in space. Thus, the blueprints for Terabel were actually energy prints for the
mountains and valley of Char, arranged in geometric lines conductive to templaric structure.
After the construction of the first city, a second, Xmu (also from cosmic blueprints), was built
near what is now identified as Mt. Timpanogos (Provo, Utah). Within the Mountains of Char,
the Master Builders placed massive vaults in which to preserve their blueprints for all time.
These were hollowed deep within the stone heart of the mountains by the use of high frequency
beams. Once secured, the chasms were coated with a thin layer of silver and gold. Through a
means of magnetic reversal and atomic interpolation, the sacred blueprints were transposed into
tonal vibrations and implanted within the atomic shield of the metallic layer. This prevented
interlopers from obtaining the records, yet made them available to those specifically evolved
beings who could release the recorded tones through the higher spiritual sciences. Within these
vibrant chambers were also placed some scrolls and vibra-rings. On the scrolls and rings were
imprinted lesser knowledges which the Master Builders felt could be released to those of lower
spiritual evolution. The layer of silver and gold maintains a constant signal tone serving to alert
those of greater spiritual origin as to its presence and location.
IN XMU, THERE in the sunset of an ancient day, braced against the horizon, was the
penetrating staff of the Gods known as the Star Tower. Made of copper with a point of silver, it
shone as a shaft of light glistening in the twilight. A perfect obelisk, it reached upward into
space eighty-two stories in height. At the top of its silvery point was an opening, boring through
to the lowest level, and it was capped at its peak with a crystal lens of special consistency and
shape. About the obelisk, a circular building hovered, the shaft protruding from its center.
Within the building, the shaft's end was girded into the ceiling, connected to a series of
geometrically shaped beams interconnected to form a maze of inter-dimensional designs. The
beams were made of an alloy created through alchemy (not alchemical gold) which appeared to
be silver, but contained within the surface of its velour a multicolored sheen, reflecting rainbow
colors when seen at different perspectives. The metal was a conductor to invisible light waves
transmitted from deep space, transformed into light of the visible spectrum when the waves
traversed down the Tower and entered the rotund chamber. Here, they were transposed from
dynamic signals to images within a sensitively charged space area a few inches in front of the
metal. In giant holographs the viewer could see images of vast stellar systems that are unknown
to our present civilization. Many of the star systems viewed through the Star Tower were from
other dimensional fields, and therefore, in a different time frame. This telescopic procedure was
devised to correct the depth of penetration of invisible light frequencies so that they conformed
to the Earth's perceptual node.
IN AUGUST OF 1981, I am made aware through friends, of an organization previously
unknown to me, in Salt Lake City, called SUMMUM. To quote from their introductory material
(all underlinings mine): "While living in the Mt. Olympus cove area in early 1973 (the year I
was first sent to SLC by my sources - CH), Claude Nowell, founder of Summum, began going
down to his den to meditate. He soon perceived a sound in the center of his mind." Mr. Nowell:
"After a time I discovered there were vast concepts and amounts of information on that sound. I
learned to tune into this sound and take the information from it."
Mr. Nowell reveals that he was later taken aboard a space craft. These beings explained to him
that the sound he was hearing was "Phi... a pure vibration at the fountainhead of relative
existence. All knowledge of relativity, the field of time and space, can actually be taken off the
sound of Phi. It is only necessary for the mind to learn how to refine its perception of
stablematic feedback."
Summum, as explained by its founder "... teaches us to move our attention towards the source,
where knowledge and fulfillment are.'
" This organization has erected a pyramid building in Salt
Lake City. For more information as to their purpose and activities, address correspondence to:
SUMMUM, 700 Genesee Ave., Salt Lake City, UT, 84104.
APPARENTLY THE "PHI" is intensified in that region and attuned to the tonal vaults within the
Wasatch Mountains. I also find this information to parallel with the “critical rotational position"
of the brain/mind complex, mentioned previously in this issue of The Source.
Of "incidental" note - The material on the two ancient cities of the Salt Lake Valley is from a
file on my holocrystal translations, which I have entitled "The Master Builders." The first cities
built by these Masters were the cities of Terabel and Xmu. While preparing these writings for
inclusion in the third issue of 1981's Source, as I was retyping from my file, I found the
following: "One hundred million years ago from the date of August 25, 1977, the first physical
beings came to Earth. This was before the time of Adam and his generations of Earthmen." The
date I am preparing this information for is... August 25, 1981!!
IN THE PUBLICATION "VOICE OF ASTARA," there is some revelant material channelled by
Page Bryant. Ms. Bryant was told by her sources that "Four Corners" of the southwestern U.S. is
the heart chakra of the planet. (My sources call it the “inverted heart chakra.”) When she
journeyed to this region she was made aware of four "Thunder Beings" that guarded the area.
The Thunder Being of the South was steward over healing and regeneration. The Western
Being's post was the "escape valve" of the planet. The North Being of Thunder was sentinel of
the "door of communication through which the planet Mother projects and shares Her love and
brotherhood with all other celestial bodies."
The "Thunder Beings" revealed to Page Bryant would seem to be the entities identified to me as
the "Chieftains of the Four Doors" (Issue 3-80). The Thunder Being of the North, and his
guardian post at the "door of communication" is connective to the "Northern Door" (Crown
Chakra) which my sources often refer to as being located at Ouray, Colorado, on the outer edge
of the "Medicine Wheel" of the "Four Corners."

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 4-81
copyright © 1981 L.Christine Hayes
THE ILLUMINED MASTER, THOTH HERMES TRISMESGISTUS, who now dwells in the
Templaric Earth, projects a pyramid of Light, as a second Light shell over my soul / body's own
natural, bio-light pyramid. Through this linking of Light pyramids, is filtered the holocrystal
paragram from the Recording Crystals of Earth into my consciousness spectrum. To quote from
Issue 4-80 of The Source... (reworded slightly for better clarity):
"He (Hermes) is an Illumined of the highest order, holding many regent life charges on the
Earth, among them being C. Hiram Abiff, the Master Builder under King Solomon; Imenhotep,
the physician and architect of Egyptian Pharaoh Zoser; Quetzalcoatl / Kukluclan, the Emperor /
Savior of the forefathers of the Aztec and Maya; and the legendary Hiawatha, co-founder,
together with visionary prophet Deganawida, of the 'League of the Iroquois'."
In a recent message I received from Hermes, or as he prefers to identify himself, "The Initiate,"
he defines his participation in the entity projections of John the Beloved and Enoch...
"I, as the Initiate, am integrated with Enoch, who was not incarnated man (in the temporal sense)
but is a Radiant being, who employed the temporary focus of a mortal form only; and John of
Revelations, who was incarnated man, but also when upon the Isle of Patmos, was the
mouthpiece of Enoch."
On September 2, 1981, I received a consignment from The Initiate, which reads in part..
"Goest thou unto the ramparts of the Lion, to the summit of the Emerald Table, to the Palace of
the Sun, wherein resideth the Bonding Flame. As a Vision Quest, the Revelations of Ages, so
thee will be made witness to the Ether Records bonded to stone. They wait to speak to the
initiated on wings of gold, hence life to be breathed from the mouth of the Lion as the Word
uttereth from the Ageless Keeping of the tongues of signs, sounds, and sights. The place of the
Sun Temple is the Homing Ground, where the Helios met their Brethern of the Blue Madras in
the First Day. It is thy assignment to bring forth the Keys of the Burning Record, the TELOS-
AHAMBRA... Take the crystals known as 'Herkimer Diamond' quartz (which come from
Herkimer, N.Y.). These crystals are the most pure, and potent, to come out of the Earth that are
now being mined. It is upon this ground (Herkimer) that the Ultra-Being, Moroni, dipped his
staff into Angelic Light and thereby charged the quartz with the Host. These stones (which are
taken to the Sun Temple of the Mesa Verde) will undergo an energy transformation and be
attuned to the archangelic chrysalis that is received through the 'Sacred Knot' of the Emerald
Table"... (these infused crystals will be imbued with)... "the pure streaming of the angelic and
nature-spirit energies as they pour through the resonating planet."
The following quotations are from "Secret Places of the Lion" by George Hunt-Williamson:
"The great Sun Temple at Mesa Verde, which has long been an enigma to archeologists, was
built to commemorate the coming of the 'sun' ship to the Indian people. Their legends today
state that when some of their people learned to make 'weapons of lightening' they constructed
this unusual temple. Inside the Sun Temple are two round structures which are spoken of in
legends: "The gods with weapons of lightening assembled in one structure, while the mortals
with ordinary weapons assembled in the other... At one corner of the Sun Temple visitors to the
ruins at Mesa Verde can still observe a strange symbol in the rock. It appears to be a natural
formation, yet it looks like a rayed sun disc. This is the exact spot where the great 'sun' ship
landed in the thirteenth century A.D. The 'disc' and its 'rays' were created by the force field of
the ship. It was done deliberately so that a marker might be established at this location. Holes
drilled in the center of the rock disc are still visible today, and were used along with wooden
pegs to determine certain sun positions."
My sources have told me that long before the sun ship mentioned in the quotations above
impressed the seal of the sun into the Earth, Mesa Verde was the place where those from the
"Blue Star" (in Orion) emerged from the center of the Earth (where they had been Zionically
beamed) to meet others from the Blue Star, who arrived in Light Visicas - supernally borne
photonic matrices for the carriage of ensouled ultra-physical beings, such as those who were the
"Helios" (from above) and the "Blue Madras" (from below). It was here in the time before the
Adamic Race, that the Helios and the Blue Madras were united once again. These "Master
Builders" placed the first of the geo-detic markers in the holy ground where now stands the Sun
Temple, directly under the spot where the later craft from Venus would impress the sun disc.
The geo-detic markers, 33 in all, were embedded in areas around the world, marking the major
"temple junctures" of the First Layer of the Earth Temple (there being several layers in the total
design). The disc Earth-Markers also send tonal signals into space on a frequency accessible
only to the more luminous ensoulments. Since the location of the Sun Temple on the resonating
plateau-disc of Mesa Verde is a "homing ground," many landings have occurred there in the
ancient past.
ON THE LINEAR DATE of September 20th, 1981 (Sept. 22nd being the Autumn Equinox), I
and two associates journeyed, as instructed by The Initiate, to the Sun Palace of the Emerald
Table. In order to transfer the “Keys of the Burning Record". I took with me cameras and a
small portable synthesizer upon which I would strike tonal coordinates to the Ether Records
bonding the aura of the Temple. The photographs taken of the "bonded stone" would serve as a
photon charge to release the heliogram impressed through the Guardian Powers upon the stone
mass centuries ago.
Upon reaching the imprint of the sun disc which my sources more often refer to as the "Sun
Grail," set in an alter on the outside wall of the Sun Temple at an approximate western angle, I
placed the crystals into the concave of the imprint. Here they were infused with the Emerald
Flame. I found the circular and roofless Temple to be "sealed" with a labyrinth of concentric
ether rings, each ring a balancing charge for the other, an etheric blueprint of the nine levels or
layers of initiation of "Zionic" passage infused into the Earth-Mass of the planet (from the inner
to the outer world). I was guided by one of "The Guardians" who oversees my Light work,
Burning Man, Shamagician of the Medicine Societies of the Central Earth Tribes. He led me
and my companions through an invisible passageway before I physically entered the Sun
Temple.
There is a helix of Light Pyramids running in spiraled symmetry clockwise through one of the
two inner circles in the Temple, and counter-clockwise through the other. This is the electronic
red ray charge (left brained / clockwise). The outer wall, upon which is appendaged the altar
with the Sun Grail (and beneath it the geo-detic marker), serves as the shield of neutronic
balance. Above the Temple and its immediate grounds, the aura canopy filters the streaming
etheric Light of the "Morphi," the eternal and supernal Light which infuses all Creation; the
Kabbalahistic "Ain Soph," through an invisible lens of spectral holocrystalic prisms. The
resultant color-Light pattern "rayed" into the Temple of the Sun is visible only to the etheric
sight. In the future Generation of Light, this "heliogram" will be seen by the visible sight of
Earth's peoples. The filtering of heliograms within temples and other ancient sacred structures
or natural creations is ascribed to certain key nodal points wherein concordance of the higher
Light spheres is present. As I worked through the various energy sequences which I was
instructed to perform, a hawk dipped and soared in circles above me in physical sight, a
messenger from the "Culture Holders" of the Mesa.
WHAT WAS ACCOMPLISHED during that time atop the Mesa has been encoded and
transferred through Morphionic Light into the Crystal Pyramid grown or manifested within a
icosahedron faceted crystallic chamber beneath the "Mount of Miuthraum," the Ute Mountain
near the Mesa Verde Plateau. This chamber is an addition to the "Solarterria" complex beneath
the Mesa (Issue 3-80). The crystal pyramid, or tetrahedron, was revealed to me through remote
viewing (etherically). Tiny rainbow-like grids can been seen in its pure crystal mass, as
opalescent refractions, changing with the perspective of the viewer. These paragramic grids
contain the encoded knowledge which are being stored within the pyramid. The crystal
tetrahedron, fully activated on October 27, 1981, is assigned the name OAHQUES-TAU.
"Oahques" is a tonal paragram meaning, "Knowing that it is" or knowledge that is fountained
within the soul. "Tau," the 22nd letter of the Hebrew alphabet, is the ancient "T" cross, the
Masonic symbol of the T-square; the Taurus-Bull of Orion; the Mystic Hammer of C. Hiram
Abiff, and the caduceus of Hermes (both incarnates of The Initiate). The Tau cross was the sign
given by the Lord to the people of Jerusalem to mark upon their foreheads, as related by the
prophet Ezekial. It is also a symbol of the "Unamanity Pact Among Equilibrant Worlds," those
worlds which carry the same genetic ancestry as Earth.
As I was re-typing this material for The Source (from rough draft) I came across an interesting
passage in Corinne Heline's "The Bible & The Tarot," concerning the "Tau" (underlinings mine -
Christine):
"Apocryphal Masonic legends ascribe the Books of Tau and the symbolic T to Methusael, the
descendant of Cain, as we... reviewed the story of C. Hiram Abiff, the Master Architect of
Solomon's Temple, who plunged through the raging molten sea to the center of the earth where
he met his ancestor, Tubal-Cain, and received from him a disk and hammer with which he
returned to the surface of the earth and completed his masterpiece... Rosicrucian legends state
that Hiram Abiff was reborn as Lazarus, taking the name of John in Initiation,-and becoming the
author of the Fourth Gospel... Four, and therefore 400 (the number of Tau), which is 4 raised to
a supernal plane, relates to the number of the planet Earth. When Hiram arose from Earth's
center he became the ROSE AND THE CROSS... The wonderful Books of Tau recorded the
history of the Sons of Fire and detailed all of their wondrous wisdom and their secrets of the arts,
crafts, and sciences including also those deep mysteries pertaining to Earth's center, into which
Hiram had been initiated by Tubal-Cain.
"In esoteric Christianity it (Tau) is the Christ Ray which penetrates to the core of the planet
Earth, and when the 3x3 Initiate has gone through the Nine Lesser Mysteries founded by Hermes
TRISMESGISTUS, He is joined to the Liberator and is released from the Wheel of Death and
Rebirth, for at the center of the Wheel there is rest. The central Earth Mysteries are symbolized
geometrically in the Point, the Square and the Circle, all drawn in one figure."
THE SUN TEMPLE is positioned atop the Mesa, near the rim of a narrow canyon cutting
through a portion of the plateau. Within viewing distance of the Temple, on the same western
facing of the canyon wall, Burning Man showed me the "Sacred Mouth" or "Place of
Emergence," also referred to as "The Source." It was from this stone door that the Blue Madras
emerged from the grips of darkness into the Light of "Atana," the solar sun. In the present time
frame, the only witness to this most ancient past is a large "door" outline, appearing to be the
product of erosion. Next to the Sacred Mouth is an old Indian ruin called "Sunset Ruins," as the
rays of the setting sun strike this western flank of stone.
The following was received from The Initiate on November 11, 1980. In the communication,
my Spiritual/Cosmic/Earth Heritage or "Spirit-Life Heritage" was being revealed to me...
"THE LEAGUE OF DAYS crosseth thy hand. In thy palm houseth the Star of David, which
endureth as the Star of Sophia, the Star of Venus, the Star of the Christos Magi. Ye did descend
to Earth from the Blue Star, passing through the Crown Chakra of the Humming Path
(Himalaya) and into the nine layers of the Earth to the interior of the Hopisan Planet (Earth).
There thou wast received by the Rosae Solaton (Sun Rose) which is also the Sacred Script as the
Atone Raia (Atom of Inner Light.) Thou was generated within the Golden Rose as a seed of the
Sun's womb for 40 cycles in time. Then the Family wast given the command of the Ra-Tone,
which called them upward from their silent dream of green pastures and still waters, from the
Land of the Eternal Sun. They left their dwelling of roses and mounted the stairway of the Atana
Path, the Throat that opens to the outer-solar sun. The Company became the Blue Madra,
Family of the Shepherd, also recorded as the "Blue Star People." They became known as the
Bearers of the Flame, the “Fire People” as well. The Fire People entered into the first Earth
Initiation as they ascended the Atana Path. They traveled in darkness, back through the nine
Earth layers which they had descended effortlessly in the beam. Returning on the upward path
was tedious, with much unknowing in their hearts. Some members of the Family chose to
remain in the interior of the world. There were some who left the assemblage after the crossing
of the Great Wall (natural division between upper and lower portions of the planet). The
remaining Company proceeded through the total of the depth, up through the lighted dimensions
of the surface plateau to commune and give adoration to the messenger of the Most Holy, that
messenger being the glorious Atana. Here, on the Emerald Table, they erected the Temple
Atlanta, meaning 'Shining of the Solar Angel.' In the Temple Atlanta, each of the Company of
the Blue Madras was given his and her design of Life, his Heritage, the thread woven of cosmic
fire by the angelic beings, the colors set forth from the Nature Kingdom by the most sovereign of
the Cosmorphia. Each Child of the Sun did sew his own robes with the holy thread and the
sacred colors."
"Upon the surface world, the Blue Madras were met by the Helios in their ships of Light. The
Helios were also of the same 'Shepherd' Family, but did not choose to go through the Earth
Initiation, and therefore were not ‘Fire People,' but ‘Air People,' as they performed the carriage
of the Air Element. All of the First Assembly of the Blue Star who united again on the surface
world from above and below were the 'Sun Bow Clan.' After the Clan had erected the Temple
Atlanta, the Helios continued to other points of the planet to place markers for future surface
sites. The Blue Madras remained upon the Emerald Table (there were some exceptions - those
who went with the Helios) to set up the Law as it was given to them to do. First they made their
robes in order that their history be woven and carried in ritual about their bodies as a second skin
of new life."
"When the Blue Madras first saw the Great Atana in the sky of the upper world, the Helios were
there in the ships of Light to meet them. As they were once again joined, the Clan of the Sun
Bow was visited by the Host of the Christos in the Soul of the Prince, the Soul chosen to carry
the many identities of the Christ from Adam to Jesus. When the Temple Atlanta was built and
the Inner Sanctum completed, the seed-stone was placed therein and was grown to full
dimension. This accomplished, the second Visitation occurred. The Christ Soul took physical
form this time, whereas with the first Visitation He had been consumed in Light. This physical
presence was Radiant and not of the elemental flesh. The Voice was like unto a bell. The Host
speaketh unto the Temple assembly:
'I AM THE LAMB CF THE SHEPHERD. I PLACE MY SEED UNTO HOSPICE. I GIVE
THE FIRST OF MY KIND UNTO YOU.'
"As he spoke these words, which were like a rising wake onto a steady shore, His Seed was
spiraled into the Crystal Stone and Illumined therein. From the center of Fire, a living Soul
germinated, and in 12 cycles of the Blue Star, was brought forth to live as one among the Family
of the Shepherd, for this they truly became from that time forward. The Child was known as
'Panther.' This, then, was the first Living Flame of the Christos of the Earth even before the time
of Adam, although this was not a karmic one as would be the Adamic Generation."
As translator of the above transcript, I feel the need to make several remarks concerning it.
Unlike the more scientifically pronounced "messages" or material directly siphoned by me from
the Recording Crystals (messages being transmissions from greater intelligences), this receipt is
given in almost storybook syntax. This is occasionally the case with some messages when they
pertain to a history so many eons ago as to be removed from our complete understanding of it.
The entire consciousness level existing then was almost a universe apart from our present
perception and thought processes. Consequently, it is my opinion that like the Bible, the deepest
truth of the message is encoded to be revealed to the heart (spirit mind) more than the cerebral
intelligence (matter mind). Once again, as I arrived at this portion of the issue while re-typing
from rough draft, I was guided to read in Corinne Heline's "New Age Bible Interpretation (New
Testament), Vol. IV." (from which I had not read previously). The following passages in this
volume strikingly pertain to the "Family of the Shepherd" mentioned in the 11/11/80 message
from The Initiate. From Vol. IV:
"When the Sun last past through Taurus at the Vernal Equinox and was approaching the cusp of
Aries, the Sign of the Lamb, about 2000 B.C. there appeared in Egypt a new order of rulership
under Hydsos or Shepherd Kings, invaders from Arabia. Manetho, the famous and wise
historian, tells us that these kings ruled for many years and that Egypt was indebted to them for
much useful knowledge and great expansion of artistic endeavor... According to an obscure
tradition, the mystic Shepherd Kings, after their expulsion from Egypt, gathered in a certain
place named Avaris and remained there for a time, the Egyptians being unable to dislodge them.
Later they passed through the wilderness into Syria and into a country now known as Judea,
where they erected a city afterwards called Salem and where, much later, Melchizedek bestowed
upon Abraham the mystic rites of the Order. This city became known later as Jerusalem, the
holy spot that for thousands of years had been impregnated with mighty spiritual forces
generated by wise and holy men in preparation for the coming of Christ Jesus."
According to the Recording Crystals, the "Melchizedek" mentioned in the Scriptures is the title
of office carried by a Master Teacher from the "Order of Melchizedek" and not the name of the
man himself. The "Shepherd Kings" we find in the crystal records as the "Solaria-Sun Race."
(See "Phoenix of the Saf-fire" on "Saf-fire" series tape list.)
UPON MY JOURNEY to the Emerald Table to "bring forth the Keys of the Burning Record," I
was given the assignment of inscribing these Keys to word and symbol in a book entitled "THE
TAROT KEYS OF THE INITIATE." I quote from this text:
"The Card-Keys of The -Initiate offer to the individual seeker a power grid through which he or
she may charge their memory centers and connect with the 'Light Morphi,' the Kabbalahistic
'Ain Soph,' that great field of Divine Light penetrating and directing all Creation, flowing from
the Mouth of the Source. These flamed power codes have been integrated (in this text) with the
Tarot Deck. Each Key possesses a mantramic Word of Power issued through the foci of the
Morphionic planetary resonance. Above each mantragram is imprinted flames of the Yod. 'Yod'
is the 10th and last letter in the first series (of 22 letters) of the Hebrew alphabet. It is far more
than a symbol, possessing the morphionic charge of mankind's inner spiritual sun, the 'Atoma' or
centering of Light. Through the guided placement of the Card-Keys of The Initiate (via the
Tarot Deck) these Yod-Flamed mantragrams will trigger within the participant the inner Fire of
the Sephiroth, the Kabbalah Tree."
"The placements of the Tarot Cards in the geometric patterns of the 'Five Sacred Solids' registers
the charge of each form as a crystal energy. It is therefore more than a means of divination or
discernment of events, but acts as a metamorphic matrix for the dynamic and static charges of
the Universe within the holistic body of man. The astro-flame of each Key in the Initiate Tarot
is bonded to a vibratory degree of the astrophysical. The astro-chemical valency is registered in
the number form of the Key. Thus, as the Card-Keys are placed in a sequence by the neuro-
impulse command of the seeker (or medium personage acting for the seeker), that individual is
creating a bonding of the astro-physical self of the seeker to the Morphi, the Creative Light
issuing from the Source. The mantramic syllables of the Initiate Keys are of an ancient order.
They are from the Sacred Mantras of the Lemurian Melchizedek. The Melchizedek mantragrams
were chosen because they are from the Books of the lost Language, from which the Sacred Key
Languages of the Earth were derived. While these Card-Keys bear the Flames of Power, they
are attuned only to the higher Spiritual- Order, and cannot be used for negative, disharmonic
purposes. The Morphionic Emerald Seal is impressed upon "The Tarot Keys of The Initiate,"
which would cause any misuse of these Keys to be turned back upon the issuer of the ill-
conceived employment."
AFTER THE DATE of October 27th, when the OAHQUES-TAU pyramid was fully energized
and activated, I began to be received into a higher consciousness state during sleep, in which I
was surrounded with Illuminaries who infused my mind with specific knowledge quanta being
directed through the O-T crystal pyramid within the mountain, and then radiated toward my
thought centers. The O-T pyramid segments the pure energy of the knowledge beam into pyra-
radial color / sonic layers of omni-dimensional bands. The O-T is, on a smaller scale,
duplicating the actions of the Universal centering / encoding / integrating of the Morphi as it
passes through the pyra-radial Star Gate. These pyra-conic engrams filter through the Earth's
consciousness spectra, integrating with minds uplifted to receive the paragrams (picto / sonic
ideograms) sequenced into our cerebral focus via “critical rotational positioning” (CPP) of our
brain/mind complex (Issue 3-81). The O-T crystal has now been positioned to act as a further
filter and integrator for all high-energy knowledge sources, whether directly from the most
luminous level of the Universal Spectra or the "hybrid" crystals created by higher intelligences
operating for the spiritual good of the planet. The natural Recording Crystals of the Earth also
contain ultra-layers too powerful for direct receipt in this time frame. The Earth is now entering
a far less stable spectra-field within the changing etheric envelope of the planet as we pass
through PHEA-3 (phasar entropic acceleration) which is a gear to a higher planetary frequency.
This particular "gear” will peak in 1982 and be sustained through 1984. After 1984, there will
be a period of greater stability for those who will accept the frequency change during PHEA-3.
However, from the present point in 1981 to mid-1982, there will be an increase in frequency
breakdowns as the other (old) etheric charge is dissipated and the new one is organized about the
Earth. From mid-1982 through 1984 this entropy of the old ether canopy or envelope will be at
its zenith, although acceleration will have ceased. Thus, during the period of 1981-1984 in order
that the highest level knowledges (of the Seventh Seal), which we as Earth participators are able
to receive, be given forth to our planetary zone, there must be established in the Earth special
conductors of thought-crystal grids entrained to the Light transport of common synthesis to act
as stabilizing pyra-nodes. Through the O-T, this region, which is an essential coupling
frequency for the Light transport of the greater Universal intelligences and the crystallex Earth
grid, will be able to maintain its parity of dynamic infra-fields with the pyra-radial program for
this planet as a Light sphere.
For several nights in succession, I was brought into radiance with the pyra-radial focus of the O-
T crystal pyramid. I seemed suspended in a weightless atmosphere, surrounded by a blacklight
screen (not merely darkness, but a screen of black) upon which three-dimensional energy fields
were projected. At one point, floating soundlessly toward me until it was stationed above my
face, was a triangular image of blue (an outline of three planes of symmetry - not a solid form).
In its center (which was spatially open) there appeared to be two blue tetrahedrons, or perhaps
octahedrons as viewed from the top. These pyramidic images were interlocked forming a six-
pointed star. There was some movement or rotation within the axis of this "star," causing the
jettisoning of blue flames outward from the entire triangle. As I continued to witness this energy
manifest, I identified it as a Light vehicle of knowledge communication, an intelligent factor of
the total knowing. This entrancing form proceeded to "face-link" with me; to match its
intelligence spectra with mine.
Our physical bodies contain a complexly encoded Light program that is composed of all quanta
of Illumined reference, from the nadir to the zenith. Depending upon our individual levels of
consciousness at the time, our bio-Light programs are more polarized to a particular zone of that
nadir-zenith Light pyramid, which we, as ensouled bio-systems, are the externalized product.
Thus, in order to integrate its intelligence spectra with mine, the Light vehicle had to deduce the
common reciprocals of pyra-radials between its Light program and mine. The interlinking
procedure must be accomplished through the acupoints and lines of the human face. It is here
that the entire body's Light program is duplicated and receptive to interlinking. The human body
in this instance is analogous to a door - the face to the keyhole.
The next visual experience I consciously remember is seeing the letters of a sacred language
(possibly Hebrew) suspended as written pages against the blacklight screen. I was the one in
motion now,
gliding past the letters. These inscriptions were also of blue fire and as I sailed past
the 'pages' I could see the letters from different reference points, the side and the back, revealing
the dimensional value of each. I knew these pages of Inscription were a cosmic table of Light
Mathematics. Each Fire-Letter was a yodic increment of crystallic valency. As one penetrated
knowledge, so the Table of Fire-Letters bonded that soul to a greater spectra of pure, crystalline
interaction with all principal and being. The acceleration of mind equals the entropy of Light
transport through into the next universe or Morphionic Creation.
Experiences such as mine need not require a crystal pyramid in one's backyard. Any receptive,
spiritually oriented individual is a candidate for Ultra-Light Communications. In my instance,
the OAHQUES-TAU is acting as an intermediate node enabling me to receive and dispatch
amounts of knowledge which I would not ordinarily have the strength to acquire and assimilate
at such an accelerated pace. There will be noted throughout the world, both individually and on
a larger scale, a rapid advancement of metaphysical processes in the near future, in order to
prepare the planet for PHEA-3 and beyond.
**
****
From Heline's "The Bible and The Tarot":
"The letters of the Hebrew alphabet were taken from the shape of constellations on the ecliptic
and were thus letters of flame, and the letter Yod remains as a witness to their creation from fire.
Each individual letter of the Hebrew alphabet is a flame or combination of flames, similar to
Yod... Yod signifies the number 10, which is the perfect number, the number of the Sephiroth of
the Tree of Life, who in their turn symbolize the forces of Spirit in operation. It has the
conventional form of the free flame, the tips of which are sometimes called 'jots.' Every letter is
really made of Yods, or modified Yods, together with enlarged or diminished 'jots' and
connecting lines. In very careful writing this symbolic flame detail can be detected, and
sometimes even in poor script or printing it is shown in the tradition that the twenty-two letters
(of the Hebrew alphabet) really imitate certain small asterisms of the zodiac which they picture
in miniature. Thus the alphabet as a whole symbolizes Light, but only a few of the letters reveal
this in their present form, while the symbolic meaning still in our day dies under the veil of the
mysteries."
******
THERE ARE THOSE SOULS who have lived and are now living upon the surface of the Earth
who were incarnate into this planetary life cycle in the beginning of the First Generation, the
time before the Adamic Race, which is called the "Natali," meaning the "Time of the Light." Of
those "First Generation" souls there are the various 'Companies" each descending from a color-
coded beam of the constellation of Orion. The First Migration descended upon the Blue-White
Ray (from the Blue Star). This was the Migration told in the 11/11/80 message from The
Initiate. The souls of Natili who are among us have long ago been integrated into the Adamic
Race and are a part of the planetary life-wave, as are the Central Earth dwellers (only the latter
being on a higher vibratory frequency of that life-wave). Most First Generation souls, while
incarnate on the surface of the Earth, are not aware of their "cosmic lineage" - some, however,
are. Many are knowledgeable of a special "obligation" and love of Earth and its people,
although the reason for this deep emotion is lost to their consciousness. There are 10,500 souls
on and in this planet who committed their being to this life-wave in the Time of the Light, and
have since dedicated themselves as Keepers of the Flame, to Earth. I must stress at this point
that there are many enlightened souls on this planet other than the First Generation souls. They
have come to this orb from the constellations of the "Living Lights" (Illumined Stations of
Governing Light-Law in the Universe) in many epochs and aeons of time. Each original
assembly or grouping of enlightened souls has its lineage in the stars. There are those entities
who originated on Earth, from the co-mingling of the primal life-wave of this planet and the
"Sons of Light." These planetary souls, or "Hemliph," are not trapped in the lower impulse, but
can progress unto a universal consciousness. Yet it is a slower and more difficult task for them
as they are newer and less developed souls. We find these incarnates on Earth now as the violent
strain of society. The Hemliph are easily led by the "Fallen Sons" (of Lucifer) who are known
by many names, "Tamilneph" being the Lemurian Melchizedek nomenclature for them. They
often "integrate" with the soul of a Hemliph in order to instigate their evil purposes, as they are
not able to directly incarnate on Earth, a planet too high in spiritual vibration for such a
retrograde counting. There are worlds and states of being further regressed than our own. All
enlightened souls of this Earth are the "Light Races" - "Those who come from the Terraces of
the Living Lights." These souls have de-evolved since their first appearance on Earth, thus they
are no longer "god-like." They have their respective karmas to contend with and are bonded to
the human condition. Yet they are definable by their above-average spiritual seeking and
instinctive sense of justice and duty to the Earth. While many of the new-soul Hemliphs are
involved in the major entropic currents of our Times, some have managed to align themselves to
a more or less neutral state or static zone.
The First Generation (Natali) Migrational Divisions:
FIRST MIGRATION - Blue Madras (1,000 souls beamed into the center of the Earth... 776
ascended to the surface in the First Aeon.)
Helios (500 souls who remained above the surface of the planet in Morphionic Light Visicas
(vehicles of radiant Light - extensions of the intelligences within) and who met the 776 Blue
Madras emerging from the "Place of Emergence" on the Emerald Table (Mesa Verde.))
The Blue Madras and the Helios combined to form the "Sun Bow Clan" of 1,276 souls.
SECOND MIGRATION - Yellow-Green Madras (3,000 souls beamed into the center of the
Earth, of which 2,105 ascended in the First Aeon.)
THIRD MIGRATION - Red Madras (3,000 souls beamed into the center of the Earth, of which
2,900 ascended in the First Aeon.)
All souls of the three migrations (of the First Generation) are "Solarians.). The remaining 3,000
Natali souls beamed to Earth in smaller units - they, too, are “Solarians”.
Returning once again to the present, the Solarians have had, since the Time of the Light, many
incarnations within the Earth and above it, among the ultra-terrestrial guardians of the planet, as
well as the numerous surface Earth experiences. Their presence is always one of some degree of
Light service, for they gave a Golden Oath to serve this sphere when they descended from the
"EL" Race of Orion. (In the Hebrew Kaballah "EL" as in "Eloha" and "Elohim" means "God.")
They do not always fully succeed, nor do they always pass every test confronting them, yet they
house souls in the physical of a most ancient lineage from the "Living Lights," to which their
spirits are wedded eternally. The Solarians, as well as the other Light Races, are beset upon by
the agents of Darkness, the Tamil-neph. These vestiges of Fallen Light seek power; a power of
the elemental impulse plane, aligned to the mortality of man as a purely mental and elemental
finite state. Consequently those souls imbued with a purpose of Light, given by command of the
Hierarchal Stations of "Living Lights," must contend with the subversive and often violent
tactics of the Tamilneph, puppetted through the primal-soul Hemliphs.
AS A REFLECTION of what has been revealed here, two Solarian souls of the Blue-White
migration Ray are profiled below:
Anwar el-Sadat... among his surface lives was incarnated as Ramses II; the pharaoh Zoser; the
Babylonian law-giver, Hamnurabi; a historian of Atlantis and a priest of the Melchizedek Order
in Lemuria. The Initiate spoke of President Sadat in a message received in 1978:
"In his (Sadat's) hands are held the golden reins of the Midnight Stallion, the steed of the
Apocalypse whose gait shall decide the pacing of destiny within the gathering of the Lost
Tribes."
President Sadat's assassination was a critical turning point on our path toward the Apocalypse.
Had he lived, certain factors would have been achieved which would have lessened the impact of
our future destiny with the catastrophes of Armageddon. Each time one of these "grace" factors
is not achieved, there are fewer opportunities for receipt between us and the "Day of
Judgement."
Elvis Aaron Presley... among his incarnations in the outer world of Earth were those of both
Lemurian and Atlantean Melchizedek Priesthood; the statesman Pericles; the Greek mystic, poet
and scholar of celestial and nature music, Orephus; the Egyptian "Ptah," physician, author, and
intellect, and brother-in-law of Hermes Trismegistus. Interestingly, Ptah was later deified in
mythology as "God of Memphis." This soul was also a follower of Jesus Christ when He walked
the Earth. The Initiate has said of this man:
"Elvis Aaron, a soul who brought the flame of Love into his life experience, was destined to re-
live the pain of Calvary, of the Master whom he so loved. Elvis' presence for good still abides
with the Earth and cannot be vanquished by the trampling herd or the cacophony of jackals as
they bay at a moon of illusion."
"In his life as Elvis Aaron, this entity longed to reveal his inner knowledges, which were
abundant. Yet it was his plight to remain a Hidden Priest."
A Tibetan Llama, upon seeing Elvis Presley via the 1973 satellite world broadcast, was moved to
remark - "There is a very good man." Elvis' father spoke in confidence of a "canopy of blue
light" appearing over their small house on the night of his son's birth - so brilliant that it lit the
father's way to the well. As with any Keepers of the Flame dating back to the persecution of the
Jews and the crucifixion of the Messiah, Mr. Presley has been greatly maligned before and
especially after his passing. His last years were ones of physical suffering. He incurred extreme
pain from many ailments, including glaucoma, liver disease, and at the last, bone cancer.
(Physical illness is common among the Solarians, as there is such a disparity between the
vibratory plane of this surface planet and the other worlds to which the Solarians are still
aligned.) The circumstance of his medication has been grossly distorted by those who seek to
gain materially from falsehood.
Such negative scoring as slander and murder cannot dim the seeds of Light planted by Elvis
Presley, Anwar Sadat, and other Solarian and Light Race souls who strive to carry the torch of
Love and Unity throughout the world. President Sadat has been incarnated again in the outer
Earth domain. Elvis Presley is manifest (not requiring birth and childhood) among the Central
Earth Tribes once again, to serve as a Master Teacher of music and celestial harmonics to the
children of the inner world.
Quote from ANWAR EL-SADAT:
"Without a vocation, man's existence would be meaningless. We have been created to bear the
responsibility God has entrusted us with. Though different, each man should fulfill his specific
vocation and shoulder his individual responsibility. To do this he should first recognize and be
loyal to his real entity within, regardless of any external factor; for it is this along which will
enable him to belong and owe allegiance to that Entity which is greater, vaster and more
permanent than his individual self... God has created you, shaped your soul, breathed His Spirit
into you,
and charged you with His responsibility. He is Love limitless and benignity infinite.
And He wants the life He created to be inspired with a sense of humor, beauty and strength ….. It
appears that knowledge of a man's spiritual life are intimately related and influence one another -
the more knowledge you acquire, the more mature your spiritual life and consequently, the
higher the quality of your knowledge becomes. It is an incessant process, which helps man
enhance his self-knowledge, and the clearer his vision of himself, the easier it will be for him to
transcend the confines of the 'self' and release his feelings, thoughts, and actions from the 'cell'
of personal concerns to direct them toward perfection and beauty... Love is the only force
capable of pulling down the barriers which may stand between matter and spirit, between the
visible and the invisible, between the individual and God. Without love, we fail to recognize the
otherness of others and so fail to communicate, losing ourselves by stifling the self within its
own narrow confines... To preserve his entity as a human being, a man should maintain
conscious communion with all existence."
Quoting ELVIS AARON PRESLEY:
"Love comes unasked and unsolicited. It doesn't confine, condemn or criticize. It frees and
protects and uplifts the beloved. It is a gift from God, to be nurtured and cared for. So many
people think it is their right to own another person... that isn't love - it is possession and will not
survive in times of crisis... If it were not for God - His hand on my life - I would have nothing. I
believe I am doing the thing I was put here for and hope that by my conduct and my example,
somehow I can be worthy of the opportunity to be here."
"It's silly to think we're the only life with billions of planets in the universe. This planet is
obviously being monitored by superior beings, to prepare us for the transition into the New
Age."

sake of visual clarity I have made the circles defining these bases much larger than the actual
size of the TCEUs. The ultra and inner bases are closely linked in their operations. They both
serve the Earth and its inhabitants in the following ways:
(1)
(2)
Monitoring geo-cosmic properties, fluxes, polarity distribution etc .of the planet.
Creating energy "pools" in which to draw off and collect some of the more destructive
outputs of Earth imbalance. They are only allowed to intercede marginally in this regard,
as is accorded to them under the provisions of the "Unimanity Pact Among Equilibrant
Worlds" (Issue 1-80).
U.S. Outline by Bruce Walton
(3)
(4)
Through their tele-crystal computers they re-charge "dead" zones,' where allowed and
when possible.
As the least of its operations, the TCEUs act as bases or ports for ultra and inner Light
craft. However, the ultras tend to be more extensive in this latter utilization than do the
Subterraneans.
On this map, I have identified only the actual Tele-crystal energy units now existing in the U.S.,
and not included the minimal monitoring units, tunnel entrances (leading to various under-
ground "roads"), storage chambers or ancient repositories.
Tele-Crystal Energy Units marked on Map:

COLORADO... Mesa Verde Plateau and Ute Mt. (IT - part of the Solarterria); between Dolores

From The Initiate (Thoth Hermes) - addressed to the enlightened seekers of the Earth:
"The inner world Brethern are to become more involved with the struggle of Light and Darkness
on the surface of this planet and in the astral plane mingled with the consciousness sphere of
Earth. Through your awareness of the 'People of the Ark' (Central Earth) and the Lost
Knowledges they harbor in Sanctuary, the Tribes of Earth will be given a bond to unite them in
the coming Aeon. The cultures of Subterranea await to transfer the Golden Key to you, the
'People of the Tortoise Shell'. Along with the Brethern of the Stars, these genetic Rays of
“Unimanity' compose 'The Family' from whence you came and to which you shall return. Our
Heritage is One."
"Cycles of time wash over you like a tidal plume descending from the Dove of Light. You seek
Visionaries in the ocean above. As celestial Argonauts, you tap the Rod of Lightening with the
prow of "Earthship" and sow the Dragon's Teeth. Yet the Tree of the Sacred Oak is beneath
your shadow; wherein, suspended at the Threshold of an inner sun, is the Golden Fleece of your
Vision Quest. From the orifice of the Threshold ascends the Burnishing Ray, infusing your souls
with universal Memory, seeding your minds in recall of the Aeon of Light, when all being was
consummate with the Hierarchies residing in the Pillars of Molten Radiance; and this sphere was
a firey rope coiled about the Throne of Crystal and instilled with the Tone of the Clarion Call."
"Deep within you is sustained the ancient Holy Tone, nurtured by a Greater Self. When this
Tone is brought in Phoenix splendor, from the silence of your center and wedded to the Tone of
"The Family," the seals shall then fall away from the Sacred Places. The Guardian Lions will
arise and escort the Children to the Center of the Earth."
