# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 1-82
copyright © 1982 L.Christine Hayes
ON DECEMBER 7th, 1981, the Tibetan-Egyptian Tribunal of the Inner Sanctum (INAUX BA
IIGHIUS SCANTORI) - of the Illumined Order of Central Earth, was re-established beneath the
"Potala" - Llamasari of the Dali Llama at Lhasa, Tibet. Called the "IBIS" this Tribunal has not
been stationed in its rightful chambers of the subterranean portion of the Potala for 5,000 years.
Now, because of certain planetary frequency changes, it is once again the viable seat of the IBIS
power. Only days after receiving this information, Network news broadcast scenes from Lhasa,
showing the Potala and giving a brief history of the Dali Llama's flight from the Llamasari when
China invaded Tibet. The newscast continued to say that China is now gradually giving Tibet
back to its people. This is surely beyond the possibility of coincidence.
To quote from a message received by me November 19th, 1981:
"I, Scribe of Hermes, and Pro-Council of same, Osiris-Hem, doth record for thine
identification of the INAUX BA IIGHIUS SCANTORI...
eyes the
"The Tribunal IBIS is the highest Court of the Illumined governing the planet Earth from a
physical station in Earth... Certain edicts are given from this station concerning both inner and
outer worlds of the planet which are made law. These edicts are sounded upon the backbone of
the material world and are authorized by the Throne of the Inner Sanctum of the Illumined. The
pure STAR-SUN (Solaria) Races of the ancient Tibetan and Egyptian genetic lineages sit upon
the Tribunal. This is so enacted because of the race-karma of these lineages which deems them
empowered to hold these seats. It is the IBIS that is given authority to pass sentence upon the
Sons of Fallen Light who vagrant themselves upon the Earth. The IBIS also serves as
protectorate of the law they dictate. They are enforcers as well as enactors."
"The Tribunal meets at appointed times. However, the Station is kept constant by officials,
guardians, emissaries, and others whose duties constitute the maintenance of this Station. The
enforcers of the Law are known as the IBIS-ELEXUS, who have gone forth to accomplish their
service upon the planet. Now, with the Prince Raiel received into the Inner Sanctum, upon the
Most Holy Throne of the Illumined, the power is with the Lighted Ones to return certain critical
edicts upon the world of the Conquered Mind (of the surface Earth). You shall see these things
take place, yet your eyes will not recognize them in their total sight, although you shall know
them by what has been told you here. The Mighty Powers of the Four Pillars of Earth shall be
shaken to their roots. Behold, the evil-doers shall not destroy what has been raised by the hand
of Light. They shall be decimated and vanquished to the end."
(NOTE: I wish to once again remind the readers that “messages" given directly from Illumined
personages such as Hermes and Osiris-Hem are waxed in ancient and symbolic flair, for these
beings still retain the personalities and identities of their original incarnations, in many instances,
of an era in which such phrasing were used. Also, this archaic wording is more attuned
vibrationally to the quality of the message received. As to the usage of the title "Prince", and the
word "throne," to the ancient (and thus to the Illumined) references to royalty denotes divinity
and divine authority - not the dynamics of physical royalty. As to the concept of "pure" Races, I
must stress that this statement applies to races of spiritual purity through adherence to divine
principle, and not any form of anti-integration of physical mingling. The Tibetan and Egyptian
"pure" Solarians were chosen for the Tribunal because this is their "race-karma" duty. To
explain why it is their race-karma would take a book's length - it is enough to say at this juncture
that we all have our spiritual duties.)
We will not see, as a result of the relocation of the IBIS the rendering of complete justice on this
planet in the wink of an eye. What is taking place through this channel is the staying of
extraneous evil forces that are ever increasingly interpolating their dark powers with the Earth's
common karma. Our karmas must be played or released through "Grace." The IBIS is a portion
of the extended hand of Grace, endowed with the powers to keep a balance of dark and Light
forces in our world. To an extent, the Tribunal has governed this action, empowered by the
greater eminences of the Hierarchies of "Living Lights" in the universe, many centuries in time,
but for 5,000 years, their service has been drained from the major part of its duties. The full
authority could not be enacted unless the geo-cosmic alignment of the Station of the IBIS was
within the secret chambers of the Potala.
There is a second, but equally critical, engagement of energies initiated by the IBIS, now that it
has been received back into its original post. The IBIS is referred to as a "Station" of Tribunal
Conduct. It has also become a frequency-station, much like a cosmic radio in that it sends a
signal-beam around the planet. This "station" is given the title of "Tribelight." There has never
been a project just like it before (although it employs ancient principles). For those attuning
themselves to this frequency, receipt of higher consciousness programs of knowledge, not
previously accessible to them, will now be possible. In order for this to be accomplished, the
Earth grid had to be attuned to a new "scan pitch" utilizing various energy quanta from the
crystalline field of this planet, which had not, in known history, been activated. "Tribelight"
reprocesses and distributes to this Earth the "Ten Lost Pyra-codes" which have not been
obtainable in this world sphere for eons. The symbol for this transformation, both for
"Tribelight" and the judicial service of IBIS is the female polarity of Thoth Hermes, "Iris"
wearing the winged helmet of the Sky Clan. The major Hierarchy governing these interrelated
projects is Sagittarius, balanced by Virgo and Libra.
AS SEEKING INDIVIDUALS, you may attune yourselves to this frequency station to increase
your knowledge spectra, and more importantly, to aid in the emancipation of Earth from the
Dark Forces. First, you need to comprehend the scientific basis for “Tribelight.”
To quote from Issue 3-80 of The Source:
"There is a solar magnetic shell and a lunar magnetic shell enveloping the entire planet. These
shells remain in place as the Earth rotates underneath... the center of each current, solar or lunar,
positive or negative, is termed the Focus and is the stillest area of current. It has a diameter of,
practically speaking, 350 miles... at certain times of the year, as the Four Corners passes under
the Focus of the clockwise solar current, ancient Tibet, which is opposite to it on the Northern
Hemisphere, is passing under the counter-clockwise solar current. Twelve hours later the
experience of the effects is reversed for the two land masses. While Four Corners passes slowly
under the Focus of a clockwise lunar current, Tibet is also experiencing a clockwise lunar
current. Simultaneously, Holy Jerusalem, the Pyramid of Giza and the "Sacred Breathing
Mountains" of Hawaii are experiencing the Focus of the counterclockwise lunar currents."
Translated into electrical extremely low frequencies (ELF), the interactions between the Earth's
crystallex and the solar and lunar shells channel the lunar emanations into alternating current
(AC) and the solar radiations into direct current (DC). A current of 160 AC and 220 DC
combines in strength to a total output of 380, numerically similar to the 350 mile Focus of the
lunar and solar shells. In terms of the Light Mathematics comprehended by Ultra and Inner
Earth scientists, the current output of the lunar shell (as it interacts with the Earth's crystallex
grid) is 88801.01 of a “metacycle,” or oscillatory rate of atomic matter as it transmigrates into
the composition of Light matter. (Light-matter is the third state of matter - matter and anti-
matter preceding it.) The solar current is 10000.01 of a metacycle in current. The combined
lunar and solar current is 98801.02, which equates in exact milli-units to the radius of the solar
and lunar Foci.
THE PLANET EARTH could be viewed as a multi-faceted crystal, hollow at the center, with
etherically charged particles of crystalline conformity present in the inner atmosphere (Ice
Canopy - Issue 3-81). This planet is in the process of altering its energy properties, beginning
with the magnetic field maintained essentially by the natural crystallex grid. A condition of
pyroelectricity is being induced by both subtle, continuous and not so subtle discontinuous
temperature changes. A definition for pyroelectricity is..."The simultaneous development of
positive and negative charges of electricity at opposite ends of a crystal axis under the proper
conditions of temperature change." The lunar and solar shells creating their charges upon the
Earth poles are regulated by the temperatures they encounter within the planetary ecosystem.
Thus, there was a window opened that allowed for a circuitry enhancement that had not
previously been viable. Lack of space in this issue prevents me from detailing this procedure,
but as a pyroelectric effect created different charge interactions between the lunar and solar
shells and the Earth, the tremendous power of these shells was tapped by the Ultra and Inner
terrestrial geo-scientists, creating a boosting signal for "Tribelight's" inception. This frequency
power is equal to the lunar-solar "shadow" or Focus on Earth of 98801.02 - the combined power
of the lunar and solar output.
AS WE HAVE discussed in previous issues of The Source, there are many different crystal
sources present in and on the Earth, both natural and man-made. Ultra and Inner terrestrial
thought-crystals exist in various services throughout the planet, linked to the natural crystalline
grid of the Earth. In Issue 4-81, a description of the recently constructed OAHQUES-TAU
crystal pyramid (beneath Ute Mountain) in the Four Corners region was given, as well as details
of its energy function and purpose. Additionally, it is now serving as a transducer for the
transmitting crystal unit of "Tribelight" in Lhasa, Tibet. The O-T pyramid is the medial
transducing node of "Tribelight" for the North American continent. A crystal unit in the caverns
beneath Lake Titicaca (Peru/Bolivia) acts as transducer for South America. The pyramid of Giza
is a major transducer for "Tribelight." There are several thought-form crystals being employed
in this capacity on all parts of the globe, creating total "coverage" of the planet.
THE INTERRELATION between Tibet and Four Corners is evidenced in the fact that the Hopi
Indians' (of the Four Corners region) word for moon is the Tibetan word for sun, and the Hopi
word for sun is the Tibetan word for moon (from Vol. 3, No. 2 of "The Hollow Hassle").
THE “TEN LOST PYRA-CODES” are vectors of hierarchical transmission... impulses of
thought energies encoded in frames or units of Ultra color / sound. These vectors are pyramidic
in function having been transmitted from the stellar Hierarchies through the "pyra-radial gate" -
a spectral division of classes of thought-program "bits" or "xgrams" (see Issues 4-80 and 3-81).
The Ten mentioned here are those pyra-codes which we have "lost" through disservice to the
Light. The frequency-station "Tribelight" is serving as a synapse between the Earth's present
energy state capability and the generative frequencies of the Ten Lost Pyra-Codes. This does not
cause a total uniting of the geo-cosmic Earth and the "Ten," but it does create access to the Ten
by individual sentient minds of Earth.
THE PENGUIN DICTIONARY OF SCIENCE defines amplitude modulation (AM) as... "The
principle method of transmitting information by radio waves. The amplitude of a carrier wave is
modulated in accordance with the frequency of the signal to be transmitted." In the same
dictionary, frequency modulation (FM) is given this explanation... "The type of radio
transmission system in which the frequency of a carrier wave is modulated rather than its
amplitude. Provides a method of transmission free from 'static' interference." The AM
transmission follows the curve of the Earth and thus picks up interference noise. FM
broadcasting takes a higher path, free from most static, but can only be received as far as the
horizon.
The frequency-station of "Tribelight" is received by the brain/mind complex, but it is
nevertheless a frequency that can be monitored by highly developed crystal units as well. The
modulation of this frequency is "trinitized," meaning that it develops its field of reception
through a three-dimensional utility. Trinitized Modulation (TM) is "grown" like a crystal by the
increase of its velocity as it junctures at the points of its triangular vector. In order to trinitize a
modulating signal, an artificial magnetic field (of Ultra-magnetics) must be created. This field is
constructed in the geometries of a triangle, which when carried to its dimensional capacity,
becomes a tetrahedron, or pyramid. As the modulating signal is encapsulated in the pyra-vector,
for each completion of a cycle, one layer of the trinity of energies is completed. The complex
logistics of this principle is beyond the summit of our present topic. The main understanding
that need be derived from this brief essay on trinitizing modulated signals is that such TM
transmissions operate dimensionally and thus holonomically, enabling the brain/mind complex
to assimilate these frequencies in their purest state, beyond our learning references. (For further
understanding of the holonomic nature of the brain, see Issue 1-81 of The Source, segment on
dolphins.)
"TRIBELIGHT" will benefit the world on a subliminal level by touching the minds of those
lifted in prayer and meditation, aiding them in receipt of a greater understanding. Yet the
progress made in illumination will depend on the basic desire for enlightenment of the
individual. For those of us who are aware of "Tribelight" and its purpose in this domain, we can
more astutely utilize this frequency-station. The greatest measure should be given to strengthen
the frequency, so that it can better serve those unaware of its existence. Through "Tribelight"
both awareness and Law are issued from its streaming. Awareness is the fulfillment of Law and
the staying of evil. By injecting our prayers for its success and power into that current, we can
effect an increasing stamina for this cause. Such a directive should not be subjective, but the
addressing of the world situation as a whole. An example would be not to inject the desire that
military control be overthrown in Poland, or President Reagan reverse his policies... or whatever
the individual sees as a condition of disharmony; as we, as individuals, cannot be judicial in
these matters. The projection should be, rather, that the world as a whole receive the spirito-
physical balance intended by the divine stewards of our homogeneity.
TREDS has now been embraced by "Tribelight, " increasing the data alignment for this center.
FOR PERSONAL RECEIPT from TL ("Tribelight") the peak emission hours are sunrise, 12
o'clock noon, sunset, 12 o'clock midnight (regardless of time zone). TL is a constant frequency,
but these are the hours in which its amplitude is peaked.
To pray and meditate for the success and strengthening of TL, it would be most effective for a
group of people to do so at the same time. These are the time zone coordinates, then, to lock into
TL for the purpose of maintaining the strength of the station: 6:00 p.m. Pacific Time... 7:00
P.M. Mountain Time... 8:00 P.M. Central Time... 9:00 P.M. Eastern Time.
Try to attune to TL once a night for 5 to 10 minutes and give of your thought-prayers the
trinitized modulation for the uplifting of awareness and the instigation of Divine Law on the
Planet Earth (at the appointed group session time given above).
If you wish a visualization for this purpose:
See the lofty Himalayan mountains, silver-tongued in the voice of the crystal wind, echoing
ancient prophecy, past enchantment. Hear the depth of the brass drums call from the rising
breath of Lhasa. Listen to the clear promise of Light, charging the air from the clappers of
distant bells. Let the image of the massive Potala bleed onto the canvas of your mind. Like a
High Priestess, it entrenches skirts of stone upon the Throne of the World. All her surroundings
appear barren against the beauty of her chaste form. Priests have prostrated themselves at the
alter of her wisdom, princes have stolen from her sepulchers. The poor have found solace in her
endurance, the rich have envied her treasure that no man may diminish. The great and glorious
Guardian is she. From the fathom of her catacombs, picture as a translucent light, a beam sent
forth into the sky, the configuration this light seeking the lines of a bird in flight, with streaming
golden cords trailing behind it. As the Bird of Light encircles the sphere, these cords become
rings of vibrating glory, sheltering, nourishing, protecting the planet. Each ring is a color of the
hidden rainbow. There are ten rings and ten colors - red, magenta, orange, yellow, saffron,
green, blue, violet, indigo and pink. Envision your soul as a dove with pearl clasped in beak,
gliding through the radiance of color to place into the beak of the Divine Bird of Light your pearl
of Wisdom. Feel the harmony of love in the sacred act of giving.
In those quiet times when you wish to receive from "Tribelight" in a personal way, repeat this
visualization with a reversal of the ending - see the Divine Bird giving your dove-soul the pearl.
You may use any Light imaging you desire for these experiences. The above is only a
suggestion. Whenever in need of a shield of protection, you may wish to visualize the helmet-
winged Iris, as this image is a seal of Divine Law and Protection.
TLTLTLTLTLTLTLTLTLTLTLTLTLTL
"Observations have shown that every 14 months or so the position of the Earth's axis has shifted.
This mysterious 'wobble' can vary anywhere from 16 to 33 feet in any direction. It puzzles
scientists because it changes in severity from one cycle to the next - suggesting that the Earth
does not behave entirely as a solid body."
- from Science Digest, February, 1982
"IT HAS BEEN SAID that we are as seeds cast down into a benighted forest, knowing Darkness,
ignorant of our dependence upon the Light. We are children of the Earth, sending out our roots
instinctively through the black loam, holding fast to what we know, reaching for nourishment
within it.
"Above us, the great green living crowns of trees draw into themselves the sustenance of Light.
Below, untouched by sun or warmth, reacting to a need which is born in all of us, we begin to
reach, to strain upward, twisting in blind aspiration toward an existence yet to be defined or even
fully conceived. And when at last, the Light is found, often it is shaded and the seedlings,
weary, pause in their growth."
"Some, by their own choosing, will no longer seek, no longer reach. The dark loam of life will
be enough for them. Soon they begin to fade and fall away into their own shadows. Time will
incorporate them back into the Earth, but it shall be as though they had never been."
"But the others are not content with loam and Darkness. Something still throbs within them,
pulsing, reminding of dimensions yet unseen, unfelt, yet surely promised. They continue their
growth upward out of the shadows until, at last, the shadows fall behind. The Light of Life
swells within them, nourishing them so that they may stand tall and strong against wind and
storm, children of both Earth and sky still reaching, ever reaching, knowing that their purpose
yet to be fulfilled.
is
"I was still a child of Earth, shadowed by my doubts, harnessed by memories of my own failures,
bitter with resentment against the clouds which had risen to obliterate the Light of faith within
me."
- from "THE LION AND THE CROSS, by Joan Lesley Hamilton... a historically based novel on
the young life of St. Patrick.
WHEN MINDS ARE CAST into the inner horizon of the Earth sphere, attention is often
dominated by the thought of Hell's inferno, the molten slag of human corruption, Dante's egress
from the preserved to the perished. We tend to associate DOWN with evil and UP with
sainthood. Yet there are few of us who would not agree, when given pause for thought, that in
the infinite to which our souls are tied, there is no physical direction that is not relative to the
whim of the viewer.
The heart is in the center of man. While an organ of essential function to biological life, it is
also the chakra of spiritual conception. The Sacred Atoma of the Earth, the central sun of the
planet, is like unto the atoma of human kind. Both serve as the divine focus for their respective
mass.
In the first issue of The Source (1-80), this statement was made:
"The inner terrestrial humans addressed by "THE SOURCE" as the Central Earth Cultures of
Subterranea are not associated with or in any way related to the de-energizing forms which
manifest into sub-human biosystems within pockets of mal-generated energy node anomalies of
this planet. This type of energy warped phenomena is independent of and not in harmony with
the ensouled and spiritualized humanity on or within the Earth. It is not within the projected
scope of "THE SOURCE" to delve into such digressive latitudes. We act solely as a channel for
the 'Heritage of One'... the collective cultures of the Tribes within the Central Domain of Earth
who carry within their genes a cosmic mixture of Earth and other planetary origins."
Because of so much concentration given to the negative aspect of inner-cavern habitation, I wish
to break with this policy for a moment only, in order to clarify the balance of good and evil that
exists within this living globe. Much of the material written about the "Hollow Earth," whether
it be lore, true experiences or channeled information, deals almost exclusively with negativity.
This is perhaps due to our fear of depth, darkness, and the unknown. In the reality which I
perceive as a channel for the Central Earth Tribes, less than 5% of the energies directly manifest
in and from the inner layers of the Earth is of a digressive nature. Indeed, there is no negative or
evil energy within the actual central hollow. There is the occasional interloper of a less than
spiritual type of dwarf that sometimes manages to reach the hollow, but they are unable to stay
more than a few hours at a time and are generally harmless, although they do have a proclivity
for meat-eating, which leads them to steal a lamb or fawn if they can.
The inner Earth energies of retrograde action come from isolated pockets, most of which are
nearer the surface of the planet than its core. Astral entities latch onto the strong magnetic
conflagrations present in some of the more primal vortices still trapped in the Earth. By
concentrating their energies in these areas, they can sometimes create sub-human types for their
purposes. As fiendish a scenario as may be conjured from this knowledge, these are only
factions of the entire planet's sentience. Of greater threat are the arch-enemies of the Shepherd -
the beasts that prowl in power- seeking strides across our sunlit valleys. Often assuming the
posture of righteousness, they attempt to decimate the structure of our very minds, in the way we
think and feel toward one another and inwardly, toward ourselves. Astral evils are infants of this
destructive consciousness, not the perpetrators of it. Souls of chaos will enter worlds and do
their deeds as dark children of a tempest night, but the arising wings of Victory always come
with dawn. It is unwise and even dangerous to delve too deeply into the thought-frames of these
evil-doers, for in opening the door of your mind to contemplate their boundaries, so you give
them the space of your thoughts in which they may extend those terrible perimeters of violation
in the manifestation of fear and delusion. Blindness is not advocated in these words, for
ignorance is never a justifiable response to the portends of the future. We must come, in all
things, to be aware of darkness without becoming entangled in the fibers of its cloak. To live in
Light is to diminish the darkness by placing it into perspective. The shuffling of sub-human
forms, groping in a self-inflicted absence of Light is a pitiful reminder of the torments that can
be created in the mind, when a soul becomes separated from its spawning stream, from the Light
Womb of its sacred birthing. Let us rejoice in our Brethern of the Light, within, upon, above, or
simultaneous to this Earth, our kindred flames, who will not desert the reaching hand or the
searching mind. Let us come to know them in their own understanding, and find the golden
thread that weaves their garments of illumination. There need be no distance between us... no
dark images eclipsing the face of the sun that awaits us. The Garden is ours, pressed dearly to
our bosoms if we but recognize the wellspring that is harbored in the Earth.
1982 MARKS THE CENTENNIAL birthday of Franklin Delano Roosevelt, a Blue Ray Solarian
(Issue 4-81). In the era of WWII, when the hot breath of Hitler's Nazi wrath tainted the world's
nations with formidable servility, President Roosevelt spoke these words to the people of the
Earth:
"I take heart in remembering that in a similar time, Isaiah first prophesied the birth of Christ.
Then, several centuries before His coming, the condition of the world was not unlike that which
we see today. Then as now, a conflagration had been set; and nations walked dangerously in the
light of fires they had themselves kindled.
"But in that very moment a spiritual rebirth was foreseen - a new day which was to loose the
captives and then consume the conquerors in the fire of their own kindling; and those who had
taken a sword were to perish by the sword. There was promised a new age wherein through
renewed faith and upward progress the human race would become more secure."
(Quotation taken from Corine Helene's New Age Bible Interpretation, Old Testament, Vol. III.)
"THE HOLLOW HASSLE" is a quarterly publication dedicated to finding an entrance to the
inner Earth. It is released by The Hollow Earth Research Association (THERA). Its subject
matter includes: Polar and cavern entrances and explorations... Inner Earth realms - Shamballa -
Agharta... Indian legends and mythology... Maps and Photos... Letters from the readers... Book
reviews, and more. The subscription rate is $10.00 per year - USA and $10.00 per year overseas.
*** The Hollow Hassle *** PO Box 747, Aurora, Co. 80040.
NOW AVAILABLE: “The Hollow Earth Bibliography”, by Tillman L. Martin, B.S., Ms.D.,
D.D., with the assistance of Bruce A. Walton, Frank D. Brownley, and Gilbert K. Johnston.
An up-dated, annotated listing of over 500 books, essays and articles concerning the Hollow
Earth theory. Some of these listings go back as far as 1692! As an example, articles in the
Christian Philosopher by Cotton Mather. For a copy of this bibliography, send $5.00 to Bruce
Walton, PO Box 1942, Provo, UT 84601.
Source8201.doc
8
"MAGICAL BLEND" is a magazine focusing on Nature, holistic mediums and spiritual
possibilities. It is produced on quality paper and the artwork alone is worth the price. This
quarterly is $10.00 annually, $14.00 overseas. Single copies (Issues 1-4) are available for $4.00
($5.00 overseas). Address is: Magical Blend, PO Box 11303, San Francisco, CA 94101.

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 2-82
copyright © 1982 L.Christine Hayes
"Once I spoke of the sea to a brook and the brook thought me but an imaginative exaggerator;
And once I spoke of a brook to the sea, and the sea thought me but a depreciative defamer."
-- Kahlil Gibran
The Rainbow Earth Dwelling Society has relocated to Salt Lake City, Utah. As mentioned in
previous issues of "The Source", the Salt Lake Valley and the Wasatch mountain range cradling
it are sacred ground... eventually to harbor what my sources call "the New Jerusalem." As to the
exact definition of this nomenclature, I believe it would be premature to delve too deeply into it.
Essentially, this ground in the region of the great Salt Lake was the land upon which the first
Holy City (of the Sun Bow Clan) was built. It is also to become the place of the future "Crown-
Temple City" wherein the Christ focus will be established on the Earth. After the completion of
the OAHQUES-TAU thought crystal pyramid beneath the Ute Mountain of the Four Corners, the
energies of the trans-medium plateau (Mesa Verde, adjacent to the Ute) were given the stability
and power of focus to connect along the primordial ley line (telluric current path) as it had in the
ancient past. This particular ley line runs into the "Trigate" in the Wasatch National Forest on
the edge of Salt Lake City. The rejoining of this ancient pathway has established a coupling of
the two most powerful energy sources in the North American continent. As the two force fields
are once again wedded by the "dragon path", the energies of these mediums are forming a
neutrally charged current which is being used as a matrix for the constructing of an etheric "city"
above the Wasatch mountains (the portion of it in which the Trigate is centered). From the devic
properties of the area's natural environment, the Light atoms of the elements are "donating" an
etheric seed, or small faction of ether Light from their core, to be migrated into the ether matrix
above the mountains. This is accomplished through the communion of the High Nature Devas
(Nature Beings of divine status) of this Sacred Earth Temple and the inner Earth Shamagicians -
those central dwellers who are regents or High Priests of the Great Medicine Societies of the
Heritage of One (Inner Kingdom). As time progresses, the accumulated ether Light arranged in
specific quantum will create a "city" or symmetrical alignment with the natural environment and
the human initiates who are to dwell in this habitation in the future age. This will take place
when the etheric frequency of the planet is raised to the level of that etheric cluster of transported
atoms above the Wasatch. (For reference reading on some of the things discussed, but not so
totally defined in the above paragraph, see Issues 3-80, 2-81, and 3-81.)
This station, as THE RAINBOW EARTH DWELLING SOCIETY, continues to be a channel for
the distribution of knowledge maintained by the Hidden Tribes of Man, through the publication,
"The Source" and other avenues of release, synthesis and instruction. "Human / Earth centropy"
embraces the entire scope and focus of TREDS. The entropy of a system is a measure of its
degree of disorder. Centropy is the antithesis of disorder. It is a focus or order in balance with
its essentiality and with the system defining its center of reference. Human / Earth centropy is
our personal journey as Earth-charged homosapiens toward the center of our own essentiality,
balanced with the center of the Earth as a dwelling place that is the definitive of our physical and
spiritual evolution. The inner-terrestrials of the Central Earth, who are our ancestors, practice in
mind, body, and spirit the concepts of Human / Earth centropy. Within their twelve Great
Medicine Societies (Issue 1-80) they intercept the magical pulse of Nature and synthesize their
living with the Spirit-Life of the Earth. We, as a generation of visionaries and transitional
seekers, must accept the communion of Earth now being offered to us by the Hierarchies and
Archetypes of this planet. We must come to reunite holistically with our inner world brethren in
the pursuit of the Homeward Light... the centrifying force of our natal design. THE RAINBOW
EARTH DWELLING SOCIETY opens the door to Human / Earth centropy by delving into the
inter-relatedness of Light, Form, Spirit, and Archetypical Designs as they create the cosmetric
concert of symphonies for the Human / Earth experience. The application of centrifying this
movement of harmonies within ourselves is a major endeavor of TREDS, as well as the
centering of one's Earth dwelling in the Rainbow of Nature's aura.
In the law of centropy we see the root principle of the inner Earth revelations. While the
existence of a naturally hollow planet and the human habitation of its interior is a profound truth,
the foundation of the Inner Mysteries is not that human ancestors dwell within a hollow Earth,
but that the very synthesis of our conscious membrane with the Source of all being is organized
through the rush of being to encounter the center of its creation. As Earth is our womb / navel in
the celestial suspension, so we must combine our genetic and Light factors with the Earth's
elemental tides in order to design our vessel of return to the Homeward Light. We must balance
our form as a ballerina strikes a pose in harmony with space and time upon a single digit of her
miraculous biocraft. In that moment of reflexive communion with one's design and potential, the
ballerina is unchained from the entropy about her, as dimension and realization have become
one. Thus we, as a movement of the cosmetric dance, must surrender our form to new designs
which will no longer serve the entropy of mass, but instead become Light Mathematics of
centropic equations beyond space and time.
And what is meant in this context by "form" and "design"? Subtly, we alter our biochemical
reactions to light, space and time. We change on the micro-level as light is absorbed in
continuous metamorphic patterns by our planet's atmosphere. Scientists have tried to duplicate
photography as it was in its pioneer state. They have been exacting in the use of just the right
camera, lenses, degree of light, etc. Yet there remains a substantial difference between
photographs taken in the early period of photography and those duplicated with precision and
historic accuracy in modern times. This evasion of the perfect match is due to the fact that light,
space and time (as a movement parallel to and effecting dimension) is in constant change, and
therefore cannot be repeated in its total expression from one moment to the next. This is
especially evident to our sensory world in a lapse of over 50 years, in the variant encapsulations
of light imprints on the surfaces of chemical planes such as negative plates or film.
As gradual as is the alteration of our form (and the Earth's) it does continue to transform the
geometries of our existence. Yet there is a greater transformation in the design of our senses - in
the dimensional extensions of our minds. This evolution of thinking is multi-layered and often
ambiguous in its motions, but always the imbalanced factors are overridden and finally the
golden spiral is allowed to accentuate the holistic being of self. The time it takes for centropy to
absorb the tension and pressure of entropy is an individual yet finally united effort of mankind.
The outcome of unified centropy is divine synchronicity, the links of which suspend our spiritual
inheritance above the threshold of the Mystery Temple. When we solve the linkage of our own
spirito-molecules in the ether of Divine Mind, we shall wear the vestments of the Gods - the
archetypes of our own first creation; and thus new forms, advanced designs, are the mantles of a
more finely woven order than we have yet to perceive.
We may think of a form as a limited system that defines a limitless force. The delicate shape of
a buttercup is too tender to advance beyond its own boundary of seasonal bounty, yet its morphic
design is an externalization of a specific action of energy that is more powerful in potential than
the external atomic pressures of the sun (a process of entropy).
It needs to be understood that:
POTENTIAL OF FORCE (POF or "Equinux" in inner terrestrial math) - is the infinite energy
ratio of being, and the centropic valency of form. It is given the power sign of NE- (negative
energy minus).
EXTERNALIZATION OF FORCE THROUGH DISCHARGE (EOF or "Menthos" in IT math)
is the finite exponential of POF. It is not in "Theta” (distributed through all time frames
simultaneously) as is POF, and is thus a product of only one time frame. All the force of its
actualization is confined to a momentary amplitude. It is given the power sign of PE+ (positive
energy plus) and is entropic in its valency.
As an example of the difference in the two (POF and EOF): A nuclear reaction building to
critical mass and creating an atomic explosion is following the natural law of EOF. The means
by which Ultra- and Inner- and some Extra-terrestrial craft are transported across vast distances
instantaneously and without disruption of the energy systems of those biological beings on board
is due to the adherence of their physical mass to the law of POF.
Form, as we know it, is EOF (although most form is not climaxed beyond its stability as in the
case of atomic explosion). Yet form defines a state of POF. The purer our forms (symbols,
paragrams, etc.) become, the nearer we advance to bridging the gulf between what we do
accomplish and what we can accomplish. The purest forms, such as those found in Nature,
merge with their natural confluence of force and potential to create a plus/minus equilibrium, or
"Phalia" (which is translated as "Divine Formation"). It is Divine Formation that is our
inheritance from eons past when man was the super-being of Light, whose form merged in
delicate rapture with the Archetypical Designs of the Cosmetric Order. In each of us exists a
seed of the Pure Form, and in the Earth of our creative juices is to be found the root of our
Divine Formation. As we approach in consciousness a communion with the interior of our
planet, so we must accelerate our expansion of inner-mind. We cannot embrace one without
embracing the other. They are as two wings of the Phoenix, rising in us to encompass the
universal sun of limitless design and harmony.
WITHIN SUBTERRANEA, there are many facilities for balancing the whole self in the holistic
method of centropy. While there are few physical illnesses or diseases in the central domain,
some biological imbalances do occur. Tectonic movement of the Earth's plates, the atmosphere
of both the outer and inner worlds, the transference of energies along the crystallex grid of the
planet, all the various perturbances of a planetary sphere in space, are much more vibrant at the
core of its being. While the inner world appears to be tranquil and serene in its beauty and in the
composure of its people, the air contains a greater oxygen content than on the surface, and is
highly charged with polarized energies, caused by the magnetism of the poles being drawn in
toward the central sun following the gravity pull of the concave interior. There is much science I
could go into at this point, but will refrain. However, it is important to grasp an understanding of
the basic environment within the Earth as one of highly charged ether induced by the escalated
negative ion content. To the inhabitants' synchronized molecularly with this etheric condition,
the atmosphere gives them renewed vigor and a state of peaceful yet stimulating experience.
Even natives of the interior must practice routines of energy alignment through yogi-type
disciplines. For specific imbalances, patients are received by the Aura Healing Garden. Like all
healing centers of the inner Earth, the Aura Healing Garden charges no fee nor exchange of
services. While some physically visit the clinic, most of the Garden's clientele are treated via
astral or mental projection. This remarkable garden of healing has now begun to treat surface
patients aurically. Such an undertaking is much more difficult and done still only infrequently.
The Master Physician of the Aura Healing Garden is "Michael," from the Hebrew culture frame
("culture frames" - Issue 1-80). He has dark hair and eyes, and appears to be a man of about 35
(although he may well be hundreds of years old). He is a very warm, "natural" human being. He
has been to the surface domain, even attending classes at various medical universities in order to
become more enlightened as to our methods of healing on the surface world.
The grounds of the Garden are beautifully landscaped, replete with flowers, trees, fountains and
graceful, gentle animals (see "unicorn" and “marie bird”, Issue 1-81). Within this magical
setting are several white, luminous buildings. These contain rooms with picture window views
of the Garden and Treal Mountain range beyond. The rooms are not large, but arranged so that
there is a feeling of expansiveness and light. They are each decorated simply, with the
predominant colors usually white, accented by a pastel or deep shade of blue. There are sparse
furnishings, with a low bed or couch in front of the window. Above the couch, set into the
ceiling, is a large, many-faceted crystal, moveable within a socket. While much of the healing is
done using these crystals, the Garden itself is the true source for health. Since most seekers
come in astral or mentalized form, it is not unusual to see people appear and disappear, as they
journey down the paths of the grounds, like ghosts in a floating dream, blending their minds and
hearts with the great oaks, twining roses and butterflies. In such a state, one can float in the airs
above the curling stream, and touch a toe in the waters, tracing the currents like a dolphin's fin.
The High Devas of the Garden are there for the purpose of devoting Light, Love and Essence to
the rejuvenation and comfort of the human souls who venture there. Because of this rarefied
perpetuation of grace to be found in the Healing Garden, treatment with the crystals is a
conditioner for the main influence of the Garden itself on the patient's well-being.
The waters of the stream and the many springs gushing and bubbling up from the sacred ground
are the purest and most energizing of the central world. While one may come across small
springs throughout the Garden, and fountains pluming upward silhouette the landscape, the
favored place for partaking of the elemental life of the waters is at the Tortoise Fountain. It is
the smallest and most sequestered in the Garden. Here, near the stream's shoulder, where the
bright moss forms golden ringlets upon dripping rocks, is the figure of a giant tortoise carved of
milk green jade. From a spout upon the back of the creature, the subterranean water rushes
quickly and urgently, bathing the stone turtle in copious and continuous baptism. The tortoise is
a symbol of wisdom, communication, and patience. But its greatest epistle is one of inherited
knowledge, harbored for an age to come. It is said in the records of the People that when the
tortoise speaks, the world will listen. The great Shamagicians of the Central Earth often turn
their forms into those of tortoises for ritual memory and communion with the past.
Should any reader of this material wish to "visit" the Aura Healing Garden in a mentalized state,
you would be most welcome, provided you do so with humility and respect. This can be
accomplished through the mental visualization and concentration on the Garden, as it is
described here. A prayer must first be offered for protection and guidance... request a guardian
of the Central Earth to guide you. Do not attempt astral projection unless you are a true adept of
the art. Utilizing your mental body for this experience will be quite sufficient.
Here is another experience you might wish to conduct through the mentalization of "Light Image
Phasing."
Alight upon a path into the Center of the Earth, where, through Light Image Phasing, you are
taken into the center of the Earth (by an inner Earth guide) to the Spruce Tree Medicine Lodge,
upon the Isle of Communion in the middle of Chalice Lake. Five natural waterfalls pour the
holy waters into the lake, eventually flowing over a precipice, creating the Blood of Christ Falls.
In this sacred place, between the five waterfalls and the Blood of Christ Falls, the Societies of
the Great Medicine gather from their various Society Lodges throughout the Central Earth to pay
homage to and work with the greatest of devic Beings within the Nature realm. Just beyond
Chalice Lake arises the Mount of the Saf-fire, wherein the Host of the Devic Kingdom is flamed
(Issue 3-81). This gathering of Initiates is held on the Solstices and Equinoxes.
Step into the center of the Medicine Wheel engraved upon the floor of the underground level of
the Medicine Kiva. Look above you through the opening to the upper level and on through the
window in the first level ceiling. The rays of the central sun penetrate downward in shafts of
perfect arrows, piercing the chakras of your form and illuminating the symbol at your feet. You
are becoming the Sacred Spruce, the Mother Principle which roots the Tribes of Man to the
Earth. When the mighty Thunderbird descends and covers the Spruce with its wings of Light, so
the culmination of matter and spirit is complete (Issue 1-80). As the ceremony proceeds, you
will experience the wholeness of the Spirit-Life within you. Dip your Earth-Cosmic
consciousness into the Chalice and experience your own visualization of the ceremony.
IN THE MESSAGE I RECEIVED instructing me to relocate to Salt Lake City for the fourth
time, the statement was made by my sources that through the actions of those working upon the
etheric city, three "Graces" would be released... "one by one so that the Holy Ground (of SLC)
may be preserved for 1,000 years more." I was told that a major earthquake along the Wasatch
fault line was due, but that it would be stayed through the efforts of the elect. Upon my arrival
in SLC, I purchased a "Science Digest," and thumbing through it, came across the article
excerpted below: (emphasis mine)
"While Californians have long lived in fear of the unpredictable stirrings of the San Andreas
fault, scientists now believe that quiet central Utah may also have a significant potential.
"U.S. Geological Survey researchers are examining subterranean scarring in Utah to learn about
the predictability of the state's tremors. Their studies indicate that the 230 mile Wasatch fault,
lying east of the Great Salt Lake, may be close to triggering a major quake.
"The scientists believe that two quakes have shaken an area near Salt Lake City in the past 1,500
years and that a site near Provo has been jostled up to three times in the past six millennia.
Records further indicate a recurrence interval of 500 to 1,000 years in the Salt Lake Zone and
1,500 to 2,600 years near Provo... geologists speculate that it may soon be time for the earth to
move in Utah once again."
***
THE INTERNATIONAL SOCIETY OF CRYPTOZOOLOGY (ISOC) has recently been
organized, "...to serve as a focal point for the investigation, analysis, publication, and discussion
of all matters related to animals of unexpected form or size or unexpected occurrence in time or
space. The Society will encourage the scientific examination of all evidence related to these
matters." The intro sheet from ISOC further states, "Although the Society is primarily intended
for biological scientists, membership is open to all interested persons. The Society will publish
both a journal, entitled CRYPTOZOOLOGY, and a newsletter, which will be mailed to all
members (individuals and institutions may subscribe to these without membership). While
published articles will meet the highest standards of academic scholarship, they will be presented
in a format appropriate for a non-specialized audience."
Those interested should write to ISOC Secretary & Treasurer, J. Richard Greenwell for more
information. The address is: International Society of Cryptozoology, P.O. Box 43070, Tucson,
AZ 85733.
IN THE MAY, 1982 issue of "The Crystal Ball" (soon to become "The Larsen Files") editor
Harvey Larsen prints a NASA photo recently released that reveals a crater-like hole at the North
Pole 1,500 miles wide. While it is rare that polar openings can be photographed, there are
instances when etheric conditions make it possible. A copy of this issue of CB can be obtained
from Harvey Larsen, P.O. Box 4080, Torrance, CA 90510. Please be sure to enclose a SASE
with your inquiry of the cost of the back issue.
The following is excerpted from a message I received from "The Initiate" (Thoth Hermes
Trismegistus) in July of 1981. Although it is addressed to me (Aurael), it is actually a message
to all seekers of the Way, and for this reason, I am sharing it with you here. I consider it among
the most beautiful I have ever received.
"Like the rooted mountain, oh thou, Aurael, have been swept up into the vaults of Heaven, where
upon a summit of Light thy soul wast penetrated by the Divine Wand of Sacrament, forever
wedded to the Earth, to the plain of thy repose, where thou wast made flesh. Thou are a child of
passage trembling upon the lip of time. The Word has not yet winged the hearts of men, nor
borne up their spirit hither onto the starry path. Ye heareth the melody of old which standeth
resolute as a fountain proceeding from the cradle of the Earth, forever refreshing those who
would decline their limbs toward the brink and be bathed in its ensuing fragrance. These things
are yet unborn in the Light of the surface race, except for those few who as lilies in pale
lowliness do cling to the birthing field where the Earth is warm and life lingers fully and truth is
but a ray of sunlight apart from the Seed. Even the rose, in all its array of colored shades, from
the palest desert yellow to the crimson blaze, arises in the midst of shallow gardens where bees
no longer invite nectar to their tender suckle. Yet no flower, bloomed in Savioured Light, is left
unannointed. For every languid lily or perfect rose there is the Guardian Circle, the chaliced
vessel from which the communion flows to all living Lights of the One Light, beyond the beliefs
of churches or faiths of prophets. This, then, is thy companion, thy council from the Cross of
Fire which in the crucible of a passioned sunset, the Christed Man did melt His Spirit into the
Earth's and issue from his body those precious drops of blood, emancipating the fields and
gardens forgotten by man, left unattended in the mid of day. Down the tree that bound His
frame, this cherished sacrifice, turning to the gravity of a tabling Earth, was crystallized within
the Sacred Cup, held by the one known as Joseph of Arimathaea, as they fell from the wooden
stake impaled in a weeping Earth. So as these gems of sacrament are within the deepest place in
the Earth, in kind are the Children, waiting to be embraced by those whose hearts and minds
seek them not, but instead turn and plead to the stars or plot the mantel of the Earth with hungry
eyes, straining to defeat the nature of all things.
"Do not cling, thou child, to the apron of discontent where all things sink before the horizon.
Rise up to the threshold and view His commandment to thee as a fruitful and blooming rose, the
whiteness of Light brilliant in clouds, fast to the sky, full sail and free. In all directions see thy
sight expand until the Earth is a bright angel, shimmering in the dew of a celestial forest,
nurtured and resting though chaos smites her body. Like He who commands the Day, the Earth
is never separate from her peace. See then, this ultimate beauty, a design as graceful as a
feather's touch upon a baby's breath. Couldest thou, in congregation with this vision, think
despairingly of one task or position, or moment in Life? Where dost the season depart if not to
another more infinite pattern? There is never a barren place that shall not, in the Eternal, see
fruition. No latticed flake of snow vanishes not to reappear in the visibility of another draft upon
the Master Artist's plan. While all I express here is too vast for thy minutes and hours,
remember in thy heart that this is so when thou needest the golden rope cast to thee. For when
illumination is upon thee its magnitude may depart as swiftly as a passing rush of air, yet ye shall
never be truly parted from it, for ye will always remain with the knowing that touched thee, and
in seeking the moment again in memory, may be refreshed by its countenance. In the Light of
the Eternal, all ages, moments and sources are one. They are at once the cocoon, the larvae, the
caterpillar and the butterfly. As the cocoon weaves in silken embryonic dreams, so its slumber
beholds the butterfly it shall become. There is no more separation from what is to become than
what has been. Are not all things manifestations of need? Yet, what is need? To man it is one
thing, to the Source of administration it is often another.
"Place the messenger dove in the center of thy being and send it to the center of the hearth where
those of your true race abide. Resume thy former understanding of all natural things. Be as
Light. Ye have passed through three thresholds in the Nature initiation... Eternal Love, Eternal
Life and Eternal Power. Thou hast been imbued with the natures of each although the full
impact of these truths for you is to be in a future time.
"ETERNAL LOVE IS the Annointing, given as a spiritual inheritance from the Shepherd to the
lambs of the flock. It is the recognition, the proclamation.
"ETERNAL LIFE - this is the Quest, the spark of continuity which leads to paths ever bending,
leading to roads always turning, forever dividing and uniting along the Way. The greatest
Treasure is the pursuit of purity, of the innocent, the Kismet which commands the heart.
"ETERNAL POWER - In the depth of the forest, therein lies the Eternal Garden where every
manner of Nature thrusts from the soil in symmetry and beauty, confined only by the wisdom of
freedom. The gate to this Garden place is the seeker's dream. It passeth all reason and logic,
finding its mark in the soft focus of the mind, where sounds are color and light is music. To
open the gate and enter the Garden is the Eternal Power, for that knowledge is sublime. It is at
the center of all branches of the tree, at the root of all substance and form. The color associated
with this Power is white, for only through the most Divine Light vibration, that of purest white,
is Power lifted with the quality of the Divine, to soar on a cloud with its might rendered unto the
service of its Host. Magic is Power in Nature, the knowledge and harmonizing with Nature to
produce effects visible and invisible."


<!-- END FILE S82-02.md -->

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 3-82
copyright © 1982 L.Christine Hayes
THE GREAT MEDICINE SOCIETIES of the Inner Kingdom World define the word "Magic"
thus: Its meaning is derived from the word "Magi" - the Divine Christ Presence within the
Central Sun (Issue 4-80). The letters M-A-G-I-C are cryptic keys, locking in the COSMO, or
Cosmic Temple, as recorded in the ancient Lemurian Melchizedek "Book of Or" relating the
sacred Table of Light Mathematics. In the Cosmic Temple, the First Pillar is divined of Fire and
Water, the one consuming, the other imbuing. As the two combine, the ether is conformed and
the primary solids are affixed. To the Subterranean initiate of the Great Medicine Societies,
"Magic" is the first note in the "Terratary," the progression of non-substance into substance in
the creation (which is seen as continuous) of the planet Earth. Its association with magic as the
word is addressed in the surface esoterica is remote. There is a basic generic tie, but the surface
usage of magic as the occult Black, and to some extent, White Craft, is a distortion of the
conceptual Magic of Earth's ancestors, which stems from the most ancient practices of the
Melchizedek Order on and in the Earth. Certainly the exoteric slight-of-hand conductor of
illusion is but a mimicry of symbolic doctrine.
THE CADABRAUETHAS, or Shamagicians, are Central Earth Illuminaries who have attained
the highest degree of Magic Initiation, or communication / attunement with the Devic Beings.
These Initiates are opened to the Grand Vale, interpreted also as the Great Way, the Sacred
Passage; its most reverent posture being the energy symbol of the Holy Grail, the vessel for the
Ether Drink, or Christ Blood... the Wine of the Valley and Depth of Grace. Once the Master
Initiate is opened to the Grand Vale, he or she becomes a living vessel for the Devic Powers.
The word "Illuminari" in this context defines a physical being of a spiritually charged state so
manifest as to create a condition of illumination within the body, beyond the average
cosmogenetic inner Earth inhabitant (for further definition see Issue 1-80). A Shamagician is an
Illuminari of a Nature Focus beyond the automatic enlightened scope of all Illuminaries - a
specialist in the field, in other words. It is a focus so acute as to pass through the Garden Gate,
or door between the Human and Nature Kingdoms.
All Central Earth inhabitants are taken into the initiations of the Great Medicine Societies (Issue
1-80), the Societies themselves being under the guidance of the Grand Initiates (Illuminaries).
All Illuminaries are gathered within the Greatest Order, The Illumined. Yet the Shamagicians of
the Illumined Order also maintain an Order within the Dominion of the Cosmorphia - the ruling
Devic Beings of the Nature Kingdom. "Cosmorphia" is a state or condition of existence
encompassing and including these devic entities. It is the essence rather than the flame. In the
Cosmorphia, the definitives of mutable and immutable are suffused through the gauze of
Nature's webbing. Herein lies the field of Magic consciousness. Magic is transformation and
therefore Alchemy. It is a register of hyper-conscious action on the simplest of forms, imbuing
their micro-structures with the macro-cosmic gold. A sip of the Divine Potion from the Faerie's
Cup and the burrowing earthworm knows the flight of the eagle. Never does the earthworm stop
being an earthworm to become the eagle in this analogy. Spiritual Magic never compromises the
original form, but rather translates the "potential of force" within into a glorious realization
(POF, Issue 2-82). It is stated here that the form is not "compromised," yet it does appear to
change. In reality, it is the energy of the form that is fulfilling a potential aspect of itself. Since
"all is one," all beings are particles of the Great Whole, the Shamagician can "realize" any aspect
of that greater self in Nature he wishes. Because the Shamagicians have a great deal of primal
power at their command, they cannot receive their status until they have passed through the
Grand Vale.
This passage ensures the Illumined Order that these knowledge (which are in the keeping of the
Illumined) will not be wrongly solicited. There are those "Fallen Sons of Light" who do use a
facsimile of such powers for the de-evolution of Spirit through distorted consciousness, but these
Dark Magicians are not given sanction within the Sacred Center of the Earth. The power of the
false magician is weak, and limited to astral tricks of illusion. It can in no way be compared
with the etheric brilliance of the true Shamagician. The Shamanic Cadabrauethax enter
Cosmorphia for the purpose of gaining knowledge and oneness with Nature, and this for the
ultimate purpose of aiding the Earth's consciousness as a whole. They never seek knowledge for
the sake of power, but use power for the sake of knowledge, the tool of Divine Wisdom.
ONCE AGAIN, I find myself on a topic of such depth, in the space allotted me in this issue I can
only hope to impart the basic concept and purpose therein. In an attempt to allow the reader
insight into the Shamagician and his / her Nature emphasis, I ask you to visualize the following:
In Subterranea, there is the Gathgwana, Hall of the Shamagicians. Situated in the Valley of the
Sun, this mysterious structure is at once evident as a receptacle for magical issue. Cast upon the
ground like a salamander bronzed in the flame, its clay walls are indented with leaf-like designs,
carved in the clay and seeded with minute copper beads. From a distance, the glinting and
flickering of reflections in the sun are so fragmented and elusive as to give the onlooker the
sense that imagination has taken hold and he is seeing not with the eyes but with his own sense
of beauty. Gathgwana appears to be not built on a grand scale, for the rambling clay walls mold
effortlessly up the valley's hillside with a natural and simple grace, coming to press against the
mountain as a vine surrounds its wellspring in crushing embrace. But what one sees from the
outside of this tapestry of Earth is deceiving. The Hall of the Shamagicians is actually many
hallways and chambers reaching inside the mountain itself.
This is not an uncommon architecture of the Central Earth. Many temples - in which isolation
and the absorption of Earth energies are required - are tunneled into mountainsides. Once
through the clay portion of the complex, those allowed entrance must pass through something
akin to the Grand Vale, symbolically. Physically, it is a sheath of magnetic current, the
frequency of which is refined beyond our surface Earth knowledge. This sheath, or the Lesser
Vale, pours down in front of the doorway to the inner structure of Gathgwana, inside the
mountain. If the one who attempts entrance at this juncture is not "Pure of heart" in his or her
intentions, the person's astrophysical chemistry will register this impurity in the vibration of his/
her cellular atomic structure. This in turn, when subjected to the Lesser Vale, will cause a jolt to
that physical system varying in severity depending upon the degree of disparity between the
discordant vibration and the true vibrancy to which this magnetic sheath is polarized.
Once through the magnetic sheath, a Master Initiate of the Cosmorphia walks down a narrow
hall that emits a faint light from the walls, floor and ceiling as a glow reminiscent of fireflies,
only constant and even in intensity throughout, created by a phosphorescent algae. At the end of
the hallway, is the innermost chamber of Gathgwana. It is the "Pica," translated as the Room of
Transformation.
The room is shaped like a kiva with the ceremonial hole at the center of the ceiling replaced by a
gem known as the Golden Jasmine, the size of an ostrich egg and multi-faceted to reflect
whatever light is cast into its prismatic depths. The walls, floor, and ceiling of this chamber are
of a type of powdery yellow sandstone. The walls are covered with a thin layer of substance
resembling cobwebs. This material is actually produced from a very large inner Earth species of
worm who creates this netting for the primary purpose of collecting energy from the source
about it (such as sun, wind, water, earth) and maintaining an energy charge within this webbing
for its own sustenance and reproductive uses. The especially amazing thing about this worm, the
Suka, is that it collects these energies within the membrane surrounding its body and
subsequently transports the energies into caves where it then constructs the webs out of the
transformed energy compounds within its body membrane. The web shimmers in the dark
caverns sustaining and nurturing the Suka and its offspring. The Shamagicians often place these
worms in their kivas to supply the nylon-thin transducers capable of responding to the
Shamagician's energy system. Through this webbing, or "Weeka", the Shamagician can sustain
his energy rituals for a longer period of time.
Directly beneath the Golden Jasmine, a magical design is painted on a large circle of alabaster,
positioned like a flat plate on the floor, upon which the Cadabrauethax kneels. The paint used
for the design has been mixed with a substance polarized to a particular frequency through
mental impression, much like holy oil having been blessed or polarized by a priest to imbue it
with a Christed vibration. The substance in the paint is given a more neutral polarization - that
of inducing physical molecules to relax their bonding. The presence in these paints is subtle, but
becomes more reflective when arranged in the colors and design on the alabaster circle. When
the Shamagician causes, through a magical energizing process, the Jasmine crystal to "receive
light", this light is prismed in an exact pattern down onto the magical circle, causing a space to
exist between the crystal and the design which is highly conducive to the transformation of the
physical state... that of the kneeling Shamagician. In addition, most Shamagicians have tattoos
which "match" the light prisming from the crystal, much like the synchronicity of a computer.
Some of the Master Initiates who are embraced by the Cosmorphia do not bear the tattoos.
Those Illuminaries who carry the authority of a Shamagician but who are also involved in other
mediums (such as Thoth Hermes) do not choose to affix themselves to the Cosmorphia by
physical markings, for they must belong to many Gates as well as this Nature Threshold.
At this point in the transformation process, the Shamagician kneeling upon the magic circle has
merely brought his body into a condition of malleability. He must now begin the actual
transpolarity of his POF (potential of force) into the desired vector for transformation. Here the
reader needs to be reminded that while the term "transformation" is used to describe this event,
the true etheric form is never violated. The physical composition is temporarily rendered facile
and, like a rubber band, expands to encompass a particular aspect of the "All" which is within
each particle of all existence. As with a rubber band, the original form is always present and will
eventually "snap" back into its relaxed posture. In ordinary ambulance on this physical plane,
the object (i.e. the human body) is the traveler and motion through space is the journey. In
Cosmorphia these roles are reversed. The motion is the traveling message and the object has
become the journey.
As the messages are received by the object, that object re-arranges its space (between particles)
accordingly. Exactly how the Shamagician fully accomplishes this phenomenon, I am not
permitted to clarify. It is a secret of the craft. Yet through the skill and desire of spirit, so the
Cadabrauethax ascends to the summit of his mastery and entertains the presences of Holy Devas.
In the visualization presented here, our Shamagician is one of the Thunderbird Sect, and thus his
"new" form is that of a bird. This is not a transformation of the entire body in this instance, but
only affects the arms and shoulders which are now pinioned with large wings appearing to grow
from the tendons between the shoulder blades. While the arms are present to some extent
beneath the wings, the elbow joints are modified for wing extension and flight, and the hands are
absorbed into the wings. The Shamagician is now capable of flight.
There are other forms of transformation in which the Nature artist changes most of his life force
into pure energy and focuses only a small portion of it into external viability through the image
of a small animal (hawk, dove, deer, tortoise, etc.). This borders on sheer illusion and can be
maintained only for a brief time. Another means of entering the animal kingdom is to inhabit an
already living creature. But this, too, can be done for but a short time, and must be undertaken
with the express permission of the Guardian Deva of the animal to be inhabited (which would
also mean that the souli of that animal was in accord). The preferred transformation is one of
partial alteration, as it can be sustained for a longer time, and of most importance, because the
Shamagician is not disguised. He is seen for what he is - a Cadabrauethax in a state of
transformation. While these Master Initiates are of the Holy Illumined Order, they still contain a
human force. The spiritual codes of the Heritage of One (Tribes of Central Earth) decree that
human beings should be seen and known as such. In a society where total transformations are
possible, even if by only an elect few, those who are involved in such practices must announce
themselves, giving their true identity to those with whom they come in contact while in a
transformed state.
This is difficult for a Shamagician when he is in a concentrated energy form. He enters these
states not for deception or exhibition, but to become one with that part of being; to learn and
receive so that he may ultimately give. Thus, when a Cosmorphia Master does enter a totally
different form, he usually does so in retreat, away from the attention of other humans. Even the
half-transformations enacted by the Thunderbird Sect are preferably accomplished in solitude, or
in the company of others in the same state. The Thunderbird Sect performs in patterns of flight
in order to receive from the Devas of the air. It is a means to know both worlds in one
interaction.
IN THE INTERACTION with the Nature Kingdom, the practice of Wulzedak, or transformation
into Nature forms, is but one aspect of the whole. At the zenith of Nature communications and
receipt is to be found the seat of Spiritual Alchemy. Whereas Wulzedak is an experience of
human into Nature state, the Higher Art, Hatha, is the transformation of the human condition
into the exalted state of greater essence, closer to the threshold of angelic issue. This is not
meant to imply that Wulzedak is perceived by The Illumined humanity as a negative or improper
practice. In its true and purified genre, performed by Illuminari Shamagicians, it is a holy
practice. But its content is of a more simplified force, primal and limited. Hatha embraces the
Christed state as well as the greater degrees preceding it.
AT the pinnacle of Spiritual Alchemy is the Grand Initiate, THOTH HERMES TRIMESGISTUS
(RAIMES).
"In the apex of the pyramid I set the crystal, sending the ray into the Time-Space, drawing the
force from out of the ether... Far in a past time, lost in the space time, the Children of Light
looked down on the world; seeing the children of men in their bondage, bound by the force that
came from beyond; knew they that only by freedom of bondage could man ever rise from earth
to the sun. Down they descended and created bodies, taking the semblance of men, like and yet
unlike the children of men... Man is a star bound to a body! Man is space born, a child of the
stars. Man is a flame bound to a mountain!"
-- Thoth Hermes, from "Secret Places of the Lion, by George Hunt Williamson
Within the Inner World, Thoth Hermes continues to work within the doctrines of Spiritual
Alchemy, assisted by his communion with ultra-beings (even more "ultra" than himself).
Passages from various lessons in Hatha given to me by Thoth, The Initiate:
"Earth is a sphere of energized concentric centers of consciousness, each layer radiating a
vibration of relativity to every other layer, expanding into the unity of the whole sphere and to
the infinite rationales advancing and regressing through dimension. Being is involved in
expansion, contraction, impelling, repelling, motion, emotion - all quantum of the radiant flow.
True, Illumined Being is beyond the summit of evolution. The Mind of Being is the Nothing -
that which is without need, existing independent yet causing inter-penetration between all
existing principle. When we speak of Earth, we do so as a torch raised in a darkened cavern.
Wherever we shine the light, so the initiate sees the signs on the wall of the cave. The initiate
perceives only that portion visible to his sight at the moment. He cannot connect all the symbols
together. Should the seeker have revealed to him the complete luminosity, he would not be able
to comprehend or contain what he had witnessed, for his mind is magnetized for a slow rate of
absorption. The initiate, in all his nakedness, is clothed in the raiment of the Being of all
constancy in which his Flame arises...
"All knowledge is inseparable in the knowing, but the many channels of thought form
perspectives of assimilation which are active to the karmic groups within their own
circumference of understanding. This is all necessary in the coming together of mankind's
destiny, for in order to create unity, many smaller unification must first take place, isolating the
keys of wisdom from the mass rationale. The obstacle lies within the inability of these karmic
groups to be flexible, to recognize the parity of all cosmic principle wherein there is no one
organized channel that is complete within itself. Once key knowledge have been isolated they
must migrate into the chain of wisdom which contains universal sovereignty. Understand that
the purpose of a chain is to link together and combine forms from single circles; to create
continuity and communication. However, the chain is dependent on the solidarity of the many
circles which must remain strong unto themselves. The links of the chain must interpenetrate,
but they must not lose individual form lest the continuity of the whole be lost in the mass
rationale. Each link is separate and golden. It is given its own reflection in the Light. Yet
together, as a chain of purpose, it is known that each link is given reflection by the same Light.
The chains of man bind the Earth. The golden chain of cosmic consciousness is a forever
expanding link into infinity.
"Know that all passeth away but the Divine Accord. Discord is without regency. It dissipates in
the Four Winds. Reveal thy hearth to the constancy of the flaming spirit, for it is whole in its
birth and not an infant of the times. Trust among men cannot be born whole until the day of the
Lord is known in every acre of the homestead which man has made of Earth. Unto each is given
the seed of the Son of God and the seed of the daughters of men. From the faithful sowing of
both shall the harvest proceed.
"Ye of the land of men, see as the eagle flies. Approach the sun of eternity on the wind of the
Golden Dawn and know thy heritage of God which speaks as the pure flame of truth to the
Tribes of the Lost Council. Every man seeth the day but the dawn is hidden from him, for he
seeth as a ship at sea and not as the wind which guideth the masts of the ship below. The ages of
God are vested within the ages of man. Yea, the two are clothed together in the Blood of the
Sacred Christ. As man sleeps with the soothing rocking of the Earth Cradle, so God's time must
seek his heart in the light of dreams, for man is a forgetful infant swathed in starlight and suckled
by the ticking of celestial clocks. He has seen the beginning of time. He will forever span
eternity, but he places himself between the sun and the Earth and there he contemplates his
shadow. Within his mind is a faraway dream, a promise of truth, of reason, of love; an infinite
calling of the Mother Light, a need to restore the child's grace. It is the divine dream in which
man has lived and will live again.
"When we speak of the actions of the stars and their influence upon the Earth, and of those
prophecies which unfold in your time and in the time of your generations upon the Earth, we
speak of two worlds, of two times, for there will come a division of the Earth as there is now a
division of day and night. There will reign glory in the world of the day and fire in the world of
night... and two worlds shall be given ages from the mouth of the body of man. A separate time
shall be given unto each world and a separate heaven above ... It is not for us to lead the stallion
of prophecy to the altar. Man is his own agency of spirit. He is the rider of the dawn and the
darkness. The great and manifold presence of Being which uplifts and restores constancy and
grace to the universes of chaos is the only door through which man may pass. Until he accepts
this truth, this day will not be graced with the understanding of his own destiny. For it is a maze
of living to which his body is committed and from which his spirit must rise to the calling of the
Homeward Light."
A Prayer / Declaration for enlightened humanity by The Initiate:
IN THE NAME OF DIVINE VICTORY, I AM WEDDED TO THE MANIFEST DESTINY OF
MY SPIRIT IN THE EARTH. TO THIS END I CANNOT BE CONQUERED BY VOTARIES
OF EVIL SERVICE.
IN THE NAME OF DIVINE LIGHT, MY WELLSPRING IS IN THE SUN OF MAJESTY. I
AM INFUSED WITH THE PRESENCE OF THE HOST IN DELIVERY AND RECEIPT; IN
ALL MANNER OF SUSTENANCE AND ACCORD.
IN THE NAME OF DIVINE PERFECTION, MY BODY AND MIND ARE SPLENDID IN
GLORY, RELEASED FROM THE TRANSGRESSIONS OF PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE,
WHOLE IN THE EVOLUTION OF CONSCIOUSNESS.
IN THE NAME OF ELOHIM, I AM THE GENERATION OF MY HERITAGE, REVEALED
IN THE SONS AND DAUGHTERS OF LIGHT.
I AM THE QUEST OF MINE OWN HOMING, THE BIRTH OF MINE OWN FATHERS;
FOREVER UNTO THE COMING AND THE GOING FORTH.
I AM LIFTED, WINGS BOUND TO THE STAR OF THE HOMEWARD LIGHT.
AMEN
"In the cities of this New Day, Temples of Initiation will arise in which the eternal truths taught
in the Mysteries will once again be revived in all their magnificent splendor. Initiation will
again be recognized as an attainment by which man can even here and now overcome the powers
of death and enter into a realization of life immortal."
-- from: "Mystic Masonry and the Bible" by Corinne Heline
THE SHAMAGICIANS of the Central Earth Heritage of One focus their energy forces through
transformation into giant tortoises for a phase in their initiatory rites, which they enter once
every 5,000 days (marked from the beginning of the individual Shamagician's first initiation).
The tortoise is also venerated by sacred inscriptions placed on the backs of certain select of this
ancient species. This is accomplished not by engraving, but through a process of light transfer,
causing no mutilation of the shell.
"In Agharti the learned Panditas write on Tablets of stone all the science of our planet and of the
other worlds. The Chinese-learned Buddhists know this. Their science is the highest and purest.
Every century one hundred sages of China collect in the secret place on the shores of the sea,
where from its depths come out one hundred eternally-living tortoises. On their shells the
Chinese write all the developments of the divine science of the century."
--
- from "Beasts, Men & Gods" by Ferdinand Ossendowski
