# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 4-82
copyright © 1982 L.Christine Hayes
IN THE OCTOBER 1982 issue of "Science Digest," there appeared an article entitled "Cities of
the Sun" in which future possibilities of creating new, efficient worlds out of redesigned
planetary material is explored. The article states that in the mid-sixties, Princeton physicist
Freeman Dyson theoretically conceived of a way to dismantle Jupiter, creating raw materials for
"terra-giants," new worlds of our own conception. The blueprint for reconstruction of the Jovian
matter would be a series of concentric matter-rings about a galactic sun. To quote from the
article:
"The shells of artificial habitats orbiting in a Dyson sphere keep the sun's energy from passing
into space as infrared rays. Instead, the energy would be captured by photoelectric cells, or
perhaps green plants, lining the inside of the habitats."
The article continues, discussing a variation of the Dyson sphere suggested by author Larry
Niven:
"Instead of a sphere, he proposes a ring about the sun about ninety-three million miles in radius
and about half a mile thick. It wouldn't need a protective dome. Walls or mountains 1,000 miles
high at the rim, tilted inward toward the sun, would hold in its atmosphere. It wouldn't need
artificial gravity either. The entire world could spin to simulate the cycles of night and day.
Ring-world would have an inner ring of shadow squares, orbiting structures that would create
days and nights of any length we chose. And we could create seasons by altering the tilt of the
ring relative to the sun.
"British physicist J. Desmond Bernal predicted in 1929: Someday most people will live on the
sun's wasted energy in hollow asteroid globes that will be circling our star."
And so we find futurists constructing in the mind's eye a vista of habitation not unlike the natural
geologic structure of their home planet. It is perhaps the capstone of ironies.
ALTHOUGH ALL VIABLE PLANETS ARE NATURALLY HOLLOW SPHERES in their true
dimensional amplitude, the central interior of the Earth would not be the paradise it now is
without the symbiosis of man and Nature extended by the Subterraneans into the very depths of
Nature Spirit communication. In Issue 1-81 of The Source, the communication between
subterranean humanity of the Twelve Tribes and the Nature Devas is discussed. Through this
exchange and sympathetic vibration of one kingdom for another, forestation is kept from random
and overpowering growth, insects are not allowed to be too proliferate, the propagation of all
species is controlled through spiritually aligned means. The majority of this benign order is the
result of the Nature Devas' rightful authority over their kingdom. (An authority that is stunted on
the surface of the planet by man's disregard for Nature Spirits, and his continued acts of
aggression toward the natural world.)
There is also a substantial effect upon the natural world of the Central Earth by its human
inhabitants. Unlike their surface relation, this effect is positive and not negative in its resultant
outcome. For example, the problem faced by the inner cultures concerning the interior ocean's
salt content. Because of various factors, including the proximity of the central sun, the salinity
of the inner seas increases at a rapid rate. This is not due so much to water condensation as by
the pressure exerted upon crystals in the hollow of a planetary sphere. The build-up of salt in the
inner oceans, were it allowed to progress upon its natural course, would render the interior
incompatible for human and, in most instances, animal habitation. Through shamanic exchange
with the Devas, crystalline structure is subtly altered through a polarity differential in a way that
slows the growth of the salt crystals. But in itself, this is still not enough. Human effort is also
expended through bio-genetics to create a kelp plant that reduces the saline quality of the water
in which it grows by converting a certain amount of the salt into a hydrogen compound. This
also serves to increase air purity when condensed. Through the combined efforts of the human
and Devic dwellers of the inner world, the kelp was developed, grown at the bottom of the seas,
sustained and, of final importance, controlled. Without assurance of control over a man-created
life form, or altered life form habitat, the positive aspects of its existence can turn into a
devastating negative.
Assimilation into a homogenous state of whole-Earth management must be complete if any
manipulation of life forms and habitats is to be successful and productive to the ecosphere of the
environment. The inner Earth scientists did not simply decide to research and develop a life
form that would serve the purpose as they saw it, but through shamanic mediums, long ago, they
were given by the Devic Regencies of the Earth the exact chemical formulas needed to alter,
through a natural disposition of precise conditions, the processes of crystalline development in
the salt crystals. Given this knowledge, the Shaman scientists proceeded in a step by step Nature
ritual, aligned to the shamanic power synthesis, to reproduce the desired effect. If they had not
been able to attune themselves to the exact formula, to the perfect degree of integration required,
crystalline deformity could have resulted. Yet they did not play the odds in a game of fortune.
Because of ages upon ages of knowledge coupled with wisdom stemming from Lemurian,
Atlantean, and other Lost World data, their inner terrestrial High Priests of Science and Wisdom
felt secure in their ability to perform such miracles of an age suspended in the center of the
Earth.
ANOTHER INTERESTING bit of information from the October issue of "Science Digest:"
"Evidence suggests that secretion of melatonin, a hormone linked to the reproductive function in
some animals, is regulated in part by daily cycles of light and dark." Research has recently
shown that "...bright artificial light and sunlight turn off this melatonin secretion. These
responses are thought to be mediated by visible light (part of the sun's spectrum) which acts on
photo-receptors in the eye."
Alfred Lewey, a research psychiatrist at the Oregon Health Sciences University, "...has found
that some blind people have different melatonin secretion rhythms than people with normal
sight... other evidence indicates that the sun's ultra-violet light impairs the human system by
causing abnormalities at least temporarily, in white blood cells."
The central sun in the Earth's interior is somewhat different in chemical structure and
performance than our solar sun, thus the biologic receptivity to environmental factors is different
within the Earth's cavity than on the surface of the planet. Because the variations in the light and
dark cycles in Subterranea are not as extreme as in the outer world (there being only a cloud
collection / dispersion about the central sun causing twilight intervals... See Issue 1-80), there is
a lower melatonin secretion in the body of a subterranean dweller than in that of his surface
counterpart. Large melatonin secretions tend to block and/or distort psi orientation. Too little
secretion could cause problems also, but the desirable level is much lower than most surface
inhabitants contain. The lesser degree of melatonin secretion in Central Earth dwellers causes
their birth rate to be naturally lower, even without the added Devic controls. Although ultra-
violet light impairs the human immune system, there is much less ultra-violet light in the
atmosphere of the inner cavity.
Because the atmosphere is more reflective than the Earth's surface atmosphere, more of the sun's
radiant energy is converted to visible light. This is especially evidenced in the "Saf-fire" and
other light images of the interior's crystalline canopy (Source 3-81). The immune system of the
inner world remains intact within itself. Disease coming from within the center of the Earth is
unknown. There is bacteria from the outer sphere that does find its way into the interior via the
linking oceans despite the natural and enhanced decontamination process of the polar magnetic
shields. These small amounts of pollution are not yet a threat to the interior, but the more
pollutants contained within the surface oceans, the greater strain put on the detoxifying forces of
the polar shields. Because the ecosphere of the Central Earth Domain is so purified by natural
processes, the delicate balance of this ecosystem could be offset by any sudden insurgence of
foreign bacteria and pollutants. Thus, any object, material, flora or fauna - or, on rare occasions,
humans who are brought from the outer into the inner world - are thoroughly decontaminated
before entering.
This is done in cavern stations, hermetically sealed from either world atmosphere, located
between the two spaces. Even astral and mental travelers to the interior are not exempt from
decontamination procedures. If the experience is vivid enough, the voyager can actually carry a
particle of his "contamination" with him in the form of auric shadows which can cling to the aura
field of the inner ecosphere and eventually (were enough to build up) "program" a physical
reality undesirable in the pristine condition of the Inner Garden World.
I can recall a mental projection trip I took into the Earth's center. I remember washing in a green
liquid which I was asked to drink also. There is definite control of astral / mental traffic into the
central world because of this factor (although some unwanted sojourners do occasionally slip
by.) One is not permitted entry by these illusive means without consent granted on some level of
awareness and a guide assigned to the individual entrant. One who somehow manages to get
there uninvited would not be welcome... whether he or she arrives astrally, mentally, or
physically. For astral or mental trips, the seeker who desires entrance should always petition in
the form of a prayer and request that a guide be given to accompany them. If no guide is
forthcoming, the journey should not be attempted. The Aura Healing Garden is a place within
Subterranea that you would most likely to be welcome, provided your purpose is a spiritual one
(Issue 2-82.)
AS MENTIONED IN Issue 3-81 of The Source, the energy used by the Subterraneans of the
Central Earth is largely directed from the natural telluric currents of the planet. In order to
direct, control and concentrate this energy, crystals are the main conductors employed. For
specialized purposes, crystals are also used as conduits and enhancers for mind energies. Since
crystal growth within the inner cavity is especially viable, with the interaction of Nature Spirits,
whole "gardens" of crystals may be grown of any type or formation. Just as surface civilizations
may have generator plants humming away behind chainlink fences, so subterranean centers have
their crystal "terraces." These terraces hum their own tunes as Earth currents pass through there.
But the songs they sing are harmonious and soothing to the ear, unlike our power plants. The
crystals are aglow with an inner radiance, never constant but always a field of light in motion.
The most fascinating of all subterranean crystals come not from the Earth directly, nor from any
other planetary mass. They are the brilliant thought crystals created by focusing mind energy
into matrices of minerals. Crystals grown in this manner by expert mentalizers appear more
entrancing than the most beautiful crystals we can imagine. The skill of the mentalizers is so
acute that he can not only grow a crystal with mental energy, but facet it as well. The proper
name for this art-science translated, is “morphacrystallic generation." There is a sister
technique, "morphacrystallic transformation," which uses the chemicals, intact molecularly, of a
once-living system, i.e., a recently deceased animal, plant or human. The famous Mitchell-
Hedges crystal skull unearthed in the ruins of the Mayan city of Lubaatun in 1927 is an example
of morphacrystallic transformation. Yet the crystal skull was transformed in Atlantis at a time
when the true art form was ebbing, and is therefore not a classic example of the science. The
crystal skull of Lubaatun was not entirely worked mentally... lasers finished the polishing and
extra faceting required for specific light functions. Although the latter Mayan priests used the
crystal skull for black magic and trick performances, it was originally used as an ocular medium.
With its pivotal jaw, a beneficent spirit could "move" through it, lending a greater reality to the
messages given. The skull was that of the female priestess, Shalkuunthee-tra, killed in one of the
last earthquakes of Atlantis.
Morphacrystallic transformation is not commonly instituted by the Inner Earth Tribes, but is
practiced on occasion when an especially inspiring personage transcends this life and wishes to
leave his or her body behind to be crystallized for the inspiration and cultural heritage of future
generations. Unlike the Mitchell-Hedges skull, the Subterraneans usually crystallize the entire
body, including vestments. This process can be achieved in a rock quartz appearance or other
crystalline formations, such as gold. The gold "statues" of Inca leaders said to be sequestered in
caverns of Peru are not mere replicas, but the actual crystallized bodies of these entities.
In Atlantis, especially the period before the last cataclysms that utterly destroyed it as a nation,
both morphacrystallic procedures (generation and transformation) were prevalently practiced.
There was the ethereal and majestic Crystal Palace of Atlantis, the center of all beauty, culture
and spiritual harmony of the world of that age. It was a mammoth example of thought-crystal
composition, employing the talents of fifty-one mentalizers and several hundred other artisans
who gave final grace and line to the Palace through laser-craft. Not the entire Palace was
morphacrystallically composed. Some was the result of laser-hewn quartz integrated with the
thought-crystal; yet the majority of the large Palace-Temple was the product of morphacrystallic
generation.
Atlantis also possessed the crystal tablets upon which living energies were ignited in the
imprinting on the surface, cut so in tune with the energy source of the actual crystal lattices that
the symbols were literally burning with luminosity when the mind concentrated on them during
the reading of the texts written upon the tablets. Some of these tablets were composed of thin
sheets of crystal or gold linked together in book form. This same process was used to display
beautiful portraits etched in crystal of animals, flowers, etc. These crystals were sometimes
large ovals or squares. They were seen as well on walls or floor surfaces that were of crystal.
The more the observer concentrated on the etching, the brighter it glowed. Such wonders are
still to be seen in Subterranea, but the "Golden Age" of this craft was in ancient Atlantis. She
was the Emerald Lady of the Atlantic, adorned with her splendorous jewels of light and crystal.
Another ancient morphacrystallic mode, still in use within the Central Earth, is liquidizing any
substance with a crystalline composition - quartz, emerald, diamond, sapphire - or stone such as
granite. Once reduced to a plastic state and poured into molds, it would reharden into the desired
form. This and levitation were the two main (but not only) procedures employed in the building
of the ancient surface monoliths.
Generations of mankind have seen the crystal to be a polished cell of their own souls, held to the
Light of Divine Fire. The holocrystal chambers of our mind reflect this inner knowing that we
are phantoms of the Pure Gem of Being, facets in the nature of perfection not realized by our
clay substance as we mold duplications of our image in the Earth. Yet deep within the center of
our consciousness, "We are winged, we are crystal, we are light. Into our vessels are poured
liquid gold, fire emerald, onyx night. We are pledged to adorn His temple forever." So said
Amenti of Egypt, High Priest of Raphis, long before the first historically known beginnings of
the Egyptian Pharaohs.
**
*****
AS I WAS PREPARING the material for this issue, and had already included mention of the
Mitchell-Hedges crystal skull, I felt summoned to the local library. I didn't have any idea as to
what I might find there, but almost immediately my hand fell on a small hardback. The title...
"The Crystal Skull"! Up until that moment, I had little information about the circumstances
surrounding the finding of this artifact. At this particular time, to find this book in my hands,
would seem to be more than coincidence. When I read the book (by Richard Garvin) I made an
even more astounding discovery. Just the very night before the book came to my attention in the
library, I had one of the most acutely sensoral- metaphysical experiences of my life. It was also
the most sustained in length (or apparent length) of time.
I had awakened in the early morning hours, just as darkness was beginning to recede, and was
lying still, with my eyes closed. I realized that I could see every detail of the room as it was in
the semi-darkness, with my eyes closed! I opened them and shut them again. It was the same
scene, whether my eyes were opened or closed. Then suddenly, I began to feel the sensation of
motion, familiar to me as the first stage of a guided astral projection. I sensed my guides near
and I knew I was off to a specific place already decided by the Elders. I had no idea where that
place would be... I just hung on and took off! At first, I was moving in a fast blur, but then I
slowed and could see that I was traveling through a city of stone buildings, very large, ornately
carved and of an ancient order. I heard, very physically, a rhythmic sound somewhat like two
soft metal spoons being struck together, emitting a medium-high pitched "tang-tang-tang," with
intervals or breaks in the rhythm. The sound seemed to conduct my motion through the space.
My journey brought me extremely close to a giant stone wall, built in a circle. I saw through one
of the many archways into the stadium-like, unroofed interior. I only glimpsed inside, and from
my perspective saw a pyramid, but sensed that there were others within the stone walls of equal
majesty. The interior "field" must have been immense! The pyramid I saw gleamed prismed
jewels of light from its perfect white form. Indeed, the whole of this city shone brilliant white,
like the bones of a great whale, bleaching in the sun. While close to the wall, I studied the
intricate symbols carved in the white stone that seemed to be covered in places by equally white
cement granules, giving a textured effect to the surface of the rock. The carved designs seemed
not wholly Egyptian, not wholly native South or Central American, but there were traces of both
cultural references commingled in the motif. I don't recall if the pyramid I saw had a flat or
pointed top.
After several moments of surveying these enchanted wonders, I began to travel once again, in a
fast blur, entering a long, dark tunnel. There was a light in the distance, almost no more than a
pinpoint. Streams of colored rays were flung about from the sides of the tunnel toward me in
fantasy spectrum. The "tanging" sound had never ceased during the entire voyage. I began to
feel a little apprehensive, as I sensed I was going down to Earth, and I was receiving too much
sensation from the sheer drop for me to manage comfortably. I felt it was time for me to pull out
and come in for a landing. When I, with some effort, opened my eyes, the sound and motion
stopped. I was back in my room, the gentle sunlight softening the darkness. I then went
soundly, and uneventfully, to sleep.
It was the next day that I found and read "The Crystal Skull." Prior to this reading, I had never,
to my remembrance, heard or read of Lubaatun (the ruins where the skull was found), nor had I
any knowledge as to the architecture of that ancient city. I now quote directly from the text of
"The Crystal Skull":
"By 1926 they had only begun to excavate Lubaatun (in British Honduras). It covered an area of
six square miles and in the center stood a mighty citadel with pyramids, terraces, mounds, walls,
houses, subterranean chambers, and most magnificent of all, a huge amphitheater designed to
hold more than ten thousand people and approached by two great stairways. The citadel had
been covered with cut white stone and hard cement. Lubaatun had raised above the level of the
jungle, and when it was young must have stood out like a magical pearl-like city... Early the
next year, as Anna (Mitchell-Hedges) and her father were in the ruins of a temple trying to move
a heavy wall which had fallen on an altar, they saw an object glisten in the dust. The crystal
skull was buried beneath that altar and three months later the matching jawbone was discovered
twenty-five feet away. Lubaatun had given up the skull but kept the secrets for herself."
In summary to what I believe was my personal experience with the "pearl-like" city of Lubaatun,
I sensed was back in time, visiting an ancient city as it had been when it was newly sculpted and
alive with the energies of the age and culture (although I must admit, it was at least visibly
empty when I was there). I feel the original city, now called Lubaatun, meaning "City of Fallen
Stone," was more ancient than the Mayans - part of the colonial cities of Atlantis, and later
occupied by the Mayans. This would account for the detailed motif of the structures being a
composite of what we now recognize as Egyptian and Mayan, both cultures actually stemming
from Atlantis.
I am reminded of an Atlantean dialogue of self which I translated holo-crystallically eight years
ago:
"I stand in silence near the city gates, the cold metal glistening in my sight. Gates that conceal,
oh, the mighty wonders within. A kingdom bound within walls? No, never bound, but
embraced by protective stone, set apart to become truly recognized from among the rubble of
lesser past cities. Chaste, in countenance with time, long fasted from living flesh. The gates
open to me, and I retreat a moment, to gather the flowers of my earthen bed, that my token might
be worthy. My sandals I cast aside, so that the bareness of the Sacred Earth shall lie open to my
feet. I loosen my hair, allowing it to fall into space, into the melody of my soul. As I enter the
Holy Place, my robe of poor and simple self becomes enchanted in the sun, and spins into a new
thread, a raiment of glorious white, as if silver stars caressed each fold. My skin becomes as
golden light, my eyes the fire of deep blue moons. I see this illumination of my body in the
faces of those around me who cluster in the streets of gold. They flutter as on wings of crystal,
clear and smooth, about me. I find the people to be the dawn and the night, the chill and the
warmth, the laughter and sorrow - the spirit of the city... Where shall I look for the perfect
image from which to make my likeness in the city of Light? Shall I be as the tallest spire that
sees farthest above and looks down upon all else?
"But without the foundation, the spiral would surely crumble. Shall I be as the gate that calls in
voiceless song, 'I am a boundary, come cross my threshold... But gates cannot become the
treasure, they only slide open and shut for others. As I look about, there is no one thing into
which I wish to fashion myself. No single piece of stone or metal alone may find meaning in the
depths of my soul. The words that make of myself whole are joined in the harmony of my
floundering heart, sympathetic to itself as it is to others; my mumbling brain that engages in
thought as a passing fancy, and my groping tongue that bribes my mind to give it lightness and a
burning phrase. Like the foundation of a dry clay that carries on its back the golden spires of the
great city, I am as a syllable of this place, yet I am a kingdom within."
***
***
LETTERS...
******
******
"I found your latest newsletter most interesting.. It reminds me of nothing so much as of a
revelatory dream I had following a period of intense grief over losing our first dog to cancer...
when I started with a descent into the center of the earth where I found blue skies and people
from all ages and times of the unknown earth history... and met my dog again who had a
profoundly important and moving discussion with me in a telepathic manner, which released me
and my daughter from the grief we could not shake alone."
Ruth Weddle, Editor of "Psychic Pets"


<!-- END FILE S82-04.md -->

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 1-83
copyright © 1983 L.Christine Hayes
An explanation for the benefit of this year's new subscribers... The inner terrestrials addressed
in "The Source" are physical, living, ensouled being who's molecular structure is attuned to a
greater oscillatory rate than our biosystems, and therefore in a subtler and more advanced state
of spiritual / physical evolution. They share with us our ancient ancestors - an ultra-homosapien
species who originally imbued this planet with a grace and culture now lost from us. We
continue to dwell upon the surface of our sphere, claiming a few degenerate human forms
evidenced from the past as our beginning in the life stream. Their remnants of bone and ash
stand as mute testimony to the fleeting of knowledge once the flame is exhausted. Our Brethren
dwelling within the natural hollow of the Earth are the "Flame Keepers" for our planet. They
keep alive what is temporarily hidden from us by our dream of life.
Illuminaries are Subterraneans (more advanced than the average inner terrestrial) who are able to
manifest any spiritualized form at will. They are spiritual Masters in highly atomically
accelerated bodies capable of many multi-dimensional feats.
Ultra-terrestrials are spiritually advanced universal humanity from other worlds who are capable
of dimensional travel and experience. Like the inner-terrestrials of our Central Earth, the UTs
are physical, yet their molecular structure is attuned to a higher frequency than our surface world
biosystems.
***
**
The following is a question and answer documentation conducted by me (LCH) with the ultra-
terrestrial, NOEL. I have been in communication with Noel for many years and believe him to
be a reliable and stable personality. Although his molecular structure vibrates at a higher
frequency than our own, his "race" is related to us genetically, and thus he is also related to the
inner Earth Tribes. Noel has resided within this planet among the Twelve Tribes of the Heritage
of One for 25 or 30 years. He is an administrator for geological survey, a commander of star
crafts for coordinated geologic restoration of Earth (coordinating ultra-terrestrial and inner-
terrestrial operations), and a delegate in Regent to the Noah Summit (gathering of UTs & ITs for
the purpose of aiding this planet and the preparation of a future uniting of the "Lost Tribes," as a
genetic family once again). Noel and his brother, Ramul, are from the planet Faustia, the Earth's
"Oversoul" world in the constellation of Orion.
Q. (Question, LCH) Explain the intention of the UTs and the ITs in their activities focused
upon the surface Earth and its people.
N. (Noel) We act as emissaries of Hierarchical command for the purpose of restoring the Earth
to its inheritance in the Universe as a conscious and active member of the "Unimanity Pact
Among Equilibrant Worlds" (UPAEW). Our mission is dual in that we must aid humanity to
restore themselves and their planet, and attempt to open the door between the Human and Nature
Kingdoms through spiritual triggering within the souls of those with a beginning and advanced
awareness.
Q. What is the "Unimanity Pact Among Equilibrant Worlds"?
N. It is a Pact and joint effort of all worlds sharing the same genetic, cosmic and spiritual
heritage as Earth's.
Q. What do you mean by “hierarchical command”?
N. The "Hierarchy," to which I refer, are Radiants of Divine energy surrounding the Christos or
Divine Charge issued from the Source of all being. At this time, the Hierarchy and the Christos
are embodied in "radiant Shells," beyond what you can imagine as physical, yet being a form of
physical energy, in the world of Faustia. This had been so since the resurrection of Jesus Christ
and will continue until your world of Earth is lifted to “meet Him in the sky." The Hierarchical
command, then, is an issue of Divine Programming set into motion to release the Earth from its
entropic disintegration, and enabling it to be received in the concourse of celestial harmonics.
Q. The terms "Dero" and "Tero" are used by several Hollow Earth occultists and researchers to
define bad and good entities which are said to inhabit the interior of the Earth. Please address
this subject briefly.
N. There are some negative forms within certain layers of the Earth. These are mostly
disembodied. A few maintain biosystems that are poorly geneticized. They inhabit areas where
pockets of magnetic anomalies and stagnant energies exist. Their presence in the Earth
constitutes a very small percentage of Earth energies. No such deformations exist within the
"Sacred Hollow" (central hollow cavity) of the Earth. The Central Hollow is represented in the
Solomonic Rites as the "Holy of Holies" - the central chamber of the Temple which contained
the Holy Relics, including the Ark of the Covenant. The Inner Earth Mysteries were symbolized
in living energies through the pantheon of the Temple. In order to comprehend the viability of
the Central Earth, both as a geologic natural form and as a populated region, it must first be
recognized as a central axis for spiritual exegesis. The Inner Earth is a Mystery leading the
initiate to understanding if he but deciphers the flaming script that will light his way through the
impenetrable maze to the Holy Center. Earth must be seen as not simply a whirling oasis of
matter and electricity, but as an externalization of spiritual purpose and design. There are nine
layers of descent into the Sacred Hollow of the Earth. These Earth layers are degrees of spiritual
/ physical change the journeyman (initiate) undergoes in reaching the destination sought - the
centering flame of the world / planet. When the sacredness of Earth's plight is understood, it can
be also understood that truly evil activities on or within this planet cannot be more than displays,
with little sustenance behind them. The greatest negativity to be found on the planet is within
the karmic confrontations of the surface inhabitants, who play out karmic scenarios among one
another.
There are negative extra-terrestrial "agents" planted on the surface of the Earth. They cannot
interbreed with Earth races (there are very rare exceptions) and they are few in number
compared to the positive forces. The negative ETs have limiting difficulties in Earth's relatively
positive environment. As an example, they find it difficult to breathe and suffer muscle spasms
similar to the bends if they stay for more than brief periods in the magnetic field of the planet.
These negative agents exert strong influences on certain key figures in industry and government.
This influence, in varying stages, is "subliminal programming." Yet they must always seek
those who are already self-motivated in that direction - those who are self-serving and seek
power are prime subjects for the negative ET influence. No one can be forced through the
manipulative energies of the Dark Forces to act against their inner desires. When considering
the surface world as a whole, the positive forces (Ultra, Inner and surface) are a far more
prominent power in the world than are the Emissaries of Darkness.
Q. I would like to continue with some points mentioned in "Hollow Earth Mysteries" (by Floria
Benton). In this book it was suggested that George Adamski, when taken by beings from
another world to see the moon, was given an illusion of life on the surface by the aliens, since we
have now visited that sphere, and know it to be void of life. Please comment.
N. Adamski was viewing the moon as it exists in its own plane of viability, and not as it is found
in your dimensional spectra. With the exception of Mercury and Pluto (where only mentalized
energies exist) all the planets in this solar system are inhabited by physical intelligence. So long
as Earth dwellers continue to see and experience space and time within only one plane of being,
these worlds will appear lifeless and desolate to them.
Q. Do the inhabitants of the Central Earth try to prevent their existence from becoming well
known?
N. The Noah Summit anticipates that only surface dwellers who are spiritually ready will
receive the truth of the Inner Mysteries as fact. While there are those who believe in the hollow,
if they do not comprehend it as a Mystic Center they will never enter unto it nor trespass into its
cavern satellite cities. Such prevention is carried out through non-harmful means. No attempt
by the Central Earth Tribes or their ultra-terrestrial allies has ever been made to suppress Hollow
Earth information through coercion or mental or physical harm. Nor has there ever been any
effort taken to stop entry into the Earth layers by ITs or UTs that was emotionally or physically
damaging. However it should be taken into consideration that to open unwelcome doors - to
attempt to enter initiative places unsolicited is in violation of Divine Law and the violator is
therefore subject to retroactive consequences, or karma.
In summary, while the positive forces on this planet do not wish groups or perhaps hordes of
surface dwellers to descend into their world, they do intend to gradually introduce themselves to
your populace for future physical encounter. Their primary concern at this time is to "initiate"
those ready, into the Inner Earth Mysteries to imbue them with the Divine Truth of their shared
origins and enlighten those who seek with their hearts the wisdom of the ages which is nurtured
and sustained in the Earth for the future Dawning. Negative forces conspire against this
fulfillment. Those who serve Darkness do not wish the existence of the interior world to become
generally known by surface nations and peoples. They work against the coming together of the
"Lost Tribes," for these "Tribes" are only externalized as actual races of peoples. They are in
essence, Creation Signal Light Codes of the Hierarchy, enacted in the Beginning Time on this
Planet, now lost from it through disintegration of the Absolute or First Principle of Perfect Light
and Power, lost from Earth's races in several stages, beginning with the original "fall from
Grace" in the Eden, or descent from the point of balance.
Q. Do ultra- and inner-terrestrial agents move among us?
N. Yes. Unlike the negative ETs, interbreeding is not uncommon between UTs and ITs with
their surface world brethren. This interbreeding is selective, but the purpose is not sinister. The
UT and ITs among you are placed there solely to aid humanity in reaching spiritual "nova" in
consciousness. The mixing of genetics is to allow the natural state of oneness to be again.
These are all various strains of the same genetics, however separated in distance or
understanding. We are all of the "Heritage of One."
Q. In "Hollow Earth Mysteries" it is suggested that those of us who are from other world
genetics will be taken off the planet just before the final destructions, leaving the others behind.
Please comment.
N. It would be totally against the Divine Purpose to which we, ultra and inner, are committed to
instigate such a plan. It is true that there will be those unable to ascend with the planet when the
time arrives, but this will be a result of their own will, not any selection or rejection on our part.
You, as a people, and individually, create your own conflicts, purges, dilemmas. You allow
yourselves to be caught up in the Law of Cause and Effect, rather than to flow freely with the
issuance of Divine Law, which permeates all existence.
Q. When the "last Hour" arrives, just before the final destructions of this planet, what will
happen to the people then living on the Earth?
N. Those who have disengaged themselves from the laws of Cause and Effect will be received
by Divine Law. They and their planetary world will be lifted up vibrationally to the level of the
Christos and received through the Mother vibration of the Faustia (a Divine frequency only
externalized as a planet). The distance in space of these two worlds will not be a factor. I am
speaking of a nova of Divine Light beyond time and space. Those who are unable to witness the
Light to become part of the Nova through their own will - will be released from physical
embodiment along with their planetary world and forced through their own decision to enter the
karma cycle in another world / dimension frame, lower in evolution than the one from whence
they were expelled. Before the "Last Hour" it will have become so divided on Earth, for the
planet to have separated into two consciousness factors... two worlds, neither normally visible to
the senses of the other. One will arise in the Coming Light; the other will hide in darkness to be
destroyed under the might of the stellar force fields.
Q. Will there be a mass evacuation of surface Earth dwellers in ultra- and / or inner-terrestrial
craft?
N. There will be no mass "evacuation" for the reason previously given. There will be no need
of vehicles for those who are lifted by the Divine Fire of their planetary flame. There will be
periodic times in your future history before this Last Hour, when star craft will carry select
individuals and small groups of individuals to other World Domains (inclusive of the inner
Earth) in order to instruct and enlighten them. They will then be returned to their surface world
to in turn instruct and enlighten their brethren.
Q. What part do dolphins and whales play in the "Noah" Projection (plan of the Noah Summit
for Earth)?
N. Since the dolphins, and to a lesser extent, whales, contain brain / minds of such inter-species
communicative value they are being adapted to a future state of communicative ability to aid in
the surface world's initiation into the Nature Kingdom. By the word "communication" much
more is meant than an exchange of feelings between species, but also an exchange of definitions,
concepts, and event-formulas unknown to your races. (Issue 1-81 discusses dolphins and Inter-
Species Alliance of the Inner Tribes.)
Q. Are the by now well-known animal mutilations a result of negative ET forces? If so, what is
their intent?
N. Extra-Terrestrials are the cause of these mutilations. They are not of a necessarily "negative"
origin, however. There are many types of ETs... more varied than the ultras. Those responsible
for the mutilations are of the scientific vein. Their purpose is to study life forms. Since they are
not lacking in certain basic moral values, they confine their autopsies to animal forms. We, of
the Unimanity Pact, do not approve of slaughtering animals, yet we cannot always prevent these
occurrences.
Q. In "Hollow Earth Mysteries" a possibility for the non-human-in-appearance beings spied in
and around UFOs is given as created by inner Earth dwellers as a means to hide their true
existence and human-like forms. Is this true?
N. There are no automats, robotoids, etc, created by the Central Earth Tribes. Most such types
are biological extra-terrestrials. Some are robots of other worlds - none from under the
Unimanity Pact.
Q. Any closing comments?
N. Through "Tribelight" (Issue 1-82) there is a coming together of the original creation-codes of
this planet as a sacred Temple for the "Gods"... Divine energies of the Universe. Through your
prayers and meditation work with us toward this "beginning."
****
The following is a quote from "The Larsen File" No. 1, by the editor of LF, Harvey Larsen:
"And so I believe there are secret places on, in and beyond this world where wondrous secret
societies exist, where lofty, wondrous beings dwell, hidden from man, because we are to them as
apes are to us even though the greatest and humblest of humankind all have the spark of the
Divine in us. Yes, much may be secret, but, to me, that is not necessarily a naughty word. Look
at the human vultures, both past and present, who would be so eager to pounce down upon such
-
secret societies or habitats, like the Assyrians coming down like wolves upon the fold, as the
poem says, to destroy, to ravage, to crucify!... About secret societies controlling the world, well,
the wise, benign ones may lift a helping hand but they do NOT control. That is anathema to
God's universal law."
The Larsen File, P. 0. Box 4080, Torrance, CA 90510
****
******
EVOLUTION OF THE SPECIES
From the center of the planet, the Nature Logos (Spirits of highest Nature origin) send a sonic
signal beyond the wavelength of human hearing, upward through the Earth sphere. This signal is
put together much like DNA molecules, capable of modifying, altering and increasing its signal
components. The "tone" strikes the DNA helixes of each species, beginning with the most
simple primal units, the microbes, and continuing upward along the evolutionary spiral to its
summit in homosapiens. The sonic signal, known to inner Earth scientists as "Urantha," acts on
each biosystem in a complex transfer of signals on to the next higher biosystem. Adaptations in
nature defined by us as "natural selection" are dictated by the Nature Logos through Urantha.
The natural selection method as theorized by Darwin exists only as a secondary factor as a
refining element or support system.
Humanity on Earth is a result of total units of God-energy, or souls projecting into the capstone
frequency of the Urantha signal. This capstone wavelength is the "Parentha, " meaning “Where
Gods dwell" or "Temple House." In the “Beginning Time” when souls chose to descend into the
Parentha, the door between the "Gods" and Nature Logos was open. There was a perfect
symbiosis between the two domains. As humanity began to decrease their frequency in the
Parentha (due to a digressing in spirituality) the door between the two living fields was sealed.
Only by cutting off the connecting passage could humankind remain in their unique "human"
state and still be less than the "Gods" they once were. Had the door remained open, and they
continued to slip from grace (as they did), they would have gravitated into the Nature Kingdom
and lost their soulship, their souls being replaced by "souli"... the equivalent of souls in the
Nature World. Since souli are not complete units, while still of divine origin, they cannot
become Divine Stewards. Thus the souls of Earth saved themselves the seat upon the throne,
becoming Kings without kingdoms.
Before the vibrational field between the Nature and Human Kingdoms ceased, some devolution
in the Parentha had taken place. This resulted in the "cavemen" homosapiens which are now
thought to be our first human ancestors. This near-animal state occurred only in certain gene
pools, other strains being untouched by mutation. In those that were affected, there were varying
stages of digressive traits. Cro-Magnons did not come about as later generation of the
Neanderthal, but as a separate distortion of genetics, not as retarded as the latter.
Such things as design, architecture and art all mirror our "imaging" in the natural world. The
more bizarre our art, the further from our natural design we have allowed ourselves to drift. We
need not become "primitive" to merge our soul-gifted being with Earth's symmetry. Before
harmony can truly find root once again in our world, we must return to our "Dwelling Place" in
the Parentha, and contribute to the Earth more than we take from it. In serving, so we will once
again become the "Gods" who dwell in the Temple House.
We may monitor our transition in consciousness as a whole through our artists... those who
combine natural talent with instinct and esoteric knowledge to construct morphic bridges into
our future. How we think, feel and perceive one another and ourselves, is rapidly changing. In
the coursing of history through the arteries of time, events interlock with one another like a vast
coral reef of crustaceans, building new vehicles of passage atop old ones... forever advancing the
intricacy of design, modifying, transforming, setting free new perspectives of the ancient truths.
This cascading transition is monitored in art. If one were to gaze into the crystal ball of time, the
streaming changes would be seen in the sparkling reflections of Atlantean crystal palaces, amidst
natural wonders; in temples erected to the God-forces of Earth, standing proud, cool marble,
bronzed in the furnace of a Grecian sunset; to the contrasting present with its twin towers of the
World Trade Center, and EPCOT of Disney World. Despite the fraying of our celestial harps,
cycles demand a return to beginnings, so we are beginning to restore Temple Earth. In our art,
the "lost soul" of self, a la Picasso, is no longer the central focus of scrutiny. We are turning our
eyes toward the summit. The spirit has become our desire, rather than the flesh - at least in
theory - we have begun a return to the quest of internal beauty.
**
LETTERS
Have you ever heard of Marcel Vogel? He's mentioned in “The Secret Life of Plants” (by Peter
Tompkins and Christopher Bird) and is a research scientist and mystic who developed the use of
quartz crystals in implements. A couple of years ago when I was still in Nevada I went to hear
him talk at the Ananda Cooperative Village outside of Nevada City, CA. He spoke on the use of
crystals for healing. He said that the human skeletal system has the same crystallographic
structure as quartz crystal. He had a beautiful crystal which came from a place in Canada which
was the supposed source of many Atlantean Crystals. He had cut both ends to match the angle
of the Great Pyramid (52). He would move his consciousness into the crystal to amplify healing
energies, and demonstrated several impressive healings. He called this the yoga of the Etheric
Body. He had visited the owner of the crystal skull (see Issue 4-82) and experienced a vision
when he picked it up. He saw the inside of a temple (probably within a pyramid) with the skull
on a pedestal. An old man with a shaved head was kneeling next to it while a priest placed one
hand on the man's head and the other on the crystal skull, transferring the knowledge of the man
into the crystal. Afterwards, a young girl came in, also with a shaved head. The priest reversed
his hands and did the same, thereby transferring the knowledge from the skull into the girl...
Another crystal skull found in Guatemala before the Mitchell-Hedges one but kept secret was
recently made available for study in San Francisco. An article (on this) appeared in the Unicorn
Guide a few years ago. And finally there is the Atlantean crystal ball found by Dr. Ray Brown
in a pyramid underwater off the coast of Bimini. - Francis P. Broussard, Opelousas, LA.
The Queen's Chamber
Copyright 1979 by Christine Hayes
MESSAGE FROM HERMES ON THE TEMPLE OF LIBRA
And the discovery of the underwater pyramid temple
Dear Bill,
Earlier this year, I read Max Toth's “Pyramid Prophecies” and was intrigued with the chapter on
Ray Brown and the Atlantean crystal ball. I immediately requested of my cosmic Benefactor,
Hermes Trismegistus (whose actual name was, and is, Raismes), data on that underwater
pyramid from which the crystal was taken. At that time, I had not previously read any other
material on the crystal or pyramid other than what was written in Pyramid Prophecies. Nor was
I aware of the photographs taken of the crystal in which swans and an eye were revealed until
you recently sent the Jan. - April 1977 No. 28 back issue of Pyramid Guide to me.
I bring forth in this testament what has been sealed from the Lay Masters and their initiates for
10,500 years. It is VIRANA, the One and Holy Law, the Epoch of the Sacred Day. The Swan
Temple feigns a sleepless death as the sacred Lotus, paled and faintly scented, long strayed from
the rapture of the Sun. A pyramid of resurrection, she sounds into the depths of her galleries, a
recall to the Homeward Light. Her ????ill is not a languorous yearning but a resonant inspiration
suspended in the blue sapphire of liquid flame. It is the passion of a knowing; deathless in
beauty, surviving ages to endure ignorance, to sustain harmony.
I speak of the Temple of Xunatal-Saket, denoting the constellation of Libra, known also as the
Temple of the Swan or Raisis. The former name was the scientific seal of record. The latter was
the spiritual shield of the pyramid-temple. Her stone was conceived through the labor of an
ancient craft and brought down to mirror of the earth from the stars, each stone polished and
tempered through fire and ice, which is the process of “seething”, involving the use of moon-
lasers and aqua-lasers (intense beams of hydrogen vapor particles).
The crystal sphere (Pyramid Guide #18) which Dr. Brown was sanctioned to take from the
embrace of SHESMU, the symbol of eternal balance, is the primal vector of the inter-space
Maximum. The crystal, the Ohum, will cause sight to be manifest in the midst of the Children of
the Sun, so that the Temple of the Swan may lift the Phoenix from the cavity of darkness and
into the wake of the Golden Dawn.
This testament is akin to the Sacred Inscription of the VIRANA. It is law. Yet it is not for those
who read words, but only for those who seek to witness the Living Flame. As with the Living
Flame whose sparks abide in man so do they abide in the matrix crystals where the Constancy
Flame, Flame of Phoenix, resurrects to couple with the brilliance of spirit incarnate.
I herewith close this testament. It is assigned the designate of ALEPH 1., and is upheld in light
through the seat of VIRANA. I doth seal this writ, Thoth Hermes Trismesgestus.
-- cosmic translation by Christine Hayes
(LCH - the preceding is a letter I sent to Bill Cox, editor of "Pyramid Guide” concerning Ray
Brown's discovery of the Atlantean crystal ball, found in a pyramid beneath the Atlantic off the
coast of the Bimini Islands.)
**********************
JUST ONE MORE QUESTION, NOEL!
Q. According to my sources, mankind, however tarnished it may be, is unique among Earth's
species, in that humans contain a Divine Intelligence, lacking in other species of this planet.
This concept, or "truth" as it may be, is an unsettling thought to me. I would prefer to think that
all minds lifting themselves unto the Light, seeking the divine chord, each in its own way, are
crowned with the virtues of that divinity. Could you please comment further on this?
N. All who knock are received. When we speak of "Divine Intellect," we address the
cognizance of judgment. It is given to mankind to judge. It is given to the animal to "Be." As
the Divine Intellect apportioned itself upon and within the Earth, so breathing life into substance,
thought into knowing, time into evolutionary passage, so there were stationed in the ethers
surrounding the consciousness of the new "world," Guardian Minds. Through many stages of
association, these "Sons of God" entered the Kingdom which they guarded and became stewards
of that Kingdom, in a far more intimate exchange than had been experienced by their former
remote guardianship. Once that contact with matter was made by the Sons and Daughters, they
were no longer the Powers of Divineship they once had been. Yet they still contained the
filaments of contact with that Power - a contact that caused them to judge their environment,
other living things, and ultimately, themselves. Those of you among the "new consciousness" on
your planet are contemptuous of the word "judgment." This is understandable, for without
Divine Intellect, to judge in essence means to condemn. However, guided by the Mind of
Oneness, judgment becomes reorganization of the parts of the whole; the calibration of
elementals to the attunement of omni-mortality. As a "fallen angel" man grasped the gavel and
held the scales before him. This was his undoing. As a complete being, he was meant to serve
Earth and its kind in the capacity of stewardship. Not to control or dictate over, as a viceroy
passing a volatile sentence on life and liberty, but to act as the compassionate servant and link
between Hierarchy and Nature. Man was to secure the anchor of the matterless energy-minds of
the Earth's sentience. However, humanity's ability to judge, removed from the full power of
Divine Intellect; and thus to change, created the profuse winds of all manner of logic and illogic,
of self-redress and desire, which were to tangle the sails of the pure condition, miring the
voyager of the heavens in the shallow waters of his own vision. With the powers he still
possesses, man is able to fill his space of thought with mental tributes to his long-lost flame. He
creates incessantly, but is sightless to the archetypical designs integrating his domain. The
creatures of Nature do not contain the ability to judge, thus they are free from judgment (karma.)
They are equal to humanity in spirit, but assume a separate role. The cetaceans (dolphins,
porpoises and whales) who are at the pinnacle of the Nature Kingdom, allow you to be as you
are. They do not judge that you have lost the part given you to fill on this Earth, while they, the
majesties of the thinking sea, continue to serve as they have for eons of time.
**
***
LET WHAT YE DESIRE OF THE UNIVERSE PENETRATE YOU
LET LOVING-KINDNESS AND MERCY PASS THROUGH YOU
AND TRUTH BE THE LAW OF YOUR MOUTH
FOR SO YE ARE THE CHANNELS OF THE DIVINE SEA
WHICH MAY NOT FLOOD THE EARTH, BUT ONLY STEAL IN
THROUGH RIFTS IN YOUR SOUL.
-- Israel Zangwill
****
******
"LIFE ENTAILS THE RESPONSIBILITY OF KEEPING IN TUNE WITH THE INNER
FLOW REGARDLESS OF THE CHALLENGES OF THE WORLD. WHEN THE CRISIS IS
THE GREATEST, YOU NEED TO EXTEND THE INWARD REACH. TRUTH WILL HELP
YOU TO REALIZE THAT THE CHALLENGE IN YOUR PATH IS AT LEAST PARTLY
DRAWN TO YOU AND YOUR WORLD BY YOUR CONSCIOUSNESS, AND THUS IT
CAN BE CHANGED AS YOU ALTER YOUR THOUGHTS.
"WHEN YOU SEE THINGS FROM THE VANTAGE GROUND OF TRUTH, YOU ARE
ENVELOPED IN A OF DIVINE PROTECTION, FOR ANYONE WHO CROSSES YOUR
THRESHOLD STEPS INTO YOUR CONSCIOUSNESS... IT IS A GOOD WORLD -
CERTAINLY WITH MUCH GROWING TO DO, AND WITH MUCH DARKNESS TO BE
ILLUMINED. BUT THERE IS WORK FOR YOU TO DO, WHICH YOU CAN DO. YOU
CAN RESTRUCTURE THE WORLD OF YOUR CONSCIOUSNESS, SO THAT YOUR
WORLD OF EXPERIENCE IS FED BY THE STEADYING FLOW CF LOVE, PEACE,
JUSTICE, AND ORDER. NO ONE BUT YOU YOURSELF CAN EVER TAKE YOU OUT
OF THAT FLOW."
-- from UNITY Magazine, Sept. 1976 - "How to Live Positively in a Negative World" by Eric
Butterworth
**:
******
"AND THE EARTH SHALL RESTORE THOSE THAT ARE ASLEEP IN HER, AND SO
SHALL THE DUST THOSE THAT DWELL IN SILENCE, AND THE SECRET PLACES
SHALL DELIVER THOSE SOULS THAT WERE COMMITTED UNTO THEM."
- II Esdras 7:32
