# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 2-83
copyright © 1983 L.Christine Hayes
.
‘COME TO ME, LORD HERMES, O THOU OF MANY NAMES WHO
KNOWEST THE SECRETS HIDDEN UNDER THE EARTH."
--
- "An Invocation to Lord Hermes" from the ancient text HERMETICUM, as quoted in "The
Hall of Records," by Jalandris
THE FOLLOWING is a question and answer communication with the THOTH HERMES, or
Raismes of Aphra, his true name in the age he lived upon the Earth. For the benefit of new
subscribers, I will repeat that Hermes now dwells within the Central Earth Tribes as an
Illuminari. He now identifies himself as "THE INITIATE". He first made himself known to me
over five years ago. He informed me that he was my "Benefactor." At that time I knew almost
nothing about "Thoth Hermes Trismisgestus," as he was documented in historical, mythical or
esoteric literature. "The Initiate" communicates with me in an archaic style of phrasing, but I
have requested that he be as "down to Earth" as possible in answering these questions. This
form of communications is not automatic writing, but is a direct thought transfer between "The
Initiate" and myself. The questions deal mainly with the building and purpose of the Great
Pyramid at Giza, also the Hall of Records, other knowledge repositories, and the Ark of the
Covenant. But first a brief synopsis of the entity Hermes in his words as given to me:
"I, Raimes of Aphra, am from the House of Salomae. I was brought forth unto the Light of this
world upon the plateau of Lausayn in (Lhasa) Tibet, at the Solstice of the Summer Tide. My
mother was Tibetan-Egyptian... my father, Venusian Consort of the Melchizedek Priestesses.
My mother was a Priestess of that Order, as was her mother and grandmother before her,
generation upon generation back into the mists of time, to the Lemurian Epoch and beyond. My
soul has known existence as Imenhotep, C. Hiram Abiff (architect of Solomon's temple),
Quetzalcoatl / Kukluclan, Hiawatha, and others within your history and many anonymous upon
the records of your time. My soul is anointed with the Christus Ray, therefore I am the 'Son of
the Son'."
The questions begin:
QUESTION: You say you are the "Son of the Son"... many interpretations in esotericism name
you as an incarnation of the soul of Jesus Christ. Are you this soul?
THOTH: I am anointed by the Holy Flame of His Life. My soul is an arc-affinity of the entity
Jesus' soul and Christed with the Birth of His Christed Self. Yet "I" am not, in the terminology
with which you understand, the one and same incarnating soul.
Q: Was the Great Pyramid of Giza built by your architecture and cosmic guidance, and under
your authority?
TH: The original repository wherein was contained the Talis (ocular records inscribed on
gemstone) had lain undefiled since before the Ages of Lemuria and Atlantis, before the falling of
the Veil, when the Earth was in the Light Forest. I, the Thoth, Recorder of the Age, did employ
forces of the Earth and Heaven in the lifting of the Pedestal (pyramid) above the repository, and
all about the chamber did I honeycomb the Earth, so that the Sacred Hive might thrive unto the
Coming Darkness. At this time, and in ages afterward, other records were lain in adjoining
chambers beneath the Pedestal, along with many precious things of civilizations among the stars,
within and on the Earth.
Q: Is the "original repository" containing the Talis, the same as what is known as the "Hall of
Records?"
TH: They are not wholly the same. While the "Kapha" or original repository is often identified
as such, it is a separate chamber from the Long Hall - "The Hall of Inscriptions," that is in truth a
tunnel or hallway, and not a cell, as is the Kapha. The Hall of Inscriptions was constructed
under my authority and contains numerous records of history and the Mystery of Life. It reaches
from the paws of the Lion (Sphinx) to the innermost chamber, the Kapha. The "records" within
the Kapha are beyond present mortal comprehension. They remain there for the return of the
Guardians. They contain signal-codes for the repositioning of the Earth within the Heavens.
Q: How was the Great Pyramid built?
TH: The Great Temple of the Lion was raised through the knowledge of Acronemunetics. (CH
- don't bother trying to look it up!) It is a process of building with light-energy or Photonics. A
grid is first constructed of photons, trapped in magnetic triangles. Once the photon mass is
sequentialized and brought to bonding with the magna-wave, matter-particles are transferred
from the "gravis" or matter-source to the pattern of the light waves within the grid. The structure
must then "set" as it is for a time, in a plastic condition. Once firm it is polished by lasers from
copper shields. (CH - an interesting note - Hermes uses present tense in describing the process,
as if he went back in time in order to render the description.)
Q: Please explain the gravis or matter-source.
TH: A matrix of material which is loosened from its atomic bonding so that it is holographically
transferrable to the photonic grid.
Q: Please give a brief statement on the later reconstructions of the Giza Pyramid.
TH: The Temple of the Lion has been reworked on its surface stone three times hence. It has
been rebuilt from its fifth layer (of seven) to the surface stone, one time. The interior has been
realigned once, with certain changes in the light shafts to compensate for the Earth's mis-
alignment. In the later reconstructions modifications of the original building process were
employed. As a drought presses the Earth dry on the banks of the Nile, so the full understanding
of the Great Temple and its cosmic architecture receded from the Ancient People and their
children under the Egyptian sun.
Q: What did the original "Temple" Pyramid of the Lion look like?
TH: A brilliance of the Sun with its satellites, Hemis, Rasha and Xnuatis clustered about it. The
three smaller pyramids were completely destroyed through misuse of energies. The two present
pyramids of lesser stature now stand in the places of Hemis and Rasha. In the age of the false
gods, the Great Temple was gutted as a Lion gored by a Bull. The capstone was exploded and
much of the outer walls destroyed, as the energies were converted into heat upon the conductive
outer skin of the Temple. But before this destruction, the Great Temple was a Virgin Priestess
among the multitude. Her walls were of finest moonstone, polished to such a smoothness as to
reflect the sunlight like a beacon to the stars. Her magnitude was such that only the initiated,
trained in retinal shielding could look upon her, and thus only the initiated dared to come into the
sight of her inscrutable gaze.
Q: It is generally accepted in esoteric circles that the capstone to the pyramid still exists, yet you
say that it was "exploded!" Please explain.
TH: The physical capstone was destroyed. The energy characters or vectors which gave the
capstone power are preserved on golden shales in circuitry impressions.
Q: What was the purpose of the Great Pyramid and its satellite pyramids
TH: Its purposes were and are many. Its main function is as a conductor / translator of energies
- both Earth and stellar, in reassembling creation-grids for the measuring, maintenance and
regeneration of the Earth as a Divine Temple within the Vault of Universal Dominions. The
details of this Divine Plan cannot be disclosed at this time.
Q: In my book "Red Tree," I say that the Great Pyramid was built by an ancient order, later to
become the Essenes. Was I wrong in this statement?
TH: I, as Thoth (Master Initiate) was the educator of this ancient order in the Last Days of
Atlantis. Thus, it was their skilled labor that built the Great Temple under my guidance and
authority. In later ages, they would continue to rebuild and repair the original construction,
despite their diminishing knowledge of the sciences involved.
Q: What is the purpose of the Stone Box in the King's Chamber?
TH: It serves as an isolator cell... a resonating cavity for transformation of molecular systems. It
can be activated on various levels of performance, from transmuting metals to transferring
biosystems from place to place. It can also be used for astral traveling, time projection, etc.
However, the Stone Box, as it now exists, is incomplete. There was originally an outer casing
over it and a control center, consisting of a gold and nickel box... a small computer built into a
serpent-headed ornament attached to the outer casing. This casing was of gold and lapis, inset
with emerald and diamond gems, faceted to achieve energy functions. Along the top of the outer
casing (the lid of the box) was a serpent's body in relief. It was within this "body" that most of
the jewels were positioned. In the center of the serpent column was a hollow crystal tube,
attached to the "head" of the serpent, winding with the body to the tail that was divided into three
golden "feathers" with rattles along the quills. These rattles were high-resonance crystals. There
are features within the entire system, called the "Orpha," that cannot be revealed now. Yet it can
be stated that this system, of which the remaining Stone Box was the matrix component, was a
transforming element, operating on subatomic article-energy.
Q: Are there other repositories of equal importance on the surface Earth? (My question would
include subterranean vaults, although I do not refer to those deep in the Earth or in the Central
Cavity.)
TH: There are several repositories of great importance. It is difficult to determine the word
"equal" as it is used in this context. For each repository containing ancient records intended for
future revelation have their own essentiality in the Karma of the World, and bear a unique seal
upon the Divine Records.
Q: Very generally, where are some of the major repositories located?
TH: Near Lake Titicaca on the Altiplano plateau in Peru / Bolivia; Lhasa, Tibetan Plateau; Four
Corners, USA; Wasatch Mts., Salt Lake region, Utah; Mt. Shasta, California; Teton Mts.
Wyoming; Maui, Hawaii... there are other repositories throughout the world.
Q: Are there accessible repositories within the submerged Atlantis?
TH: There are two regions in the Atlantic where these records may be found. One is in the area
of the Bimini Islands, the other near the Yucatan Peninsula. The latter was submerged
antecedent to the former. There is also a third in the Atlantic, but it is not a repository in the
same sense as the others we are discussing here. It is a "fallen temple," that had been taken over
in the Last Days of Atlantis by the false priests. Yet within it are sacred records of a specific
kind. The temple will one day receive purification and be restored, the records freed from
darkness.
Q: In a reading given by the "Sleeping Prophet" Edgar Cayce, he states that "three" will come to
uncover the records "near the Sphinx." Could you lend further insight into this?
TH: The Three shall bear the insignias of the LION, the FALCON, and the BULL. The color
rays shall be respectively, RED (Lion), BLUE (Falcon) and YELLOW (Bull). Each shall have
inborn for this purpose an Archetypical Key to the Hall of Records. Together they will open the
Door when Libra resides with Mercury in the 12th House.
Q: On page 92 of the book, "The Hall of Records" (by Jalanaris), is found a prophecy of Hermes
given in an ancient writing called "Treatise on Initiations." This prophecy states that in a future
age "...again a chorus of praise and of blessing shall celebrate Him who has created and
redeemed so beautiful a work. This rebirth of the world, this restoration of all good things, this
holy and sacred rehabilitation of Nature will take place when the time shall come which is
appointed by the divine and ever-eternal will of God, without beginning and always the same.
And those to whom it then shall be given to dominate the Earth shall be sent forth and establish
at the extremity of Egypt, a place built toward the west, whither, by sea and by land, shall flow
all of the race of mortals. They shall be established in a great community upon the Libyan Hill."
Is this a true prophecy of yours, and is the above a fairly accurate translation of your original
text?
TH: The prophecy is from my hand. As it is above given is accurate, except for the following
corrections... "And those to whom it then shall be given to dominate," should be written "And
those to whom it then shall be given to dominion the Earth..."
Also"...shall flow all the race of mortals" was written in the original text "shall flow those from
all the race of mortals."
Q: Please give a brief summary of Akhnaton's relation to Moses and the Ark of the Covenant.
TH: Moses was the son of Akhnaton... not by Nefretiti, but a Hebrew Priestess. This was
accomplished through divine command, and not adulterous by divine law. Nefretiti, an initiate
herself, was knowledgeable of the event, and was confidante to her Pharaoh in the keeping of
this secret. There were two Arks. The first was translated from the Faustian Plane to the Earth,
through the most ancient Potala in Tibet. Centuries later, I, Thoth, brought it from the Potala to
the Great Temple of the Lion (Giza). Akhnaton, an initiate of the Saf-Fire, knew the location of
the Kapha in which the Ark was concealed. For many generations the Pharoahs of Egypt had
been uninitiated. It was not until Akhnaton that once again, a Pharoah was truly "Son of the
Sun." When the time came for the Ark to be taken to the Hebrews, Moses was assigned this
task. But the vibration of the people (of the Exodus) was too estranged from the divine
rendering of the Covenant to abide harmoniously with the Ark. During the journey, at the place
of Sinai, the Ark was taken from the people. Moses and his circle of initiated were instructed to
build an ark with a lesser vibratory balance. Because the second ark was built imperfectly, due
to a fading insight among the initiated circle, it became in many instances a tool of destruction.
Q: Are both Arks still with the Earth?
TH: They are both with the Earth. The latter is in South America. The first Ark, of the Faustian
Plane, is attached to a receiving veil in a specially fortified chamber in North America. The
initiate who knows the correct signals can bring this Ark into material bonding on the Earth
Plane. The time for this has not yet come.
Q: How long ago was the Sphinx built, by whom and for what purpose?
TH: It was constructed at the same time as the Great Temple (Giza) but it appears with greater
age as it has not been repaired to the same extent. The Sphinx might be compared to a computer
console for the Great Temple, which is also a great cosmic / earth computer.
Q: In the age when you lived as Thoth Hermes on the Earth (actually, Raismes of Aphra) who
were those Master Initiates who worked with you?
TH: My father and mother, sister Lhasa, brother-in-law Ptah, my son Tat, several other of my
children, a nephew... there are many throughout a time-span of 300 years in which I lived upon
the surface Earth as Raimes. Many were my relations, as our work was bound to the Sight
brought through genetic origin.
Q: Did the incarnate Jesus take initiation in the Great Temple of the Lion at Giza before and
after he was "Christed" (occurring at the baptism by John the Baptist)?
TH: The child Joshua (Jesus) was first brought into initiation on the inner-planes as he stirred
within his mother's womb. His first initiation on the physical plane in that life was in the Great
Temple of the Lion, as a youth. He later returned to the plain of Giza, still before his baptism,
for the innermost initiatory Light, of which no man but He has partaken in the ages of man on
the Earth. He did return once again, after Baptism, to the Temple, and again once again after the
Resurrection. In His lifetime, Joshua traveled to many lands, to places of the undefiled, to leave
His imprint and receive initiations, not for Himself, but for the Eternal Man / Woman. After His
Resurrection, he again sought Pilgrimage, this time for the purpose of irradiating Holy Places
with the Christ-Born Light multiplied in brilliance through the Passion. At this time, in New
Body (yet an illumination of the old) He walked the Earth.
Q: Is the Shroud of Turin the actual linen of His burial shroud?
TH: So this is the cloth of the Miraculous Transformation of the Christed Joshua, resurrected
through the Light of the Saf-Fire. There are records in the Yucatan which in a future time shall
be found, attesting to the Resurrection of Christ and the veracity of the Turin Shroud.
Q: Please comment further on this!
TH: Upon the journey of the resurrected Christ to the Yucatan, He left this account. It was
written in an ancient, lost language by a great Shaman of the Temple in the city of Xutswiani, a
city now lost to the centuries within the voracious growth of the jungle. I quote from this
accounting:
"And so Habaar (Jesus Christ) who lay in the Sleep, came unto the Great Ones of Old, and they
communed with Him... Habaar was anointed by the serpent's tongue, His lungs were blown with
the serpent's breath, and his flesh was made transparent as the crystal stone. Passed He outward
from the Death Veil, His body illuminate with the power of the Seven Thunders."
END OF COMMUNICATION
The following is a song given to me from the inner planes:
CLOUD SHADOWS
CLOUD SHADOWS WHISPER SOFTLY ‘NEATH A MIDNIGHT MOON,
CLOUD SHADOWS TELL THE STORY OF THE PHARAOH'S TOMB.
LIGHT, LIGHT IT COMES FROM OSIRIS' EYES,
BRIGHT, BRIGHT AS THE SAPPHIRE OF EGYPTIAN SKIES.
(chorus)
SEE TIME JUST SLIP AWAY, SLIP AWAY, SLIP AWAY,
OH RA, SHELTER ME.
WITH WINGS OF THE FALCON FIRE, LIFT ME HIGHER,
SET ME FREE.
OH RA, GRANT MY GENERATIONS LIBERTY.
(2nd verse)
CLOUD SHADOWS ON THE TEMPLE OF A GOLDEN RACE
CLOUD SHADOWS, THEY MASK THE BEAUTY OF ISIS' FACE.
SAND, SAND RECOIL FROM THE SPHINX' STARE,
LOOSE, LOOSEN THE BONDS OF THE SIRIUS SNARE.
******
********
(The following are two separate accounts of “mental projection" trips I have taken to beneath the
Great Temple of the Lion, at Giza... LCH)
August, 1978: During morning meditation, I was projected beneath the pyramid of Giza... I saw
myself in a loose white robe of thin transparent linen. Before me was the river which runs
through the marbled floor of the Temple. The floor itself can widen or narrow to allow a greater
or lesser flow of the river. The waters come underground, upward into the temple, the flow
regulated through spigots aligned as the median on a violin. It was here I descended into the
river, walking down several steps into the water. As I entered waist deep, the whole of the water
was lit with a yellow-golden hue. Above the river were pyramidical rays of light, one after
another as if being viewed in endless mirrors down the river. I allowed whirlpool sprays of
water beneath the current to flow about my body, and became very relaxed from the sensation. I
swam around gently in the currents. As I came from the water, a robe was placed around my
shoulders by a young woman, and the marble floor slid over the river. The design atop the floor
panel which had concealed the river was a large emblem in several shades of blue, resembling
the fleur-de-lis. It pointed toward giant double doors. I walked forward and entered through the
doors. Instantly, a bluish light came about me and dried my body, hair, and robe. Before me in
the chamber was a table shaped like a boomerang as it would be seen coming toward me. The
walls to the room were a pastel green. The table and floor were white. On the floor, I stood in
the center of a design in multi-shades of green. It was circular, with the green rays of differing
widths and lengths, resembling a solar emblem. (At this point, a personage whom I recognized
as my Benefactor, Thoth Hermes, arose from his seat behind the table.) From behind the table
there began to shine a blue-gold light as if seen through transparent beaded strings. The wall,
which had before seemed solid, was finally dissolved by the light. We entered the chamber
behind the light-wall. Here, suspended on light beam was what I recognized to be the Great
Table of Invocation. Crafted of a beautiful wood, golden lines coming from its center divided it
into 24 sections. Each section had beautiful colored designs worked into its flawless surface....
August, 1979: I lay on my back with my arms out from my sides as a living cross. In my left
hand I held a rose quartz crystal and in my right, an Iceland crystal. I was projected into the
glass pyramid and experienced the purple and yellow rays inside cones of white and golden light,
beaming into the Sandollar Cross, causing it to become the Lighted Cross of Solomon, which is
the ray of the Arisen Spirit. The sun symbol, the lapis ring and golden chains were all bathed in
golden light and harmonized with the Cross. I was then transported inside the Hall of
Inscriptions within the Omega Temple of the Illumined, which is beneath the Great Pyramid of
Giza. (The chambers around the Hall... including the Kapha, compose the Illumined Temple.
There is one other Illumined Temple - within the Central Earth.)
This Hall was narrow and constructed of smooth perfectly fitting slabs of black onyx. The many
inscriptions were set in gold. I suddenly went upward and was in a large chamber which was the
Grand Arc Gallery (not the "grand Gallery" of the surface pyramid). It was entirely of crystal
with a large square pool in the center. There was a crystal "throne," which was not at present
occupied, but in front of the throne stood Hermes in a jeweled robe and headdress. Underneath
the robe was a tunic of purple. The jeweled robe and headdress were like the wings of an eagle
or falcon, with gold bead and intricate inlaid jewels of coral, turquoise, ruby, pearl, sapphire,
emerald, garnet, amber, lapis, mother of pearl, jade, diamond and a yellow-orange stone called
"absentha." Beside Hermes stood Rhama Asul, wearing an equally beautiful, but less brilliant
costume. I held up my hands, fingers extended, and they each put golden rings on all of my
fingers.
I was suddenly aware that there were golden designs on my body... they seemed illumined. On
my forehead was a lighted cross, over my heart chakra I bore an ankh design upon my skin, with
sun rays drawn around it. At each chakra point there was a sign. I crawled toward the throne in
what I seemed to know was the "crouched lion posture"....
(These testimonies are only excerpts from the records of my personal initiations, which I have
related here to give the individual seeker a glimpse into the possibilities of such communions
that await anyone who is sincerely on a Path of Light and Inner Initiation.)
FOR LO! THE WINTER IS PAST, THE RAIN IS OVER AND GONE;
THE FLOWERS APPEAR ON THE EARTH;
THE TIME OF THE SINGING OF BIRDS IS COME,
AND THE VOICE OF THE TURTLE IS HEARD IN OUR LAND.
--
- Song of Solomon
I AM ASKING SUBSCRIBERS' AID in collecting astrological (natal chart) information on the
Master Initiate, JESUS CHRIST, before and after He was merged with the Christ Presence.
Thoth Hermes has given me the following information:
NAME: Joshua ben Josef (Jesus)
BORN: April 24th, 15 B.C. (fifteen years before His recorded birth), at 1:00 a.m. in Bethlehem
A second natal chart should be done for His complete Birth, as Christ-Man. This occurred at the
time of His Baptism, on August 4th, 15 A.D. at 12:25 P.M.
Anyone interested in doing these natal charts, please send copies to The Rainbow Earth
Dwelling Society. Information taken from these readings will be printed in a future issue of
"The Source."
***
**********
The California Astrology Assn. informs us that an "Astral Child" predicted by Nostradamus over
500 years ago has recently been born.
"Nostradamus predicted an Astral Child would be born on August 13, 1982 on the 13th second
of the 13th minute, of the 13th hour, on Friday the 13th. Dr. Stanley Solomon, the noted
authority on the works of Nostradamus, flew in from South Africa to the unnamed city in the
United States to witness the birth. Dr. Solomon predicted, 'This child will be a leader of the
masses in the year 2000. Nostradamus not only predicted the birth to the exact second, but the
exact location in terms of latitude and longitude'.
"An Astral Child by definition is a 'child of the stars' who is destined to lead his / her people to
the promised land. Dr. Solomon noted, 'The last Astral Child was born thousands of years ago,
and his name was Moses.'
"The family's name and location are being withheld by request. Their Astral Child's first name is
Issad." (CH It's a girl!)
THOTH confirmed that Issad is indeed an "Astral Child," but that the true interpretation of this
meaning is not yet understood. He also states that there have been others born between the time
of Moses and the present which could be classified as Astral Children, although very few.
Hermes further responds that the word "astral" used in this context is misleading esoterically, as
an astral state is a rather cluttered plane of mixed vibrations. The ancient and inner-Earth term
for these souls incarnated is "Yodutha," meaning "the crossing of the stars"... referring to an
astrological aspect present in the natal charts of these embodiments. I did not ask for a definition
of the exact astrological occurrence referred to as "the crossing of the stars," as space would not
permit me to detail it here.

(The following article which I wrote was originally published by The Light Transport
Foundation of Del Rio, Texas in their "Hologram" monthly supplement of 1982.)
THE LIGHT MIND
As we, the population of the surface Earth, continue to penetrate the techno-layers of our own
making, so we rapidly exchange old definitions of progress for new ones. The term "lifestyle" is
becoming a psychology for living rather than the increasingly archaic material bonding of self to
habitable circumstance. Despite the descending turmoil of world manifests such as terrorism,
economic entropy and ecologic deformity, humanity is establishing an outpost in the farthest
space of mind, where singly and together in small clusters, they may observe the morphic design
of an approaching new world. Through observation, there is a transfer of recognition from the
"watchers" to the impassive majority. Subtle and non-definable as this transfer may be, it is the
first link in the schematic of a greater movement in consciousness which will usher the new
reality to the forefront of human existence in the surface habitat of this planet. Infants in a
celestial cradle, w are under the guardianship of Hierarchical presences too vast in cosmic
linking to fully contemplate. The "ultra" (other planets) and “inner” (within the naturally hollow
cavity of the Earth) terrestrials who resonate within the spectroscope of the "Unimanity Pact
Among Equilibrant Worlds" (those world consciousnesses who share genetic relation to us) are
the ranking "Masters" or "Initiators" of awareness programs within the Hierarchical plan for
Earth. The new reality to which we have unconsciously submitted our life wave is aligned to the
present reality of these Initiators, whose world orders are in turn aligned to the greater command
of Pure Integration with the Source of Being.
As physical beings, the worlds registering within the Unimanity Pact must relate to Pure
Integration through corporeal means, as must we. The initial channel to begin synthesis with
higher mind states is what we mechanistically call the "computer." To these ultra worlds,
computers are known as synthesis aids or "centropic value relators" (CVR). Plasma based, the
CVRs are thought of as extensions of consciousness tools. The purpose of these bio-operative
synthesis aids is not to devalue human logic by an increasing dependency on non-human modes,
but to integrate the human mental capacity with advanced Light Archetypes of the inner-universe
within the dimensions of mind. These Light forms are at the center of our conception as
thinking, ensouled systems. We are manifestations of Light, streaming from the Source,
interchanging, creating through Pure Integration, pools of crystal spacing - color coded, sonic
matched to fit as keys into locks. Decentralized through image enhancement into archetypical
frames of generation, our Light selves assume, in the climax of recognition, the substance of
atomic frequency known as matter. CVRs are merely an extension of the output / input of these
initial cosmic reference fields, which are still provoking responsive reflexes throughout the
timeless rationales of the inner universe.
Our surface-Earth-based computers seem like dismal, artificial limbs, striving to adjust to the
mimicry of a facile art they can never hope to adequately simulate. Yet within the computer are
compartmented phases of an ideology from which to launch the Light-minded synthesis aids that
will truly unlock worlds of consciousness for us. Even now we are approaching the wedding of
Light to the machine. All that remains for the breakthrough in this new field is a basic change in
perception of how we see ourselves, the Earth, and the Universe. I do not mean in giant terms of
scientific or spiritual revelations beyond the scope of the present mind. The alteration in
thinking that must come about is already in progress, as I stated in the beginning of this article.
It is one so gentle as to be unnoticed by the majority. Yet it is fierce in its steady undoing of the
knot of our consequence - the knot cutting off the holistic flow of the breathing Universe and the
natal fluid of Earth. We have long fasted from the nutrients of our first Light. As the noose is
loosened about the girth of our inner ecosphere of mind, so we shall begin to receive imprinting
from the greater Nature, the full homogenity among all things. As we step into the light of this
memory, hidden from us by our own shadows, so we will see with renewed focus, the "new
world" which is the world of ancestral birth. We will see once again with the first sight, and in
the new reality will emerge our ability to commune with our Light Archetypes through such
avenues as centropic value relators, leading us to even closer encounters in Pure Integration
within our own inner-universe.
Membership to the Light Transport Foundation is $12.50 per year, with annual "Hologram" and
timely supplements to regular participants in the Conductor Services. Non-participants will
receive all previous years' supplements with annual "Hologram." For membership or further
information (with SASE) write to LTF, 206 Nat'l. Bank Bldg., Del Rio, TX 78840.
***
OH MOUNTAIN!
COMEST THOU UNTO GRACE
FROM THE EARTH THAT BORE THEE,
AND THE GOD THAT LIFTED THEE
SWEET DESIRE OF SPIRIT QUENCHED AT THY BOSOM,
RESURRECTION RECEIVED AT THY SIGHT.
-- from Psalm of Templara (Central Earth)
**
****
For those readers not familiar with "Tribelight" (Issue 1-82), it is a frequency-station
reestablished in 1981 beneath the Potala Llamasari in Lhasa, Tibet. "Tribelight" reprocesses and
distributes to this Earth the Ten Lost Pyra-Codes which have not been obtainable to this world
sphere for eons. These Lost Codes together form "The Word" or frequency of being, once
within our Life Wave, connecting us to the Living Lights of the Universe. Through "Tribelight"
gradually this integration can once again manifest on this planet. The thoughts, prayers and
meditations of Earth's sentience is needed to strengthen the frequency. Since the entire
population of inner Earth is actively engaged with “Tribelight” only a small unit of surface
participators could serve in carrying the frequency to the surface of the planet.
"Tribelight" is conducted through the Tibetan-Egyptian Tribunal IBIS, the highest court of the
Illumined... the Tribunal for Spiritual Laws on Earth. "Tribelight" is a frequency of knowledge
that projects equilibrium through the ethers of the planet, strengthening the latitudes of Justice
and Divine Will.
I have recently been given by IBIS a listing of ten "stations" on the planet, inclusive of the
mother station at Lhasa, each of which draws upon and focuses on one of the Lost Pyra-Codes.
Those of you who wish to aid "Tribelight" can now participate in a process called
"Triangularization"... intensifying color-code vectors or grids for the purpose of balancing and
strengthening "Tribelight's" penetration of the Earth's etheric envelope, and uniting the ten codes
to their former magnettos (Earth magnetic centers).
To Triangulate these vectors:
First, below are the ten stations on Earth, the color they work through (the true "colors" of the
Lost Pyra-Codes are no longer within the planetary spectra), the zodiacal sign governing each
particular action, the planet and house of the action, and the Major Arcanum which best
symbolizes the initiation of the Pyra-Code's formative frequency.
(1) LHASA, TIBET - SAFFRON - LIBRA (Lords of Individuality) - MOON - NINTH
HOUSE "THE HERMIT"
(2) DEAD SEA, ISRAEL - ORANGE - SAGITTARIUS (Lords of Mind) - URANUS -
TWELFTH HOUSE - "THE CHARIOT"
(3) GIZA PYRAMID, EGYPT - TURQUOISE - PISCES (Lords of Humanity) - VENUS -
TWELFTH HOUSE - "THE MOON"
(4) ICELAND - PEACH - CAPRICORN (Archangels) - MARS - EIGHTH HOUSE -
"STRENGTH”
(5) FOUR CORNERS / MESA VERDE, COLORADO - EMERALD - LEO (Lords of Flame)
- MERCURY - NINTH HOUSE - "THE SUN"
(6) WASATCH MTS. / SALT LAKE, UTAH - SAPPHIRE - VIRGO (Lords of Wisdom) -
SATURN EIGHTH HOUSE - "THE EMPRESS"
(7) TETON MTS., WYOMING - VIOLET - TAURUS (Lords of Earth) - JUPITER - SIXTH
HOUSE "THE HIEROPHANT"
(8) MT. SHASTA, CALIFORNIA - RUBY - GEMINI - (Seraphim / Elohim) - PLUTO -
SIXTH HOUSE - "THE MAGICIAN"
(9) MAUNA LOA, HAWAII - AMBER - AQUARIUS (Angels) - NEPTUNE - FOURTH
HOUSE "THE STAR"
(10) LAKE TITICACA / GATEWAY TO THE SUN, PERU / BOLIVIA - ROSE (Pink) -
(Cherubim) SUN - NINTH HOUSE - "THE HIGH PRIESTESS"
-
Select a quiet time of the day or night for you. If you have an altar or a special meditation spot,
go there. In prayer, ask that you may be cleansed in order to become a pure channel for Grace.
Begin the Triangularization by concentrating on the first station - Lhasa, Tibet. Use all or any
one of the energy symbols (i.e., zodiacal sign, Arcanum, etc.) to attune yourself in the center of
your mind to that station. Now start to "Ohum." Entone "ohummm….. "ohummm"...
"ohummm"... six times, focusing on that one station as you visualize the code energy / color
emanating from that station. After the six Ohums, go to the second station, the Dead Sea.
Repeat the same procedure, however this time keep the first station in your mind….. think that as
you "ohum" in the second station, so you are joining it to the first. Then go to the third. As you
repeat the process with the third station, now imagine that you are linking together the three
stations, forming a triangle. See the colors running like energy bands between them. As you
begin with the fourth station, realize that you are starting a new triangle. When you complete the
second triangle (stations 4, 5 & 6) link it mentally to the first (stations 1, 2 & 3). Via modern
association, it might be easier if you were to make a computer screen of your mind, and "play"
the program of triangularization on that screen, as if it resembled the light impulses of a
computer game. As to the pattern in which to link your triangles together, this should be a
matter of your own inner guidance. You will achieve the best results if you do not try too hard.
Let your mind flow. The above are guidelines only. If you fret over not being able to clearly
"see" each step or keep track of every procedure, then the results will not be worth the effort.
But if you approach this Light drafting as you would a pleasant yet constructive daydream, you
will find it rewarding. You do not have to succeed to the letter. Whatever you are able to
contribute is what is needed.
This exercise will serve two-fold. It will help the Earth in the regaining of its true spiritual
energy spectrum and it will attune your mind, body and soul to a more perfect vibration, giving
you vitality and clearer meta-perception.
From the June or July issue of GEO Magazine (article on Himalayas):
Before we made our rendezvous with the small airplane that would retrace 55 days of walking in
35 minutes of flying, we stopped at the shrine at Muktinath. For both Hindus and Buddhists, the
shrine is one of the holiest places of pilgrimage in all of Asia, and it has been for as long as
history has been recorded. One of its features is a gushing spring reputed to have healing
powers. Nearby are caves in which the three flames of Muktinath burn steadily and apparently
miraculously, as they have, according to the faithful, since the creation of the universe. One of
the flames seems to leap from dry sand, another from a small spring, and the third simply floats
in midair. Having paid my respects, I retrieved my cameras and pondered the hand-painted sign
outside caves. "The gods of Muktinath are very beautiful. You are kindly requested not to snap
them." I thought of the incongruity of such ancient holiness and snapshots and realized that as
the kingdom is propelled from the Middle Ages into modern time such incongruities are bound
to multiply.
**
******
LILIES OF THE FIELD
Thy Bounty in the Field is the Song of the Earth,
Each color a bond of loving brightness sewn to the
garment of the Mother, a tone of Her grace and beauty.
For every child that bends a knee to thee, little Flower,
for every butterfly that floats in thy airy midst,
and mountain stream that curls its silver tongue about
thy seeking roots, so thy gift of song is multiplied
through the golden rays of the Father;
thy dew enriched by His sight upon thee.
Thou art the wand of Perfect Life, blessed in the hollow
of the Queen's hand, drenched in the potion of Earth's
sweet nectar, adorned as a faerie in her dance of light.
- from THE NATURE MEDLEY -
"Dance of the Tamerine" (Subterranea)
****
******
In previous issues of The Source, the awareness of the Subterranean to the Nature Kingdom, and
his/her communion with all natural being, has been revealed. (Most prominently in Issues 1-81
& 3-82.) The very life and breath of inner Earth humanity is sustained through this sacred
communion. I use the word "communion" rather than communication, to impart the depth of
exchange given and received. There is the communicative act of "thought speaking," which is a
common practice between the entities of the human, animal and flora states, yet the bond among
these sentiences is greater than the sum of their common mind. In order to begin to truly
comprehend this cognitive union, one must see from the same summit as do the inhabitants of
the inner world. From this perspective, the Earth is a sphere of crystal, honeycombed with
chambers of resonance.
A Mind, pulsating with the transport of Light through its passages, humming in living thought as
a sacred hive suspended from the Sepherothic Tree of the Macrocosm. Every thing that exists
upon or within the planet is a part of Earth, and, in like manner, is a holographic extension of the
crystal sphere. When a holographic photograph is shattered, each minute fragment of that
photograph retains the entire image of the original. So we, the human stewards, and the
creatures of Nature, both flora and fauna, are all complete images of the Crystal Mind. Thus,
each fragment is seen as a crystal vessel, hollowed through the center ... a vein transporting
planetary Light.
With this new sight, look to the soils of the Earth from which arises the rooted beings, those who
do not roam the Earth, but instead send messengers upon the breath of the winds, clinging to the
bodies of the winged armada that flush the spaces with their pure form, bidding their envoys
hither with the fragrance of the flower's song. Because they cleave to the Earth, the Plant
Kingdom vibrates in the rarest of ether frequencies. It is given to the flora to transfer the basic
Light nutrients throughout the Planetary Life Wave. Without these nutrients of ether purity, the
entropy of matter would have long ago consumed the flame of life on this planet.
Within the Aura Healing Garden of Subterranea (Issues 1-81 & 2-82), the flora of the most
Earthly perfection vibrates in sanctuary. It is among the harmony of this Eden that the Nature
physicians attune the many plants growing there to the auras of their patients, allowing the
healing qualities of the plants to nurture the imbalances of the individual. There are various
levels such radiations can penetrate, the most satisfying for perfect health being on the emotional
/ karmic level, where all physical ills either originate or are captured and left to stagnate and
multiply in emotional toxins. The best antidote for the poison of emotional turmoil are the
flowers for they are the "Emotion" of the Plant Kingdom. Their blossoms, flirting in the breezes,
blushing crimson near the reflecting brook, sighing in the wilting heat of day, finally to fold
coverlets about them in a swirl of midnight dreaming... express the full range of emotions for the
Rooted Ones. Like any mass of sentience, be it human or another of God's created images,
individuality in some form is always present. For this reason, certain flowers effect specific
emotional wave-lengths. Using various plants, the inner Earth physicians guide their patients in
a process of bonding or chording with the flower or flowers most able to clear that individual's
emotional condition. This enables the loving essence of the flowers to bathe the Emotional body
of the patient, entraining the emotions suffering imbalance to the Light nutrients of the flowering
plants. It is known by the physicians of the Garden which varieties of flowers soothe or restore
what emotional conditions. Each type of flower vibrates in a specific frequency of emotional
purity, all. together forming the "soul body" of the Earth.
In the ancient worlds of Lemuria, Atlantis, and Egypt, and in other regions where the Wisdom
lingered, etheric healing was practiced... often including the taking of flower essences. A similar
method of treatment is still practiced in the outer world through the Bach Flower Remedies.
These remedies, 38 in number, were given to us by Edward Bach, a London doctor of the 1930's.
Seeking a more natural means to restore health and prevent illness, Dr. Bach abandoned his
lucrative practice and set himself upon a Vision Quest into the Nature Dwellings of Great
Britain. At the center of his Quest was an inner knowledge... a belief in the symbiosis of Nature
and Man. In his words, "Herbal remedies have the power to elevate our vibrations and thus draw
down spiritual, which cleanses mind and body and heals." To quote from "The Secret Life Of
Plants" by Peter Tompkins and Christopher Bird, "Bach compared his remedies to that of
beautiful music or arrangements of color, or any gloriously uplifting medium that gives
inspiration; his cure was not to attack the disease, but to flood the body with beautiful vibrations
from wild herbs and flowers in the presence of which 'disease would melt away as snow in the
sunshine'."
Edward Bach's increasing sensitivity to Nature, as he roamed Her woods and fields, gifted him
with the ability to simply touch a flower and receive the communion of that plant's curative
powers. In this way, Dr. Bach discovered, or more correctly was given, his 38 Flower Remedies.
Using techniques of photo-irradiation (from sunlight) of placing flowers in pure water, this
mystical physician of the Nature Mysteries brought to the surface Domain, a practice as ancient
as the Lemurian Healing Temples. From "The Secret Life Of Plants"... "Thousands of patients
throughout England and the world still depend on this elixir of flowers to cure them of
innumerable ailments." Prophesying for the future, Edward Bach wrote, in his book "Heal
Thyself"... "Healing will pass from the domain of physical methods of treating the physical body
to that of spiritual and mental healing, which by bringing about harmony between the Soul and
mind, will eradicate the very basic cause of disease, and then allow such physical means to be
used as may be necessary to complete the cure of the body."
***
**
In Issue 2-83 of The Source, one of the questions posed to Thoth Hermes was:
"Is the Shroud of Turin the actual linen of His burial shroud?"
Thoth's answer: So this is the cloth of the Miraculous Transformation of the Christed Joshua,
resurrected through the Light of the Saf-Fire. There are records in the Yucatan which in a future
time shall be found, attesting to the Resurrection of Christ and the veracity of the Turin Shroud.
Thoth continues to speak about the Yucatan records in that "interview," stating that the
resurrected Christ Joshua (Jesus) came to the Yucatan, where a "great Shaman" of a now lost
city, recorded his words to them.
Since that interview with Thoth Hermes, a subscriber to The Source, Hollow Earth Researcher,
writer, publisher and artist, Bruce Walton sent me a photocopy of a very rare, out-of-print book
entitled "The Great White Chief," by Norman C. Pierce. Bruce suggested I might find a strong
connection with some of the material in this book and the reference made by Thoth Hermes to
the records on Christ in the Yucatan.
"The Great White Chief" is an accounting by two men of their experiences in the Yucatan with a
secluded tribe of Indians. From ancient records handed down through generations, these Indians,
the Chigaraguans, read to them of a majestic event that transpired long ago. Their ancestors
were witnesses to an occurrence of cosmic proportions; I quote here from the accounting in "The
Great White Chief":
"Just before noontime, the people became greatly distressed due to a light in the sky. It was of
much greater brilliance than the sun, and directing its progress slowly earthward, coming straight
to the Chigaraguan city... A few people, braver than the others who were prostrate upon the
earth, watched the approach of this light as it came toward them. As it drew nearer, they could
discern the outline of the body of a heavenly personage. Around this personage, (many of the
Chigaraguans believe to this day) was a robe made of quetzal bird feathers. (The author
believes, however, that in the confusion they mistook the halo of light around Christ for what
they believed to be a feathered robe around Him.) As this personage touched the earth and
walked among the prostrate upon the ground, the Echa Tah Echa Nah (Holy Leader) of that time,
came forth from the temple to greet Him, inviting Him into the temple. The Wise -men were
assembled and as many people as could get into the temple remained there to listen to this great
spiritual being. He showed them His pierced hands and feet, and the wound in His side, and told
them of His crucifixion and resurrection, and how He must visit other people of other places.
The book continues at length on Jesus' visit among these people, and the knowledge he left with
them.
