Source Issue 4-83
copyright © 1983 L.Christine Hayes
"Man is not himself only, not solely a variation of his racial type in the pattern of his immediate
experience. He is all that he sees; all that flows to him from a thousand sources... He is the land,
the lift of its mountain lines, the reach of its of valleys...
"...(man) is aware of a steady purr in the midriff of his being, which, if he is an American, comes
to the surface in such half-articulated exhalations as 'Gosh, but this is a great country!'
"To feel thus about your homeland is a sign that the mysterious quality of race is at work in you.
For new races are not made new out of the dust as the first man was. They are made out of old
races by reactions to new environment... Where two or three racial strains are run together, as
cooperative adventures in the new scene, or as conqueror grafting himself upon an earlier arrival,
the land is the determining factor in the new design."
-- Mary Austin - The Land of the Journeys' Ending, 1924.
*************
**********
In order to create a foundation for understanding the substance of this issue, I wish to quote
various passages from two previous issues of The Source.
From Issue 1-80:
"There are twelve tribes within the interior of the Earth. These tribes are not now as they
originally were in the beginning of Earth habitation. However, these genetic tribes with their
accompanying cultures have not changed appreciably since their abandonment of the surface
world. They strive to maintain a partial stand-still in time until the complete unity of the Earth's
peoples can be achieved. As the Caretakers, they hold the genetic bonding to the past. Their
generations have maintained a genetic proclivity to natural enlightenment, a trait most surface
dwellers no longer contain within their genes to pass to their offspring.
"The Surviving People, the Ayria (people of the Central Earth Tribes), uphold their laws out of
spiritual unity and not out of fear or through force. There is a freeness of spirit among them that
is not confined to dogma. With this natural seeking, the Twelve Tribes have formed Clans
within each Tribe... In order that they maintain a genetic parity with their Spirit-Life activity,
and not mutate their race out of existence, they have devised a Great Family Order in which each
Tribe has become a large genetic family. The Clans are united within the families. As an
example of this Order or 'Grand Totem,' a woman from the Clan of one Tribe would not consider
marrying a man from another Clan within her own Tribe any more than she would wish to marry
her uncle. To marry within her own Clan would be equivalent to marrying her brother. Instead,
the young woman would quite naturally be attracted to a husband/ wife relationship with a man
of a Clan in another Tribe.
"The Twelve Central Earth Tribes are: (1) Sky-One Point (2) Sky-Two Point (3) Sky-Three
Point (4) Sky-Four Point (5) Sky-Five Point (6) Earth-Six Point (7) Earth-Seven Point (8)
Earth-Eight Point (9) Earth-Nine Point (10) Earth-Ten Point (11) Earth-Eleven Point (12)
Earth-Twelve Point... The numbered points refer to the number of absolved cultures taken to
create the one Tribe. This means, for instance, that there was only one complete cycle absolved
or completely assimilated within Sky-One Point before it retreated from the surface world into
subterranean sanctuary. At the opposite end of the scale, Earth-Twelve Point had twelve
absolved cultures in its surface past. Since entering the inner region, no culture has been
absolved totally.
The Tribes are divided into Sky and Earth. The Sky tribes contain a genetic dominance which is
directly related to the Earth's ultra-terrestrial lineage. The Earth Tribes contain a stellar lineage
as well, but of a lesser strain. Upon the Grand Totem all of the People are seen as equal
members of the Family Order and equal inheritors of the Sacred Spirit-life Medicine Wheel,
which represents the Equal Rights of the People to Life, Liberty and Spiritual Inheritance. Yet
the principle of 'Spiritual Inheritance' embraces the idea of a culminative design, in which the
Spirit-Life of all the People, as spokes of a wheel, rush to the central axis and together, create a
superior focus, which is an equal part of them all. This, then, is the belief which upholds the
Great Thirteen Point Family, not considered a Tribe, but the culmination of the Twelve Tribes.
This special 'Family' has no divisions or Clans, but is called the 'Wind Pipe,' which is sometimes
referred to as the ‘grandfather Family' as all other Tribes are matriarchal in lineage in that the
husband is accepted into the Tribe and Clan of his wife. In the Thirteen Point Family the mate
from outside the 'Wind Pipe' is accepted into the Great Family, regardless of sex."
To further clarify the divisions of the Central Earth Tribes, it can be understood thus:
There are three major divisions - (1) Tribe; (2) Clan; and, (3) Culture Frame. The latter is the
actual culture of a certain collection of people. For instance, a Subterranean who is within the
"Culture Frame" of the Inca, may not share the same Tribe and / or Clan of his Inca friends. To
quote again from Issue 1-80: "One's Tribe is his genetic vine. One's Culture is his matrix for
preservation of a singular cultural experience never to be achieved again in exactly the same
conduit of human expression." It is difficult for us to grasp exactly what these terms (Tribe,
Clan, Culture Frame) identify to the central Earth People, for we categorize our genetic families
differently. What we term as "tribe" is not wholly the same as their qualification of "Tribe."
This is also true for clan and culture frame. There are no vast differences but dissimilarities do
exist. Aside from cultural and environmental differences, the inner world inhabitants are, it must
be remembered, composed of "remnant" cultures, and thus genetics, from race-roots far in our
past.
In order for these races and cultures to survive in such a limited number and environment, they
must be carefully apartmented and defined by a means that will best afford a cataloging of each
genetic strain. More often, marriages take place between Tribes, and never within clans. Marital
unions do come about within Tribes on occasion. However it is necessary that most genetic
changes occur between the Tribes, to ensure maintenance of the molecular frequency and
spiritual attunement. Since the karmas of inner world inhabitants are far less involved than are
ours, the securing of the "perfect" mate is not as difficult a pursuit for them as we of the outer
world find it to be. The dwellers on the "tortoise shell" (surface Earth) have created a dense
entanglement of karmas with one another, making it necessary for us to often "tie the knot" in
order to work through our karmic connections. This deprives us of our intended union with a
soul mate in that life, or at the very least, postpones it. Our inner world Brethren are not
involved in such an entropic dilemma. They are able, for the greater part, to choose their
incarnating cycles upon the Destiny wave, with little karmic density to distract their timing.
Without the burden and complexity of large amounts of karmic relationships to deal with, the in-
dweller is able to align himself more freely with the proper spiritual partner. It must be stressed
at this point that what is being discussed here is not a genetic purifying of races of people, but a
spiritual encoding within all races. Although this encoding has deteriorated among the surface
born through centuries of karmic and ecological abuse, it remains intact (to a far greater degree)
within the Tribes of the Central Earth Domain.
It is the major focus of the Central Earth Tribes to keep the spiritual encoding in a pure state, so
that we, of the surface domain, may recapture our former linking in a future time, through
integration with the "Grand Totem."
The Inner Nation of Earth goes back even further in time with their record-keeping of genetic
cycles. To quote from Issue 4-81 of The Source:
"All enlightened souls of this Earth (inner and outer spheres) are the 'Light Races' - those who
come from the terraces of 'Living Lights.' These souls have de-evolved since their first
appearance on Earth, thus they are no longer 'god-like'. They have their respective karmas to
contend with and are bonded to the human condition (this is especially germane for the outer
terrestrials). Yet they are definable by their above-average spiritual seeking and instinctive
sense of justice and duty to the Earth."
And what of those souls not among the "Light Races"? Since it is spiritual energy within the
genetic trellace that is the essence of the bonding, any soul can bring itself into the vibration of
the "Light Races," through spiritual evolution. Unfortunately, not too many surface Earth
dwellers follow such demanding evolution cycles. They postpone karma clearance as long as
possible. Like a man with many debts, they are in no hurry to make the payments when they feel
overwhelmed with the obligation.
The inner world records reveal the incarnating cycles of all mankind on this planet, both above
and below, and their genetic ties to ultra-terrestrial worlds. They are able to achieve this massive
feat at compilation through attunement to the recording crystals of the Earth, from which they
feed this information into their own recording crystalline units. These records trace humanity
from the First Three Migrations of the "Solarians" to Earth. (For more information on the
Solarians and their Migrations to Earth from the Blue Star, see Issue 4-81.)
Now that the historic background has been presented, we are ready to witness a wedding among
the Central Earth Tribes. The groom's name is Kohna. His Tribe is Earth-Six Point, and he is of
the Shell Clan. His culture frame is a branch of the North American Indian. His bride's name is
Revella. She is from the Clan of the White Foxes, in the Star-One Point Tribe. Her culture
frame is Hebrew. It is not often that people intermarry between culture frames in the inner Earth.
This is not due to any prejudice. It is known by the inner world Tribes that incarnating cycles
within the Earth are set by the Archangelic Hierarchy to maintain these cultures, in order to
preserve their history and spiritual archetypes for the future linking with the surface world. This
will complete the planetary charge, creating once again, a truly "whole Earth."
Conversely, it is understood that a totally static state, with cultures isolated from one another,
would bring these remnant civilizations into a condition of decay - both spiritually and
genetically. Nor is isolation of cultures consistent with the inter-linking of Tribes and Clans,
necessary for genetic viability. Thus, intermarriage between culture frames must occur, but very
selectively. This selectivity takes place in the incarnating cycle, guided by the Hierarchy and not
through any manipulation on the human / cultural level. In other words, souls incarnating into
the Central Earth, in most instances, do so at the right time and in the right place to have the
opportunity to be joined with the correct mate - a soul with whom they will feel a special
belonging and love. Once Kohna and Revella complete their vows, they will become part of the
Great Thirteen Point Family, which is the "family" of all the Tribes, in which the inter-culture
couples are received. The Great Thirteen Point Family is at the top of the Grand Totem.
Kohna's and Revella's spiritual genetic codings will filter down through the Tribes on the totem
of the Light Transfer.
In preparation for the final vows, the couple will enter a period of grace, during which time they
will experience various spiritual states and receive through revelation and council, certain
knowledge of life reserved for the bonded energy polarity of two souls in marriage. The beauty
of this discourse is like a vivid mural of colors and tones integrating the initiates emotionally and
physically with one another and their spiritual design.
The final phase in the preparation for wedded union is the presentation of the XEN (pronounced
"zen"). The XEN is the entire Light encoding of an individual inner dweller from his or her
"Creation Star" (point of soul beginning) through to the present, inclusive of all his / her
incarnations. The XEN is also a record of all relatives, generation upon generation. Yet the
XEN is much more than this. It is that individual's very being captured in crystal - in light, color
and tone. The XEN is recorded on a "quill," an instrument used for recordings of various sacred
knowledge. A XEN Quill is far more sensitively attuned, containing greater interdimensional
qualities and fractions. A quill is somewhat the size and shape of a rolling pin. Its main casing
is generally made of alchemical gold, although some "ordinary" quills are not. All XEN Quills
are made from this most precious of alchemical metal. The internal mechanism of the main
casing is far too advanced for me to detail here, as certain whole sciences would first have to be
explained.
Sticking into the cylinder casing are small quill-like needles. These needles protrude from the
cylinder about 2 ½ inches. They are each the approximate thickness of a very fine sewing
needle. The strength of these needles is far greater, with a vibratory sensitivity more acute than
any element known to us. On the head of each needle is a small faceted natural jewel. The size
of the gem and the type of stone and facet depends upon the service of that particular quill. A
XEN Quill is set with Golden Jasmine diamonds, mined in the inner Earth, having originated
from the pressures of novas before this sphere's creation. The Golden Jasmine stones are faceted
into a design called "cornflower." The stone is not really cut into the shape of a cornflower; it is
only the prisming of the light in the center of the jewel that optically resembles this flower. The
color of the gem in this facet is a brilliant white light aureole about a golden point at the center
(somewhat symbolic of the "atoma” central sun at the center of the planet). The golden point is
often hardly visible, but can be made to bloom to a greater light through energy transfers within
the Quill.
Other energy synchronizations cause the white light to nova in brightness; still other, higher
qualifications of energy transfer bring forth a flaming of violets, blues, ruby and emerald - all
colors of the spectrum, and many not visible to surface Earth sight. The cornflowers are all the
same size on the XEN Quill, but each stone contains its own unique "program." These crystals
are set in patterns that form matrices of "bio-energetic" geometrics. (Bio-energetic is a term for
energies transferable from the ethers of higher spiritual planes, directly into the genetic system of
biological ensouled beings.) Specific geometric patterns cause different programming of this
bio-energetic transfer.
The Hebrew Yod flames are derived from measurement quanta of these exchanges with the
"Living Lights", or Archangelic Hierarchies, and the bio-entrained souls of Earth. The
cornflowers on these needles are placed so closely together there appears to be no visible spacing
between them. Only in careful scrutiny can the spacing be detected. The spacing is enough to
sustain a vibration when the Harmonics are "played" upon the Quill instrument. The Harmonics
are the combined messengers of light, color and tone that are initiated by the inheritor of the
XEN Quill through his or her Light Being, or center of spiritual persona. The handles or knobs
on each end of the cylinder can be turned for fine tuning of the device.
Now that the instrument has been described, I will proceed to its uses:
(1) To serve as a complete genetic record of the individual through both generation and
incarnation.
(2) Further, to serve as an instrument of communication with one's genetic and para-genetic
(incarnating self - past and future).
(3) To interact with the inheritor (owner) for clearing of awareness channels, and receipt of
universal truths through the individual's spiritual encoding, directly from the "Living
Lights" of his/her lineage.
(4) XEN contains xgram patterning of the inheritor, to be used for critical rotational
positioning of the brain by the sensitive Subterranean computers (should the need arise).
(See "CRP" - Issue 3-81)
(5) Maintains a record of the inheritor's Nature Devic Guardians, elemental forms, cosmic and
Angelic Guardians, which are integrated into the individual's personal life pattern.
(6) Other minor uses... also some which are initiatory and I am not permitted to divulge.
In a future age, these Quills, carrying the XEN programs, will serve as synchronic tools in the
advancement of the human form or microcosmic gematria, toward the "Pure Gem" state, in
which the human body becomes aligned to its centropic valency - that of the macrocosm. The
XEN Quills are a physical counterpart (in individual genetic coordinates) to the “Urim and
Thummim." My sources give the definition of Urim and Thummim as follows:
"The light Crystal vectors for transmission between the Celestial Thrones, and from these thronic
Radiances to the lower realms of habitation, such as Earth."
The lights, colors, and tones that emanate from the XEN Quill can also project a holographic
image or series of “motion picture” images from the etheric records of the inheritor's generation
and incarnating past. Accompanying sound can be brought forth as well. Also encoded on the
Quill for holographic display are meditational and triggering patterns - all integrated to the total
Harmonics of that individual.
An Inner Earth inhabitant becomes an "inheritor" of his / her XEN at the surface age of 18
(counted differently in Subterranea), after he / she had undergone initiation into one or more
Great Medicine Societies (Issue 1-80). At this time the most revered "Craftsmen of the Grand
Totem" guild, craft the Quill and program its XEN. This is a most sacred and secret process, the
knowledge of which no written record is kept. The Quill / quill is the symbolic representation of
a totem in shape, which is the cosmic gematria of the spiral of life. The XEN Quill is the single
most sacred artifact of individual ownership.
We return to the wedding preparations of Kohna and Revella. Before they can become one, they
must present their XENs upon the Quills before the "Xen-as-orta-el," a council composed of five
High Priests and one Grand Illuminari. This council is assembled from members of the Great
Thirteen Point Family. The Illuminari who heads the council is Benefactor to both marital
parties and is related to them. Everyone within the Central Earth Tribes is related to the Thirteen
Point Family. Since neither the young man nor his bride-to-be are from the Thirteen Point, the
preparations will include uniting the bio-energetic frequencies of their XENS to that of the Great
Family. First, however, the Quills of the two seeking union must be matched together and
wedded in Harmonics, so that their offspring (should it be in the divine plan that they have any)
will receive the amalgam of bio-energetic Light Transfer created by the union of both parent's
spiritual encodings to be processed through the XENs of the generations of their family. Once
the Harmonics of the XEN Quills come together, a like procedure occurs within the Light bodies
of the couple. The presentation of the Quills before the Benefactor and council on the eve of the
final step in the wedding is to ensure that there are no discords present. Although Subterraneans
seem like virtual gods in comparison to the best of surface dwellers, they are human, with karma
and emotional will. If a discord is present, caused by disharmonious living or incompatible
Light encodings, the marriage will not take place. In most cases, because the Inner World Tribal
Karmas are so advanced, awareness, and thus less entangled in personal karmas, the Harmonics
do match. Yet this is not always true. Should a couple wed their XEN Harmonics despite a
discord between them, both XENs would lock onto the discord. This would cause entropy
among the entire Light encodings of the two participants, to be passed down through generation
and on by incarnation as well. It would then require the working out of the karma knot of
discord through many cycles of karma / incarnation.
It staggers the mind to reflect even for a moment on how many disharmonic violations must
occur among the surface inhabitants through their karmic unions, most without the benefit of true
soul-bonded love. The People of the Ark, the in-dwellers, do not fail to recognize the
importance of the Harmonics. Should a discordance be found before the Council of Harmonics
(Xen-as-orta-el), almost without exception the Code is not broken... the completion of the
marriage does not take place.
On those few occasions when the Code is defied, the marriage is allowed with the understanding
by the couple that they are to bear no children, and to be exiled to the cavern cities outside the
central hollow. This may seem harsh judgment to be dictated for the star-crossed lovers, yet the
reasoning behind this ruling is sound. Were the love between these two souls in this lifetime that
of an ideal bonding frequency and free of karmic motivation, there would be no discordance
between the Harmonics of their Quills. Thus there must be a flaw in their relationship which
creates the register of the discord. This flaw may have its beginnings in lifetimes past, but it is
surely still there in the present, or otherwise the discord would have been transposed into a
harmonic. Should they bear children, the discord would be amplified by drawing in souls who
carry similar discords. Should the couple, childless, remain in the central hollow, their auric
discordance (through their sexual bonding) would be imprinted in the ether envelope of the
sacred hollow. This would, in turn, bring about an entrainment toward discord among the people
who shared the envelope of ethers (as more and more discordant marriages took place). In the
cavern cities the ethers are not so impressionable. More general discordance is already present
there as these souls are closer to the surface of the planet, and thus less initiated both spiritually
and physically to the Inner Mysteries.
The story of Khona and Revella does not have a happy ending. A discordance was found
between their XENS. Its source was more in Khona's karma than Revella's. Khona persuaded
Revella not to accept the Code of the Council of the Harmonics.
Resplendent in a white opaline fine silken gown of spun cobwebs, Revella entered the wedding
hall, where Khona stood, attired in a white tunic style suit with ruby and gold belt. Each carried
their XEN Quills before them on satin pillows. The groom is the first to walk to the altar. He
turns and waits for Revella, who walks gracefully toward him, delicate pale cornflowers trailing
from the satin pillow supporting her Quill. Her heart pounds like the tiny hooves of the unicorn.
She suddenly halts her procession a quarter of the way to the altar, where Kohna, his face taut,
stares at her intently. She struggles with herself to continue, but in her mind she sees a pair of
eyes burning into her forehead. She recognizes them as the eyes of the unborn of her generation
- as one entity of continuation toward the fount of the one Source. These searing eyes tell her
they cannot be sealed from her womb. She is the Gateway. Revella looks once more to Kohna
and hears in the inner part of her being the piercing discord their bonding will create. Through
this painful sound, she sees their love for one another as incomplete, and releases Kohna from
her Aura. Revella then turns and leaves the wedding hall.
(Several years ago I saw in a vision, the form of Thoth Hermes with a tasseled rolling pin in his
hand. Later, a friend related to me a dream she had experienced which was more like a
revelation in its clarity, in which she found herself walking into a great room, carrying one such
object, jeweled and glistening, on a satin pillow. Although she knew this to be her wedding
ceremony, she felt sorrow, knowing she would not marry her intended spouse, as this union,
should it take place, would impress a discord upon the object she carried, which she felt was her
family history. I have consequently brought the entire experience forward from the recording
crystals of the Earth, presented in the story of Kohna and Revella.)
We see in this discourse on the "Grand Totem" and the XEN Quills, how the People (of the
Central Earth Tribes) have integrated their lives and soul progression with the guiding triggers or
Yod of the "Living Lights" - the Archangelic Hierarchies governing this planetary element,
which is included in a vaster schematic of Divine Integration. Thus, in the this final lesson for
the year of 1983, let us focus upon a clearer understanding of the "Living Lights" and their
governership over the Earth and her souls. There is a great deal of information that could be
given on this subject that regrettably cannot be stated in the brief space allowed in this issue. I
will instead attempt to relate only the major points needed to coordinate past and future material
given through this source with the concept of Divine Integration.
The following is a quote from "The New Age Bible Interpretation Old Testament, Vol. I": The
physiological key to the Scriptures also unlocks untold treasures. Used in this instance, the
ladder of Jacob's dream refers to segments of the spinal column, and the Angels of light to the
sacred fire which ascends therein to the head (heights of illumination). As the life force passes
through the several plexuses they each receive a certain vibration from the astrological sign
governing them. Since every individual is differently constituted and in varying stages of
development, no two respond in an identical manner to the rising of the spirit fire.
"The ancients described Jacob's ladder as the seven coils of a serpent that reached from heaven
to Earth. This refers to the Path of Initiation, which has its counterpart in that starry ladder of the
skies stretching from the Pleiades to Orion.
"In Amos 5:8, it is described thus: Seek him that maketh the seven stars and Orion and turneth
the shadow of death into the morning, and maketh the day dark with night; that calleth for the
waters of the sea and poureth them out upon the face of the earth: the Lord is His Name.
"From the cosmic standpoint, Jacob's ladder reveals the entire scheme of evolution. Egos
descend from the spheres of God to the World of Matter, later re-ascending to be reunited with
God at the end of the Day of Manifestation."
The Archangelic Hierarchies atop our macrocosmic totem or spiral or receipt are located
spatially in the constellations of Orion and the Pleiades. These two repositories of "Living
Lights" are the capstone of our para-genetic and divine Life Stream Pyramid. Between the two
major guiding Power Realms is a point of balance called by the Inner Earth Illuminaries, the
Ulta. The Ulta, in more scientific terms is known as the pyra-radial gate... the mechanism which
encodes the pyra-conic Light frequencies (emitted by the "Living Lights") into spectra color/
sonic bands. These bands are filtered down through the pyramid or spiral acting on and reacting
with all levels of integration, until it reaches our human condition, at which point these bands are
synchro-radiated to the bio-chronic field of the brain / mind complex. The pitch and meter of
synthesis resulting from the matching of brain waves to the xgrams or program codes of
Morphionic (divine) Light, determines the time ratio of our field of consciousness. What all of
this essentially means is that the "gate" controls our perception of reality, and since "reality" is
nothing more than perception itself, the Ulta feeds us our reality in a frame of limited quanta
release. The Light of the "Living Lights," coming together at the gate creates an amalgam
(blend) of the two Power Centers (i.e., Orion and Pleiades). Emerging from this amalgam is a
new form, stronger in "potential of force" (Issue 2-82) than its parent sources.
After the advent of the falling from power of the Light Bearer, the angel Lucifer, an attempt to
steal or corrupt the power center was activated by the Luciferians. This is analogous to the
stealing of the fire embers in American Indian lore. The power sought by the Luciferians was
not wholly gained, yet the corruption had served to seal away the spectral integration of the ten
pyra-codes and dislodge the "Seat of Flame" from the Gateway. The Seat of Flames was
manifest as a brilliant sun-star, its median mark creating an equal arc between the Seat of Rigel
in Orion and the Seat of Alcyone in the Pleiades. With the corruption of the spectra the pyra-
conic radiations were justified to a lesser force valency in order to maintain some form of
balance among its parts (of the Archangelic Light Mechanism). So as to accomplish this activity
within the law of Re-Integration, the Seat of Flame (the Light Bearing Fire or Jewel of Lucifer)
was transferred in point of force to another spacing on the cosmic grid. This spacing lies within
the constellation of Canis Major, and is organized in material collectivity as the star Sirius. It is
actually two stars, as the greater Sirius has a lesser dwarf star rotating about it. In material
essence, the dwarf star contains the trapped energies of the lost calibrations expelled from the
rhythm of the Harmonics when the Seat of Fire was dislodged from the Throne at the Gateway.
On this planet we are forging through the Path of Fire in our geophysical / karmic upheavals,
now arising from the prophetic pen of past savants and coiling for the strike of Armageddon. In
order that we may survive the undertow of the passing wave, we must transform the Sirian
density into the free-blown crystal rose of the chalice, which is our vehicle into ultra-dimension.
The very bodies we now inhabit can become transmuted into the Pure Gem of the greater Light.
The key to comprehending how Sirius acts upon us in this Age is through the releasing of
trapped energies. This release is taking place on all levels of the Light Pyramid from the
mundane to the magnificent. Many of the horrors we see around us now are the struggling of our
karma level to release these energies at any price. This is the violent and somewhat forbidding
side of the Sirian Power, as it accepts the activity that cannot be denied and plays the role of the
Mover of Mountains. Yet there is the Sirian Light that still survives the ancient cosmic power
struggles.
Beyond the walls in which turmoil wrestles to resurrect balance, abides the perfect "Jewel of the
Light Bearer." High intelligences operate within this cocoon of brilliance. When the trapped
energies are all released, and the lost pyra-codes restored to the Throne-Crown of the center-
point chakra between the Thronic Radiances of Orion and the Pleiades, then all the "Living
Lights" of the many governing thrones under these two main centers of power can re-centralize
their balance points and form greater calibrations of the one Living Light.
**
(The following treatise was on display at the Million Dollar Museum in Memphis, Tenn., August
1983. It was written by "Solarian" (Blue Star Race) Elvis Aaron Presley.)
ASTROLOGY
It is designed so as to expose the ultimate in height and depth. To relate the strength and
weaknesses of those who are willing to accept and are seeking a closer relationship with the
Divine. In order to recognize and correct one's faults and be in step. To be capable of
understanding the necessity of the changing times. To participate, to create, to express,
appreciate, and to more fully understand his individual role in reaching the Divine God. For man
to more fully understand and to determine his own destiny. The realization that Divine God is
life itself. Upon being able to accept one's faults and weaknesses. To correct them in order to
have a better understanding and to be capable of giving love and help to other human beings
regardless of color or creed. To appreciate all people. The breaking down of barriers and
recognizing individual traits. To be sincere in having the desire to show gratitude and
appreciation for that which each individual has given to the world. You create a better
understanding for yourself of life and the part you yourself and others play in this world. You
are soon recognizing a brighter light within yourself. The sharing of that light with others and
feeling the importance of stressing and / or distributing the Love and Will of God. For Christ,
who gave life and hope and faith to the millions of people who have accepted His sacrifice and
Ray of Life. He taught the love of God and the importance of the love of one another by keeping
always the importance of expressing gratitude and respect for the greatest miracle of all -- life
itself!
ELVIS PRESLEY
The divine voice shall be struck by heaven
So that he cannot proceed any further.
The secret of the close-mouthed one shall be closed,
That people shall tread upon and before it.
Nostradamus, 15th century
***
******
"Until the Stone was made transparent, they did not know His true body, for they had seen Him
only clothed in the garment of the world. Those who were made witness to His sacred flesh
were opened to the vision of the Holy Race, the Lords of Light... No Beast may devour the
Graces of the Light, nor those who are garmented in His Robes of Christed Service."
- "The Initiate," Thoth Hermes, concerning the Resurrection of Jesus Christ
**
****
Excerpts from Thanksgiving Message from THOTH HERMES, 1977:
"Without the Rays of Aton the womb is still... I do not speak here of the sun you see in your
skies, but the Great Spiritual Solarius, the Third Eye of the Source of all things. All creation is
composed of rays from the Solarius, throughout all the three Ultra-Universes and many cosmic
universes within all dimensions and inter-dimensions, in every plane of thought, reason or
comprehension. The Solarius Rays are found within the greatest quasars, the ice worlds of the
frozen starplexes, the fire galaxies that burn in flaming sequences of rainbow colors, and it is
woven into the green Earth... the Great Sacred Rays are everything. They bring forth the Rays
and respect their divine action. They study and chart the movement and combination of the rays
which create each element of life. The Rays of Aton are hierarchical, beginning with the Source
and descending through the Seven Harmonies in lesser and lesser complex archetype forms. The
Rays of Solarius form a mighty circle, for as they descend they reach a point within the
microquasars of the mini-optic dimension where they begin to rise again.
"The Solarians are those souls which were separated from the first beams of soul generation into
Creation Stars which were resonant with the Solarius. They were cultivated to be the guardians
and servants of the Sacred Rays. These are the Sun Children, for (here on Earth) in sensitivity
they are much like little children, as they maintain a blithe spirit. The Solarians are the scouts,
the cosmic frontiersmen. Those who clear the sacred Earth and raise the bridges and build the
temples from His cosmic blueprint... Before the last bridge is raised all souls (of Earth) shall
gather the beams... There are those souls with divine mission who are not from the Light Races
of the "Children of the Sun" (Solarians) who arose in later ages to take up the torch. They, too,
form circles of Light on the Earth. One day all will be received into the Keeping of the Atonic
Flame."
The Ten Sacred Solarius Rays
(from which the ten lost pyra-codes are trinitized)

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 1-84
copyright © 1984 L.Christine Hayes
"A great scientific instrument lies sprawled over the entire face of the globe. At some period,
thousands of year's ago, almost every corner of the world was visited by a people with a
particular task to accomplish. With the help of some remarkable power, by which they could cut
and raise enormous blocks of stone, these men created vast astronomical instruments, circles of
erect pillars, pyramids, underground tunnels, cyclopean stone platforms, all linked together by a
network of tracks and alignments, whose course from horizon to horizon was marked by stones,
mounds, and earthworks."
-quoted from "The New View Over Atlantis,"
by John Mitchell
The "great scientific instrument" was first laid down upon the surface of the planet many
millions of years ago. The Guardian Masters of the Sun Bow Race (Solarians) established these
centers as geodetic markers for the Grand Temple Earth was to have become. Nothing now
remains of these original structures. The cycles of time and man have wrought many shapes and
forms upon these energy vortexes through eons. Yet the code of the Master Builders lives on. It
is the silent, pulsing Word that binds the stars to the Earth. The Order of the Master Builders is
still with us, among the "Illumined" of the Central Earth (see issue #1-80). The remaining
stones, edifices of past majesty that still cling to the breast of the Earth Mother, were later
handiworks of the same order that spawned the first megalithic temple pillars. Each age brought
into the Light the sects of Old; a new generation seeded with the initiations of ancient Sight.
Their number grew fewer and fewer yet they survive to this day among us. These "Sighted"
knew the secrets of the Sacred Places and how to blend their consciousness as one with the
constant current of the Earth through these palaces of mercurial wisdom.
From "The New View Over Atlantis:" "Many of the greatest works of the megalithic builders
involve the construction of a hidden chamber set deep within the earth or at the heart of some
great artificial edifice...Almost every megalithic site includes at least one such buried chamber…..
These artificial caverns...are found with local variations in many parts of the world. Their
entrances are frequently oriented towards a significant astronomical declination or aligned upon
a well-marked ley."
These subterranean galleries and chambers served a three-fold, inter-connected purpose. they
were a symbolic reminder of the Central Earth and its remnant Holy Tribes from whence the
esoteric orders of the surface world received much of their wisdom. The chambers also created a
resonate cavity (in small scale, much like the hollow cavity of the Earth) for the power practices
of these ancient orders. The third function of the chambers was ritualistic in nature, but based
upon scientific laws and knowledge of the forces of the universe. This last function was at the
crux of White Magic. Only in the last stages of esoteric history did part of the Order stray from
the Light and delve into the Black Arts, using the very same power structures of the holy orders
for their dark deeds.
The Isles of Great Britain, with their Arthurian legacy, are especially fertile in reminders of the
practices of Old. The blend of Christian and pagan elixirs runs from the same grail cup, flowing
through the sacred calendar of the land, from glen to cairn stone, among the Earth circles and
crumbling castle walls. The central figure in the subterranean chamber Mysteries and rituals of
these misted lands long ago was the Vma, a priestess who represented the Divine Inspiration
of the Mother Light, first received by this Earth through the Venusian emissary, the first
Melchizedek in Lemuria, and later in Atlantis. (past subscribers to "The Source" will recall that
such beings as "Venusians" are ultra-terrestrial, and that their sphere is at its habitable register in
a separate vibration from the Earth as we inhabit it. Thus the lifeless atmosphere of the planet
Venus as we see it is far different from the dimensional spectrum in which the Venusians dwell.)
Melchizedek returned in several Earth incarnations to guide the Order out of chaos, but was
never fully successful because of the willful actions of humanity. The innermost tenets of the
undefiled Melchizedek (as differentiated from the "fallen" Order) are constituted as a principle of
laws and balance that must be attained between UW and OD (positive and negative polarities, or
yin/yang)which on Earth is exemplified in the male and female sexes. The later Arthurian
symbol of Camelot came from the words Cama and Lot, the two balance points of the UW and
OD, or the perfect balance maintained. Cama Lot is not the perfect balance inert, but the action
in balance. It is an excelling force. In order to achieve Cama Lot, the female principle assumes
the post of occultory regent. She is the receiver of Divine Inspiration in its pure, non-directed
energy, or Ouja. The male principle in this process is the active corresponder. He is the director
of the inspiration into design and form. he thus becomes the mathematician and architect of
Ouja. Within the high discipline of this working ideology, each sex assumes the one polarity
role of its gender. In a totally balances society of incarnating souls, either sex is inherently
equipped spiritually and mentally to contain the germ or both agencies (UW &OD). However,
the Melchizedek mission on Earth never advances further than the first stages in retrieving this
androgynous spiritual chemistry, which before the fall from the (ether) Veil, was the condition of
souls entering the crystal sphere that was to become, through stages of entropy, the material
earth plane.
Through the ages, the Cama Lot principle was resurrected under many titles, always to receive
the same fate of expulsion from the Mystery orders. In the Druidic Mysteries, the inner most
sacrosanct Mystery sect within and concealed from the external Order, was Gwavadlvge,
meaning Sacred Three and also, Sacred Tree. it is taken from the Druidic Mysteries' Celtic
Codex, which is purposely layered in interpretation. The etymology of this Codex was riddled
with connective and multiple syntax. The Celtic Codex was Ynas Tex, translated as Hidden
Book, also Hidden Root, and further understood as Fire of the Sacred. The Sacred Three held to
the Principle of Cama Lot in principle alone, not having performed it in ritual since the days of
Atlantis, when the last Vma or Priestess of Cama Lot was murdered by the Melchizedek priests
who wished to usurp the occultory rights of the female in the Temple. It was, for the later
Druidic Sacred Three, not a simple matter to select a new Vma. Such an oracle must be birthed
through pre-ordination and sent to the Council of the Sacred Three from the Melchizedek
Masters beyond the sphere of the Earth. Certain signs would make her known to the Council
Templates, the six Council priests. Since the fall of the Melchizedek Order in Atlantis, the
Templates of the Sacred Three had judged the signs of both Heaven and Earth, vainly seeking
the signal from beyond that a Vma would be given once again to the Temple. There was fear of
persecution as the Sacred Three was all that remained of the true Melchizedek Order, finding its
way into the Druidic Mysteries via the Phoenicians, who were later day Atlanteans. Prior to
final cataclysms which rendered to rubble the Atlantean Empire, the undefiled Atlanteans (who
still adhered to the Sacred Principles) calling themselves the Pure Born, migrated to several
regions of the Earth. Many eventually descended into the Central Earth. An elect band of Inner
World Atlanteans inter-bred with Venusian vestiges of the Central Earth's exo-cultures (see issue
#1-80). Later, these offspring ascended to the surface to mix genetically with the Indus Valley
cultures, who were ancestors of the Phoenicians. The Phoenician Mystery Schools preserved the
Venusian-Atlantean knowledge of the Venusian "angel" Melchizedek, and the accompanying
Order.
From Corinne Heline's "Mysteries of the Holy Grail:" "Melchizedek, the title of a succession of
Atlantean High Priests...celebrated with Abraham the Mystic Supper in which also he conferred
upon Abraham the High Priesthood of the then New Dispensation of the Aryan Epoch and Aryan
Age."
During the latter part of the 12th century, a young girl of 13 was brought before the Council of
the Sacred Three by one of the Templates. The signs of Heaven and Earth had been auspicious,
and this child's personal traits and heritage bore the signals of cosmic pre-ordination the Hidden
Order had sought since the Days of Atlantis. After thorough deliberation it was unanimously
decided by the Council that the girl was indeed the long awaited Vma. The fallen Temple could
be raised again like the Madonna Atlantis from the sea. The star child's name was Lorraine. She
was the daughter of a French wheelwright in the town of Chartres, France. Chartres was the
location of one of the most holy catacombs of the Sacred Three. The wheel is a Spirit-Life
symbol of the Templates to be given to the Altar of the Most Holy. "Given to the Altar" was not
an allusion to living sacrifice, but to the service of Eternal Watch over the Holy of Holies, the
symbolic Altar of Erazuma in Atlantean times, which later became archtypified as the Altar of
Solomon.
There were those within the outer, defiled Druidic circle who suspected that the Cama Lot rituals
had been reborn and sought to once again destroy them. Lorraine conceived a child through
ritual union with a consort priest of the (Central Earth) subterreanean Temple. This was done to
assure continuation of the Vma through her issue. Because of the known danger to Lorraine and
her daughter, Camellia, they were kept in seclusion in the Temple of Chartres. Their true
identities were concealed under false titles. Despite the caution of the Templates, Lorraine's
identity as the Vma was discovered and she was poisoned by a Druid Priest-Knight of the
Templars. As a result, she died when her daughter was nine years of age. The Order of the
Knights Templar was also an offshoot from the esoteric knowledge of the Atlantean
Melchizedek. Like the Druids, the Templars had a defiled outer order, and a secret sect which
swore its allegiance to the same Sacred Three. There were consequently many Knight of the
Templar who were also Druid Priests, both of the Black (defiled) and White (pure) Grail. In
Heline's "Mysteries of the Holy Grail" the bio-centering of the spiritual Grail Cup is explained
thus: "There is an etheric organ, little mentioned in occult literature, which is built from the life
substance as it rises from the throat center up into the head. It has the shape of a lily-cup, whose
corolla shines within the skull, embracing the organs of spiritual vision which are there and
sending its light outward to radiate halo-like about the head. This etheric structure is a true
organ, through which will enable perfected man to speak the Creative Word, whose sound verily
has the power to create and recreate matter in all its forms.
Soon after her mother's death, Camellia was taken from Chartres by a Grand Template, along
with her aunt, Lorraine's sister Paulette, and a company of loyal White Grail knights, to the
Fount of the Sacred Tree, rooted in sanctuary at the Glastonbury Abbey in Somerset, England,.
At Glastonbury, Camellia spent her years being groomed to become the Vma following Lorraine.
However, fate did not decree for Camellia to be a Priestess for the Cama Lot. A natural oracle
was to be a Nature Priestess and spiritual channel, but not in the same manner as he mother.
Because of he paternal ties to the Central Earth Races, Camellia found herself in the midst of a
battle of good and evil, as the Illumined sought to keep the lantern burning on the surface world
through the Great Mysteries.
From the literature of King Arthur we know of the Mystery Isle of Avalon, that exclusive estate
of the fairy world borne in the midst as on the back of a white swan to the threshold of timeless
enchantment. In truth, Avalon was an inter-dimensional reality anchored to the telluric currents
which came together at Glastonbury. It was earth, water, air, and fire. unified in an ageless
embrace of life, where time moved only as the mind moved. Those initiated, such as Camellia
and the Nature Priestesses before her, could step between the folds of the Earth Goddesses robes
ans slip into the reality that was Avalon. It was not merely a state of consciousness, but a
physical condition of the elements. For such inter-dimensions as Avalon are no less real than
our world, yet they are more sensitive to the pulses of the mind, by which all realities are
fashioned. Thus the daughter of Lorraine made her passage from Glastonbury to Avalon often.
Since the two worlds were not stationed within identical measurements of time, Camellia could
stay only a day in Avalon and be gone several months from Glastonbury. As with the Knights
and the Druids, the Monks were divided in belief and allegiance. Only an elect few monks at the
Abbey were aligned to the White Grail Mysteries and the Sacred Three. The other monks at the
Abbey were aligned to the truth of Avalon. It was, to them, a bard's legend. The Sacred were
seen as pagan evil and a threat to the Christian way. Consequently, upon the grounds of
Glastonbury, under the watchful eyes of the pious monks, Camellia was a ward of England's
throne. A curious little figure caught up in the politics of the current ruling class, she was put
under the protection of the Abbey by the Church of England. This had been accomplished by the
English King, Stephen. It had been devised by the Templates of the Sacred Three that Camellia
was to be considered the illegitimate daughter of the King. Although the truth of he paternal
linage would have staggered the limited imaginations of that age, those in oath to the Black Grail
would have made haste to see that Camellia met a similar fate to her mother's had they suspected
her true heritage. It was far more advantageous to the cause for Camellia to accept the mercy of
the throne, to spend her life sequestered in a monastery that was no less than a threshold to a
mystical world. Through Avalon, Camellia prepared to serve as an ocular priestess. Her natural
talents were enhanced and guided into the proper channels. It was the purpose of the Sacred
Three and their college of initiates among the Druids, the Templars, the monks, and a very few
in the Christian priesthood and ruling class, to re-establish the lost knowledge of Nature and
science known to the ancient world.
It was no easy task for Camellia to leave the Abbey for months at a time. A plan was devised in
which the young woman had frequent attacks of epilepsy. These were triggered, unknown to the
Christian monks, by an herb. After several glimpses of Camellia's fits, the monks, believing
epilepsy to be a taint of the devil, allowed her to dwell in virtual seclusion within one area of the
Abbey containing a chamber a small garden. It was here that only the seemingly bravest
monks(who were in actuality, her companions in the White Grail) tended her. It was from her
chamber, through an underground passage, that the daughter of Lorraine would make her
pilgrimages to the Lake near the Abbey. In the crossing by barge of this body of water through
the veil of the mist, an initiate could touch the shores of Avalon and bridge the world of darkness
to a world of Light. In her 30 years at Glastonbury (from the age of 9 to her death at 39),
Camellia spent much of her time at Avalon. Yet Avalon was only a nourishing place for the
Priestess Camellia. She also made secret journeys to other sacred grounds. From among these
hallowed places, other than Avalon, she most frequented Stonehenge. Constructed by the Master
Builders, Stonehenge was originally past of a network of structures linking the Earth energy
fields together for instantaneous energy transfer from point to point. This energy could be in the
form of thought, transformation of matter from one juncture to another, or materialization of
ether into substance. Using the secrets of the bio-spiritual grail, Camellia could accomplish
these feats. Stonehenge also served as a time portal through which initiates could become
immersed in all the thought signals of the past and future of the Earth. Like an initiate of old,
Camellia would stand within the circle., aligning herself with the stones so that a passage
between the stones was positioned directly in front of her. She then stood before the Door or
passage in time and space. She found herself part of the Earth current, riding the back of the
dragon. Through the passage of great stones, Camellia saw the rays of the sun stream upon the
megaliths, striking a tone within their core, heard to the sensitive psychic ear of the initiate. As
the music of the sun surrounded her, the stars with the sum nature of Stonehenge as the Earth
Mountain, the anchor in the sky.
In this moment, the Priestess Camellia became a living stone at the Threshold. Like the giants of
rock encircling, she had been transformed into a moon- the earth's satellite, the sun's mirror,
reflecting its glory in the Universe. From this sacred place, Camellia would take council with
Masters out of time and space- from the distant past, from other worlds and dimensions, from the
Inner Kingdom, and from the future ages of man, in the Age of the New Enlightenment.
The accounting of the life Camellia has come to me a personal past life incarnation. This is but a
brief outline of her life, which I felt would be of interest to "The Source" readers, as it touches
upon the Mysteries which are germane to the theme of this quarterly.
The megalithic telluric markers and grids found throughout the world, and especially numerous
in Great Britain, were called "Herms," or Hermes Stones by the Greeks. From "The New View
Over Atlantis: "..."Mercury (Hermes) was also the God of revelation and of the 'hermetic'
mysteries which were held within a dark, buried chamber similar to the king's chamber buried
deep within the masonry of the Great Pyramid."
"...Beneath the abbey (of Glastonbury) are remains of vast catacombs caused by natural
upheavals. These catacombs are very deep down, and it is through these underground channels
that the magnetic currents of the world flowed...(Chartres) was the site of the great Druid
university of Gaul... The Cathedral stands on a large prehistoric mound over a buried chamber,
and this, according to Charpentier, is the natural meeting place of several powerful streams of
telluric currents known as woivres or mercurial serpents. Here the Christian geomancers, whose
hidden influence within the church was active during the Middle Ages, sited and built their
miraculous structures to serve as an instrument for the accumulation and fusion of energy and for
its dissemination to the benefit of the locality and of the pilgrims who at certain seasons crowded
the cathedral.
For those who wish to delve further into information on the catacombs and telluric Earth
energies beneath such ancient edifices as the ones at Glastonbury, Chartres, and Stonehenge,
you will find "The New View Over Atlantis," by John Michell, excellent reading. The chapter of
special interest in this regard are 6 & 7. (published by Harper & Rower, 10 East 53rd St. N.Y.
10022.)
Another book of related interest is "The Book of Runes," by Ralph Blum (with whom I had the
privilege of conferring in 1974). The text is accompanied by an actual set of Rune stones. (St.
Martin's Press, 175 Fifth Avenue, N.Y. 10010).
Runes were used by the ancient Celts as ocular stones, much in the esoteric spirit of the tarot and
I Ching. From my sources, it is related that the Runes originated from Celtic Codex (previously
discussed in this issue) brought into an ocular form imagery in the phases of self-initiation with
greater Self.
In "The Book of Runes," is given a quotation from the 13th century "Saga of Eric the Red,"
describing "a contemporary mistress of runecraft:" "She wore a cloak set with stones along the
hem. Around her neck and covering her head she wore a hood lined with white catskins. In one
hand she carried a staff with a knob on the end and at her belt, holding together her long dress,
hung a charm pouch. She wore catskin shoes and catskin mittens to cover her hands at all
times."
On the cover of this issue of "The Source," above the drawing of Stonehenge, are suspended four
Rune symbols. From left to right: THE SPIRITUAL WARRIOR- Sun, yang energy, active
principle, Victory, a guiding planet or star...GATEWAY - Both portal and a frontier between
Heaven and the mundane, it is the threshold of self-redress...INITIATION - Secret, hidden,
unknowable, associated with the mythical Phoenix arising from the karmic solution of its own
ashes, intense aspect of initiation, renewal of the Spirit... WHOLENESS - The Sun, self-
realization, bountiful energy.
These four Runes express the Four Forces of Union and Action which is embodied in the
Principle of Integration or Re-integration, depending upon the universal stage or perspective in
which the principle is experienced. These forces express the four values of centropy, a return to
the Source, which is the center of Being. In previous issues of "The Source" the true Self-
Mystery within the Mysteries of the Inner Earth has been addressed. It perhaps can best be
realized in this passage from a sacred text of the Central Earth monastic orders..." Of the
profound Mysteries of Earth, this is the greatest- To abide in harmony with thyself as a cell in
the body of Earth, in the Spirit of Christ, in the Eternity of God." To this I add that in the true
understanding of the physical and spiritual manifestation of our planet as a hollow sphere, so we
will recognize the centering of Self. These four Runes then, depicted in this issue, are the stones
of consciousness which form the pillars to the Inner World Temple.
To quote from Ralph Blum's "The Book of Runes:" "Rune casting is high adventure. It means
taking the wheel of your life and owning your power. The new maps, unlike the old, are three-
dimensional, and the third dimension is Spirit. Whatever the Runes may be - intercessors for the
self with the Self, simultaneous translators between the Self and the Divine, an ageless
navigational aid - and the energy that engages that engages them is our own. And, ultimately,
the wisdom as well. Thus, as we start to make contact with our deeps, we will begin to hear
messages of profound beauty and true usefulness. For like snowflakes and fingerprints, each of
our oracular signatures is a one-of-a-kind aspect of Creation addressing its own."
Mr. Blum has developed the New Oracle Foundation, publishing a quarterly newsletter, The
New Oracle News. He describes it as a newsletter which will..."serve as a forum for all of us to
share our experiences with the Viking Runes. It will contain insights into the oracular tradition,
innovations in Rune-casting techniques, and new aspects of 'Rune play discovered by readers of
The Book of Runes; and will, in addition, serve as the source for new product information,
ranging from crystal Rune pendants to computer programs for Rune play. For further
information as to Foundation membership, and to receive The New Oracle News for one year,
send a five dollar donation to cover costs of publication and mailing to: The New Oracle
Foundation/45-454 Ihilani St./Kaneohe, Hawaii 96744"
Runes, incidently, play an essential role in Shamanic Tradition of the central Earth Tribes.
Mention of them can be found in the fictional, truth-laced Tolkien books.
From The Throne of the Illumined to an initiate:
"Thou hast been received unto thy quarters of the Earth from when ariseth the eagle's flight. On
unbound wing doth recede the night. All manner of life imparts grace to thee as thy Quest rings
the moon's birth with the colors of the initiates robe; the silver and violet satin mist wreathed in
golden rope and tears of pearls, set in the rushing white of the Master's crystal lamp. Gifts of air
come hither to thee. Gifts of Earth fill the sky as beasts rising to the call of the wilderness,
opaque in mighty stone, coiled as proud serpents, guardians of the sacred vaults into which no
uninitiated may trespass."
"AND THERE SHALL BE MEMORIALS MIGHTY OF THEIR HANDIWORKS UPON THE
EARTH, LEAVING DIM TRACE BEHIND WHEN CYCLES ARE RENEWED.' Thoth
Hermes
(In ancient Egypt) "The candidate who had become an Initiate was found worthy to enter into the
presence of Osiris and to be numbered among the followers of Horus forever. 'Companions of
Horus' are mentioned in earliest Egyptian texts as 'sky people,' said to refer to inhabitants of the
mighty constellation Orion. "Sirius, the great star following this constellation...was called the
Star of Isis. Knowledge concerning celestial intercommunion between high Initiates upon earth
and Beings far off in stellar space was taught by Atlantean priests and passed on to their
neophytes and disciples in the early days of colonization in Egypt." Bible Interp., Vol. III
