# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 2-84
copyright © 1984 L.Christine Hayes
The sacred history of the Hopi Indians of North America tell of "the Red City of the South," and
of the kachina or "Star People" who prepared it for the ancestral Hopi clans. From the "Book of
the Hopi," by Frank Waters:
"Far in the tropical south, no one knows where, lay the mysterious City of the South, Palatkwapi
(Red House). Perhaps it was in Mexico, perhaps in Central or South America. Wherever it was,
it is still an important landmark in the geography of Hopi legend. Clan after clan included it in
their migrations. Hundreds of tales are told about it."
As the story is told by the Kachina Clan, when the Hopi clans emerged from the subterreanean
regions after the destruction of the Third World, some of the clans, lead by the Bear Clan, chose
to go south. To continue from the, "Book of the Hopi:"
"They were accompanied by a number of kachina people. These kachina people did not come to
the Fourth World like the rest o the people. In fact, they were not people. They were spirits sent
to give help and guidance to the clans, taking the forms of ordinary people and being commonly
regarded as the Kachina Clan.
"Having reached the southern paso and left their signatures, the clans returned north until they
reached the red-earth place where the kachina people instructed them to settle and build. From a
small village it grew into a large city, a great cultural and religious center, the mysterious Red
City of the South.
The Hopi history describes this city - that it was divided into three sections: the first for
ceremonial purposes, the second for storage, and the third being living quarters for the people.
Beneath all three sections ran a river. Within the ceremonial section, there were two buildings,
one for initiates and one in which the sacred ceremonies were held. Built in a terraced fashion,
as are the pueblos of today, the ceremonial building was four stories high. A description of this
building is found in the "Book of the Hopi."
"On the first or ground floor the kachina people taught initiates the history and meaning of the
three previous worlds and the purpose of this Fourth World to which man had emerged. On the
second floor they taught the structure and functions of the human body and that the highest
function of the mind was to understand how the one great spirit worked within man. The spirit
of kachina people taught this so that the people would not become evil again and this Fourth
World be destroyed like the first three..
"In the third story initiates were taught the workings of nature and the uses of all kinds of plant
life. Although the people were still relatively pure and there was little sickness, some evils
would come, bringing resultant illnesses; and for each one there was a plant remedy for the
people to remember.
"The fourth story was smaller than the three below, making the ceremonial building resemble a
pyramid. To this top level were admitted only initiates of great conscience who had acquired a
deep knowledge of the laws of nature., Here they were taught the workings of the planetary
system, how the stars affected the climate, the crops, and man himself. Here too they learned
about the 'open door' on top of their heads, how to keep them open, and so converse with their
Creator."
Although, as the story is told, the people of the Red City prospered for awhile, eventually war
was visited upon Palatlwapi. The Spider Clan, who because of their unspiritual ways had been
refused entrance into the city. attacked this sacred place one early dawn. The guardian
kachinas devised a plan of escape for the people, as it became evident that their city was under
siege. They were to leave by digging a tunnel underneath the river. The kachinas told the clans
that once they reached the other side of the river, they must resume their individual migrations,
each in their ordained directions.
From "Book of the Hopi," the kachinas parting message to the people of the Red City of the
South was:
"The day will come when your migrations are completed and you are all united again. So
remember all that we have taught you, properly observe your ceremonies, and keep the doors on
top of your heads open."
"Now we, the kachina people, will remain here to defend the city, while you make your escape in
the darkness. The time for us to go to our far-off planets and stars has not come yet. But it is
time for us to leave you. We will go by our powers to a certain high mountain, which you will
know, where we will await your messages of need."
The Hopi believe the kachinas to dwell in spirit within the San Francisco mountain, southwest of
Oraibi, near Flagstaff, Arizona.
That is the story of the kachina people and the Red City of the South, as the Hopi tell it. Now,
from my sources, the following is revealed of this "city" and its history...
After the last great cataclysms which tore the Atlantean heart from the bosom of the Atlantic
ocean, the period of time began known to the Hopi as the "Fourth World." The "kachina people"
were indeed, beings from a distant star, although not of the spirit world, but instead, the ultra-
terrestrials who inhabit subtle-state bodies (of greater rarification) than our own. These UTs
who gathered select clans of the Hopi together in the "City of the South," were from the
constellation of Orion. They chose these clans in the hope if re-seeding certain regions of the
Americas with the lost knowledge. It was these UTs who had instructed the High Priests of
Atlantis before she turned her face from the Light in her Last Days.
The "Red City of the South" was located in South America. The storage and living quarters for
the people were both underground in subterranean caverns. The ceremonial section was partially
underground, with the ceremonial building, or pyramid emerging to the surface from a
subterranean chamber. No inner-terrestrials were among the kachinas, as they had been the ones
to harbor and care for the clans before their emergence into the Fourth World. The Hopi called
these inner earth masters, "the ant people." In some instances, the ant people had mixed
genetically with the hibernating Hopi. There were those Hopi who did not choose to return to
the surface would, and still dwell as a "remnant culture" (remnant cultures-issue #1-80) within
the central hollow of the planet. Thus, as the clans emerged to the surface once again, those
clans which carried a greater capacity for awareness, were gathered by the kachinas to be taught,
or rather, re-taught, in a special university which they would build, under the guidance of the
kachinas.
Aside from there being a red coloration to the soil where this university was raised, it also
represented the color shift of the individual star within Orion from which these kachina came
different star than the star from whence came the "Blue Star race,"mentioned in previous
"Source" issues. The red ray is also the generative ray of the kundalini, which the kachina were
teaching the people to focus upward once again, through the succeeding chakras of the body
until it rose, like a star in the heavens, from the crown of the head. It was the red ray that the
kachina worked with among the people in order to retrieve the lost scoring of Earth's human
melody at that time. This unique university was thus aptly called, "City of the Red Star."
The Spider Clan had taken the path of the Dark Powers, distorting the potential of the sacred
people. They were thus denied entrance into the university of the kachina. They left to organize
and strengthen their powers, but eventually returned to attack the City of the Red Star. After the
people had exited the city via subterranean passages, the kachina withdrew the energy shield
which they had placed over the university complex, and withdrew. This band of lutra-terrestrials
then went into the chambers of the San Francisco mountain. From this vantage, they council
those of the Hopi who have not broken with ceremony, and have kept "the doors on the top of
their heads" open.
The illustration on the cover of this issue shows the door to the subterranean levels of the City of
the Red Star. It has been sealed away since the kachina left it, although it has been visited by one
since that day. The Christed Man, Jesus, when He walked the Americas after His resurrection,
went into the underground portion of the ceremonial level to receive a crystal waiting for him
there...yet he walked through the sealed door. The man Jesus had a purposeful link to the Hopi.
Before His incarnation into the body of Jesus, who was to merge with the Christ in that lifetime,
one of His incarnation had been among the Hopi. Thus He returned to be among them briefly
during His time with the peoples of the Americas. As to the crystal left for him in the deserted
city, that is a story of which all the parts cannot yet be told. It can be said that it was brought
down into elementation. It is the Archangel Stone. In the future, this crystal will play an
essential role in the struggle of good and evil above and on the Earth, for it will be desired by
Lucifer's Fallen, as a means to "capture the Light of the World." Yet it is the very crowning gem
(in essence) forsaken by Lucifer that is integrated with the Supreme Archangel, known to us as
the Christ.
Some of the Hopi after leaving the City of the Red Star, mixed with the Mayans, who were
actually part of the original People from which the Hopi descended as well. The story of the
Mayans, and their heritage from the Incala of Atlantis is another chapter unto itself, left for a
future issue, but from among the lost literature of the Mayans is the psalm-prayer of the Eagle
and the Crystal. It is a depiction of Jesus Christ, the "Eagle," or Great Winged-One, and the
Archangel Stone. An excerpt from this psalm-prayer:
"From the tips of the wings of the Eagle, there came the sinews of Light, stretching
forth into the grey dawn. Came He down above the field of the Earth, descending to the pinnacle
of the mountain summit of the Holy. There did the Great Winged One suspend His flight and
come to rest upon the stony terrace. The People saw Him in great wonder, and He came in fire,
for His nostrils were like blazing suns and His eyes the brilliance of molten stone. He was
fearful to them, with the roaring of beasts about Him.. He stirred the winds to whip the ground
in fury, and caused the body to ache and feel coldness and heat together as one. The People sent
up a terrible cry of anguish, and as they did so, the roaring beasts and winds ceased, the spirits
were cast from their bodies and there came a calm presence among them. The Great Winged
One changed before their gaze. From the midst of the fire came golden water, bathing the Eagle
in matzma.* From the center of the Light, soothing sounds issued, and in the midst of this
Paradise, there was seen a Being emerge from the Eagle's breast. The Being was of a man's form
and His face was of a man's face. His countenance was fair. His skin a golden-white, the
paleness of the Water Flower. His hair was unbound, yet He was of royal bearing. ** His chin
was bearded in the style of the Hermit.*** In His hand He carried a large crystal, clear as the
Harvest Star, yet as He moved it about, so there appeared a change in the crystals' light, and it
was seen to posses many colors, as a rainbow appears upon a clear sky."
[asterisks for the above excerpt: *"matzma" is a special ceremony ritual of baptism, to renew the
Earth's bounty through the anointing with water of people or animals.
** *Among the Maya at that time, any man who's hair was not bound in the ceremonial style, was
not of the elite, or royalty. The elite were those whose Sight was still with them, and who could
thus lead the people in the Spirit Ways.
***
**(Only a hermit-type of personage, a sage living away from the Mayan populace, wore beards.)]
From the "Book of the Hopi" concerning the Hopi initiation ceremonies:
"The one who selects the single stick painted red is designated to impersonate Masaw, the deity
of the Nadir and underworld. Dressing in their costumes, they get ready to go to Hawiovi Kiva.
"It is now nearly midnight. The kiva is dark save for the faintly reflected glow of the fire
burning in the fire-pit. In its dim light the initiates massed on the raised level watch a priest
ritually remove the plug from the little round hole in the floor of the altar level-the sipapuni, the
symbolic place of Emergence. Now as the seven Pleiades, symbolic of the seven universes,
followed by the three stars in Orion's Belt, rise into his view through the ladder opening above,
he recounts to them man's journey on his Road of Life through the successive seven world that
comprise each of the seven universes."
The initiates are symbolically taken through each of the three previous worlds, to the Fourth
World. The Third World is represented by the kiva in which they sit, while the Fourth World is
symbolized by the world outside the kiva, which can only be reached by ascending the ladder.
The Archangel Stone contains the Christ Nova of energy focused within an elementalized
crystalline power source. Jesus' body/soul complex was/is also an elementalized focus for this
power, and through the crystalline composites of the human body, so He could radiate His being
as a crystal of Light. The focalized power of the Son of Man (Jesus of Nazareth) merged with
the divine Logos of the Universe, the Son of God(Christ), created a unique presence within the
frailty of a biological entity that was more powerful in pure potential than all the thermonuclear
weaponry this world can muster.
The actual transformation of the body of Jesus Christ in the tomb, from a death state to the pure
gem radiated body of Living Flesh and Light, was accomplished through a process of nuclear
fusion. This process was controlled to execute the scorched image of His form upon the delicate
linen fabric of the shroud. As the nova burst of energy within the body of Jesus transformed His
molecular structure into Light, passing through the burial cloth, it left its mark upon the surface
of the fibers. This metamorphosis was triggered by a kinetic beam from a Ship of Light
hovering over the tomb. The beam passed through the stone that plugged the tomb (just as the
resurrected Christ was later to pass through the stone that sealed the entrance to the City of the
Red Star) and as the kinetic beam interacted with the stone, so the lattices of its micro-structure
were changed to an amethyst crystal in a state of rarified elementation. Within the tomb, the
beam struck the shrouded body of the Master, dissolving the seal placed about the body at the
time of death. This stirred the process of transformation within the body.
The scientific team studying and analyzing the Shroud of Turin seem to have drawn some similar
conclusions, although lacking the more metaphysical aspects. From "The Shroud of Turin- The
Burial Cloth of Jesus Christ?" by Jan Wilson:
"...the impression is inescapable that, rather than a substance, some kind of force seems to have
been responsible for the image... The idea then, of some thermonuclear flash being the force in
question is obviously more than idle speculation... Thermalchemist, Ray Rogers of los Alamos
Scientific Laboratory, very active at the recent testing (of the shroud), said very much the same
thing, using these words, 'flash photolysis' and speaking of a mere millisecond of time."
It should be realized that all that has been discussed in this issue-lesson up to this point are
pieces of a magnificent Divine Plan for the Earth, integrating into the furthest reaches of
humanity through epochs of historical karma. The resurrection of the Christ from the tomb of
death was a living re-enactment of a sacred ceremony. Like the Hopi, Jesus passed through the
stages of the Inner Mysteries as he transcended the "death" of the Third World and exited the
sipapuni, emerging into the Fourth Domain of Eternal Life. As of the Master's journey into the
central Earth during the period of his suspension of life(death), while His physical form lay in
the cavern chamber, I refer you to issue #4-80 of "The Source." As I quoted in that issue, from
the television motion picture, "Jesus of Nazareth:"
"I went down into the cities of the earth unto the people of the past."
[upon hearing this line spoken again, I find it should be countries of the past.]
We find similar enactments of the Inner Mysteries initiations in the use of the "stone box" within
the pyramid of Giza, which, in addition to being a tool for many scientific uses, was also the
sacred resonating chamber in initiatory services. Jesus' enactment of the Inner Mysteries was
part of the entire pageantry of Mysteries to which the human element on this planet is
committed. Jesus, as bearer of the Christ, dipped His soul into the whole Vision, carrying like a
cross of Light and Blood, the burden of the World through the ultimate initiations of Pain and
Sorrow. The Inner Mysteries were the pinnacle of this ritual assumed for us by the Christ made
flesh.
From Corinne Heline's "The Mystery of the Christos":
"Christ is not only Lord of the Earth but also the spiritual Ruler of the Sun and the great
Hierophant of the Christian Church. Mankind is just beginning to realize something of the
tremendous power emanating through the radiation of the physical Sun and how the earth can be
transformed by means of energy. It will be the new Aquarian Race man who will receive and
transmit the spiritual radiations of the Sun.
"From the cross on Golgotha He passed into the heart of the earth, there to become its indwelling
Planetary Spirit and Lord of all created beings, both within and without the earthly sphere.”
From my unpublished manuscript, "Christ in the Earth" (written in the early 1970's):
"Jesus wrote in His own accountings (lost to history), 'Through my spirit all shall pass.' Through
Jesus' physical death, He relieved universal pressures that had built because of the unspiritual
conditions prevailing upon the Earth in that time. The perfected Christ was amidst a worldly
degradation from spiritual awareness. Because of this, His positive force (stronger than any
force the Earth had ever before known) was straining against the void of ignorance (negative
condition).
"Jesus was truly 'the Light of the world," but in order for this Light to enter into the void, it had
to burst free from the pressures of physical existence. Only through a physical death, by the
letting of blood, could this be accomplished. The chemical structure of the man Jesus had
become, at the time of His baptism, the wheel in the synchronization of the universe. Actual
chemical reactions in the Earth were caused with His breathing and the pulsing of His heart. His
very blood held energies no other man has yet to possess.
"Because the world could receive the evolving of forces that had been created through the
awareness of souls (within the phases of Earth's evolution), and carried to perfection in the
vessel of one soul (Jesus), an act of physical release was necessary. The blood of Jesus...flowed
out from its vessel and into the Earth. 'This cup is the new testament in my blood: this do ye, as
oft as ye drink it, in remembrance of me."
In summary, we see the life of the Initiate Jesus was received of the Archangelic Host, the
Christ, at the time of baptism. Up to that moment, Jesus had assumed the role of personal
initiationship that each adept must wear as a robe of self-mastery on the transfiguration into
spirit. After the Christ, the Solar Logos of Divine Being, was impressed into the body, soul, and
aura of Jesus, the "Son of Man"—initiate of personal karma, became the "Son of God"-bearer of
the Impersonal Self. It was this Divine Man that underwent the final, Greater Mysteries, which
are climaxed in the Sacred Hollow of Self, prefixed by the hollow of the planetary sphere. This
was accomplished through both symbolic and physical enaction. The Jesus/Christ Manifest
which infused this planetary life wave in the Piscean Epoch, is the Logos or Archetypical pattern
that is for us, the A.D. generation of Aquarius, the Liberating Seal of the Archangel.
The drama of His passing on and in the Earth is not yet over, for the Archangel Stone remains.
The final chapter will unfold when the Battle of the Archangels, Christ and Lucifer, over the soul
of the Earth is brought into play through this most sacred of relics.
I recently received a message from my sources that on June 4, 1984, a subtle change in our
planetary time spectrum would occur. The actual moment this would take place was
10:20PM central time. To quote directly from the message:
This is a part of the acceleration of Earth through PHEA-3 toward LP-40, the point when the
entire frequency of the planet become aligned to the etheric body of its atoma (central sun). This
new phase in time (occurring on June 4th) will be in the form of a quantum leap from one time
synchroneity to another."
The message in its entirety was printed in the Hologram Supplement issued by the Light
Transport Foundation [306 Nat'l. Bank Bldg./Del Rio, Tx. 78840] prior to the June 4th date.
From "The Initiate," Thoth Hermes- STEPS TO MANIFESTING YOUR DESTINY
(1) Make a decision in your life- one that releases you from whatever bondage enslaves you. Re-
dedicate yourself to that dedication each day.
(2) Visualize, each day, what you wish to manifest in your life. Desire only that which will do
no harm or deprive another, yet serves you in your spiritual, mental, emotional, and physical
growth.
(3) Be receptive to divine guidance. Listen to the voice within, and act without hesitation upon
its command.
(4) Show respect for yourself in word and deed toward others, and in inward identification of the
being that is you.
(5) Always look forward, never linger in regret of the past. For your errings, seek earnest
forgiveness from God (within you), forgive yourself, forgive others who have transgressed
against you, and move on.
(6) Know that your success in manifesting your needs and desires depend upon only two
sources-yourself and the God-ness within. Do not depend upon others to bring good fortune to
you. Circulate your own favorable energies.
(7) Be happy. No temple was ever raised in sorrow. In order to bring forth substance from the
void, you must surrender to Joy and give it prominence in your life.
(8) Nothing is ever created, it is only transformed from one field of consciousness to another.
Thus, Manifestation is Transformation. Be ready to receive what you manifest, as it will
transform your life. if you are not prepared for the transformation, that which you have
manifested can defeat you. Flow with the new matrix, and you will receive liberation.
TWILIGHT OF THE GODS. by Michael Baran
"Twilight of the Gods explores the considerable evidence that a world-shaking catastrophe
occurred about 11,000B.C. presenting the author's intriguingly documented model of fiery,
worldwide cataclysm that submerged the Pacific island continent of Lemuria and devastated he
'sister' land in the Atlantic, Atlantis.
"An array of respected writers and theorists from the archaic-occult-phenomenologic field are
cited in the author's correlation of legend and science...Michael Baran's theory that inner-earth
gravitational-electromagnetic forces represent the key to the ancient and modern mysteries
receives a dramatic confirmation in his use of this same energy-model to convincingly explain
yet another genuine mystery - the 'phantom-leaf' phenomenon of kirlian photography.
"Michael Baran holds a doctor of medicine degree, has been mentioned in Who's Who, and has
contributed to leading scientific journals. he is the author of "Atlantis Reconsidered" and
"Insights into Prehistory."
Twilight of the Gods=$9.00 Atlantis Reconsidered= $6.00 Insights into Prehistory=$7.00

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 3-84
copyright © 1984 L.Christine Hayes
The following article appeared in the San Antonio Express, Friday, July 6, 1984:
"Immense arc of hot gases found near galaxy's center"
Washington (AP) - Astronomers announced Thursday that they have discovered a giant arc of
hot gases near the center of our Milky Way galaxy unlike anything previously seen
Researchers from the University of California at Los Angeles and Columbia University in New
York said the arc is billions of times larger than the sun and resembles a huge solar flare leaping
out into space.
The arc which rises straight up from the flat plane in which the galaxy and our solar system lie
before turning at a 90 degree angle, is more than 150 light years long, said the astronomers.
"It resembles a large solar flare in appearance, but the scale is billions of times larger," said Dr.
Mark Morris, an associate professor of astronomy at U.C.L.A.
A light year is the distance light travels in a year at 186,000 miles per second - about six trillion
miles. The Milky Way is a flat spiral of billions of stars that is 100,000 light years across and
between 1,000 and 2,000 light years thick.
Pictures of the structure produced from observations with radio telescopes show that it is
composed of many narrow, filament-like features that are each a few light years wide.
Morris, with Farhad Yusef-Zadeh and Don Chance of Columbia discovered the structure in
observations made with the Very Large Array radio telescope assembly located in New Mexico
Morris said no one knows how the arc is produced, but it could result from a warping of the
magnetic lines generated by the rotation of the galaxy.
While the galaxy's magnetic field is thought to lie in its flat plane, he said, the new structure
indicates there also may be a substantial "north - south" or vertical magnetic field with poles
much like those of the Earth, the sun and other stars.
"The evidence now available, especially the detailed shape of the structure, implies that the arc
of hot ionized gas is controlled by a magnetic field," Morris said.
The arc, which is located about 30,000 light years from the Earth, appears to arise from an area
about 100 light years from the galactic center, he said.
Using the VLA, other astronomers recently discovered three S-shaped clouds of hot gas spiraling
around a dense object at the center of the galaxy. But there is disagreement on whether these
clouds are being pulled into the center or being pushed out from it.
Morris said there appears to be no obvious connection between the giant arc and the smaller
structures nearer the center, "but there may be some relationship we don't see because we are
looking at very different scales."
The news article released on the preceding page especially excited me, for on 1969, in a
manuscript entitled "Universe One," I wrote about what I was given to call at that time, "the
Nebula Strain." I defined it as, "A surging power flowing on the pulse beat of the universe…..it is
a current beyond what we know as magnetic, flowing through the universe in arc fashion…..it
keeps the planes (dimensional states) in harmony by drawing in certain energies and creating*
new ones when needed...the Strain does not exist in all planes, only in the ones in its path, as it
flings itself outward from the central point. However, its influence reaches to all points of the
universe. It is the guardian of all universal law...it is not immobile in the universe. It changes
course in its flowing motion. Our galaxy also is traveling through the universe and both are
drawing closer together. This will create changes on the earth..."
When I channeled and wrote the above, I was 20 years old. I had begun my receipt of
information via the Recording Crystals of the Earth two years before. I was therefore still a
novice in the art of synchronizing words to pure thought-energy. For instance, the word,
"creating" used in the above material (see asterisk) should really be more appropriate as "re-
creating" or "transforming," as nothing in the universe is "created" from nothing - all is
transformation since the Beginning Time, when the Creation Matrices were begun. Yet from
another perspective, any re-organization of energy or being is a new creation, in that it is new in
its form.
In 1984, when I read the news release on the arc of hot gases coming from the center of our
galaxy, "unlike anything previously seen," there was little doubt in my mind but that the "Nebula
Strain" had finally reached the Milky Way 15 years after I wrote about it in Universe One. Upon
checking with my sources, they confirmed this. Our astronomers believe they have only now
discovered the existence of something that has "always" been there. They do not realize that it
recently penetrated the dimensional state in which the physical reality of our galaxy exists. My
sources concur, saying that it entered the Milky Way with the time adjustment that was made
June 4th, 1984 (see issue #2-84). The following is present information given to me by my
sources concerning the arc [asterisk means see glossary following material on this subject]:
The Chariot, or Great Strain, is an inter-dimensional energy arc containing the logos* of the
Creation Matrices of the universe from the Divine Source. It is an imprinting force, directed
toward those galactic states which attract it through divine eminence, which is the factor of
spiritual emission coming from sentient sources. This divine eminence impels the Archetypes*
of creation toward a unifying translocation* of energy and form. This is the essence of the Law
of Reunification, directed through astro-chemical imprinting and logos transfer through time and
space.
The penetration of the Great Strain through into the ovela (center) of the Milky Way galaxy is
the moment of creation/conception re-enacted on the universal scale. It is much more than
symbolic. It is supreme archetypifying*, beyond cause (archetype) and effect (prototypical
duplication), for it bypasses the central mode of perpetual duplication that results in progressive
entropy (increased disorder), and instead, re-creates antethetic* paragrams* through its mutual
internal systems.
Thus, the Great Strain redesigns itself to face-link* with its decaying or entropic particles
(substance forms, ie. sentiently controlled fields of matter and spirit that we know as our
reality). This new logo identification is not digressive. As old becomes new, the prototype
cannot identify the old logos in its new form, and consequently will not repel it. It is the
repelling factor, where continued association with old creation matrices causes the prototypes to
slowly repel the kinship with its matrices, just as souls are repelled by burdensome karma; that
results in entropy. In its new form, logos can now link with prototype, for it is no longer in
repligender* with the prototype. It is much like a family tree, in which the relations must protect
the genetic strain by rejecting intermarriage within their family. Should the strain be re-born into
a new genetic pattern, then those once-related are removed from close kinship. Yet what we are
discussing here is not complete transformation. The process is termed "auto-genesis"-advancing
design forms through a condition of time expansion, relative to the cognitive factors involved.
So the change is analogous to moving a rail car forward several positions rather than switching it
to another train entirely. In its advanced state, although in a different position in the procession
of rail cars, it is still on the same track, being pulled by the dame engine. Back in step with our
picture of the family tree, we have not entirely removed our relations from kinship, instead re-
positioning them to far removed cousins instead of the immediate family. One could also view
this transfer or advancement as a spiral through time, in which the archetype is advanced in form
to the same point above its old form on the spiral.
It is important to realize that when it is stated that the Great Strain bypasses the central mode of
perpetual duplication, this means that the Strain breaks what we consider an immutable law..that
cause must come before effect. A new and advanced logos interacting with our "old" reality is
an effect of our future changing its own cause, which is our present. From another perception
,any archetype is the cause of some future effect. Any future effect that streams from our time-
reality is part of our whole event consciousness, and thus part of our effect continuum. And so
we see the cause/archetype proceeding from the effect/our present reality. Through this process,
the set quantums of time have been eluded, and the seals of entropy are broken, releasing
centropy* from the cosmic chrysalis. The Archetypes of our being will have become the last
movements of the scoring as well as the first. The symphony cannot be unified in scale if the
last movement in the scoring is always an uneven beat or fraction of wholeness. One more beat
must always be added to compensate. This is the essence of entropy a breakdown of original
form; a digression of the prototype as it becomes, through disassociation, less and less like its
archetype.
―
Time is a circle. As we leave behind the old Archetypes within the logos of our creation, so we
break down our image structures, causing decay. But we must reach a point, through the Law of
Reunification, where we begin to take up the memory particles of the old Archetypes and project
them into our future. Since any projection into the future advances the form projected along its
own continuum, the old body for our Creation Matrix of the beginning Time in shall we say,
"spirit." The Archetypes changing from old to new are liken unto an incarnating soul discarding
one body for another. Thus the new Archetype is still the old in spirit, and part of the same
continuum of creation that spawned us, and is awaiting our "return" in the future. It is at this
point, when we begin to recreate our Creation Matrices, that we start our centrifying. it is the
first winged step in our return to the Homeward Light.
-
The presence of the Great Archetypifying Strain in this galaxy will bring about on this planet a
greater degree of archetypification among us – in how we see each other and how we view
ourselves. It will cause us to receive and disseminate information in a more advanced degree..
This element will bring greater division between good and evil on the planet as those so inclined
toward the Light will advance further into it, and those on the edge of Darkness will be eclipsed
by that Darkness. This polarizing of forces will be accelerated by our advanced archetypifying,
as knowledge will become more accessible and more easily controlled. This will give power to
the Dark as well as to the Light forces.
The 1984 information given to me on the Nebula Strain is os complex I am presenting a glossary
of terms used in this material. Some of the words can be found in our dictionaries and textbooks,
others are strictly those given to me by EQUIUS, the Seat of language translation within the
Central Earth, who determine the closest parallel of meanings between our words and those of
both UT (ultraterrestrial) and IT (innerterrestrial). In addition, they often create new words -
especially when dealing with sciences of which we have no knowledge, and therefore no
comparable definition. The words in this glossary that are given to me by EQUIUS I have listed
with an "EQ" in front of the definition. All other words given here are from our surface earth
vocabulary.
GLOSSARY FOR MATERIAL ON NEBULA (GREAT) STRAIN;
logos - While Webster's Dictionary lists "logos" under logotype," giving the definition "a
distinctive company signature, trademark"...the meaning as applied in the context of the Nebula
literature is closer to our biblical and ancient usage, being greek for "Word" (as in divine Word
of God)' After writing on the Great Strain, I began searching for a text that would lend a more
revelatory expression to the interpretation of "Logos," as the Word. I found far more than I had
anticipated within the pages of Corinne Heline's New Age Bible Interpretation, Old Testament -
Vol. II. In fact, the information given in this volume on Logos was so profoundly related to the
processes of the Logos in the Great Strain:
"The creative imagination, or feminine principle of the Logos, biblically referred to in the first
chapter of the Gospel of John as 'the Word,' is actually the focusing center of the rhythmic
emanations of the four creative Hierarchies of Fire, Air, Water, and Earth. The universe and all
its manifestations were created and are sustained in creation by the music of the spheres. it is to
be borne in mind that the great archangels referred to both in biblical and apocalyptic or
apocryphal literature are representatives of entire Hierarchies, each of which has its own
particular function in the spiritual universe.”
ARCHETYPE-[web] from the greek archos, first + typos, a mark. An original pattern or
model. Webster's also states "prototype," however, my sources use the word prototype as an
earthly second archetype of the First Principle Archetype of universal dimension. The prototype,
then, is first on earth but second in "heaven." In the Great Strain material, the words
"Archetype" and "Logos" are used almost interchangeably. This is due to their basic
interrelatedness as applied in this context. The Logos of Creation are impressed with the
Creation Archetypes. The Logos could be seen as the face or presentment of its internal parts,
the Archetype.
TRANSLOCATION - (EQ) Movement of force or from one space or dimension to another.
ARCHETYPIFYING - (EQ)
The process of identifying the powers of archetypes within the elements and designs in which
their images are mirrored, and then reinforcing the archetypical powers within these elements
and designs by projecting them through other states and qualities of bring.
ANTETHETIC - (EQ) A mode of theoretical possibilities taken to the exact quotient, preceding
an actuality or real-time event. It is the scale of calculations preceding its mode or unit of
measure.
PARAGRAM- (EQ) Visual and tonal image refinements of xgrams. XGRAMS are energy codes
or packages of cognitive directives created through the assimilation of various Earth and
solar/stellar processes. More information on paragrams and xgrams can be found in "Source"
issues #4-80 & #3-81. Antethetic paragrams are at the seat of the event reversal factor, ie, effect
preceding cause.
-
FACE-LINK (EQ) Matching or aligning the common reciprocals of one intelligence to
another. For further information on face-linking, see issue #4-81.
REPLI - GENDER - (EQ) A great deal would need to be written here to fully explain this term,
so I will simply skim the subject with its basic end-result: replication of karma-dharma modes of
expression and release through an energy xgramic composite that is an etheric duplicate to the
genetic system, actually designing and creating the genetic circuitry we each contain, according
to various factors within the karma and dharma of personal and world event structures.
CENTROPHY - (EQ) (also centropic, as the action of centropy) A focus of order in balance
with its essentiality and with the system defining its center of reference. For further information,
see introduction to "The Source Edition, Vol. I." introduction to the Rainbow catalog, and
beginning of "Source" issue #2-82.
***
*******
In the first age of the Lemurian Race, there existed on that continent in the Temple of Pure
Thought, a bell known as the Karma Bell. It was constructed of three large moonstone slabs,
resembling the ivories on a keyboard suspended vertically, side-by-side. In front of each of
these pieces was also suspended a long rod. When a person stood on a platform in front of the
bell, the energy of that individual's karma passed into rods, causing them to send a vibration out
against the moonstone slabs. Although the rods did not move and strike the pieces, their
vibration co-mingle with the element of the bell-keyboard creating tones of three chords. The
sound emitted was the tonal essence of the karma of the personage standing upon the platform
before the bell. After a moment, from behind the slabs, a temple priest would bring forth a
crystal containing the karma tone of that individual that had just "played" the Karma Bell. This
was the Time Crystal, which held in vibration all the karma, good or bad, of that personage. It
would echo through time as a bell ringing through eternity. Just as karma is not immutable, so
the Time Crystal is changeable. As the entity of that crystal changed his or her karma, the
crystal would turn in its timekeeping to record the change. The Time Crystal, then, was an
almost living testament of one entity's being on this earth. As that soul reincarnated, so his Time
Crystal followed the course of the new life in its karma journey through the cycles of living.
Only an elect number of souls in that Lemurian Age were brought before the Karma Bell. They
were those men and women whose karma was not yet tainted with the heavier burdens of earthly
existence. These souls were the Illuminaries of the Age, pure as could manifest upon the earth
plane in that time. Once their essences had been set as moving light into the frozen lattices of
the crystals, these crystals were then sequestered in places on the earth and guardianed by the
Keepers of Time. The Time Crystals of these illumined souls, would through the centuries, keep
a sacred link with the Earth, as their radiant presences remained bonded to our world. Although
the Time Crystal Illuminaries did have future incarnations into this realm (there were a few who
have not come again), they did so with great selection, never allowing their karma to become
defiled, for in turn, so would their Time Crystals lessen in brilliance, weakening the spiritual
aura of the planet. The Archangel Stone of the Christ (issue #2-84) is the Supreme Time Crystal.
The Karma Bell is no more on this earthly plane. It was shattered as those defiled stood before it
and demanded their tone to rise from the heavenly instrument. The discordant sound pierced the
hearts of angels as it crushed the winged bell like crystal shattering under the paw of the Beast.
This rare and enchanted bell was built by Prince Melchizedek, who brought the gift of the bell
and the knowledge of the stars from the Guardian planet, Venus. It was Melchizedek who
established the first and only true Melchizedek Order (issue #1-84). Through the Prince of
Light, Melchizedek, the Aton, the divine tone of the Solarius (creation rays of the universe - see
issue #4-83) was reveals to the Earth. Until this time, mankind, new to the physical realm, did
not see and experience the spectral and sonic divisions of color and sound, but instead received
them in a sense beyond the divided spectrum. To receive the Solarius Rays and the Atonic
Chords, was a revelation of knowledge. The Bible speaks of it in Genesis. Though the first man
and woman wanted for nothing, they were not content. They desired after knowledge; to know
from whence their bounty came and to become part of its power. Before they had allowed fate to
move them, whereas now they wished to move fate. Knowledge was therefore chosen over
wisdom. Once the Earth's souls entered into the devises of knowledge on their own accord, so
the Guardian planet sent its messenger, Melchizedek, a Prince of Light, to establish a Temple of
Knowledge and guide the humans of Earth into understanding the nature and quality of the
Solarius as they had been awakened to it through their own desires. It was another "Prince of
Light," Lucifer, who fallen from grace, tempted the innocent to the edge of the Light Forest
(Eden) as a means to achieve his own hand in the designs of power.
(Above is my drawing of the Karma Bell. I only attempted a sketch of its basic parts, as I could
not have done justice to the intricate and beautiful design of its casing.)
As eons were layered in filigree upon the rings of time, the Time Crystals traveled from Lemuria
to Atlantis. Several were shattered there by the desecrating priests who sought to overpower the
Melchizedek Order, taking the ocular power from the priestesses, and was part of their
mediumship, the Luciferian-serving male priests (not all the priests deserted the priestesses and
the true order) sought to destroy the Time Crystals. However, most of these sacred crystals
remained unharmed and were taken secretly out of Atlantis before her final hours, and into the
colony of Aegypt (Egypt). It was in this already ancient land that the struggle continued
between the Veil of Light and the Veil of Darkness. The Order of Melchizedek would
eventually surface again under that name, yet under male domination, in Jerusalem, but the true
Keepers of the original Order worked in hidden service throughout the world under various
titles. As the evil priesthood gained strength, so the secrecy of the Keepers grew, like the growth
of a jungle, about a delicate and rare flower budding beneath its tapestry. In Egypt, the Order of
Light was known as the ATON, and those who worked their black sorcery to serve power alone,
were the AMUN> Both Aton and Amun are Lemurian words. Aton is the divine sounding or
"Word" streaming from the Creation Rays of the Solarius. Amun originally meant "dust," but as
the Dark priests and priestesses chose this word for their identification, it came to mean, "to take
(or command) power from the Earth." Akhnaton, an initiate of Aton, was instructed by the
Divine Hierarchy to being Aton's Light to the surface once again. Akhnaton taught the true
meaning of Aton as the "Word." The solar disc in the heavens was merely revealed as a symbol
of the streaming life force of God
During the period of the Temple Beautiful in Egypt, the battling between followers of the Aton
path and the Amun was especially intense. It was not, for the most part, a battle of swords and
spears, although many an Aton priest or priestess was murdered while they slept. It was instead,
a fight of the mind and soul. Amun's initiates practiced the Black Arts, and used this as their
main power to gain a following. One of their ploys was the kidnaping of children and young
women. Especially gifted children, who were under the guidance of the Aton, were coveted prey
for the Amun. Once the youths were captured, or in some cases simply lured, brainwashing via
witchcraft was attempted, and was often successful on those so young and with minds yet to be
molded. Had these children been shown the truth of the Amun, most of them would have been
repulsed. Instead, illusion was given to the grim reality. Many young minds were snared in this
talismanic web of black magic, not to awaken to the quaking of reality until these unknowing
souls had already committed a great deal in the name of the Amun power. They were then a
prisoner of their own guilt. There is no greater bondage than the chains of guilt, to be wielded
by the emissaries of Darkness.
Through karmic impression and reincarnation, ancient Egypt continues to be a keyhole in which
all Aton/Amun keys may turn. Every day on this planet, souls serve the old karmic paths, many
take up the Aton and Amun masks they once wore, playing the scenes again, re-enacting the
battles of old.
When I was summoned by my sources to once again return to San Antonio, Texas, I was
informed that many Egyptian souls, both Aton and Amun, were collecting in the San
Antonio/Austin area, and many more would soon be filtering in from all over the world. They
are here because this region contains at this time, a karmic vibration in the planetary wave-length
that is suitable for the working out of this karma. It is also a region selected by the Hierarchy for
various future Light Programs.
Beginning on June 4th, 1984 (the day of the time quantum leap), an Atonic Pyramid of energy
and law was rayed over San Antonio/Austin area (the actual area is a bit larger than that). This
grid will serve as the power assembly for the new Light Programs to be established here in the
near future and will serve to further uproot the Amun vibration within the pyramid's perimeter.
While this region will certainly gain spiritual advantages from the projected work here, the Earth
will benefit as well. What is being done here, as with any place Light work of Hierarchal design
is accomplished, is for the entire planet.
There has been a new inter-dimensional craft designed and built in joint effort by PHOENIX-5
(ULTRATERRESTRIAL) and NOAH (inner-terrestrial) to avoid our world. Its first mission is
to build and maintain the Aton pyramid rays over the San Antonio/Austin area. This is just its
first appointment. This very unique Light craft will eventually work all over the planet. The
new Light craft travels mostly through dimension. Its shape is pyramidal, the point of it
somewhat rounded and the edges beveled. Its main function is an archetypifyer. Since all
projects of this world effort are given names of Equius identifiable to us, the pyra-ship is named
Xanadu, after the fabled pleasure palace of Kublai Khan. I was admittedly puzzled by the
choice, but when I questioned it, was asked to read about the pleasure palace of the Khan. I have
not yet been able to find literature in it
Via mental projection, I was shown the pyra-ship as it hovered over the city one night. Invisible
to actual sight or radar, it was stunning to my inward vision. I beheld a shining pyramid, lighted
like a triangle of stars, a Christmas tree in the sky. The most brilliant point was a diamond-
shaped cluster of crystals prisming some hidden light source. I was told that there were
matching clusters on the other three surfaces of the craft. They were composed of what they
called, "shuttle crystals." there were more shuttle crystals within the open vastness of the
underside of the ship. About the opening on the underside of the Light ship were coral-like
scallops. Further into this opening were lenses and the shuttle crystals in various formations. It
was far too complicated and advanced in technology for me to comprehend in one brief tour.
The rest of the pyra-ship contained compartments where technicians, scientists, and those skilled
in the special sacred science of archetypifying, performed their duties. Inside the ship there was
a soft diffused pink light, quite different from the natural white glow I had seen on other Light
ships. There seemed to be a profusion of light and delicate crystal beauty that made this ship
more of a "palace" than a craft. To understand the purpose of this pyra-ship, I refer you to the
definition of the word, "archetypifying" in the glossary of this issue.
The following is a review of an article by Hugh Cochrane, entitled, "The Astounding
Dimensions We Do Not See" (UFO REVIEW, No. 19). The review from which I am quoting
here is from the newsletter, "Psychic Pets" (Weddle Publications/22235 Parthenia St. Canoga
Park, Ca. 91304) (September 1984 issue):
"Mr. Cochran discussed the work of some East Coast researchers who propose that pattern-
fields exist for everything with a material identity, be that an element of nature, a rock, a dog,
man, a planet or even a universe...Furthermore, this ground Field fits into a larger universal
matrix which he calls the "Cosmic Background Field" or CBF lattice. it is the interaction
between these fields which is believed to cause phenomena of materialization and such changes
within these materializations as ill health and/or healing by readjustment of anomalies within
these fields."
Another excerpt in which archetypifying is evidenced, is from the HOLOGRAM Supplement,
August 1984 (light Transport Foundation/306 Nat'l Bldg./Del Rio, Tx. 788401):
"Because of our present time synchroneity we must re-define 'astral.' Astral can be considered a
formative state of electromagnetic-gravitational-mass deep within the earth. Physicists refer to a
category of this energy using the term, "gravitons." The term "crystal" must be conceptualized as
existing in various states of holographic projections for the purposes of this model - one device
being physical (as we commonly define the term). Once we can determine the inner earth crystal
state, a physical model can be constructed in order to project this energy into our current time
synchroneity. (Xanadu is just such a physical model-CH)
"Projection of this energy would retard fission/fusion reactions within a time warp. Another
positive aspect of this model would be the advancement of crystallization of our higher bodies,
using energy illustrated by the phantom-leaf phenomenon of kirlian photography, so our bio-
systems can begin to reduce aging, disease, and death."
**
***
Golden Lotus
A SPIRITUAL READING is given the seeker, using the sacred lotus plant as a symbolic path of
initiation into the Self.
THE ROOTS, bound deep in the earth, are analogous to the foundation of the numerical
cornerstone of the Temple—the mathematics of Light vibration, registering in the weave of
numerology.
THE STEMS, rushing upward, searching with the faith of blindness for the surest path to Light,
are the tarot an imagery long ago set before the questers of spirit, who stole insight from the
mystic branches of that alchemical tree.
So as the human soul opens to the Source of its creation, THE BLOSSOMS of the lotus unfold in
celebration of the sun. Upon every petal is inscribed a verse of life, of a strength that poured
itself into the whole. Thus, the Rune Stones tell us the unfolding energies of ourselves, each sign
a signal to our consciousness of the approaching dawn.
THE SKY above the lotus is crowned with the shining of the Heaven Speakers, the stars by
which our ancestors charted things seen and unseen. The voices of planets, speak in kind to the
soul lotus, reflecting in the waters of birth and death.
Using these tools of initiation-numerology, tarot, runes and astrology, the individual is given
his or her Archetypical energy patterns. These readings, given by Christine Hayes, are overlight
by the Illumined Initiate, Thoth Hermes. Please send full name at birth and birthdate. (Reading
is on cassette).
GOLDEN LOTUS READINGS-$50.00

# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 4-84
copyright © 1984 L.Christine Hayes
Using the ancient oracular rune stones (see issue #1-84), I developed a PROGRESSED
FUTURE WORLD SCAN. I began with the date of September 5th, 1984 (given to me by my
sources) and divided the progressive 13 years into 13 "Event Cycles," to correspond with 13
runes of self-transformation (the major runes within the 25 rune symbols). Each event cycle
contained 9 years. This comes to a total of 117 years, bringing a close to the Progressed Scan on
September 5th, 2101. Since, in numerology, a cycle in one's life is seen to be completed in 9
years, this format appeared acceptable. Interestingly, I also found that both dates (9/5/1984 and
9/5/2101) numerologically reduce to 9—and so does 117!
Next, I separated the 13 Cycle Runes from the rest of the runes, leaving only the Cycle Runes in
the rune bag. I then began to draw the Cycle Runes from the bag. One by one I put my hand
into the rune sack and accepted the one rune that was attracted to the magnetic field of my hand.
In this way, I drew the Cycle Runes in the following order:
1st Event Cycle (Sept. 1984 - Sept. 1993...NAUTHIZ (7) Constraint
2nd Event Cycle (Sept. 1993 - Sept. 2002)...ANSUZ) (3) Signals
3rd Event Cycle (Sept. 2002 - Sept. 2011)...URUZ (5) Strength
4th Event Cycle (Sept. 2011 - Sept. 2020)...DAGAZ (22) Breakthrough
5th Event Cycle (Sept. 2020 - Sept. 2029)...HAGALAZ (919) Disruption
6th Event Cycle (Sept. 2029 - Sept. 2038)...THURISAZ (21) Gateway
7th Event Cycle (Sept. 2038 - Sept. 2047)...OTHILA (4) Retreat
8th Event Cycle (Sept. 2047 - Sept. 2056)...BERKANA (16) Growth
9th Event Cycle (Sept. 2056 - Sept. 2065)...PERTH (reversed) (6) Initiation
10th Event Cycle (Sept. 2065 - Sept. 2074)...INGUZ (8) Fertility
11th Event Cycle (Sept.2074 - 2083)...EHWAZ (17) Movement
12th Event Cycle (Sept. 2083 - Sept. 2092)...RAIDO (reversed) (20) Journey
13th Event Cycle (Sept. 2092 - Sept. 2101)...KANO (14) Opening
Since these 13 Event Cycles are dealing with the entire planetary future for the next 117 years, I
cannot go into too much detail on my own interpretations. Thus, I will only touch on the main
aspects as I see them.
(Quotations in the following scan indicate passages from, "The Book of Runes" by Ralph Blum,
unless otherwise stated.)
For the 1st Event Cycle, the cycle rune drawn was NAUTHIZ, rune 7. It deals with the 9 years
beginning September 5th, 1984 and closing on September 4th, 1993. (Technically, the next cycle
begins on September 5th, but there is an overlap when dealing with such large scales.) This first
cycle will be a time of "constraint, necessity and pain" for the earth. We, as a world populace,
must learn during this period, to work with the limitations of others as well as those we bring
upon ourselves. There is a need for restraint, as world temperaments among leaders and the
politics of countries clash. It is a "time to pay off old debts, to restore if not harmony, at least
balance." Numerologically, the number 7 seeks answers. It is a vibration of retrospection and
inner analysis.
The 2nd Event Cycle was integrated with the cycle rune ANSUZ, number 3. This covers the time
from September 5th, 1993 through September 4th, 2002. The world at this point will enter a time
of receptivity. There will be an increase in communication and a deeper feeling among
individuals and nations to understand one another. A mental reciprocity will develop worldwide.
"A sense of new (world) family solidarity invests Ansuz." 3 carries the qualities of
manifestation and self-expression. It is a vibration of communication and creativity.
The 3rd Event Cycle was revealed in the rune URUZ, number 5. Here we are forewarned that
although the earth's peoples continue to grow from the new contacts of the previous cycle, we
will enter a "passage into darkness" as part of the cycle of perpetual renewal. There will be a
struggle of karmas upon the earth in the years 2002-2011, as many souls grapple to hold onto
that which is passing away, decaying even as they clasp it to them. Yet those aware of what is
truly taking place will "seek among the ashes and discover a new perspective and a new birth."
It will be a time in which we must learn to serve our fellow man as never before. In doing so, we
become a part of the universal synthesis. 5 is then umber of freedom and change.
For the 4th Event Cycle, DAGAZwas drawn. In rune 22 we are informed that the 2011 - 2020
cycle will be the time of a major breakthrough for the consciousness latitude of our planet. It
will be a "complete transformation in attitude-a 180-degree turn." Each citizen of earth will be
called upon to resurrect the nature of the Spiritual Warrior within them. While it will bring a
"major period of achievement and prosperity," we are warned "not to behave recklessly" in our
new enlightened life-style. We will not be given this Age of Light on a silver platter, but will
have to invest our efforts to gain it and strive diligently and joyfully to maintain it. 22 is a
master number. It is endowed with the promise of success. 22 is an ancient numerical symbol
for a circle, representing the Alpha and Omega. In the tarot it is ascribed to the Major Arcana of
"The Fool," which is the super-conscious. In "Numerology and the Divine Triangle," the scene
behind the figure of the Fool is described..."The white Sun is the universal radiant energy
eternally rising, for it can never reach its zenith. The mountains indicate attainment. They are
cold and uninteresting to many, but from their peaks melting snow feeds the streams and makes
the valley fertile. So, too, ancient wisdom will feed your consciousness and transform your life.
The 5th Event Cycle was displayed through rune 19, HAGLAZ. In the 2020-2029 cycle the
people of the world will feel the urge to break free from the plateau that they had reached in the
previous cycle. What had been transformation has become, through day-to-day living, tedium.
The soul's instinct is always to progress, to be released from the present into a future embrace.
No matter the comfort and beauty the present may extend to them, it is the future that offers
perpetual liberation toward the new, the unknown. Through this need to move on, so the souls
inhabiting the earth at that time will create their future. They will cause the gods to stir, and the
elemental powers will quake beneath them. Disruptive natural forces will align to the world
karma and a sudden quantum of power will surge through the planet like a giant wave from
humanity's tide. This will be caused by "a pressing need within the psyche to break free from
constricting identification with material reality and to experience the world of archetypal mind."
19 is numerologically reduced to 1, which is the vibration of yang, the sun or male principle.
This is a frequency of self-identification and re-molding of identity into a progressed and more
applicable form.
The 6th Event Cycle is carried by the cycle rune of THURISAZ, Rune 21 is the Gateway, thus
the 2029 - 2038 period will bring the world face to face with the Threshold between the little self
and the larger, Self of spirit. The earth's inhabitants will be asked to contemplate its past and
present before passing through that Threshold. 21 reduced, is 3, a number of good fortune. new
worlds open to the sesame of 21/3. it is a stirring vibration for change, in which the old must
make way for the new. 21 is the mystical number of the cosmic consciousness.
The 7th Event Cycle corresponds with rune 4, OTHILA, energy of the years 2038 - 2047. This
rune of Self-Transformation tells us that once the earth walkers pass through the Gateway, so
they become star walkers and must renounce the karmas of the material plane they are leaving
behind. This does not imply that the earth is to be abandoned as a sacred nature vessel, but
instead that the karma of the worldly planet as it is then understood must be cast aside. There
will be those souls who will not be able to achieve this, and will collect in karmic hot spots
around the globe. Those who do achieve mastery over their karmas will be commanded by time
and space to shed their cultural skins and be prepared to take up new raiments of Light. Like
monks of old, they will retreat into the cloisters of the earth, forsaking their worldly ties. 4
vibrates stability. It is the foursquare cornerstone that must be set in place before the Temple can
be built upon its golden mean.
The 8th Event Cycle was given to the rune, BERKANA, 16. In 2047 - 2056 earth's inhabitants
will be ready to grow in the new heaven and earth. Like a tender young tree, their souls will be
planted in fertile soil near the river's edge. A rune of rebirth, they will experience an infancy in
Light. From the womb of darkness, so they enter a world of radiance beyond our present
comprehension. There will still be upon the earth in that age, those laggards who cling to the
periphery of the New Eden, unable to deny the serpent its due. Those souls who do root
themselves firmly in the new earth will be novices to this experience and must remain humble to
its Law. "This rune is concerned with the power of influencing development and with the flow
of beings into their new forms." 16/7 is a vibration of awakenings.
The 9th Event Cycle is seen through the face of PERTH, a rune number 6. The years 2056 - 2065
will become for earth, a time of the Temple. As a planetary whole, more and more souls will
become initiates of the Self. This rune was displayed in reversed position, indicating that while
these souls will undergo initiation into hidden knowledge, they must not expect more than
destiny allows them to encounter. "When your inner being is shifting and reforming on a deep
level, patience, constancy and perseverance are called for." Number 6 vibrates harmony, truth
and justice. It balances the environment. It renders service, love, compassion, counseling,
healing, and creativity.
The 10th Event Cycle is bonded to the cycle rune of INGUZ, 8, Fertility and New Beginnings. In
2065 - 2074 the world will once again enter a new condition. "This rune is akin to the moon, to
yin, the intuitive energy with its urge toward harmonizing and adjusting in the sphere of personal
relationships. It embodies the need to share, the yearning to be desired, a search after
similarities." It would seem that as a unit, humankind will have reached a point where new
communications with one another must be established. However, unlike those taking place with
Event Cycle 2, this communion will be on a telepathic level. As we "fertilize the ground for our
own deliverance" so we must awaken our minds to a new rhythm of semantics—a wordless song.
8 is the number of power.
The 11th Event Cycle is governed by EHWAZ, THE 17TH RUNE. In 2074 - 2083 Movement and
Progress will be the planetary keywords. "...physical shifts, new dwelling places, new attitudes,
new life..." As a whole, the world will truly be on the path into the Sun of Divine
Consciousness. It will be no sudden leap this time, but a slow, progressive climb toward the
summit. The light Seekers will have long since left behind the vibratory plane of the laggards,
who must find a resolution to their undoing through another portal; and thus relieved of
surrounding negativity. The mind's true forces for good are stirred under this number reduction.
Ideas are ripened on the vine and the secrets of life are blossomed before the searchers of truth.
The 12th Event Cycle is witnessed in the 20th rune, RAIDO, reversed. This rune evidences one
more battle of good and evil before the closing cycle of this one Mega-Cycle of 117 years. 2083
- 2092 brings to the earth another phase of communication. This time it comes from the power
centers of the universe-the Logos of the Divine Source. Yet interference from Lucifer's dark star
will cause confusion, and bring about a disruption of the journey toward the Homeward light.
However, these blockages will be overcome. Raido tells us that opportunities will be re-routed,
"with union and reunion as the only abiding destinations. "20/2 carries the keynotes of
awareness, adaptability, and reconstruction. From "Numerology and the Divine Triangle:" "In
20, the God power, O, works through Vulcan, 2, to bring about the union of what appears, in the
physical form, to be separate parts-spirit and matter.
The 13th and final Event Cycle of the Mega-Cycle, is addressed in the cycle rune KANO, 14.
Within the last nine years given in this 117 year scan—from September 5th, 2092 up to
September 5th, 2101-the torch will be lit upon a new summit in world history. man will see
himself as the center of his universe. It will not be an ego sight, but as a natural understanding of
divine accomplishment. He will then be opened to the radiant ands limitless forces of the
universe. Mankind of planet earth will at last be free to "receive, yo know the joy of non-
attached giving." The correspondence for 14/5 in "Numerology and the Divine Triangle:" The
things of the earth (4) must be understood as manifestations of pure energy (1)." There will be a
testing for earth's souls under this number vibration-one more measure of worthiness. Those
that are tempered under the flame will arise Phoenix-graced for flight into the Mega-Cycle.
You may order Ralph Blum's "The Book of Runes" from: The Rune Works
P.O. Box 24084
Los Angeles, Ca. 90024
Excerpted from "The Book of Runes:"
"The motto for the Runes could be the same words that were carved above the gate of the Oracle
at Delphi: KNOW THYSELF. The Runes are a teacher. Yet for some it may be more
comfortable to approach the Runes in a spirit of play. Oracles are sacred games, instruments for
serious or high play, and the value of play is that it frees us from the effort of learning, frees us
to learn as children learn. "The Book of Runes" is offered as a primer for oracular play.
"The praying voices of the Old Ones are silent. Three hundred years have passed. No doubt
those voices have whispered to others as they whispered to me. We must be content with
whispers, honor our own natures and trust the Knowing Self within."
"The Runes are a major blessing, a gift from the Knowing Self that is our beginning and our
destination. A talisman for our journey and a tool for self-counseling, the Runes speak to each
of us according to our ability to hear. As available as we are accessible, truly democratic, they
are an agency of the process by which we grow in clarity, in stillness, in being at one with the
Self. To that end one single question, a simple prayer, will always suffice: SHOW ME WHAT I
NEED TO KNOW FOR MY LIFE NOW."
From the Center For Shamanic Studies Newsletter, Fall 1984 Edition:
"During the summer Michael (Harner - author of "The Way of the Shaman") spoke on
shamanism at the Academy of Sciences of the USSR in Moscow, at the invitation of the Institute
of Ethnography of the Academy. The response was enthusiastic, with the question and answer
period extending for an hour and a half after his lecture. The turnout was the largest the Institute
had had for a foreign visitor in four years. Officials from health branches of the Soviet
government were among those present, and several expressed interest in the possible application
of certain shamanic methods in the drug-free treatment of public health problems, especially
alcoholism.
"The visit, co-sponsored by the Center for Shamanic Studies and the Soviet-American Exchange
Program of Esalen Institute, included productive discussions with Academy anthropologists
specializing in Siberian and Central Asian shamanism, and the exchange of research information.
Plans were made for future conferences and exchanges, and interest was shown by one major
Soviet magazine in translating and publishing portions of, "The Way of the Shaman."
The CSS Newsletter is sent without charge to those on their mailing list:
Center for Shamanic Studies/Box 673 Belden Station/ Norwalk, Ct. 06852
A letter to President Reagan by a young child:
"Dear President Reagan,
...I know you are probably proud of man's knowledge, but man's knowledge is destroying the
Earth and the Earth doesn't belong to man. If we get into a war, I'm not just worried about me
and my family or people. If we want to destroy ourselves, we should do it without destroying
Nature. When I think about the way people treat the Earth and the way animals treat the Earth, I
find a big difference...Mickey from "Transnational Perspectives" (published in Sweden). Sent
to TP by Vivienne Verdon-Roe, Editor of Spirals.
Concerning the name, Xanadu, given to the pyra-ship discussed in the issue #3-84 of "The
Source," subscriber Theodora Duncan writes to "The Source:"
"You request information re: Xanadu. It is a Mongolian word meaning JOY. it was mistakenly
called a Pleasure Palace by historians and laggards, but in actual fact was a beautiful Temple
Retreat for Khublai Khan to meditate in, as he was a devout Buddhist who got his illumination at
about age 60...Khublai Khan, as you may know, fostered all religions in his country, and asked
Marco Polo to ask the Roman Pope to send him ten best Christian scholars so they could debate
the other religious teachers, but none arrived. Marco did his best, but the Buddhist faith won
heart, no wonder, since Khublai was fresh from his victories in Tibet.
In a recent visit with me, Theodora Duncan introduced me to a beautifully inspiring cassette tape
entitled, Himalayan Bells II. Side 1. is "The Way to Potala" and side 2. is called "From Potala
to the World Below." This tape is available from the TIBET SHOP 1807 Polk St. San
Francisco, Ca. 94109, for $9.00(postage included).
REALITY OF THE LIGHT part I. is an absorbing and beautifully inter-related book by Rev.
Dorothy Leon of Anchor of Golden Light. It deals with the archetypical condensation of Light
and its integration with spirit-matter-man. Scriptural passages and doctrines are revealed as the
source for the "Seven Step Process for Letting There Be Light."...An excellent study and
reference guide for the meta-spiritual student. Unfortunately, I am unable to find a price listed in
the book, so just send an SASE requesting info and price to:
Anchor Of Golden light / P.O. Box 451 / Grants Pass, Or. 97526
From the SACRED STRUGGLE NO. 1:
"Technocratic Man denies the existence of the Life-Force-'Orgone Energy.' He also denies that
when the Life-Force comes into contact with harmful kinds of radiation—such as that from
nuclear tests and nuclear reactors—it turns into its opposite -Deadly Orgone Radiation -DOR. At
this very moment DOR is increasing exponentially in the atmosphere and the oceans of our
planet……..The greying of the Earth as described by the Astronauts, is not being caused by 'normal'
pollution. It is a global symptom of DOR production which has got out of hand...from Holland
and Germany we hear that the current increasing rate of tree destruction is simply staggering!
For example: in mid-May 1984 hundreds of acres of trees had to be cut down because they were
decaying so fast that their wood would be economically valueless in a very short time. Yet only
a few months earlier, at the end of 1983, these same trees had been inspected and classed as
reasonably healthy...DOR kills trees from the top downwards and from the bark inwards. many
photos of dying trees show that they are being killed off by DOR. Actual inspection of the bark
shows a blackishness developing on the topside of the branches-leading to a gradual
disintegration of the bark which is the skin of the tree. There is no chemical which can prevent
this from happening. The process cannot be stopped by conventional means. trees by nature
draw the Life-Force or Orgone Energy toward themselves. But once these natural streams of
Orgone Energy become infected with DOR the trees become ready victims of this Killer
Force…..'The taking apart of the center in the atom is an obscene achievement which has nothing
to do with life. It is life-destroying and therefore inexcusable. At this point, it is valid for higher
intelligence to intervene.' - Sir George Trevelyan. In view of the terrifying DOR-factor-which
has been caused by Technocratic Man's splitting the atom-these words would seem to be
among the truest ever spoken." -Michael Tobin and Caroline Kuijper
In issue #1-80 of "The Source," the Culture-Rama, built beneath the Grand Canyon by the Tribes
of the Central Earth, is discussed in detail. To quote from that issue: "The basic purpose of the
Culture-Rama is the NOAH PROJECTION, a long range massive project to refurbish, revitalize
and regenerate the surface territory of this planet. It is an attempt to offset the portending cosmic
changes which wreak havoc on the unprepared surface dweller, and to subdue the increasing
self-destruction of the outer domain intelligence as they play out their karmic tragedies.. NOAH
will work on the synthesis of Outer and Inner Earth harmony, finding means to seed depleted
surface
forests with inner dwelling fish, fowl and mammals to provide sturdier, less mutated genetic
stock adaptable to the ultra changes that this planet as a whole faces in the near future as colossal
cosmic occurrences encroach on our protective ecosphere. Pollution reversal is also a main
concern to the scientists of the Culture-Rama. Decontamination techniques must be perfected
before much physical contact between the two life support environments can be safely realized.
In issue #1-81 of "The Source" Nosha Hovers-High Nature Devas (Spirits) collecting about
certain greatly evolved trees, are discussed: "it is a truly awesome sight to see such a light mist
enshrouding a majestic tree (in the inner earth). It is to these Hovers that the emissaries of the
Medicine Societies make pilgrimages in order to commune with the forces of Nature."
It is tragically ironic that we are destroying, on the surface of this planet, the very living oracles
and healers that can restore the earth. From an article in a recent newspaper entitled, "Amazing
Healing Powers of Trees:"
"Dr. Roger Ulrich studies patient records at a suburban hospital in Pennsylvania for the years
1972 to 1981. He found that those who had rooms with views of trees recovered from surgery
faster than those whose rooms did not face trees. Astonishingly, patients who had surgery to
remove gallstones required fewer doses of painkilling drugs, suffered fewer post-operative
problems and got out of the hospital one day sooner if they could look at trees through their
windows.
"Dr. Ulrich, a geographer, believes he'd find similar results no matter what dis-orders patients
suffered. Ulrich's discovery adds further documentation to the legends of American Indian tribes
which attributed curative power to trees. 'Indians in both North and South America have very
complex healing rituals involving trees, according to Dr. Howard Wynn-Hughes, an English
biologist currently studying plant life in the Central American jungles. 'They maintain that all
life is guided by spirits-plant as well as human. They believe that spirits that animate trees
have strong curative powers and they invoke them for illnesses.
"The legends of scores of tribes all over the Americas tell of miraculous healings brought about
through the intercession of tree spirits," Dr. Wynn-Hughes said. Indians suffering from illness
are carried into the forest and placed underneath the branches of the largest trees. The medicine
man then pays homage to the tree by dancing around it slowly, chanting praise for its majestic
height, its great beauty and the unlimited powers of its guiding spirit .He then describes the
patient's symptoms and calls upon the tree spirit to cure them. This rite is repeated every day
until the patient has recovered. I've witnessed this ceremony many times and in almost every
case recovery was total and rapid, with no other treatment being used."
"The belief that trees have spirits guiding them just as humans do is not peculiar to Indian tribes.
An English woodsman revealed last year that he regularly converses with tree spirits. Dusty
Miller claims that a gypsy boy taught him how to communicate with trees during World War II
when he was evacuated from war-torn London and lodged in a rural town bordered by a forest.
"One thing the gypsy taught me was that people are like horses with riders," Miller said. "We
are the horse and there is an invisible rider on our backs who has the reins in his hands and leads
us always and everywhere. he is sort of like a guardian angel. Trees have similar types of riders,
and we communicate to each other through these riders," Miller revealed.
"The fact that trees communicate with each other has already been established by U.S.
scientists..."we have definitely witnessed a form of communication in many dozens of trees,"
said Dr. Gordon Orians, a zoologist at the University of Washington. A Japanese electronic
expert, Dr. Ken Hashimoto makes an even more startling claim-he says a device he's invented
that eavesdrops on trees has revealed that plants not only talk to each other but actually sing and
can add and subtract." Phil Brennan


<!-- END FILE S84-04.md -->
