# Combined OCR Output

The SOURCE
Christie Hayes
The Source, Double Issues: 2 & 3-85
copyright © 1985 L.Christine Hayes
The Goddess
FROM THE SOURCE or Godhead of being our planetary consciousness was delivered. The
vibrating cells of atoms sustained in a fury of rapture, transcribed the geometry of space and time
within molecules of life. Crystal spirals, tranced in a psalm of cosmic mission, encanted the
Word, and thus began the Earth of the Goddess, rising from a plane of barrenness to breathe life,
grace and bounty into all of the natural world.
In the Beginning Age of the Earth, before the Adamic Race, there dwelt upon the planet Beings
of Light whose forms were radiant descriptions of celestial harmonics played upon the harp of
the Goddess or Nature Mind of Earth. The integration of Cosmic Creative Principle or Elohim
(masculine) and Creative Nature Mind (feminine) was an outpouring of new harmony within the
soul and Light body of each of these first Earth inhabitants who were our ancestors. This pre-
Adamic Race, which we shall call the Stellar Race, contained both negative and positive charge
of equal measure and thus were androgynous. Their pro-creation was a result of nuclear fusion.
As disastrous as this may sound, it must be understood that the Earth in that very distant age was
in a far more etheric condition. It contained a brilliant auric envelope or Infinity Mandala and an
ice crystal canopy encircling its atmosphere. Combined, this created the Light Forest. Within
the Light Forest, or Eden, all energy was in such complete harmony that combustion as we know
it was not possible. All light was created within a limited acceleration energy field that was not
capable of reaching atmospheric density. Nor were any of the physical elements in the bodies of
the Stellar Race, or the plants and animals then living, within a density capable of receiving a
destructive charge. On the entire planet, in those Days of Light, there was no entropy. All was
in a constant state of centropy, which is a focus of order in balance with its essentiality and with
the system defining its center of reference. Consequently, nuclear fusion was not then a
destructive power but a creative one. Instead of dis-organizing energy into chaos, a centropic
valency was reached within a new cosmic geometry focus, creating a new bonding, a new life
vehicle. This fusion birth was brought about through internal mind energy generated within the
individual and not between two of the same species. In the beginning this was also true of the
animals and flora of the planet, but as the souls of the Stellar Race began to create more
separatness in their cosmic geometry, and the Infinity Mandala or Doctrine of Signature for the
Earth was altered, the least complex on the scale of Light Mind, which was the Nature Kingdom,
began to divide its polarity into negative and positive vehicles. many animals and some plant
species while still within the Light Forest of that Beginning Time, already were polarizing into
two distinct sexes. Their androgynous force was sacrificed by the Stewards of the planet, the
Stellar Race, in order that the Stellars could continue their androgynous existence through this
justification of the force field. Because of the dividing of polarities in the Nature World there
was a balancing for a time of the entire Earth energy grid upon which the Stellar Race was
registered at the apex of the crystal helix pyramid. All of Earth's life forms including mankind
originated within the matrix and silica elementation of the crystal. As the Doctrine of Signature
for this crystal design shifted, so physical bodies began to become less orientated with the Divine
Compass. Gradually, instead of pointing toward the Golden Mean of centropy the Stellar's Light
bodies began shifting their point of reference toward the disorder of elemental infrequency.
Eventually the Stellar race was forced, through imbalance of its essential parts, to become
divided into two sexes. In the first period after this division sexual union was achieved via light
transport-the two parent beings merging their Light embodied forms in a nova of Light blending.
From this union still a form of nuclear fusion took place and a new being was brought forth, not
from a birth canal, but as a crystal frown in the ether and sunlight.
As the protective ether canopy disintegrated in gradual increments, because of the reversed
direction of the whole planet's atomic line (from centropic to entropic), the planet was vulnerable
to giant solar flares then active on our star-sun. This caused electrically charged atomic particles
to whip the surface of the Earth. This served as further deterioration of the Earth Light System.
As the Solar Winds dissipated the Stellars were left with the task of re-organizing their energy
to co-exist with a rapidly escalating state of chaos. They found they could no longer pro-create
through nuclear fusion, as the etheric envelope of the planet had disintegrated past the point of
radiance—the vibration of the Light Forest. They had been cast from Eden. The Stellar Race
now had no choice but to follow the only pro-creative direction sustained for them, that of the
purely biological intercourse. With what little Light transporting power was temporarily left to
them they began to alter their dimming Light bodies, adapting them to the new, lesser-state
atomic rotation of the matter world. The first man altered from the Stellar Race became the first
Adamic man. From his body the crystal DNA was drawn into a Stellar woman via Light
transport. It was from this genetic material that the first Adamic woman was actualized. Her
womb and birth canal were fashioned from "Adam's rib," or his harmonic helix. There is an acu-
point on the seventh rib of the male human that corresponds to the womb of the female, as it was
from this point that the past ages of nuclear fusion births were engendered.
IN THE AGE OF LEMURIA Adamic Man first entered the planetary consciousness. It was on
this now-submerged continent in the Pacific Ocean that mankind established the first civilization
inclusive of religious doctrine and governmental law. In the first of Lemuria's reign as the cradle
of humanity, the Garden Door between the two World Kingdoms of Man and Nature had long
been closed, save for a crack of Light filtering into the human existence. Yet even in the less
spiritually lighted world of Lemuria's first centuries the Earth was a vastly more beautiful reality
to its inhabitants than it is today. Communication between Man and Nature species was
accomplished by initiates of Nature and Mind Craft. As we have medical physicians today, so
Lemuria's peoples sought their Light Healers and Nature Shamans. The history of their Stellar
Race ancestors was known to all the peoples then and recorded in their sacred texts and vibrating
rings-holographic-sonic Light transport devises employed in the stead of the largely lost
biological ability to Light transport. The whole consciousness of the Empire of the One People
(Lemuria) was like a wheel, its spokes connected to a center axis of Spirit. This "Spirit-Life
Wheel" is embraced within the Tribes of the Central Earth as well. The Spirit Energy of this
vibrating center is the combined force of God-Cosmic and Goddess-Earth, Projecting as a
guardian archetype of the spiritualized man/woman.
It was at this juncture that the Lemurians raised their Supreme Temple. Physically it was located
at the center of the Empire. Spiritually it was in allegory, located between two Creation
Pillars—one containing the signs of Fire & Air, the other the symbols of Water and Earth.From
fire & air (ether) the sun-stars are forged. From water & earth the Labor of the Great Mother is
continuous. In that Age there was communion between Earth and other worlds of related
spiritual and genetic bonding. From Venus, Earth's Guardian planet (Venus is a viable world in
the higher dimensions) was given a doctrine to establish a means of spiritual receipt in the
Supreme Temple. This was an attempt by the Universal Brotherhood to recapture radiance on
the planet Earth. The Hierarchies of the Living Lights, through the Guardian Venus, sent the
emissary Melchizedek to Earth, where, in the Supreme Temple, he established the Order of
Melchizedek. Venusian oracles were also brought into the Temple from the Guardian planet.
These were all female, as it was known and taught by Melchizedek that the female among the
Race (Spirit Race) was the natural receptacle for high order knowledge in the Temple
homogeneity. The male was the natural organizer and director of the sacred knowledge received
through the priestess oracle. This occult law is evidenced in the tarot, seen in the major arcanum
as "The Lovers." In this arcanum the man is gazing into the eyes of the woman, while she is
focusing upon the angel Raphael, a messenger of the Hierarchy. In the spiritual understanding of
the times, each individual was seen to possess both the feminine/oracular and masculine/director
abilities, yet their sex determined the more prominent faculty. In Supreme Temple, in order that
this natural system for divination be utilized in perfect harmony, women assumed their natural
oracular role, while male priests were in command of organization and direction. Although the
original oracles were Venusian, selected Earthwomen became their predecessors.
Surrounding the Supreme Temple was an outer circle of chambers, the whole composing the
Hall of the Heaven Houses, or Zodiac. Each chamber in the circular building was a small temple
unto itself, expressing the Mysteries of one of the twelve zodiacal houses. Within each Heaven
House was established one oracular priestess and seven directive priests. As time progressed,
many of the priests became dissatisfied with their directive powers, wishing to assume the power
of Divine Receipt as well. The male human had largely been blocked from profound Divine
Receipt (greater than the lesser personal spiritual communion all humans may receive) because
in the Time of the Light Forest the male energy of the Stellar Race had taken part in the attempt
to reorganize the Hierarchal Thrones so that the archetypes could be altered to raise the
manifesting power of the Race. It was in this "Battle" against Divine Will that the Angel Lucifer
and his hosts of the Fallen Universe corrupted the power center. The male Stellars of Earth had
not intended to aid in corruption, but in their ignorance of the Divine Balance of Light and
Matter, they served as a foil for the Luciferians in this betrayal of the Divine Principle of
Integration. When the Hierarchies began the activity of Re-Integration by re-establishing the
power center, it was the female energy that brought the integrating forces together. It is from the
power center or Star Gate that the Earth's planetary consciousness is given forth from the
Thrones of the Living Lights. In order to accomplish Re-Integration the power center was
transferred to another spacial position in the heavens. This point of transference was organized
within the star Sirius in Canis Major. This has been discussed in issue #4-83 of THE SOURCE.
To briefly return to this material as a basis for what is given in this issue: 'THE Seat of Flame
(power center) was manifest as a brilliant sun-star, its median mark creating an equal arc
between the Seat of Rigel in Orion and the Seat of Alcyone in the Pleiades." With the corruption
of the Seat of Flame this center of power, or Star Gate was transferred to Sirius: "It (Sirius) is
actually two stars, as the greater Sirius has a lesser dwarf star rotating about it. In material
essence, the dwarf star contains the trapped energies of the lost calibrations expelled from the
rhythm of the Harmonics when the Seat of Flame was dislodged from the Throne of the
Gateway." Sirian power works to release trapped energies on this planet through often violent
action: "Yet there is the Sirian Light that still survives the ancient cosmic power struggles.
Beyond the walls in which turmoil wrestles to resurrect balance, abides the perfect Jewel of the
light bearer. High intelligences operate within this cocoon of brilliance. When the trapped
energies are all released and the lost pyra-codes restored to the Throne -Crown of the center-
point chakra between the Thronic Radiances of Orion and the Pleiades, then all the living lights
of the many governing Thrones under these two main centers of power can re-centralize their
balance point and from greater calibrations for the one Living Light.
The manifesting energy of Sirius acts through the constellation and zodiacal house of its old
position in the heavens, before it was corrupted and transferred into Canis major. This pre-
Luciferian location is in taurus. it is the old karma that we still must work through. it is also in
taurus that the goddess is the most profoundly linked to the sexual duplicity of mankind. thus it
followed suit that it was in the Taurean Heaven House in Lemuria that the corruption of the
Melchizedek Order began.
From the NEW AGE BIBLE INTERPRETATION, VOL.II..."Venus is the ruler of taurus... The
Venus trial is the trial by love: will the affection be prostituted to base the selfish ends or will
they be held high, sacred, and selflessly radiant?"
In the Taurean Heaven House encircling the Supreme Temple the defiled priests plotted the
usurpation of the oracular throne. Yet only a few priests were initially corrupted. Since their
numbers were few, their attempts would be futile unless they could recruit a greater number of
the priesthood. They sought the surest path to this end through the officiate priestesses of the
Temple who were not initiated as oracles. Most of these priestesses grew old in service to the
oracle caste never to attain Supreme Priestesshood, as their spirituality was not fully developed
for this most sacred service. So it was that many of the officiate priestesses were indoctrinated
by the defiled priests, working with them to bring down the female oracular regency of the
Supreme Temple. The priestesses who accepted the dark agreement with the defiled priests, so
that they too might share power and knowledge, recruited select women from outside the
Priesthood as well, promising them power and protection in turn. All the women who aligned
themselves with the defiled priests were in various degrees, knowledgeable of the Black Arts,
using this knowledge against the remaining uncorrupted priests primarily through the mis-use of
sexual energy. Eventually, the Lemurian Oracular Throne was overtaken by the defiled priests
and priestesses. The oracular priestesses were subsequently murdered and the remaining
uncorrupted officiates (with the exception of those who chose to die with the Supreme
Priestesshood) were relegated to minor roles as servants to the priests and their female
companions in darkness. The priests who remained loyal to the Throne of the Goddess met the
same fate as the oracular priestesses. There were a few uncorrupted priests and two Supreme
Priestesses who were able to escape the slaughter, fleeing to the Great Caverns from which they
descended into a cavern retreat of the Central Earth Tribes. This final tyranny occurred in the
last days of Lemuria. Both the Melchizedek Supreme Temple and the Lemurian continent
crumbled in the spasms of a Dying Age. In Atlantis, the Daughter Colony of Lemuria, the
Melchizedek Order was raised once again in its pure state. Yet as karmic cycles often repeat
themselves, it too was vanquished by the dark forces as the curtain of destruction fell upon the
face of the Lady of the Atlantic.
In both Lemuria and Atlantis the Melchizedek Temples were corrupted through men and women
unjustly seeking power by abusing the natural laws of polarities. These souls who took part and
are taking part in the abuse of the Goddess Principle, carry the karma of Taurean entropy. Yet
the Goddess remains vigilant as a centropic force still vibrant within the planet. In allegory, the
Goddess retreats into the most hidden grove of the forest and there she plants the staff of the
Cosmic God into the ground, setting free the fountain of knowledge from deep within the Earth.
This is the release of the centropic Taurean energy as it ascends the spiral of being. From the
hidden depths of the Earth Mysteries the ascended Taurean force carries upward Truth, Beauty
and Harmony to spiritualized the heart of cosmic man. The Song of the Goddess is the vibrating
hum of life sounded in the first Genesis of Earth. From BIBLE INTERPRETATION VOL II:
"This Taurean Mystery...is the Word that was God. The Word that was God in the beginning of
creation, and without which was not made anything that was made. (Taurus rules the larynx and
the throat)."
Thus from the same fountainhead rush two separate streams—that of the ascended Taurean
centropy, bright, beautiful and life-giving, a medium of love both sexual and spiritual; and the
degeneration of the entropic Taurean energy, that which is a decaying remnant of the corrupted
Seat of Flame.
With the closing of the Atlantean Queen's eyes in the eternal sleep beneath the sea, the ice
canopy about the Earth was greatly destroyed. Only a thin layer remained. It was in this period
that a new ether developed about the planet, one that created a doorway into multi-dimensional
realities. Although the world populace was fast losing its grasp on what remained of spiritual
awareness, there were many who could see between the pages of Light, space and time, even
though few of these souls could fully comprehend what they were witnessing. In this age the
Goddess Principle, in a comparatively primitive state, flourished. Once again the Melchizedek
was brought into the Sacred Mysteries, but this time kept veiled, with only select initiates
knowledgeable of its truths. (see issue #1-84) Through the Egyptian, Phonecian and Celtic Race
Spirits much was gained to restore the Garden Temples and release karmic stagnancy, yet this
age was short-lived. The doorway closed silently as the last of the ice canopy fled from the sky.
IN THIS PRESENT AGE we continue to bear the two-fold energies of Taurus within the
karmic/destiny weave of the planet. like the two horns of the bull, the Taurean energy serves the
Goddess by tearing away at the superficial, exposing the powerful command of Spirit. On the
ascended Taurean path this command or Word is given to us through a rush of enlightenment, as
the truth and beauty of the Goddess fills the vessel of the initiate like a chalice brimmed with
communal wine. For a woman who embraces the ascended Taurean energy, she is clothed in the
robes of the Goddess-the aura of Priestesship as a servant to the Throne of the Earth. her life
becomes a service to the equalizing of the positive/negative polarities in all manner of
manifestation, from the yin and yang of joy and sorrow to the spiritualized love between a man
and woman. Her duty is to harmonize, to usher Desire to the Seat of Spiritual At-One- Ment.
The woman initiate of the Taurean life need not bear that house in her natal chart, for here we
speak of universal attunement and not one's karmic space alone. However, if Taurus is in her
chart she is naturally more involved with that influence from a karmic perspective, either
positively or negatively, than she would otherwise be. The female serves of the ascended
Taurean Light are the Gateway to the Ancient Universal Attunement that is gratified in the
hidden recesses of the Earth, wherein the Temple consecrated to the Goddess is a living
threshold to the God-Christed Universe. In mass, these priestesses of Old who are now
incarnating once again to serve the Law of Re-Integration, are the Wave that must usher man to
return to a union of Grace with woman.
Also in embodiment at this time are the fallen priestess and those females from outside the
Temple who conspired with them in the Ancient Days. They form a web of the old weave of
entropic Taurean energy affixed to the plane of the lower desires. They re-assume their karmic
roles as usurpers of power in dominating the male polarity and manipulation of the man as the
dominant sex in our society. Souls who were once embodied as defiled priests also presently
inhabit this sphere. many of these are now incarnated as women. The female who lends herself
in this age to the Taurean entropy expresses the disintegration of energy through anger, the great
disrupter of order, and manipulation, with its conspirator deception. These entropic forces are
generally directed toward men, but also toward other women who are seen as threats to their
usurpation of power. Much of the old Black Arts are resurrected from past consciousness and
employed, usually subconsciously, in the present by the Taurean entropic female. No frogs legs
or eye of neut is needed to conjure sexual magic as a brew in which poison arrows are dipped
before aimed at the Achilles heel of the male animal. The woman of the entropic Taurean
energy is driven by her desire to overcome her secondary status in society and by a lust after the
power that men as natural directors of energy, possess.
The male in the Aquarian Age, can only interact with the Taurean energies of light and Decay
through the Feminine principle. he either becomes a part of the Goddess consciousness through
his harmonizing with women as a spiritual gender and the female essence within himself (as both
sexes contain the seed of the other within them), or he will be subject to the disintegrating of
false life forms as lower desires lead him into combat with the entropic Taurean females in a
battle for his freedom of self-government. The man involved in the entropy of Taurus can only
work through the female polarity. Consequently he must seek out women who he can
successfully dominate for this purpose.
After writing my material on the Goddess for this issue of THE SOURCE, I came across the
following information, excerpted from the book, THE SYMPHONY OF THE ZODIAC, by
Torkom Saraydarian:
"The Eye shining from the head of the constellation of Taurus is the transmitter of that cosmic
light which is called 'the penetrating Light of the Path.' I would call it the waiting eye, the 18ght
of which shines as a beacon on the stormy ocean of life and leads the planetary and solar
pilgrims toward the path on higher and higher spirals."
"The energy of Taurus is the energy of desire, desire toward manifestation. This energy turns
into aspiration and direction as man progresses on the path and becomes the one longing for his
Home. We are told that in Taurus—desire is transmuted into aspiration, darkness gives place to
light and illumination, the eye of the Bull is opened which is the spiritual third eye, or the 'single
eye' of the New Testament. 'If thine eye be single,' said the Christ, 'thy whole body shall be full
of light."
In 1983 I requested from my sources the birth date and time of Jesus Christ. They gave me this
information (April 24th, 15BC - 1:00am) but suggested that if I wished to work with it
astrologically (which was my intention) that I should have the baptismal date and time as well
(August 4th, 15AD) since the Master Initiate Jesus was "reborn" as the God-infused Man at His
baptism. Unable to do these charts myself, I published this information in #2-83 of THE
SOURCE, asking any astrologers among the readers to attempt charts based on these dates and
times. I received no response until May of 1985. At this time, the following material was sent to
me by Edward L. Nowak of Ft. Worth, Texas:
Dear Christine,
I have made an attempt to calculate the natal birth chart and the baptism chart from the
information you gave in "The Source." The chart was calculated from the "Time Traveler"
computer software by Matrix. It calculated natal charts from 4313 BC to approx. 2300AD to
within 1 degree accuracy.
...I have attempted a limited interpretation, but feel it is beyond my understanding at this time. It
is also difficult because the differences in astrological interpretations as well as the
consciousness of then and now.
A brief perspective:
1. Yod- This chart has two. This indicates that He had a destiny to fulfill. Some special
mission. The Yod is the "Finger of God," aspect in a chart. It also denies the full expression of
the personality so that the soul can manifest its purpose without too much interference. One of
the Yods points toward the Mid-heaven, the entry of spirit into matter. Anyone with a Yod is an
old Soul, much less two. The Yod is represented as the Hermit in the Tarot which is illumination
from within; 'the open hand.' The union with the higher mind. A Yod which is connected to a
node, when activated, indicates that a soul has come to a crossroads in his life. it calls for a
major decision. His was activated on His baptism by the transiting Sun in Leo (activation of
heart center), squaring the natal Sun(soul awareness) in Taurus (illumination). The natal Sun is
in direct opposition to the North node (point in Yod) in the 11th house, (house of the Master).
The natal Sun being the reaction point of the Yod. This triggered the trine to Pluto (masses) at
the mid-heaven (career-public life), in Virgo which rules service. This in turn squared the
ascendent which activated His soul purpose by triggering the 2nd Yod...and so it goes around the
chart.
2. Grand Trine in Air - Causes evolvement through solutions to mass problems. The Grand
Trine usually does not become active until the 30th year (baptism). You then become ready to
extend yourself internally.
3. Grand Cross - This indicates challenge. He certainly had his share of that. It also indicates
the crucifixion on the cross of matter. Symbolically for us, literally for Him. If freed from the
limitations of matter, the power to create its own divine self becomes evidently manifest. This
he did.
4. Six pointed star - Star of David. The attributes of power, wisdom, majesty, love, mercy, and
justice. It is also known as Solomon's Star. It means the beginning of a long line or tradition
favored by God. The two stars inverted upon each other stands for perfect balance of the
elements within one's soul. It is said that a physician could heal any illness if he could properly
apply the elements in the body. This He could do. it is the Philosopher's Stone. The six pointed
star appears as flowers in the 6 of cups in Tarot. It is also in the Hermit's lantern and is a flaming
star representing all the philosophies coming from the mystic center.
5. The 9 pointed star represents the gifts of the Spirit; wisdom, knowledge, faith, healing,
miracles, prophecy, discernment of spirits, tongues, interpretation of tongues. it is completion
and attainment.
6. The 13 pointed star - It has been stated that the thirteenth month was the one assigned to the
Solar Lord. it is also the connecting link to the mystic center. Christ was the 13th, with the 12
disciples around Him. 13 was His number.
It is symbolic of the Way, the Truth and the Light. The 5 pointed star opens at the top to reveal
the 13 pointed star. (see 'The Sign of the Dove' by Elizabeth Van Buren - also her books, 'Lord
of the Flame,' and "The Land of White Waters.')
His baptism also occurred at His "Saturn return," a most important time in anyone's life, the time
of maturing in a total sense. Also, Jupiter conjuncts the natal Saturn, indicating the attainment of
high office, but also indicating death in 'office.' Not unlike the Jupiter-Saturn conjunctions that
are in phase during the reign of a president who is assassinated or dies in office.
At the end of His life, around the fall of 18AD, Venus, Mercury, Sun, and Pluto were all
conjunct His natal ascendent, also conjuncting the natal Saturn. Pluto and Saturn both rule the
end of life, especially with Pluto in Scorpio, which also rules death, martyrdom, death of the
personality and transformation. The ascendent is the indicator of the Soul's purpose and thus His
was fulfilled. The Moon, Saturn, and the North Node, were all in Capricorn which rules
initiation, forming a Grand Trine with His natal Sun and Pluto. This Grand Trine imposed over
the natal Grand Trine forms a near perfect 6 pointed star. As above so below. Uranus is also
forming a grand Trine with His natal Neptune and Mars, thus activating the natal Grand Trine. It
is no wonder that His life is completed and attainment is achieved. For He did not become fully
enlightened and integrated until, while on the cross, He stated, "It is finished." (not His work,
but the last vestiges of the ego and self-will). Only then was His initiation complete.
...I do not know all of the major events in His life, but, I feel tjay this chart could very well
indicate the timing of such events.
His Pluto is in the 9th house. This most definitely indicates a desire to attain higher education,
travel for the reason of self-transformation, and spiritual attainments. This is a good placement
for it bestows a will guided by the Higher Self. This also shows that He had little tolerance for
hypocrisy and social injustice. This is also the position for the revolutionary. Here Pluto
indicates His interest in the regeneration of the legal, educational, moral, and philosophic
systems. this is manifested in an ability to perceive the fundamental causes of problems
connected to the larger social order. The intuition is highly developed, giving profound insight
into the future of humanity and its institutions. The capacity for spiritual leadership is more than
evident.
I point out this one planetary placement because it is the focus of His Yod, and it is also
connected to all the major patterns in the chart as well as 8 of the 10 planetary points. You must
also realize that any interpretation is done without a fully enlightened awareness, for who could
really 'know' the true and total story in this chart of Divine glory.
note: is it not interesting that as humanity seeks the return of the Christ at this time (at whatever
level), that Pluto is again in Scorpio? And, Saturn returns to Sagittarius in the fall of 1985, an
exact 2000 year cycle from the birth of Jesus! (And with the first appearance of Halley's comet!)
A "thank you!" to Edward Nowak for his precious information and interpretation.
THOTH HERMES - given on 5/29/85:
The CHRISTOS emancipated the Spirit of the Earth from great karmic trials through the Body
and Soul of the Master Initiate Joshua(Jesus). Without this release, the planetary 'heart' or
'atoma' would have burst as the pressures in that Age became too great. This Blessing that Christ
dies for our sins is seen by Christians as a moment in time—an act of sacrifice that is now a part
of history, yet which the faithful may draw upon in consciousness for personal liberty and
strength. This is so. Yet there is also the truth that time is only divided top divided minds.
Therefore the Life and death of Joshua Christ is even now occurring in the consciousness which
spawned it.
In Egypt, the Joshua Christ sealed away His living energy form or 'KA' within a layer of the
geometric griding of the great Pyramid. In the 2,000th year since His birth which is by your
calendar the year 1985, His KA will be released from the pyramidic code. Once this occurs, His
manifestation form, the KA, will link with the helix of perpetual time elementation—the law
being thus: All that is, all that manifests upon the event horizon, is still in the process of its
creation, existence death. The Joshua Christ KA will then be able to transmit to the Earth's
planetary wavelength the PURE POWER IN LIGHT of His Initiation which was given before
physically in His Birth, life, and Death. This is the first step in the actualization of the future
Earth Light World. it is also the first measure of distance set between that Light World and the
material world which is still very much with humanity. We have spoken to you before of the
TWO WORLDS which will come about on this Earth. One will gather Light as a mother eagle
collects her wings about the nest. The other will grow putrid and be as carrion for all manner of
prey. The year 1985 is the true 2,000 th "Year of our Lord." For Light Workers it is the year in
which they will dissolve old claims and stake new ones. For them, 1986 will be the year
2001―the first year within the new millennium. It will be the year of spiritual fulfillment but
also a time to begin building the City of Consciousness spoken of in 'REVELATIONS.'
2,000AD is the year the preparations of the Light Workers see fruition in a New Geometry for
the Light Planet. With 2001 (and for some within the year 2,000) the knowledges kept until this
time will be loosed to flood down from the apex into the waiting minds attuned to its coded
passages. In 2001 (1986) new forms will be evidenced to those Sighted, that have never been
witnessed before. More and more incarnated Servers in the light at this time will become part of
greater initiations and performances of service for the Earth on the inner-planes in spirit-body.
When their bodies sleep, they will travel to the Sacred Places and participate in ritual for the
New Geometry of the planet.
For the planetary masses, those who dwell in the material world and those who still remain in the
middle (but not for long) balanced on the line of demarcation, the year 2,000AD will not reach
them until the calendar tells them of its arrival. For them, physical upheaval will mark the
arrival of the new millennium, for they will have no other way of understanding its importance.
Only physical trauma can alert most of humanity to the change in geo-cosmic current. The
degree of severity in this physical activity will be determined by the mass planetary karma. Yet
for those in the Light—even with only a ray of this understanding upon them, they are now
living that Blessed YEAR OF OUR LORD. When Halley's comet presents its fire to the world
in the calendar year of 1986 it will trigger karmic actualization, finalizing the Christ KA's
mission on Earth and releasing Him from the planet to be on again with the physical body, soul,
and Christ Spirit of the Joshua Christ in His dwelling place on Faustia. Only then can the Way
be made for His physical return to Earth and His Supreme Act of raising the planet in its true
spiritual form to the level of Christed Consciousness.
During the period of time when the Christ KA is with the Earth (November 1985 - April 1986)
there will be a bidding for power by the Anti-Christ. The child will reach his 12th year in 1985
(the true 2,000AD) and become magical 13–the number of energy for both the Christ and
Lucifer, in 2986 (2001). The actual Luciferian force will be merged with the host in his 12th
year, but will not become empowered until his 13th birthday on September 4th (6:35pm -
Damascus, Syria). In his 13th year of life, the Luciferian empowered host will begin to seek the
Archangel Crystal-the coding for World Transformation. (see issue #2-84) Through various
channels and physical hosts, the Defending Archangel, Michael, will become the Spiritual
Warrior on Earth as He vies with Lucifer for the Crystal Coding. If the Archangel Michael
succeeds, the Dark Host will pass from Earth incarnation, breaking the bond in the physical with
Lucifer. If this break is realized, no new incarnation of the Anti-Christ could manifest in time
for the host to be of leadership age in the calendar year 2,000 when the karma of the world will
be at the feet of both Light and Darkness. The Defending Archangel's success or failure will be
determined by the shifting of planetary karma.
(Editor's Note: I was surprised that the place of birth given for the Anti-Christ was Syria instead
of Iran(Persia). Hermes informed me that astrologically it was necessary for him to be born in
Syria, but he would find his leadership vibration in Iran, and should he realize his full potential
on the planet, he would rule the material world from there.)
The above message given to me by Thoth Hermes speaks of Light Servers becoming part of
"greater initiations." During sleep time they will "travel to the Sacred Places and participate in
ritual for the New Geometry of the planet." I believe that is what the message A HOPI
PROPHESY or PROPHECY OF THE RAINBOW PEOPLE(Prophesies of Intertribal Societies
of the native American Indians collected by Grace Walking Stick and Ruby Morning Star) is
revealing in the following passages:
1986 - When Tagashala and the enlightened teachers begin to open the veil of the crack between
world. We will see our memory circles. All Kivas and sacred power spots will come alive in
1986 and be totally awakened. The inner room of the Great Pyramid will be opened. The order
of the Golden Dawn will have ceremonies there again for the first time in 20,000 years. The
Temple of the Sun in Palenque will be refurbished, reawakened and ceremonies will begin again.
No doubt there will be some participation on the physical plane, but the greater service will be in
'dream state.' According to the HOPI PROPHECY this will become a migration in
consciousness with the year 1987 (2002 true time accounting):
1987 - 144,000 Sun Dance enlightened teachers will totally awaken in their dream mindbodies.
They will begin to meet in their own feathered serpent or winged serpent wheels and become a
major force of the light to help the rest of humanity to dance their dream awake. A Sun Dance
teacher is any human being who has awakened, who has balanced their shields, who has gained
the dream mind-body and who honors all paths, all teachers, and all ways... This is a sacred
dance. That's what 1987 is about. That's a Sun dancer. You cannot say that you have the only
true way, for all ways are true. In 1987, 144,000 enlightened Souls will sit down in gathering
circles saying, "Here it is Brothers and Sisters. Openly, totally-Come and receive it."...On
August 17th, 1987 the various winged serpent wheels will begin to turn, to dance again and when
they do the Rainbow Lights will be seen in dreams all over the world and Those Rainbow Light
dreams will help awaken the rest of humanity.
For the year 1985 (2,000 in true time accounting) the HOPI PROPHECY speaks of contact "in a
very knowledgeable way with our ancestors from the stars." The Prophecy states that these
contacts will begin with the Pleiades and then form Sirius.
Joseph Jochmans gives in-depth information on the effect of Halley's comet on the planet in his
newsletter, 'MERRIE MAGI'S THE CRYSTAL PLANETWORKS'the (No. 3-June, 1985):
...Cometary bodies, as they approach the Sun and the Earth, bring with them strong influxes of
transformational energy. The key, however, is the choice humanity makes in directing these
incoming energies, creating either positive or negative patterns, for themselves and for the
planet. (the "New Geometry?"CH) When Halley's comet last flew by, in 1910, it reached
perhelion, or its closest approach to the Sun, in April 20, in Aries. This was the vibratory
signature or challenge of the comet...Now Halley's comet is coming back, and its new
challenging vibratory signature for the Earth. When the comet will be in perhelion, will occur at
3:50am (EST) on February 9, 1986, in Aquarius. Greatly accenting this, Halley's at that moment
will be conjunct with the Sun, New Moon, Mercury, Venus, and Jupiter! The challenge that is
going to be handed to us will be the opportunity to consciously direct the positive energies from
this conjunction, to usher in the first real influx of new Age consciousness and higher frequency
shift, for all of humanity, and for the Earth Mother's beginning crystalline transformation. A
power potential is given to us from which we may draw upon for the next 75 years, to bring very
real and significant positive changes to the entire world. But once again, if we do not take on
the active responsibility of positively focusing the cometary energies triggered in Aquarius, then
we are faced with another prospect. George Orwell, in his famous novel, "1984," created the
character, Big Brother, symbolizing the ultimate totalitarian control of all aspects of life,
including human thought. Big Brother, in this regards, is a perfect Aquarian, that is to say, he
personifies all the negative or lower vibrational qualities of the sign of Aquarius. If conscious
choice and direction of the higher Aquarian energies is not made, then we may very well be
subject to an intense period following February 9, 1986, of awesome, dominating totalitarian rule
in the world of both political and religious nature, which could last up to 75 years, or until
Halley's comet next appearance in the year 2061.
...(An) intense configuration will come on October 18 (1985), when the Sun will trine Halley's in
29 degrees Gemini, and semi-sextile Saturn, the Moon conjuncts Uranus in Sagittarius opposing
Halley's by 10 degrees, Jupiter is in weak sextile to Moon-Uranus, and Pluto and Neptune are
sextile. This planetary grouping further accentuates the need for energy receptors to take on the
responsibility of opening to their Higher Self and allowing it to manifest in their lives, to thus
allow the influx of higher Wisdom, and be open through meditation to channelings from the
cometary entities. Be aware, too, that this will be a time for the opening of all karmic closets,
bringing all hidden things to the surface, and the need for their release.
...As was discovered by such proponents of the science of pyramidology in the last century as
John Taylor and Charles Piazzi Smyth, there exists in prophetic time-line along the inner
structures of the (Great) Pyramid (of Giza), with the central axis following the floor of the
Ascending Passage, the Grand Gallery, the Antechamber and the King's Chamber. As one
measures along this floor line a year for each pyramid inch—a measurement inherent within the
Pyramid itself-one discovers that wall markers, entrances, junction points, hanging lintels and
doorways all delineate the dates of past events in the spiritual development of humanity since
10,000 B.C. and also looks forward to future dates when the evolution shall continue. The
leading authority on pyramidology today, Peter Lemesurier, in his book THE GREAT
PYRAMID DECODED (1977), offers the best critical evidence available as to the prophetic
timeline's accuracy to date, and also the most accurate measurements for the yet unfulfilled
portions of the time-line, extending as far as the 83rd century A.D. According to Lemesurier, the
first overhand in the Antechamber marks out upon the chamber floor the upcoming date of
November 30, 1985, and according to the stone type, floor angle and chamber dimensions, this
will be the time when, "powerful spiritual influences start to irradiate the enlightened." This will
be in preparation for the next date marked by the prophecy time-line, February 21, 1999, where
the Antechamber's granite floor begins that leads into the King's Chamber. At that time, writes
Lemesurier, there will be, "final establishment of the Kingdom of the spirit—a separate and
unique form of human society based solely on allegiance to the spiritual." Elsewhere,
Lemesurier notes, "In late 1985, spiritual or cosmic events will occur, calculated to bring
perfection to the very basis of reincarnating human life, through spiritual influences from above,
and an irruption of the eternal into the temporal sphere."
In issue #3-84 of THE SOURCE mention is made of the "Atonic Pyramid of energy and law
(that) was rayed over the San Antonio/Austin area" as well as the surrounding region, bordering
on Lampasas in the north, Uvalde on its western perimeter, Crystal City at the juncture between
the juncture of its southern and western border, with Cameron, Rockdale, and Halletsville along
its eastern border. "This grid will serve as the power assembly for the new Light Programs to be
established here in the near future..." I have since been informed that the 'capstone' of this
energy pyramid has been set over 'ATON-ONE' (SA/AUS) and 'ATON-TWO' (Grand Canyon),
where the inverted pyramid is stationed. These two pyramid pillars serve to anchor a grid-line
for the New Geometry forming over the North American continent. The center for this grid-line
or "Diving Rod" as it is referred to by Thoth, is a region in Arizona encompassing Sedona,
Flagstaff & Pine, including the Mogollon Plateau. While this area is not the physical center
between the two atonic pyra-pillars, it is a center-point in the New Geometry, affixed also to the
Medicine Wheel at Four Corners and the Trans-Medium Plateau of the Emerald Table (Mesa
Verde, Colorado). Three major links along this Diving Rod are Amistad, Texas, Carlsbad, N.M.
and just outside the central axis, Phoenix, Arizona. Thoth tells us that ATON-TWO holds a left
handed negative charge. Thoth Hermes: "We use the terms 'left and right-handed' as the human
hand plays a vital part in the interplay of energy points on the planet in this New Geometry and
with the initiates of these advanced forms. From birth, certain numbers of the Earth's populace
carry in their genetics a circuitry of the ALPHA-OMEGA integrated into the palms of their
hands and finger tips. The circuitry, until now, has largely been dormant (since the days of the
First Generation). Now in larger numbers of people (although still a small percentage at this
time) the 'Chana', as the Ancient Tribes call it, is being quickened. More and more people will
be born with unawakened Chana which will be quickened at the right time in their lives. Who
contains this circuitry in their genetics is determined by their own karmic cycles, but it will also
be possible for individuals not born with the circuitry to have it impressed within them through
strong transformational changes, according to their personal spiritual redress. For those with
quickened Chana, MANY DOORS WILL BE OPENED TO YOU IN THE FUTURE. The ten
fingertips are registers of the Ten Lost pyra-codes (see issue #3-83) when activated in Chana.
Understand that the human body is not only the temple, but the book, just as the monolithic
world temples are books in stone. The passages of the body are the verses of a flaming universal
script. Chana given to the hands ignites the flame of the eighth chakra, which is the central sun
of the human being, the atoma of life.
"Many of the actual doors of sacred inner Earth chambers are sealed with either the right or left
hand printed groove (see cover drawing of issue #2-84). Only a living hand quickened in Chana
can open these doors. But possessing quickened Chana is more than opening sealed doors-it is
the identification that will keep you from greater New Earth as the karmic planet falls away.
Now that the capstone is in place over the ATONS, ONE & TWO, an etheric double or KA of
the knowledge banks of the Great Pyramid of Giza is integrated, through the Aton capstone, with
Aton energy pyramids of North America. This will enable this continent to receive directly from
Ancient Culture Holders. Only those attuned through their own desire of spirit by the
TRIBELIGHT frequency (issue #3-83) will be in receipt. While this New Geometry is
beginning as described above, all sacred places on the North American continent will become
centers of these geometrices as the weave becomes more and more intricate. Thoth Hermes:
"The capstone or generating Yod is in place and it is now emanating the six pointed star
mantragram or "Star of David' on an opening and closing flux as it rotates at the same rate as the
hyper-atoms of the Pure Gem or perfected Light Body, which is in essence, the true Star of
David. The six pointed star configuration is the center of balance radiated from the manifesting
plane or progressed realization of humanity. From the Grand Canyon, emanating from the
inverted Light Pyramid, is the five pointed star or Pentacle. The Pentacle is the geometric wheel
of actualized thought forms, connecting and motivating initiatory phases within the human
element, integrating humanity's ascension with cosmic consciousness. Thus while the Star of
David projects Divine Awareness on its charges from the future, the Pentacle vivifies ancient
commitments of the human morale and reawakens them through dreams, images and visions
within the initiate, acting as a trigger to cosmic understanding of human conditions. These two
Flaming Stars are now integrating upon North America through the North American Indian Ray
Host (Pentacle) and the Egyptian-Hebrew Ray Host (Star of David). This uniting of the two
Thresholds to Wisdom has begun as a vortex for the fulfillment of Prophecy to take place in the
New Zion.
Combined, (6 + 5) the two geometrics form a Master Number 11. Numerologically, the word
"Light" vibrates to this number, and so does the word, 'Wisdom.'
***
Golden Age Communion...as given by Thoth Hermes
TRANSFORMED through Grace the Earth is my Chalice.
BOUND in Beauty my Spirit is given Wings.
STRENGTHENED by Sorrow my Heart is a Candle.
RESURRECTED, I am New Wine for the Table of the Lord.
FASTED from Darkness my Body is the Bread of the First and Last Supper.
I AM the Initiate, the Walker, who goes forth for Humanity.
I BECOME the Feast for a Golden Age, the sustenance through which this Generation may be
fulfilled.
TO THIS END, TO THIS BEGINNING, I dedicate my life.
The outer border of this horoscope is taken from the starmap in the Temple of Hathor at Denderah.
The inscription in the middle ring is from the 20th Dynasty text of "The Legend of Isis and Ra." Beginning in the east,
it reads, clockwise:
"Sayeth Ra: I am Khepera in the morning, Ra in the afternoon and Temu in the evening. I am the maker of the hours.
I am the creator of the days."
The innermost circle is composed of the hieroglyphic determinatives of the names for these three gods respectively,
in addition to Osiris Aat midnight.
See First Steps in Egyptian E.A. Wallis Budge; London, 1895, pp. 252-253.
STAR CRAFTED IMAGES, P.O. Box 1055, Virginia Beach, VA 23451
JESUS (BAPTISM) AHG. 4TH 15A.D. 12:25 PM
PELLA, JORDAN
35E 37 (LONG) 32H27 (LAT.)
TROPICAL PLAC
GIBSON L. TOWNS

it reads, clockwise:

I am the creator of the days."
The innermost circle is composed of the hieroglyphic determinatives of the names for these three gods respectively,
in addition to Osiris 4 at midnight.

# Combined OCR Output

Christine Hayes
THE SOURCE
Issue 1-86
Source Issue 86-01
copyright © 1986 L.Christine Hayes
Halley's Comet (Communication from THOTH & the Guardian Circle)
Energy in dynamism when interpolated with time produces spiral vectors or passages in
consciousness equal to Light Mathematic spirals. There are Ultra-computers which are capable
of integrating these spiraling motions or passages within all dynamic energy and displaying them
in color graphics upon crystal refracting screens. A comet is an especially graphic example of
spiral vectors that effect time current. because a comet is a cosmic electron in orbit around its
nucleus- a mass of charged hyper-space, the time integers if its spirally motions are far more
inter-dimensional than most earth known energy spirals and thus more active or various time
planes.
As a comet moves upon its orbital path, it pierces the super-sensitive light density webs of stars
and planets like a silver bullet, triggering long dormant thought mechanisms held in karmic
suspension and accelerating already viable thought/time correlations with the worlds whose light
it disturbs. There are also the parallel physical disturbances created by gravitational pull, but
even more profound is the fact that comets lock onto the heartbeat of the planet's (in this case
Earth's) central sun. Each sphere in space sends out a harmony uniquely its own, created by
electrical charges from such occurrences as tectonic motion, tides, other light and energy fields
both from within and striking the planet's web from other bodies in the stellar sea. In
combination with this interplay is the ever-present hum of the planet's central sun. A comet
coming within close proximity of the Earth, such as will be the case with Halley's, interferes with
this harmony by injecting its own chord into the concert. The new harmonics, while not dis-
cordant, do create a quantum-like surge in the dynamics of the planet due to the exposing of the
inter-dimensional values of the comet to the three dimensional earth mode.
Consider karma as seed pods trapped in cyclic anticipation of renewal. They await release to
struggle in the life-death grasp, hoping for the first bloom before the sun sets. Time is the
releasing factor, as cycles are mechanisms of time. When the spiral vectors of the comet
interpolate with Earth's time-spiral vectors, suddenly earth time is given a vent into greater
dimensions of renewal. Because of humanity's present inability to accept energy in the Light
Mathematics of pure form, the expanded dimension is largely received on the emotional plane
only. Thus accelerated or premature projection of karmic attitudes erupts into a chaotic feeding
frenzy, in which the tearing open of deep and uncharted karmic reefs is more frequent than is the
digesting of small portions on the menu. Long festering mass karma, such as is found in the
Middle East will prove to be an example of this in 1985-2,000 (calendar dates). Earth's souls
need to not only understand the interactions of comet and planet, but they must come to
synthesize with comets and other energy spiral forces that so strongly effect their world.
Just where upon the Earth's time spiral the comet's spirals penetrate determines the degree and
direction of effect. To use the Quabballic spheres as reference to these direction-paths, Halley's
in the year 1986 will activate MALKUTH-the sphere of confrontation and revelation. It will
serve to infuse both the Anti-Christ in his 13th year on the planet, and the Christ, whose etheric
double will be released on April, 1986 from the Earth, with old and new power forms. Between
the zenith and the nadir the forces of Light and Darkness shall play upon deep waters. With the
passage of MALKUTH the Seal shall be broken.
On April 24th, 1986, the 2,001st year from the birth of Christ, the Hierarchy will project through
MALKUTH (Halley's) the Divine Light of the Virgin Birth of the World, long trapped within the
light bands of the Jewel Star, Sirius, into the center of the Earth.
(For visualization, the Earth's time coils or spirals are BLUE, the comet's are RED.)
(New subscribers: For related material to above communication-back issues nos. 2/3-85
(double issue) & no. 4-85).
***
I invited William Buehler, a minister of The Church of Antioch, and a gifted authority on ancient
& metaphysical interpretations of the Quabbalah supply us with any "Malkuth" correlations to
the comet he might wish to impart. he sent me many pages of correlations which space does not
permit me to share with you in full. However, here are some excerpts from his material on what
I consider to be major points:
PROV 31: 10-13 (Hebrew Bible) concerning Malkuth:
"WHO (that which) COMES FORTH (or exists), A SUPPORTING PILLAR OF SELF
CONSUMING FEMININE FIRE (having force, virtue, fresh and revived life, giving birth in
pain, perversion and perfection), WHOSE ORIGIN IS FAR REMOTE (and precious, of long ago
and a great while to come) FROM THE MANY TURNING PARTS (or spinning pillars of fore).
A new science is being generated from the older spiritual formats, not so much changed as being
updated to fit the new. This is being combined with contemporary science. The increased
vibration (of the science) is essential to support the new malkuth (foundation). Leaders in this
effort will surface in the races near to the Earth with emphasis on those of the "Middle Kingdom"
(China, the new consciousness there) and the native Americans. Judeo- Christians need not fear
this but should understand the metaphysics of their own religion, the same as with other major
religions. The "mind set" however, in the orthodox religions is generating more division than is
acceptable for the emergence of the Holy Spirit in Malkuth. This division will be used by the
Anti-Christ and is probably our single greatest weakness to be exploited in "its" attempt to defeat
the transition and undermine the new malkuth and its spiritual science.
Synergism is one of the key concepts in making rapid growth in the new spiritual science. The
malkuth's essence, the feminine polarity (in all forms) will emerge in a leadership role, along with
the "earth sensitive" cultures. Now, many who seem to be "minorities" will come into influence.
However they (women in general and the native Americans as examples) are going through a
"false face" phase, redefining persona according to the old ways, but also transitioning into the
new consciousness rapidly. Synergism demands equal exchange between poles, the basic two
poles often being expressed in very complicated matrices."
Our present transition phase began with the China quakes in the 60's but "locked in" with the
transit of Kahoutek. Comets might be likened to Solar Lords; greatly evolved beings that are
mobile within the systems. They generate tremendous evolutionary changes via what we might
compare to auric telepathic bonding in humans.
My personal estimate of Halley's function, only partially based on (group) channeled output, is
that it focuses the whole system's collective consciousness and it's resultant action. Energy builds
on its inward flight, peaks at perihelion on February 9th (1986). This should be the point of
"setting" the characteristics of the systemic form, not only the Earth's new etheric but also its
inner planes mirroring form (the "new Heaven"). Little has been said of the impact on the whole
solar system but it is obvious that our own evolutionary jump within the synergism must also
phase in with the same with the other planets (within a larger coordinated sequence). Halley's
perihelion would be the trigger for the whole system's transition at the malkuth level of all the
sephiroth within the systemic form. Earth nexus.
The context is more relevant to the sun and planets as a collective entity. Metaphysically there
should be an entity mirroring Halley in February ('86) located at its opposite point with an
exchange of energy climaxing on February 9th. The "other one" would logically be Halley's
kether point. Another way of putting it is that the Sun has brought its system's collective malkuth
into unity and its peak vibration by bringing Halley's into perihelion. its kether or crown is
brought to "ground," the circuit is triggered with a dual complementary flow of energy and the
malkuth vibration (brought in through the Sun) is imprinted into the system.
*****************************
IN 1973, I was invited by Science author Joseph F. Goodavage to submit material channeled by
me on the then-expected comet Kohoutek for his book, THE COMET KOHOUTEK. The book
was published, with some of my material in it, but the comet was "no-show" —it had changed its
course, taking it away from rendezvous with planet Earth. My sources say that Hierarchy
curtailed the extreme karma-letting we would have experienced had Kohoutek charged into our
plane of consciousness. They were able to eclipse this fate for Earth because of may determining
"grace" factors that came together synchronistically at the "Eleventh Hour."
Since all comets are vehicles for stages or phases in the "systemic" (to borrow a word from Mr.
Buehler) of karma, a look back at Kohoutek is, I feel appropriate. To quote from this
editor/translator's information of Kohoutek as presented by Joseph Goodavage in THE COMET
KOHOUTEK; (When Kohoutek last visited Earth 50,000 years ago it)"altered and condensed the
solar field which affected the Earth's own magnetic influence...increasing the magnetism created
an explosion within the sun that also radically changed the pressures on Earth and influence the
courses of civilizations."
(Kohoutek's 50,000 year orbit of the sun is not invariable...)"not only has the orbit of the comet
been altered, but the orbit of the Earth around the sun has decreased. This time (with Kohoutek's
return in 1973) the human race will undergo a PHYSICAL change as well as a profound mental
reorientation. This will occur in slow progression, changing our relativity by degrees so that it
will not disturb our consciousness of what is happening to the species. Because of this 'density'
of the time-mind complex, Kohoutek's third or fourth return to the sun may not conform to the
50,000 year pattern."
What I did not realize when I translated the above information in 1973 was that the" alteration"
my sources spoke of was quite extreme. However, it need be realized that had the comet
followed the path anticipated by Earth's scientists, it would have effected this planet
cataclysmically. Thus, even at it's great distance at perihelion, Kohoutek DID effect us,
occurring "in slow progression, changing our relativity by degrees so that it does not disturb our
consciousness of what is happening to the species."
And what IS happening to the species? To quote from EARTH ASCENDING, by Jose
Arguelles: In viewing the earth as a space/time matrix, the first thing we must grasp is the
inherent unity of earth, space, and time. Within this unity, the emergence of man is also a unity.
Just as the element of fire is the same all over, though kindled by different means, so human
culture is one. And as the wave of hominization gathers its strength and rolls from the late
Pleistocene into the Holocene or present era, so the advent and emergence of civilization is
equally a unified global phenomenon.
As the rings of a tree tell us it's age, so may we view the different stages of human psycho-
cultural development as successions of rings emanated by a planetary core. To date these rings
are four in number: 1. The ring of aboriginal emergence; 2.the ring of the ancient world, with it's
seven streams of civilization: the Nilotic, the Mesopotamian, the Indian, the Chinese, the
Mesoamerican, the Andean, and the Nigerian; 3. The ring of the medieval world, with its three
cosmopolitan religions: Buddhism, Christianity, and Islam; and finally 4. The ring of the
modern global-industrial world.
These four rings, or stages, of history may yield further insight when seen as the double helix
weaving of the AC and CA currents comprising the binary pulse of psycho-cultural
development.
In Mr. Arguelles' chart of the following page, the energy spiral composed of his cultural rings is
evident. My sources say that all interpretations of time current (i.e. cometary interruptions)
change karmic courses, and thus space-time events. Yet, as with the chicken and the egg, the
disruptions themselves are determinate integers of the whole morphism; still our choices together
and individually ARE essential to our processing of relationships and spiritual growth along the
spiral, for we are removed from common knowledge of the ultimate determinate. Without
sentient choices, the dynamism of the space-time spiral (of the planet) would cease, and the
hyperbola of tension along the spirally plane would collapse.
Insert diagram here
This has occurred in parts of the Universe, forming "black holes" (although not all black holes
are formed this way).
So, although the Universe script has been written, the players are removed from the score in
order that they will continue to promote the kinetic charge necessary for continuity and spiritual
expansiveness through the dimensions of the Universe, all of which are sensitive to every micro-
cell of the entire organism.
Turning once agin to Mr. Arguelles' comments, we see that he has begun his developmental
rings with the aboriginal emergence, which is in Hopi terminology, the Fourth World epoch. His
chart therefore, does not allow for the Period of Illumination and its divisions prior to aboriginal-
-a period covering the cultures of Lemuria and Atlantis, among other cultures now lost from
history.
It is within the inner "sacred" hollow of our planet that the entire culture-helix is preserved, not
on shelves of antiquity complacently gathering dust, but as a living testament in the genetics and
heritages of "The People," each page burning a star on our future horizon. William Buehler
speaks of Leaders surfacing "in the races near to the earth." These leaders and the race-charge
within them will be psi-kinetically infused by the intact racial vibrations of the One Heritage
being sequestered among the diverse cultures and races, ancient to this planet, maintained in the
inner earth world. The uniting principle can only be brought forward by the "Mother Root" that
begins the Divine Tree--the common Light Mathematics vibrating through the DNA helix of all
racial parts of the whole. My sources refer to this once existent and future persona, who
contains the entire code in one form as the "Rainbow Man" (Sorry, but my sources often use the
word "man" to refer to both sexes in general).
From an ancient text of the Central Earth Tribes, prophesying the coming of the future Rainbow
Man:
"From the coiled serpent of the many-feathered one, there shall arise He who is the Rainbow
Sun. In His left hand Ether dwells, in His right hand, Earth.
Upon His bosom the Races engrave their symbols of Old, upon His forehead the Jewel Star doth
burn. With His lips so he will form the Sacred Vowel, to be transplanted into the soul of man.
Ten shall know Him, Two shall not.
His passage shall bring a new coming for the children who cry in the night."
(The above prophecy is obviously in riddle-form. At this time, I have not been given the
translation.)
To order EARTH ASCENDING write: Shambala Publications, inc.
1920 13th Street, Boulder, Co. 80302..try bookstores first!
On the following page is reproduced another plate from EARTH ASCENDING...I discovered
this after I translated the above prophecy!
Insert diagram here
THE SEVENTH MORNING
In the first of Seven Mornings, lay the world in satined purse. A quiver torn from angels' lips
breathed harmony sweet to solemn verse.
With the Second Light it sounded, ringing crystal, born of air, and in the Third it burnished
brightly, blue and round the Earth laid bare.
On the Fourth of Days 'twas seeded, bringing lush the Garden's bloom. In the Fifth Dawn golden
fingers wove flowered dress from Heaven's loom.
By the Evening of His Wonder, yea, sandaled angels' feet asunder, where sacred steps had
padded sand, and molded clay 'neath all the land, were shod in Heaven for Earth's delight and
bridged the rainbow 'tween day and night. On the Seventh Morning a spiraled horn was raised to
call, and all the angles gathered swiftly, still and hushed with reverent awe.
Listened they to the Great True Voice, listened in raptured bliss. The Word was spoken in their
midst, and the Word was a silent kiss.
Christine Hayes
MAGICAL BLEND quarterly publication--A transformative Journey
A magazine focusing on Nature, holistic mediums and spiritual possibilities. It is produced on
quality paper and the artwork alone is worth the price. Each issue contains articles on
metaphysics, healing, ancient Mysticism, human potentials, holistic health, interspecies
communications as well as fantasy, "cosmic" comics, art and poetry. Subscriptions: $12. ($16.
Overseas) annually (4 issues). Send to Magical Blend, P.O. Box 11303, San Francisco, Ca.
94101.
"THUS I CAME OUT OF EGYPT AND STOOD BEFORE SINAI, AND A POWER DIVINE
TOUCHED MY SPIRIT AND GAVE IT SIGHT. SO THAT I BEHELD MANY WONDERS.
AND FROM THE SACRED MOUNTAIN I HEARD A VOICE WHICH SAID,
'KNOWLEDGE IS LOVE AND LIGHT AND VISION." -Helen Keller, relating the entrance of
her teacher Anne Sullivan into her life.

---
title: The Source Issue 2-86
tags: ['star gate', 'gate cards', 'symbolic cards', 'symbols deck', 'deck symbols', 'cards star', 'text star', 'pattern star', 'gate symbols', 'originator star', 'numbers star', 'gate depicted', 'cards circle', 'interpretational key', 'orientation star', 'symbols hall', 'levels star', 'gate keys', 'using star', 'engraved symbols']
