# Combined OCR Output

Source Issue 86-02
copyright © 1986 L.Christine Hayes
Several months ago, my sources led me to encounter STAR*GATE. It is labeled an "insight
system" and indeed I found it to be true to that definition. There are three major parts to the
system, each of which can be purchased separately. The most essential of these is the "Basic
Card Set & Sky Spread." This is a boxed set of ninety-six symbolic cards and a felt-like plastic
sheet or matt with a placement outline on which to place the cards you draw from the deck. The
symbols in the deck are very simple: "EYE," "CHAIR," "ROPE," "SNOW," etc. yet each card
is beautifully interactive with every other card, forming a "language" between the diviner and the
Higher NATURE. On the back of the picture side of each card, the basic interpretational key
words are given, along with a number, a name, and a Card Type symbol.
The next necessary items of the three is the book by the originator of STAR*GATE, Richard H.
Geer. This text, "STAR*GATE KEYS TO THE KINGDOM," is a mystical work unto itself,
expanding the reader's consciousness as to the true orientation of STAR*GATE with the human
condition. In addition to the detailed instruction on the use of this insight system, Richard Geer
relates his story - how, as a 3 year old he first became aware of a Light Pattern that made him
feel nourished and protected, and how eventually, in his adult life, this Light Pattern became the
"Circle Pattern" of STAR*GATE. Mr. Geer is quite frank in his conviction that he did not
invent STAR*GATE, but that he came into this life to present it to the world. I believe him. To
me, the system he has given us is far superior to any other divinatory tool I have come across
before.
The third major part of STAT*GATE is really the most important, but probably the most
difficult to fully utilize. It is the first member of the STAR*GATE body that accessed Richard
Geer's conscious mind as a child - the Circle Pattern. This is a Mandala of interconnecting lines,
with the numbers of the STAR*GATE cards found at the points of connection. My sources tell
me that Geer's Circle Pattern is the Infinity mandala of Earth - the "Doctrine of Signature" for
this planet's etheric double, Altheria (for reference see issue 4: '85 of "The Source"). Once the
STAR*GATE cards have been drawn and aligned on the Sky Spread, and the seeker has attuned
himself to the properties revealed and how they relate to the circumstance in question; the
individual is then ready to work with the numbered correlative points of these specific cards on
the Circle Pattern. This pattern charts the "HOUSES" and the "SEAS" of STAR*GATE's
voyagers, determining multiple levels of personal association for the individual involved. There
are twelve houses and twelve seas. Some of the titles of these are: HOUSE OF THE SPIRIT
INCARNATE, HOUSE OF THE PERFECT FORM SEA OF PYRAMIDS, SEA OF QUIET
FLOWERS, and SEA OF STARS WITHIN.
In "STAR*GATE KEYS TO THE KINGDOM," Richard Geer states:
"STAR*GATE is, I believe timeless or beyond time as we know it. There is a
freshness about the pattern and all that flows from it that speaks more, however, of what is to
come than of anything else. The system, or 'game' - there isn't an adequate word to express
STAR*GATE - is a gift, and I know now that, in part, I came to deliver the gift. The questions
of where it came from and what it's purpose is have been with me since I first discovered the
Circle Pattern, the deepest expression of the system. Having spent so many years with it, I have
plenty of thoughts about it. But its meaning and use are not up to me but to you, the thousands
of people around the world who use it, and the new users to come. You and they will ultimately
be the ones to decide what is to become of it."
Another example Richard Geer gives of the unifying principle revealed in STAR*GATE, and
depicted through "fictional" scenarios of other authors, is the series of books by noted science-
fiction writer, Roger Zelazney, on Amber:
"...a place from which Earth and all other iter realms stemmed. Amber contained a
'pattern' that depicted the cosmos. The pattern contained seven veils of energy, each more
difficult to penetrate than the last. Only the Princes of Amber could walk the pattern at all, and
he who could, commanded the forces of the universe as well as being able to appear at other
replicas of the pattern found in the other realms. Also, each Prince had a set of symbolic cards
which included trumps- portrait cards of the Princes and other members of Amber's's court. by
looking intensely at certain trump, a Prince would gain instant communication with the person
pictured; staring harder would teleport him to wherever the person actually was."
When my sources guided me to work with STAR*GATE, they introduced a system of
interaction with MAYA. In "A DICTIONARY OF SYMBOLS, by Cirlot," Maya is defined:
"The constant projection and externalization of our specific shakti (vital energy) is our
'little universe,' our restricted sphere and immediate environment, whatever concerns and affects
us. We people and color the indifferent, neutral screen with the movie-figures and dramas of the
inward dream of our soul, and fall prey then to its dramatic events, delights, and calamities. The
world not as it is in itself but as we perceive it and react upon it, is the product of our own maya
or delusion. It can be described as our own more or less blind life-energy, producing and
projecting demonic or beneficent shapes and appearances. Thus we are the captives of our own
Maya-Shakti and of the motion picture that it incessantly produces.. The Highest Being is the
lord and master of Maya. All the rest of us...are the victims of our own individual Maya...To
liberate man from such a spell...is the principle aim or all the great Indian philosophies,"
My sources informed me that there was a deeper level to Maya, going beyond the "delusion"
aspect to the Archetypal patterning and Free Form synthesizing of our entire World Spectrum.
In simpler language, Our delusions are keys to harmonizing with Truth in thought and action, if
only we understood the patterning of the delusive field, and knew how to activate the completion
of the Maya pattern back to its source-the True Principle.
My sources then informed me that they wished me to integrate with this archetypal Maya pattern
using STAR*GATE. Further, they intended to guide me into the STREAM or current of
effecting small portion of that pattern...effecting it in a way that will promote a beneficent
response within the STREAM OR the subconscious communication field of the Maya pattern.
I was to draw three cards from the STAR*GATE symbolic deck. I was then to work with
feeling and understanding the energy of these three symbols and their inter-relationship. I was to
locate them on the Circle Pattern, again coming into contact with their relationship to this
pattern, which is not only a mirror of the Infinity Mandala or Doctrine of Signature for the
planet, but relevant to the charting of the Maya.
After a short meditation on all of these aspects, I was ready to begin my "voyage" or ABRAKA-
the travel of the "AB" all life, the sun is the center of our cosmic...together they merge in the free
form of the etheric double. I would like to share with you one of my 'ABRAKA,'," TAKEN ON
March 26, 1986. I drew three cards: CHILD (Undeveloped) BLOCK(Foundation) Arrow
(Decisiveness). Respectively, these symbols are enveloped in the HOUSE OF MOTION ("I
Relate") SEA OF INNOCENCE (Growing) HOUSE OF PERFECT FORM("I Perfect) HOUSE
OF UNIFICATION ("I Expand") SEA OF QUIET FLOWERS (Freeing). I was told not to
expect obvious coordination of my experience in Maya with the STAR*GATE symbols. There
would be some conscious connections, but mostly this experience would delve much deeper into
the levels of these STAR*GATE vectors than would be obviously evident. My voyage into
Maya, guided by my Guardians, begins:
I was in a subterranean passage which I sensed was beneath a chamber I had previously
visited. The passage was immense and the floor, ceiling and walls were entirely covered with
small tiles, engraved with symbols. The hall was shaped with the ceiling shorter width than the
floor, which caused the walls to angle in toward the ceiling, sloping like they would inside a
pyramid. I seemed to float down the hall until I came to a larger opening. Here a waterfall came
out of the suddenly ended floor, from somewhere underground and flowed over a precipice,
down into a clear pool below. I didn't see where the water went after it fell into the pool, but I
believe it syphoned off in a direction outside my immediate focus. Interestingly, I had a new
Age music tape on my stereo during my journey, and as I came to the end of the hallway, where
the waterfall was exposed in its solemn drop to the pool below, the music I had been playing
suddenly changed its orchestration accordingly- into a dramatic surge of strings. At just that
moment, I looked up, beyond the falls into something almost impossible to describe. It appeared
to be an advanced kind of holograph- very large- maybe a fourth of a city block, squared. Like a
holograph, it had dimension. It was permeated with a diffused pearl blue, filled with swirling
stars. In closer view, planets bared their souls before me, telescoped as large spheres of brilliant
markings; some ringed with gases, wedded to moons. It was as if the cavern "wall" had simply
vanished at that place, instead, time and space withdrew their grasp on the elements, quantum
leaping to some distant point in the universe. Multi-colored streams of laser light began to come
from some undetermined source, and "play" against the planets. As certain colored beams struck
the different planets and sections of space, I heard musical harmonies (other than what was
playing on my stereo.
Images began to appear in the dimensional opening, being formed from the out of the-
streams of light and color. They were geometric in shape, each form coming out of the last,
which was dissolved in the newer image. This imaging occurred between the two largest planets
in my view. After awhile the direction and intensity of the lasers changed, became more
concentrated toward specific points, and increasing in the energy of light. The light bands cris-
crossed from a vertical line down which brighter light swirls appeared. A human image began to
take shape around this vertical track. It was then I realized that the light swirls running down the
line were major chakras of the body. As the human form was being light-woven, I saw a quite
different light enter the form-something deep inside me whispered that this was a soul.
As the glowing human-like form remained suspended in the space between the planets,
two men who looked Egyptian, came to my attention. They were standing outside the
dimensional screen or holograph, on the cavern floor. One was on each side of the suspended
form. Directly in front of the three figures was the pool. Each of the "Egyptians" held a small,
long-stemmed gold cup, which they dipped into the pool. They then handed the glowing form
suspended between them, their cups. The form took the cups and drank from them. After a
moment, the form stepped out of the holograph and floated down to the pool. He began to
appear of a more solid elementation. I could not see his head or face as he wore golden helmet
shaped like a lion's head. It covered his head entirely, even his eyes. Aside from the helmet, he
wore only a sand-covered cloth covering his loins and buttocks. His skin was fair, and
contrasted to the Egyptians who stood on either side of him. They wore Egyptian styled skirts
and hoods of pink and light green stripes. The two darker skinned men led the sightless lion-
headed man into the pool, up to his waist. They then bound his bare chest in thin gold coils. I
have seen Thoth Hermes wear similar bands, but I knew by the lean build and light skin that this
personage was not Thoth. The two helpmates then led the Lion One from the pool. There they
dressed him in an apron of gold metal that went from his waist to just above the knee. They led
him to the right of the pool and holographic opening for a distance of about 55ft. to a simple
stone door.
The Lion One entered alone through the door into the room beyond. It was a much
smaller room than the cavernous one with the waterfall, pool and holograph. It appeared misty
inside, as if evaporation of some kind were present. A soft, golden light filled the space, gently
washing the walls in a medium of moonlight. My eyes were riveted on the center of the room.
There in a rapture of refracting light, atop a golden oval about 4 ft. in height, a pointed crystal
pierced the veil of light that shown about it in a canopy of reverence. The crystal measured
approximately 12 ft. from the base (atop the oval) to the tip of the highest point. There were
several spires to this pristine gem, each spatially harmonious to the whole, bearing the
appearance of a castle, but it was an inspiring size for a single crystal, a beautiful sight.
I had become so involved in studying the crystal, I had abandoned the Lion One.
Turning my attention to him once again, I saw that he had removed his helmet. I looked into his
face. He was beautiful in continence, yet his features, to my eyes, were somewhat strange. he
had thin face, with a slightly pointed chin, accentuated further by an Egyptian styled braided
beard. His eyes were very golden, appearing as liquid amber. The hair was reddish-blonde,
worn straight and long to his shoulders. His hairline did not begin until almost the center of his
skull. he stood there, before the crystal, with his arms raised.
In some way the crystal was reacting to his body. I felt this but at first there was no visual clue.
Then the multi-colored laser lights that I had seen form the man on the holo-screen, came from
the Lion One's body and entered the crystal. it was clear that the crystal was not charging the
man, but that the man was activating the crystal. I too, felt apart of this and not just as a
spectator. I knew then that I was "accessing" this dimensional encounter through Maya for the
Lion One. I became aware of a large gold ankh around his neck. In the center of the ankh (the
loop) was a smooth stone that appeared to have a dark matrix with iridescent pinks and light
greens flashing and moving as if alive in a swirl at the center of the darkness. On his left hand
was a small pyramid shaped stone set in a ring mounting. This stone also had the black matrix,
flashing with pink and green. I remembered seeing the pink and green combination once before
on this journey - in the design of the "Egyptians" clothing.
Suddenly my attention was once agin on the large crystal in the center of the room. It began to
slip down inside the oval pedestal. Then the top of the oval pedestal, into which the crystal was
receding, seemed to melt away, revealing a honeycombed interior. This interior then slid back
and something came up from the center. As it arose to the top of the oval, the room's energy
changed dramatically. I cannot find the adequate words to describe the change, but everything
seemed to be more in focus - not just visually, but in conscious understanding. The object that
now adorned the oval was even more magnificent than the crystal had been. I knew I was gazing
upon the Ark of the Covenant.
I recognized it, as it looked very much like the traditional representations of the Ark throughout
history. In fact, it looked so identical to its depiction in the motion picture, "Raiders of the Lost
Ark," that I was suspicious of my own consciousness..had my mind supplied me with the image
of the Ark I would feel the most identified with? As I asked this question within myself, the
immediate answer from the unseen "guide" that was leading me through this journey, was that
my assessment was incorrect. I was told that what I was witnessing was in no way being
reinterpreted by my thought patterning. In fact, it was somewhat the other way around. The Ark
of the Covenant is much more than we understand it to be. It comes from pure archetypification
of the most sacred forms. Therefore, our human impressions of the Ark through time have been
relatively accurate. I was also told that the original casing for the apparatus of the Ark, was, in
some ways different from what I was seeing, and how the historians have depicted it. However,
this original casing was "destroyed" (no further explanation was given) and another casing was
fashioned for it in Egypt. I feel I should add here that the Ark, the one descended from the Blue
Star, and not the second, inferior Ark Moses was forced to have constructed after the business
with the golden calf. We do not "see" the Ark in its original casing as that archetypical form has
not yet been revealed to us.
To return to the Ark as it was revealed in the room with the Lion One...The golden beings or
angels perched on the Ark had their wings facing inward, toward one another. But once the Ark
had completely emerged from the oval, the wings turned outward. At this point, I was instructed
silently to leave the room. I merely thought of leaving and I was on the outside, back in the
larger cavern, where the two Egyptian fellows were still standing by the door. I knew that
something very "sacred" was occurring on the other side of that door that I was, quite simply, not
worthy to witness.
After a few moments, the Lion One came from the "Covenant Room." When he emerged, he
once again wore the golden Lion-headed mask. The two Escorts led the Lion One back toward
the holo-screen. As I looked at this portal, or dimensional passage, I saw those pink and light
green lights that had been in evidence previously, flowing and turning in the portal,. The man
with the mask entered the holo-portal as if by magic, and began to "unravel" his light unti91 only
the heart chakra was visible, then that too, disappeared.
When the Lion One completely vanished, I too, vanished from that point in Maya. I was now
inside a triangular, white craft, looking like a very modern jet, except it was all one big triangle
with no visible mid-section. I was inside the vehicle, but I could see it from the outside as well.
Now my guide was more evidently with me, although I could still not see him. As the craft
scare through an atmosphere that was fille with crystalline forms, for which there are now words
to describe, my host informed me that we were traveling into the world of the Lion One, a
dimension apart from ours. After we soared awhile through this crystal universe, we went
through a light barrier into another dimension - this one obviously organic asked for clarification
as to how these dimensions related to Earth as we know it, and to the Lion One's journey into the
cavern. I was told that these dimensions we were passing through were matrices for the
essentiality of Earth...they were each a Mother Archetypication. I had only been exposed to two
of them. The Lion One was an ensouled being of the Crystal Essence. My guide told me that I
could not, as this time, be made fully aware of the Lion One's mission with the Ark, in
preparation for the 2001st century, beginning April 24th, 1986... (see SOURCE double issue 2/3-
85).
I do not remember, what, if anything, that transpired the rest of that night (of 3/26/86). I fell into
a deep sleep.
This had not been my first experience with the Ark of the Covenant. Several months before I
had experienced two separate journeys to the "dimension" where the Ark now rests, but had not
before been permitted into the lower cavern or Covenant Room, nor had I seen the Ark in actual
experience prior to March 26, 1986. Then, after my journey into the Covenant Room with the
Lion One, I participated in a group related group experience. On the night of April 10, 1986, I
was one of 18 people (a gathering under Hermetic guidance through me that meets regularly)
following instruction from Thoth Hermes. We were told to attune ourselves to a similar number
of splendid-looking Incalas (ancient ancestors of the Inca) who were wishing to commune with
us from an alternate dimension. Within their dimension was also land that had once been in the
Peruvian Andes, but was now held "between worlds." Through their hands, they transferred
energy codes to the 18 present at our gathering. All participants were moved by the experience.
It was not until later that I was informed by my sources that these Incala were the Guardians of
the Ark. Through those gathered with me on the night of April 10th, certain codes from the Ark
had been transferred into this dimension. Although there is a dimensional connective node to the
Ark in North America, it is now my understanding that there is also one in Peru, near Lake
Titicaca, but that this Andean one was sealed away long ago. For some reason not yet known to
me, it has been reopened. It was reopened with the energy transfer between the Incala and our
gathering. It should also bear remembering that the "other" Ark is psychically housed
somewhere in the Andes also, but not near Lake Titicaca.
Where is all this leading us? First, let us review what "all" is occurring at the time this is being
written, in April of 1986, that relates to the "changing of the guards" from the 2000 th to the 2001st
year. As I write this, the U. S. attack on Libya is not yet 24 hours old. The two Esotericans,
Joseph Jochmans (of "Merri Magi's Crystal Planetworks") and john Davis (Director of Coptic
Fellowship International) are in Egypt, conducting energy circuiting in preparation for the Earth
consciousness shift of April 24th. On that exact date, Mr. Jochman and Mr. Davis will be atop
Tor Hill at Glastonbury, England - the point where the DIVINE LIGHT OF THE VIRGIN
BIRTH OF THE WORLD will penetrate into the atoma or central sun of the planet at 1:00am
(Glastonbury time). Through the awareness of these two initiates, much of this manifestation
will be transferred to other people and points throughout the world. With the U. S. military
action against Libya only weeks before, the karma seal for the new Luciferian Trident, the Anti-
Christ (the host soul/body now in its 12th year in the planet) and the predecessor to the Anti-
Christ - the one who precedes that Dark Entity into the karmic field, establishing a fertile
condition for the one who is to follow him. The Christ, also had such a predecessor in the
embodiment of John the Baptist. The last visitation of the Anti-Christ within the host incarnate,
Adolf Hitler, also had his predecessor (read "Spear of Destiny" by Ravenscroft). It is obvious to
our present world as to which identity is assuming the role in this age.
While writing this page, a book was brought to my attention entitled, "MESSIAH AND THE
SECOND COMING" published in 1982, and written by Naomi Rice and John Davis - the same
John Davis who will be (or by the time you read this, has been) at Glastonbury on April 24,
1986, It was suggested that I read the last chapter in this book. In this chapter, the authors write
that on November 11, 1949, a child was born in a lightship above Mt. Shasta. They state that
there were twenty-two witnesses when the child was then brought down to Earth on Mt. Shasta.
Those present were told that this child was the "Messiah." later in the chapter the authors give
the date of April 11, 1986 as the date the Messiah will truly begin His work on the planet -
possibly "coming out in public." I find it beyond coincidence that without my knowing the
significance of April 11, 1986, my sources interrupted the scheduled program I had planned for
the previously mentioned gathering in my home on the night of April 10, 1986, to have us
become conductors for the actual transfer of the Covenant energy codes into this planetary
dimension, while on that same date (as well as the day after, on the 11th) John Davis, co-author
of "MESSIAH AND THE SECOND COMING," along with Joseph Jochmans, were in Egypt, no
doubt at the Great Pyramid, where in November of 1985, the Christ "Ka" was released to the
Earth.
I have asked my sources to elaborate on this information, new to me, of the "Messiah" born
above Mt. Shasta in 1949. Their reply was not surprising as it related knowledge they had
previously given to me. Over a year ago, my sources told me that Archangel Michael, whom
they refer to as the "Defending Archangel," was tp physically, and in this world dimension,
(mentioned in previous issues of "The Source"). In other words, Michael would be here on Earth
physically in order to accomplish this service. Now they tell me that the Messiah of Mt. Shasta
is the host soul for this Archangel, just as Jesus was the host for the Archangel we know as the
Christ. This should not alter our perception of the term "Messiah." Michael is an extended
consciousness of the Christ, as the latter extends to rectify it's disunity with the Fallen Angel,
Lucifer. From a previous message given to me by my sources, they explained that Lucifer was,
and in infinite sense is, the "Twin Ray" of Christ. The entire story of this, presented in almost
scientific terms, was given to me, but it is too long to include at this time. However, I do wish to
say that in that material they spoke of the two Archangels Christos and Lucifer as being divided
from the same Light. "The Christos worked with the maintenance and distribution of Light
(beyond heat-light), and Lucifer, the "Light Bearer," was positioned to integrate the devalued
(entropic) Light into its proper balanced channels as (heat) light, for the Elohim's creative
systems. "My sources continue, relating what went wrong - something we will go into a future
issue. Then they speak about the "breaking of the link," when Lucifer actually broke his
"Covenant" or "Arc" of power with the Christos, "When he broke the link, there was soul energy
discharged from both Christos and Lucifer, that came together as like elements. This new unit,
an amalgam of both Christos and Lucifer, is represented as the Archangel Michael. But Michael
is not a product of the persona (fallen) Lucifer. For as Lucifer broke the Covenant, he was
forced to discharge his remaining spiritual Light. It is that spiritual Light, coupled with Light
from the Christos, that is contained in Michael. Michael is the fore-runner for the Christos in the
battle of good and evil, as he contains the connective particle between the Twin Rays of these
Archangels, Christos and Lucifer.
Now my sources are saying that Michael has entered his host incarnate, the Messiah of mt.
Shasta. It is essential that this entity empower the Archangel Stone before the Anti-Christ builds
his momentum to empower himself. Surely this Archangel we identify as "Michael," and who
contains a portion of the Christ Light within him, qualifies as a "Messiah" for the world in his
present service to humanity. As to what form his defense will take, I do not, at this time, know.
It may not be a stance visible to the world politics. I only know that his physical presence upon
the planet is warranted. As for the return of the Christos, in a sense, He has already returned
through his extension, Michael, and will return again in full, once His predecessor, the
Defending Archangel has established the new matrix for His entry.
**
****
Halley's comet's encounter with earth in this phase of time has triggered an alternate current in
the crystallex grid of the planet. This alternate current is not in place of the present currents
which translate into electrical extremely low frequencies (ELF) in the interactions between the
Earth's crystallex grid and the solar and lunar shells. The lunar emanations are channeled into
alternating current (AC) and the solar radiations into direct current (DC). To quote from issue
#1-82 of "THE SOURCE:" "A current of 160AC and 220DC combines in strength to a total
output of 380, numerically similar to the 350 mile Focus of the lunar and solar shells,. In terms
of light mathematics comprehended by Ultra and Inner Earth scientists, the current output of the
lunar shell (as it interacts with Earth crystallex grid) is 88801.01 of a 'metacycle," or oscillatory
rate of atomic matter as it transmigrates into the composition of Light matter and anti-matter.
light-matter is the third state of matter - matter and anti-matter preceding it. The solar current is
10000.01 of a metacycle in current. the combined lunar and solar current is 98801.02, which
equates in exact milii-units to the radius of the solar and lunar Foci.
The alternate current triggered by Halley's (not alternating) operates within the dimension of
Light-matter, forming in the dimension of matter, the capacity of a binary cell (an element in a
computer which can store information by virtue of its ability to remain stable in one of two
possible states). So to avoid confusion between the words "alternate" and "alternating," we shall
call this new alternate current a "binary" current or BC. With the BC now a part of our planetary
energy field, a greater capacity for earth bonding among like, spiritually aware minds is possible.
This will apply among one another and with the earth as the living mother. The preparation for
this began in 1982. To quote again from issue #1-82 of "THE SOURCE," "This planet is in the
process of altering its energy properties, beginning with the magnetic field maintained
essentially by the natural crystallex grid. A condition of pyroelectricity is being induced by bot
h subtle, continuous and not-so-subtle discontinuous temperature changes...as a pyroelectric
effect created different charge interactions between the lunar and solar shells and the Earth, the
tremendous power of these shells was tapped by the Ultra and Inner terrestrial geo-scientists,
creating a boosting signal for TRIBELIGHT's inception. This frequency power is equal
to the lunar-solar 'shadow' or Focus on Earth of 98801.02 - the combined power of the lunar and
solar output."
As discussed in previous issues of "THE SOURCE," TRIBELIGHT is a frequency of knowledge
that projects equilibrium through the Divine Will. it is conducted through the latitudes of justice
and Triburnal IBIS, the highest court of the Illumined – the Triburnal for Spiritual Laws on
Earth. Now with the natural binary current being emitted from the planet, TRIBELIGHT will
have a greater latitude of world penetration. The whole process of TRIBELIGHT is too
expansive to repeat in this present issue, but is detailed in #1-82 of "THE SOURCE" and further
discussed in issue #3-83. These back issues are available through TREDS.
The BC operates as a shield, keeping the AC & DC of the lunar-solar shell from being tapped by
the Anti-Christ, which aside from what we understand as an entity, is an anti-force field. There
is a specific vector that was given to me by my sources a simple design - yet it conforms to the
BC planetary shield. This image is a powerful vector, acting as a deflector, preventing
interruption of natural current. using this symbol in mental imagery should aid an individual in
concentrating his singular force upon a positive, faith-oriented objective, as well as act as an
actual conduit of Sacred geometry for the BC in deflecting physical malfunctions (of planes,
shuttle, etc.) which have been occurring with increased frequency because of the growing anti-
force field building on this planet.
This particular vector we shall call the ARCHEL. It is aligned with the etheric body of Christ,
which as a reflection of the true Spiritual Body of the Christos, is also a field of force, but not
anti-force. The Christ energy projects a complete circuit forming a shield of Light matter equal
to the sacrilegious to "equate divine power," but even divinity is a tangible resource from which
all tangible resources are derived. When the etheric double of the Christ leaves this planet on
April 24th, 1986, the ARCHEL will remain, as it was created by the Christ Ka or double during
the Ka's time upon Earth, from its release in Egypt, November, 1985 until its journey back to the
"Blue Star," in April of 1986. In conclusion, the ARCHEL is now the point of focus in
symmetry that dynamically defines the new binary current of Earth.

# Combined OCR Output

The Source issue 3-86
copyright © 1986 L.Christine Hayes
On July 10th, 1986 our Light Circle here in San Antonio, Texas, working through guidance from
Thoth Hermes, prepared to aid in a very essential transfer of energies. Thoth's message to us
was as follows:
"The land and ocean area risen or translated from this dimension (originally in Peru) in which is
contained the first true Ark of the Covenant, we shall refer to here as the Risen Sea. Within the
caverns of the Ark there, is suspended the TALMUD - a diamond-shaped blue quartz crystal.
near the TALMUD crystal is the TYCHON FLAME - a large beam of high energy lasers
streaming upward from a white stone lotus. The TYCHON is a balancer and rectifier of
energies. it stabilizes the dimension in which the RISEN SEA abides and maintains a frequency
of parity between the Ark and its parallel vector (this dimension). The TALMUD CRYSTAL is
more complex to interpret. its entire workings are not to be given at this time, but it operates in
conjunction with the TYCHON. It absorbs Light from various levels of creation and reintegrates
that light into elemental conformity, all the while accelerating the quantum of Light transfer,
which in turn, redefines the entire process of Light to Spirit through its systems.
After receiving this message, our Light circle was guided through a visualization and energy
integration by Thoth. This visualization can be enacted by the reader for his own awareness
expansion. It is presented here:
"The Guardians of the Ark, whom you met before (in a previous Light imaging) wish to initiate
you further into the Mysteries of the Ark. We will begin by visualizing the chamber containing
the TYCHON FLAME and the TALMUD CRYSTAL. Spend a few moments with this
visualization, perceiving your reality of the large room. When you see the TYCHON, be aware
that there are two other Tychons connected to this planet. One is in the Inner Earth and the other
is in the Himalayas. See the diamond-shaped blue quartz TALMUD suspended near the
TYCHON FLAME. Realize that it is liquid Light, held back a moment before the rush of time.
In it is contained the record of humanities' passing in the Earth. This knowledge is channeled
through the crystal TALMUD as DIVINE LAW. it is segmented into verses of consciousness,
each motion given a separate dialogue in time. The many souls incarnating again and again are
the embellishment, the notes in a concert of spirit consuming flesh, singing in the flame of life
that dwells but a moment with the reality of the soul.
The stages of soul evolution in Earth are divided within the crystal into four major parts - the
Sacred Four, equivalent to the Four Forces of the Universe, the Four Elements of the alchemical
Earth, and the Four Sons of Horus. I give you four words to speak, each a trigger to a fourth
segment of the crystal. As you speak each word, take several minutes upon that word before
proceeding to the next in order that you may place yourself into memory rhythm with that stage
in your soul's evolution. bring into your consciousness a visualization in tune with that
experience. Proceed through the four sacred force words applying this memory rhythm. The
words are:
ORIGIN
TRIBULATION
TRANSFORMATION
LIGHT
After this Light Imaging, our Circle was told by Thoth that our Light energy could be enlisted to
help bring into this dimension an object from the RISEN SEA dimension. This object was the
size and shape of half an ostrich egg. In fact, it looked exactly like half a broken egg (with
jagged edges). The "egg" was of alchemical gold both inside and out, a layer of crystalline
material pressed in-between these two layers. On the uneven edge of the "break" were tiny
golden circuitry embedded within the crystal "filling." We were told by Thoth that this object
was half of the entire unit. This half, with our help (and no doubt the enlistment of other sources
as well) would be translated from the dimension of the RISEN SEA to this dimension. it would
appear partly buried in a specific region of the Americas, to be found by a certain envoy or party
unknown to us. The second half of the golden egg would be brought through at a future date
(how distant into the future we were not told) and eventually united with the first half. When
brought together, the circuitry would be complete and the Ark of the covenant would be
translated via this devise, into our dimension.
Our Light Circle followed Thoth's guidance through this energy transference process, and we
told that it had been correctly executed. Several weeks later Thoth informed me that the
Guardians of the Sacred grounds - high souls who once lived and many who are still living
(inner/outer Earth) as Great White Shamans (as opposed to "Black Art" Shamans) are gathering
in the sacred places. They are awakening the magic of their ages 9in the Earth, following the
DREAMPATH for Earth Awakening. they are closer at this time then, to our reality. All is
stirring from the ancient vaults and minds of direction of long ago. It is now that we can humbly
tap into this resource, asking the blessing and permission of entry from the DREAMPATH
Shamans. This Dreampathing began once the golden egg was in place on this dimension, and is
occurring all over the world, culminating in a great ritual and spirit dance on the inner-plane in
Chaco Canyon, Arizona on September 11th of 1986. With the closing of this ceremony
initiations will have been given for entrance of certain incarnated souls dwelling of the surface of
the Earth at this time, to become Dreamwalkers between this dimension and the true dimension
of earth Vision in which the Dreampathers exist. Those Dreampathers who are presently
embodied on and in the Earth, join their shamanic family of discarnate priests and priestesses by
sending upon the DREAMPATH, their etheric doubles. The purposes of the Dreampathing are
many branches, yet the tree reaches into the building of the etheric double of the planet. This
Dreampathing is also a preparation, deliverance of Earth and selection of souls for the fulfillment
of the Feathered Serpent prophecy. To quote from the Rainbow People prophecy (previously
quoted in "The Source"): "1987 will be the year when the 144,000 Sun Dance enlightened
teachers will totally awaken in their dream mind-bodies. The will begin to meet in their own
feathered serpent or winged serpent wheels and become a major force of the light to help the rest
of humanity to dance their dance awake. A Sun Dance teacher is any human being who has
awakened, who has balanced their shields, who has gained the dream mind-body, and who
honors all paths, all teachers, all ways. On August 17, 1987, the various winged serpent wheels
will begin to turn, to dance once again and when they do, the Rainbow lights will be seen in
dreams all over the world and those Rainbow Lights will help awaken the rest of humanity." My
sources tell us that the Sun Dancers are a prelude to the universal tribe, the STAR DANCERS,
who will awaken the crown chakra of the universal center into which all souls have been sent
forth and must return.
From Joseph Jochman's "The Merri Magi's Crystal Planetworks" current issue (Special Report
#1), Mr. Jochman writes:
"As concrete manifestations of human-planetary-stellar connections are being made, certain
individual Workers will be responsible for completing very specific projects, including:
1. anchoring Pleiadean energies in the Corioonoha temple in Cuzoo, on Mt. Kilimanjaro in
Kenya, and in the great Pyramid in Egypt;
2. anchoring Sirian energies at Palanque, Uxmal and Tulum in the Yucatan, at Delphi in Greece,
at Glastonbury in England, and at Giza, Saqqara and Philae in Egypt
3. planting stone pyramids as initial keys for preparing for the future opening of global Halls of
Records, at Orongo on Easter island, atop Mt. Haleakala in Hawaii, at the foot of Mt. Shasta in
California, on Bimini in the Bahamas, at Saqqara in Egypt, atop Mt. Sinai, and the Tor at
Glastonbury in England;
4. the return of the sacred ankh symbol, form Egypt back to its most ancient source, Lemuria,
cast into the ocean off Aku Tahai, Easter Island:
5. the creation and purification of a symbolic Breastplate with 12 gemstones, to act as an interim
anchoring instrument for the coming transition from one planetary Crystal energy grid into its
new one; (the Infinity Mandala of the Earth's new etheric double, Altheria? - CH)
6. performing special ceremonies and planting healing crystals and stones throughout ancient
sites in Peru, Bolivia, Easter Island, Hawaii, Samoa, Ponape, Austrailia, the Yucatan, the
American southwest, among the temples of Egypt, and other locations; and
7. beginning meditation networking for planetary healing and world peace. All these will be but
beginning manifestations of the Work.
What the new Earth Healers and Planetary Initiators will discover, during this period, is that
within themselves is the power to bring creation into manifestation, through the process of
Imagineering. Imagineering is: VISION empowered by LOVE and DESIRE, projected DAILY,
to bring about NEW MANIFESTATION."
To this list of Mr. Jochman's my sources add:
8. the opening of the inner vault aboard the remains of Noah's Ark, atop Mt. Aarat in Turkey;
9. the dis-assembly of the distorted Satanic Pentagram buried in the shadow of an ancient tree
near London, England.
10. the inner-plane awakening of a "Lost Dynasty" of China, the "Hiang," that will stir the
Chinese people into the spirit action of the feathered Spirit.
11. the visitation of the Archangel Michael in his incarnated host body to the grounds of
Glastonbury and St. Michaels' in England.
12. the deliverance of one half of the "golden egg" (of the Ark of the covenant) to its Threshold
position in North America.
13. the reawakening of the Power Animals who guardian sacred grounds and temples to their
full inspirited time-state - that which correlates their force fields with the ancient American star
calendars.
14. the strengthening of the female polarity within the male duplicity, releasing the goddess to
flood its tide through mankind, cleansing it of the "original sin" - a misunderstood concept,
w2hich in truth is the burden man/woman took upon them when they allowed the Crystal
Canopy to fall through their mis-use of polarity power.
15. the evolving of the Plant kingdom within the spiritual emancipation of the plant as a whole -
the reinstatement of the plant devas to the thrones of their rulership, from the redwoods, which
are the archangels of the plant world, to the most delicate fern sewn into its root.
16. the rites of Earthly severance are given to many souls caught up in the astral plane, because
of their karmic mis-deeds. many will be released and continue to be released - not to return to
earth, but to be drawn into other cycles for the re-addressing of their retrograde thought forms.
Some of these souls will slip through the nets and back into Earth's karma cycles, however.
They will have to be confronted, and the beast subdued on Sacred ground.
These are only part of the major healing processes that are now or will soon begin motion in our
new Light world.
From Michael Harder's, "Way of the Shaman," discussing the descent of a Shaman into the
inner Earth:
"The satanic journey is one of the most important tasks to be undertaken. The basic form of this
journey, and the one usually easiest to learn, is the journey to the Lower world. To undertake
this, a shaman typically has a special hole or entrance into the Lower world. This entrance exists
in ordinary reality as well as in non-ordinary reality. The entrance among California Indian
shamans, for example, frequently was a spring, especially a hot spring. Shamans were reputed to
travel hundreds of miles underground, entering one hot spring and coming out another... The
Conibo Indians taught me to follow the roots of the giant catahua tree down into the ground to
reach the Lower world. In the SSC, the roots were transformed for me and my Conibo friends
into black serpents down whose backs we slid to reach lands of forests, lakes, and rivers, and
strange cities bright as day, lit by a sun that had disappeared from the ordinary world above-for
those journeys were taken at night...Entrances into the Lower world commonly lead down into a
tunnel or tube that conveys the shaman to an exit, which opens out upon bright and marvelous
landscapes. From there the shaman travels wherever he desires for minutes or even hours,
finally returning back up through the tube (henceforth called the Tunnel) to emerge at the
surface, where he entered."
The following is excerpted from, "The Hole at the Pole," by Joseph H. Cater. This article
appears in full in the August 1, 1986 issue of THE HOLLOW HASSLE:
"Our space program is revealing a number of startling facts that do not conform with the
viewpoint of scientific textbooks. As an example, consider the photographs of Earth taken by
satellites from orbit about 18,000 to 23,000 miles out. All of them show unmistakable evidence
of an entrance at the north pole, hundreds of miles across, that goes into the planet. The first of
these photos released to the public in December of 1966 was taken at a more oblique angle to the
plane of the equator than the others. It gives the deepest view of this hole. Here we have a dark
elliptical pattern whose center is at the geometric pole. This refutes any argument that the
surrounding white is a cloud formation. the pole is supposed to be covered with ice and snow,
especially in the winter, the time this photo was taken. Therefore, any break in a cloud
formation over the pole would not show up dark. We must conclude then that this portion of
Earth that looks like an entrance is not just an illusion.
The photo released in the late summer of 1967 that does not present a view of this hole is the
most startling of the entire series. This view was obviously taken parallel to the plane of the
equator and looks like a large part of Earth was sliced off and thrown away, revealing a flat in
the outline about 1500 miles across. The scientists tell us that Earth is slightly flattened at the
poles, but is still nearly as perfect a sphere as a billiard ball, which is a far cry from a ball that is
about 1/5 of its maximum diameter out of round. This is precisely what one would expect if a
large polar entrance existed.
Strange to say, no comments concerning these remarkable views seem to have been made, in
spite of the fact that these photos have appeared in many popular magazines with a circulation of
millions. Even our men of science have cheerfully ignored these findings. "THE HOLLOW
HASSLE" is now in circulation again. 4 issues per year, $10. U.S. & Canada, overseas air
mail - $15. per year.
Here is given a Light Imaging you may wish to conduct as entrance for you into the Earth
Healing Star Dance:
Begin visualization with concentration on the center of a crystal (a physical crystal in
your possession). Touch the crystal as you visualize being at the center of the quartz stone. See
yourself as an elf/fairy-like being twirling around and around in the center of the crystal. As you
do this, tiny particles of Light are shed from you, spiraling out into the crystal from your body.
The crystal becomes part of your living vitality as you seed it with your Light.
Now see a cross of light superimposed over the tiny being of "you" at the center of the crystal.
This Light cross is precise and brilliant. The four rays of the cross extend out of the crystal, and
are attuned to the Four Sacred Directions, the Four Sacred Elements, the Four Sacred
Dimensions.
See yourself, and thus your crystal with it's LIGHT cross, which surrounds you, in the center of
a Medicine Wheel painted in colored sand on a background of white crystalline sand. You,
inside your crystal, are painted in the center of this colorful and intricate sand painting. On the
rim of the wheel have been painted the sacred places on the Earth whereupon lie the remnants of
temples of old. In the North, there is Lhasa, Tibet, the lotus jewel of the Himalayas; in the
South, spans the Gateway to the Sun, near Lake Titicaca, atop the antiplano or high plateau in
Peru. In the East, there you find the abbey of Glastonbury, the threshold to Avalon, in the West
is the Emerald Table, the Mesa Verde Plateau, Colorado, within the Medicine Wheel of the Four
Corners of the United States. In between these four points of your Light cross around the
Medicine Wheel, are the many points of your Light cross around the medicine Wheel, are the
many other sacred sites of the past, which links your present to your future. Feel the energy, the
wisdom, the endurance of these Earth dwellings surge through you at the center of your
Medicine Wheel Crystal.
Hear the chant, the song of your Wheel, your crystal, your soul. Listen within and hear the
music of your life song. Dance-dance inside your crystal to this breath of living notes, each a
memory sound calling you home to the creation of your spirit.
Come back to the present moment...open your eyes...look in at your crystal. See it with
different vision now. See it as part of yourself, as your spirit stone, your satanic bridge into your
own Medicine Wheel, which is Life Force and Spirit Force combining to become all that is you.
The following is an Egyptian Cartouche spread (cards & text developed by Murray Hope)
concerning the question - What can be revealed at this time about the Archangel Michael's
infusion with a host incarnation on Earth, and his mission here? The Cartouche reply:
I drew only three cards to address the trinity of energies involved.
(20) THE TWINS - This is obviously referring to the fact that the Christ and Lucifer are "Twin
Rays," for this Cartouche speaks to us about "Polarity and Integration," and in particular, the
Twin Souls. The Egyptian Identity of THE TWINS is Shu and Tefnut, the Twin Lion Gods:
"Shu and his twin Tefnut were the children of the old god, Ra...Although Shu is mostly depicted
in human form while Tefnut assumes the leonine role, according to some sources while Tefnut
assumes the leonine role, according to some sources both were originally lion deities,
reappearing later in the Middle Kingdom as the twin lion gods of Yesterday and Today. Some of
the ancient texts refer to the Double-Lion in twin soul terms, as the physical manifestation of the
one original creator, Atum whose energies assumed dual form upon coming into contact with the
Earth, or material sphere." It would seem that the STAR*GATE ABRAKA (issue #2-86) with
the lion-masked entity could have something to do with this orientation.
(11) FIRE - This Cartouche is identified with Duamutef, of the four sons of Horus, its forces
bring Energy and creativity. "Spiritually, it suggests creative gifts that can be used to bring
LIGHT...FIRE can also represent a condition that is being kept alive or aflame." It represents as
well "a general purging" which would be in order for the Defending Archangel in his battle with
Lucifer. Concerning the Four Sons of Horus: Traditionally these four godlings always appeared
seated on a lotus in front of the throne of Osiris in heaven. They were not, in fact, Horus'
progeny, but represented the four winds, the four points of the compass or the four elements. In
other words, they were the sons of Horus because they served all Nature of which he was the
supreme lord.. Fire is considered to be the senior Element, and because of its refining nature, its
numerology is No. 11: creativity through transformation."
This is especially interesting to note, since the No. 11 is apparently the power number for the
Michael embodiment (see John Davis info in issue #2-86).
(6)HATHOR - "Signifies spiritual strength to be gained by making contact with the god force
within us.
It deals with the "Mirror of Hathor," which is a "variation of the magical shield, such
as the one that the Greek goddess Athene gave to Perseus to help him slay the Gorgon. It's
energies are, therefore, reflective and act in two ways: (1) by showing the viewer his or her own
true image, and (2) as a shield in which the face of the adversary can be seen without direct
visual confrontation. .
Magically, the Hathor Mirror contains the energies of the user on the one hand, and reflects back
impinging external vibes of an undesirable nature on the other. This puts HATHOR in the
position of being the grand deterrent of Cartouche, the symbology of the card ensuring that the
energies released by the combination of the twenty-five cards cannot be misused, and the
hieroglyph confirming HATHOR's role in the Cartouche magical picture...Magical tradition has
it that one should never look an enemy in the eye - hence Hathor's Mirror and Athene's famous
shield.
Here we see the deflection of negative energies in the Hathor Mirror as the Archangel engages
Lucifer in combat to subdue the Beast. There is also the consideration that Michael himself is
the Hathorian Mirror, for he is the combination of Light shed in the nova that separated the twin
Archangels, Christ and Lucifer the moment before the "Fall" of the latter from Grace. As the
magic mirror, Michael can be seen as that which has captured the light of the Throne in order to
reflect it upon the face of the Beast, blinding the Satanic Eye and therefore breaking the hypnotic
spell the Eye has cast on the lesser world.
