# Combined OCR Output

"THE SOURCE"
ISSUE #4-86
-
-
WITH THE COMING OF THE OLD COMET”S TAIL ( a comet tail the Earth recently passed through)
there is ascended a path to Earth from the angelic realm – a path uniting with the DREAMPATH of
Earth's Dream Makers, the shamans of old (see issue #3-86). It is upon this STARPATH that the
Recording Angels of Ezekiel's encounter are once again transferring the Knowledge – Form from the
center of the Earth to its Doctrine of Signature and Infinity Mandala. In Ezekiel's age, this transfer was
made to bring from the Inner Mystery heart center of the Earth, those atomized records or divinely
impressed etheric Light forms, and enjoin its most sacred presence with the Recording Crystals of the
Earth's matrice. This enabled the Age of Christ to take place, as the Knowledge – Form had been
delivered to set the pattern for Christ's physical incarnation of Perfection and Light.
-
From the center of each planet therein dwells the Perfection and Light, the Knowledge - Form of the
world. The Earth has turned through many ages and many "worlds" or world constructs. For each
new world there must be delivered from that planet's "Holy of Holies" or Sacred Sun Atoma, the
Knowledge - Form of that world, ascending into the Recording Crystals, and on into the Doctrine of
Signature for the planet.
Ezekiel was the physical element for that transfer in his time, for his presence was a testament - a
"record" that would last through the Ages of Man. In truth, Ezekiel's vision was an archetypifying craft,
and thus he was seeing an "other world" vehicle, but also he was witnessing a process in
archetypification. Once again the Knowledge – Form transfer has come to pass, as the old comet tail
infused the Earth's etheric double with the necessary conditioning. Remember that with the
MALKUTH comet (Halley's) the last of the Latter was given up to the New Day.
-
-
The Knowledge - Form dwells within the Anii or Holy Center of the central Sun (atoma) of the planet.
It has a highly radiant physical counterpart – the Foundation Stone of the Illumined, within
Subterrenea. From issue # 4-80 of “THE SOURCE" it is described as a crystal squared, with
six faces and a seventh esoterically being the completeness of the six; and it is the knowledge
of the Law, supporting principle and justice. The Foundation Stone or Holy Cornerstone is
suspended within the inner sanctum of the First Temple, the Most Holy of structures on or
within the Earth, erected upon the bottom of the subterranean ocean. This First Temple, or
TEMPLE OF CENTAURI, contains many records of energy engraved by high laser beams
(interdimensional) into crystal talis sheets formed by thought waves into material elementation.
The "Holy Stone” within the center of the Temple contains the most Christed of constancy
flames - fire eternal, in the center of the stone, which emanates a Christ spark. Each facing is
engraved with a sacred symbol which is recorded in the ethers as one of the creative motions
or xgrams which formed the Earth.
Corinne Heline, in "The New Age Bible Interpretation, Old Testament, Vol. III. writes that Ezekiel's
"creatures" represented “certain Race Spirits for the human kingdom and Group Spirits of the animal
kingdom... The animal Group Spirit is described by modern Seers as a creature predominately human
but with certain characteristics of the species which guards and protects.”
Ms. Heline continues that, “This vision is characteristic of Chaldean Mysteries. It has occasioned
much perplexity among the orthodox because they have failed to use the astrological key that unlocks
its meaning. The four symbolic creatures with the ‘likeness of a man' plainly and obviously represent
the four fixed signs of the Zodiac: Taurus the Bull, Scorpio the Eagle, Aquarius the Man, and Leo the
Lion. They are the Four Recording Angels of Christian esotericism; or, as they are also called, the
Lords of Destiny. The vision of Ezekiel reveals that these four divine Beings are a collective entity;
they work as a unit. In addition to its own special quality, each Being possesses the qualities of the
other three. Their intelligence permeates the entire universe: "Wither the spirit was to go, they went;
and they turned not when they went."
In addition to Ms. Heline's interpretation, my sources tell me that the vitality of the ethers was being
expanded through the more physical process of the craft itself, in order that the multi-dimensional
properties of the new Knowledge – Form could be infused with the (then) current Doctrine of Signature,
causing it to evolve a quantum closer to its Perfection in the Infinity Mandala. Understand that the
Doctrine is the evolving signature of the planet, whereas, the Infinity Mandala is its future-perfect form,
which of course, is always present when one steps outside of the mental/karmic adherence to
past/present/future.
With the workings of the Four Race Spirit Archetypes, which in divine receipt are the Four Recording
Angels, a Way or Path is made for a "New World". My sources measure this as the "Fifth World". To
many esoteric scholars it is identified as the "Sixth Epoch". To quote Ms. Heline again (a passage that
I quoted previously in issue # 4-80): “The Sixth Epoch, or New Galilee, follows the present Fifth or
Aryan Epoch. In that period initiation will be the common experience of the race. Only the 'stragglers'
will remain outside the door of the Mysteries. By then the majority of mankind... will be more or less
conscious of the Christ Fire burning at the core of our globe. During the Sixth Epoch the Master Jesus
will once more appear publically to all. He will lead the human race to its full flowering; and by the end
of the Sixth Epoch most egos will have trod the Path of the nine Lesser Mysteries, whereby they will
have met the Christ face to face at the heart of the earth. To Initiates of the Sixth Epoch this Divine
Being will be worshipped as closer than hands and feet, the indwelling planetary logos of the earth,
while the Divine Man, Jesus, will be adored as the flower of the human race, the Christ Bearer."
In the same 1980 issue of "THE SOURCE", I explain the difference in the Sixth Epoch and the Fifth
World.... The Karmic Man had his first root race in the Adamic generation. As Karmic Man, he
is now approaching his Sixth Root Race. The Illumined Man began his Earth zodiac in what is
termed the First Generation, before the Adamic Man. The Illumined epochs are assuming
divisions in spiritual-cosmic illumination of man, while the Karmic Root Races are divided
through the trials of the karmic consequence on its path to the Source. The path of Illumined
Man is therefore, one to the Illumined Christ within the center of the Earth. The path of Karmic
Man is to the crucified Christ within the carriage soul of the Master Jesus. Karmic Man is then
the image of purification (through) crucifixion (sorrow/Pisces) while Illumined Man is the sign
of transfiguration through Grace (alchemical/Scorpio). In every human soul there abides both
the Illumined and the Karmic Being.
Now is the time for all initiates to commune with the Race Spirits, Group Spirits - all archetypes of our
dimensional solvency, for it is through them and you, the Seeker, that the New Matrice is being filled
for the New World Kingdom. The OX, the EAGLE, the MAN and the LION – their spirito-functions are
given thusly (quotations are from “Bible Interpretation"):
TAURUS/BULL (OX) - ".. added the impulse of formativeness – that is, the power inherent within the
evolving spirit that makes it desire to create forms and to live and function therein." It is also, according
to my sources, the Staff struck into the Earth - that which awakens the feminine attraction of viability
which causes the creation of form out of chaos, and crystallization from distillation.
SCORPIO/EAGLE is the alchemical wing, ascending into the unbridled reaches of Earth's creative
possibilities and transmuting through spiritual alchemy, the mental barriers of human karma. Scorpio
is a challenged path for it is the entrance for the “Lords of Form... At the dawn of the Earth Period the
Hierarchy of Scorpio was given charge over evolving form; from it came all the factors essential to
physical evolution." Because of the mis-use and fall of this evolution, the feathers of the eagle have
become the sacred signals for reclaiming spiritual heritage. Only by re-tracing the Spirit Wheel -
Ezekiel's Wheel, can we dis-entangle our spirit bodies from the web of the physical fall, or descent
from Grace.
AQUARIUS/MAN - "Angels make up the Hierarchy of Aquarius. They work with the desire nature of
men and animals. They oversee the activities of animal Group Spirits and of human tribes and races.
"The Aquarian path is that of the Shepherd. In this shaping is found the mold of mankind's unity with
this brethren, both human and animal. Through Aquarius the Gathering of Tribes will be accomplished
on the Earth.
LEO/LION - "The Lords of Flame of the constellation of Leo contributed to the evolving spirit the initial
impress of the masculine pole or principle (Fire)." Through Leo the pathfinders encounter the
Threshold. The Lion is the High Deva of the Inner Earth Domain, the Guardian of the Divine Seat
within the central sun, and all properties, records, ancient and divine pertaining to the most Holy of
Holies. Through Leo, humankind stretches out its hand to the hidden truths and finds them to be
known only to the Revealer within.
In unity these Four archetypal Magi consign the Rites of Passage to the Solar Boats. Those initiates
whose sails are drawn full into the ancient winds will be brought full circle into the New World.
SUPERIMPOSED IN ANOTHER DIMENSION over the ruins of the grand kiva in Chaco Canyon, N.M.
is a much larger kiva – one resplendent in its sacred power, undefiled by mankind. Its shape is the
representation of the Infinity Mandala (also seen in the Star Gate Circle Pattern: Issue #2-86). This
interdimensional kiva is also integrated, as is the Infinity Mandala, with Ezekiel's Wheel. The inner-
plane kiva, which has only recently manifested over the ruins in Chaco Canyon at Pueblo Bonito, is
the "Illstanza", or Perfect Form. The Illstanza is represented by the thousand-petaled lotus and thus
the kiva's interior divisions are a thousand chambers. Most of these thousand chambers are very
small resounding enclosures which serve the purpose of capturing all sound given off within the kiva
and producing a harmonic vibration, like the
inside of a giant wind instrument. The opening to the kiva bears a sculpted Ram's head above the
door. There are four major doorways inside the first, totaling five doors or paths. The first door all
initiates must enter in order to pass through the other four. Once the Path of the Ram has been taken,
it is up to the initiate to know which of the other four paths he must embark upon at this time. Each
initiate knows that eventually he must experience all five paths. As revealed in Ezekiel's vision, the
four paths after the fifth are designated by the archetypes of the Lion, the Bull, the Eagle and the Man.
Within the central Earth is raised the Illstanza kiva in physical form, duplicating its counterpart on the
inner plane. Among the 12 Sacred Tribes of the Central Earth Domain, this kiva is the essential
activator of the “Perfect Form Realization" within those initiates of the Medicine Wheel who are to
become masters of power service to the planet. No ordained shaman, priest, science master, or
adept of any of the Knowledge Arts can be granted entrance into that power field before first receiving
the realization of his own Perfect Form. This is called the "Ziramund" or "Vision Perfect". It is
achieved by entering the Illstanza kiva which is more than a symbolic representation, but is a vibratory
furnace or amplitude grid for awakening the crown chakra of the body. This, the most sacred of Light
centers in the body is the portal to the Perfect Form, or fulfillment of Divine Perfection that is our true
reality beyond the gates of past, present and future.
After the initiate has entered each of the four doors or gates behind the Ram's Gate, he is presented
with three further entrances, these being the Trinity of the Godhead. Once past these doors, he finds
himself surrounded with “the Song" of the Vision Perfect, humming through the sacred kiva. This
entoning hum is created in the thousand chambers of the kiva as the initiate's spirit being becomes
awakened to his own life song. It is a unifying of all melody in the Earth. It is the sounding of the
humpback whales who play Earth's dreamsong through their fluted bodies; it is the music of the last of
a species, the splash of rose petals falling into a hidden pool, and a mockingbird's laughter. This song
captures the sounds unheard by the human ear - the heavenly choir of stars as their sensitive rays
strike the hollow earth's bell – like mantle; nature devas in a mountain valley - all breaths of life are
set to the music of the initiate's soul. As he walks through the Grand Lotus, the Perfect Form emerges
in his realization of Self.
The Illstanza kiva is a recreation of the engramic stimuli within the brain that unlocks soul-spirit
transcendence. Understand that it is not an artificial stimulus, but a natural attuning device that merely
releases the blocks within that individual which keeps him from perceiving him/herself. Should one not
be ready to see perfection within, the Kiva would be no more than stone to him, and the great
sounding of life, the Song of Songs, would be largely unheard by his ears; what he did hear would be
dis-harmony, for it would be his own cluttered illusion transported to him in sound. Thus, it is only that
single person who may either be opened into the Lotus or remain closed to the sun, regardless of the
Illstanza or any device, even one of a divine nature.
The Gateways of the Trinity are within the logos of the Fish of Pisces (this includes the cetaceans, and
is represented in the Bible by the whale of Jonah), the Goat of Capricorn and the Crab of Cancer.
However, the logos containing the emblemantic (emblem of a mantric frequency) charge of these
stations will change and indeed has changed through time. The Illstanza is in fact change itself,
embodied in an instrument of nature and man. Just as the fragile lotus flower is in transit from life to
death and beyond, so is the human element. Only the spiritual identity of Perfect Form remains the
same, and even this must be perceived from a “moving train” of
quantum dynamics within the soul's patterning; that is until the man/woman embodied spirit cuts the
cord of karma and sails past the Golden Ram's Gate into the Sea of Perfect Form. Here all illusion is
transparent and holds to nothing but its own mask. The stars of mind are stoked by the Archangels in
a fiery furnace of Spirit, and the soul is torn from the Dragon's heart to become a lamb at the feet of
the Shepherd.
The principle of the Illstanza is represented in PARZIVAL, by Wolfram von Eschenbach, as the city
called "Petalamund" (Petal Mound). This is elaborated upon in Trevor Ravenscroft's "The Cup of
Destiny". To quote from Ravenscroft's text, "It is the sixteen -petal lotus flower which Wolfram is
describing... And it is this very organ (of the crown chakra, represented by the lotus) which gives an
insight into the working of the laws of destiny (karma)." While Petalamund was the embodiment of the
sixteen petaled lotus, Illstanza is the continuation of the Eight-Fold Path to the 1,000th power, which in
Light mathematics corresponds to the infinity decimal of the Grand Mandala of the Infinite.
Ravenscroft, in his "The Cup of Destiny" writes, "The unique aspect of the western path, the quest for
the Grail, is that it reverses the whole tradition of the eastern path to higher consciousness. For
instance, all eastern cults insist on the development of the chakras from below upwards. This is to say,
the whole process of the development of these organs, which are based on the endocrine glands,
commences with the opening of the four-petal lotus flower associated with the gonad glands. For this
reason, the eastern path demands a complete withdrawal from life into an ashram, or the like, where a
novice can be protected from all temptation of the world, especially from sexual desire.
The Grail path of Parzival grasps the serpent by the head, developing these centers in sequence from
the cerebral hemisphere downwards. Such a technique permits a way of living fully in the world but in
strict accordance with Christian ideals and responsibilities."
Entry into the Illstanza sets the initiate upon the Grail Path, which is a pathing of spirit-matter
integration. Until matter accepts spirit there can be no resolution of the karma wheel. The Grail Path
is the path to Grace, to the final and complete cutting of the cord that fastens matter to karma. As the
Dreampathers, the shamans of this world homogeneity of inner, outer and inner-plane domains,
gathered in the Chaco, they re-traced the Grail pathing for the world of matter and re-dedicated spirit
to its pursuit of Light engagement with the elements.
On September 4th, 1986, seven days before the Spirit Dance in Chaco (see issue #3-86), the host of
the Anti-Christ achieved his 13th year incarnate within his present Earth embodiment. This host is
now empowered by the Anti-Christ and has begun his seeking for possession of the illusive Archangel
Stone, previously mentioned in several issues of "THE SOURCE”. We can see that since the 4th of
September, Luciferian actions accelerated around the world, most especially in or from the Middle
East, which is the geographic location of the Anti-Christ host. The Sun is the logos of the Illumination
in Spirit - the emblematic of Christ. The Moon is the logos of matter, whether illumined in the spirit
cradle of Goddess Earth, or crafted by the grinding heel of human consequence. It is the weaving of
spirit and matter together through the loom of the Goddess Principle that liberates, thread by thread,
the elemental illusion of karma, and transforms it into the free flight of the grace-bearing dove of Light.
Yet until every thread is woven in its place, the Path of the Moon is, when attached soley to worldly
passions, a trail of tears. Mr. Ravenscroft addresses this insight as it applies to the Middle Eastern
battleground for
world karma clearing thusly: "The Persians, beyond all other peoples, could recognize the nature of
the sun hero (Christ) who, like Ormuzd, is surrounded by his twelve amshaspands, his disciples.
Alexander the Great's wanton destruction (of ancient “Sun God: knowledge and temples) produced a
karmic retribution more than a thousand years later. And, as a result, the Greek nature did not unite
with the impulse of Persia but with the moon culture of the Arabs."
In all fairness to Alexander the Great, my sources state that he was not the central figure in the
destruction and pillaging historically attributed to him. He was an idealist and sensitive poet whose
power structure failed him when he unwittingly delegated his authority to certain generals under him
who were corrupt. Nevertheless, the karmic stage was set in that age by the hands of a dark destiny
for the present confrontation now before us.
As we discussed in previous issues of "THE SOURCE", the Archangel Michael is a "Seed"
encapsulation of the Twin First Flames - Christos and Lucifer, and is now among us to act as a
retriever of the "Archangel Stone" before the Anti-Christ claims it as his power-cone. The meta-
scientific definition of the Archangel Stone or Crystal is that of a vector in which Light may merge with
matter, forming a complete circuit between the two conceptualizations (Light and Matter). It is the
vehicle for the Infinity Mandala, for it allows all it "touches" to realize in matter, its Light perfection. Yet,
if this vector is polarized to the Anti-Christ or Dark Retainer, it can reverse this conception into matter
-locked bonding. The former is then, matter serving Light, whereas the latter is Light serving matter.
From "The Cup of Destiny":
"The sun spirit, behind the golden disc of the sun, was experienced by the Ancient Persians as far
away in cosmic space. By steps, he descended then to earth, and his descent is the descent of the
world savior down into darkness, "And the Light shone in the darkness but the darkness beheld it not."
What then descended was experienced as the cosmic word, sounding in all directions which in shining
sounded and in sounding shone. This light radiating into the depths began to penetrate the forces of
nature in ancient times it was conceived as the image of the bull.... These conceptions passed over
into Manichaean Christianity and were incorporated into the sagas of the Grail, especially in Wolfram
von Eschenbach's PARZIVAL. There we read that, from lofty, starry regions, there shines towards
the depths the figure bearing the firey sword, who in ancient times was called Marduk and in the
Christian era is know as the Archangel Michael, the regent of the cosmic intelligence. He treads
underfoot, the falling spirits. The light -bringer, Lucifer, falls downwards. Through his descent into the
terrestrial regions, he brings man the reflected light – that is knowledge – and is thus able to converse
with him. "Thine eyes shall be opened, and thou shalt discern light and darkness, good and evil." But,
what falls downwards is not only Lucifer; a whole corona of beings accompanies him. The Grail
speaks of this corona as the crown of Lucifer. And then Michael with his firey word-sword strikes one
spirit out of this corona of spirits, out of Lucifer's crown - a spirit of a totally different nature than the
others. One spirit took the path from the heights to the depths not as one falling but as one
accompanying the falling spirits out of free will, in order to bring salvation to the human beings who
were to be delivered over to these fallen spirits."
Ravenscroft, in “The Cup of Destiny", further states that was this angelic being who was vanguard to
the Christos or “sun spirit... for the world logos himself took the same path that the falling spirits took
whom Michael trod underfoot.” In the Grail legend, says Ravenscroft, this vanguard being was
regarded as a jewel in the "Crown of Lucifer". After Michael struck the
"stone of light" from the crown of the fallen archangel, Lucifer, this glorious light being descended to
earth, “forming himself into a vessel to receive the blood of Christ. The vessel became know as the
sacred chalice which held within it the sun host."
Thus we see the host for the Christos on Earth, the Chalice or Grail and the "Archangel Stone" coming
together as faces of the same Light. Ravenscroft continues:
"... this unique being represents wisdom which resolves itself into love. At first, so says the legend, it
was preserved in a mystery cult or Hercules, a Platonic sun hero – that is to say, it was guarded in a
Phoenician temple in Tyre, the city of Hiram, who designed the temple for the Jews. It was then
passed into the hands of the Queen of Sheba, the queen of star wisdom; she brought it to King
Solomon. In such descriptions it is the Path of Wisdom which is described. The same vessel came
into the Essene house in which Christ partook of the Last Supper with his twelve disciples, and the
power which flowed from him to his twelve disciples streamed forth from this Holy vessel. A Jew
brought it to Pilate, for Jesus, Christ was led before Pilate. And when, after the crucifixion, Joseph of
Arimathea begged the body of Jesus from Pilate, Pilate committed to him this precious vessel and he
and his descendants became the guardians of the Holy Grail.”
Ravenscroft leads us to perceive of the Grail as the soul of the Master Jesus, or more accurately, the
Master's Wisdom, infused with the stellar graces of his antecedent in Heaven, the Christos. However,
my sources, most directly, Thoth Hermes, informs me that the Grail, or Archangel Stone, is the "Light
Mathematics" or divine circuitry that transfers matter into Light and vice-versa. This fact is far greater
in universal consequence than might at first be realized. The division between matter and "Light” or
the higher evolutionary waves of spirit, is the Great Wall that obstructs the Oneness of spirit within our
world reality. The Light and Perfection seen as the Infinity Mandala in its accomplished (un-
descended) state, and as the Grail (Archangel Stone) in its hidden form, was inter-faced with the sun
host, Jesus in his perfect balance with the Light-matter circuit. When the Christos entered this perfect
balance of the host soul and the Grail mandala, the planet surged with pure spirit at its very center and
created a new pathing within its Doctrine of Signature. This new pathing is leading us toward the
future perfect of the Infinity Mandala, which cannot be accomplished until the 'hidden' sequence
contained within the Archangel Stone is inter-faced with our central sun, or Holy of Holies.
There is also the physical manifestation of the Archangel Stone or Grail in the chalice cup from
whence Jesus Christ drank at the last supper. It need be understood that the divine circuitry of the
Grail can take any material form as it is the LAW of SPIRIT becoming MATTER and MATTER
becoming SPIRIT, without violation of atomic purity. Thus the "Grail” may take any form so desired by
the Divine Will. The Anti-Christ cannot successfully conquer matter-bonded souls without first
possessing the circuitry that will allow the "anti-force" of the fallen or violated divinity, Lucifer, to control
Light through matter, without mutating atomic structure (which would destroy the matter world, the
very state which Lucifer desires).
At its center, the Grail is a Three-Fold Path. It is the coding or pattern of Light Dynamics which
engages matter to spirit; it is also the esoteric attunement to the Light engendered womb of the
Goddess, where sun and moon embrace their liquidity into a solvent potion to redemption and grace;
and it is the quickening within the Being of transcendent Beauty and Light, who accompanied the
fallen archangel to Earth.
Those who gathered with the Lord about His table as He supped with them for eternity, did not equally
witness the Grail He lifted to his sacred lips. Each saw degrees of spirit-matter transcendency,
accorded them through their own initiatory stages of receipt.
Previous Incarnations Revealed. Revolutionary do it yourself method. Complete course comprising
3 step by step instruction manuals. $15. Jeanday Publications, Z38 Davenport Rd., Suite 363,
Toronto, ONt. M5R 1J6, Canada.

four issues in 1987. The first 1987 issue will be out in February. If you have already subscribed for
1987 in advance, disregard this notice. THANK YOU & BLESSED BE.

# Combined OCR Output

"The Source"
Issue #1-87
In the Himalayas there are several hidden valleys in which the warmth of the sun is gathered
by solar units of ancient means. Other devices draw upon the thermal forces of volcanic
activity beneath the surface of the planet. These tools are employed to heat the geologic and
atmospheric realms of these isolated domains, sequestered upon the crater floor of the long-
dormant volcanoes. It is one of these valleys this “SOURCE” issue addresses. My sources
refer to it as the "VALLEY OF THE BLUE STAR".
I have taken several conscious (and no doubt many more unconscious) mental and astral
journeys into this sacred valley. I am told that it PHYSICALLY exists, and is guardianed by
Tibetan monks, but that it is also inter-dimensionally viable, attracting many “Blue Star” Light
Race souls who venture there in their mental and astral bodies. The Valley is so bonded
etherically as to also be able to support our genetically-linked ultra-terrestrial and inner-Earth
beings. In addition, there are both Egyptian and Tibetan priests and priestesses who have
dwelt in the Valley and served in its temples for hundreds of years, as did their ancestors
before them. There are even a few “pure-blood”, Atlantean descendants amongst them.
Thus, we find in this most special vortex, a melting pot or meeting point in realities, where
inter-dimensional, ultra-physicl, non-physical and astral beings may come together to share
commonality of spiritual purpose and cosmic origin. The guiding inner core of beings
directing the functions of the Valley and its temples are "Blue Star Solarians", discussed
previously in this quarterly. They are those souls who descended to this planet from the "Blue
Star" Rigel in the constellation of Orion eons ago. Yet, all Light Races from Orion, the
Pleiades and the star-sun Sirius in Canis Major are part of this energy patterning, as well, for
together they form the greater body of the Earth's heritage as an originally Light-engendered
sphere. There are other stars and constellations who are permitted entrance into the Valley,
whose spirit ancestry is distantly linked, but the predominant “ancestry" represented is from
the Orion/Pleiades/Sirius Triad.
The purpose of the gathering of the "Tribes" in the Valley is to propagate a continuous flow of
united origin consciousness, beaming out this inward message through “Tribelight" (see
issues #1-82 & #3-83), into synergetic mind of all Triad Star-Seeds on and in the Earth. The
second stage to this plan is the gathering of these star-seeds through mental, astral and
sometimes physical voyaging, into the vortex of the Valley – where the temporal divergence
of these many different personalities is cast aside, and the true reflections of their Light forms
and their cosmogenetic heritage is made manifest.
It was only in 1986 that the radiant healing energies of the Temple complex in the Valley of
the Blue Star was transmitted, through “Tribelight", out into the populated world. Those who
share that commonality may tap this laminate source for physical, mental, and spiritual
healing. When I say “those who share that commonality”, I mean any among us who sense a
belonging to the vibration and origin of the Valley.
I now wish to give you a visual picture of the Valley of the Blue Star. On several of my first
journeys into the Valley of both mental and astral sojourns, I was “flying” along a narrow
pathway high in the snow-laden mountains. As I sensed I was nearing the entrance to the
Valley, I was told by my accompanying guide that I must first enter the "Waystation" - a
modest Tibetan- style building. Once inside, it seemed as if I were somehow adjusted for a
different or multi-frequencied state. I then was allowed to proceed through a doorway which
opened in the side of a mountain. It was very narrow, but once on the other side the beauty
of the Valley was in my sight. It was a verdant landscape somewhat surprisingly reminiscent
of the California Wine country - rolling hills interspersed by flat acres of carefully landscaped
grasses, trees, ponds, lakes and buildings. There is a stream that rushes in terraced
waterfalls from the side of one of the surrounding mountains. Wherever the green blanket of
foliage parts in the water's dance with gravity, the stream ruffles a silver tail and glances a
deep blue eye toward the sky, like a playful kitten amongst Pan's children.
The temples on the floor of the Valley are constructed in patterns which, when viewed from
above (on the mountain slopes or from the air) form consciousness-triggering geometrics. By
inter-linking the temples in this way, determined also by the type of energy progressed within
each temple, an initiate entering a specific temple is joining himself to the entire complex via
that one "chakra" or temple of the whole body. His/her energy processing then, expands from
that particular chamber outward to the whole.
The temples reflect in design Egyptian, Tibetan and South American Indian qualities, which is
also typical of much inner Earth Tribal architecture. These “temples" however, are not
elaborate. Like their inner-Earth counterparts they are quite simple in line, close to the
ground, and flowing with the natural curving of the land. They have a certain “ranch-style"
look with what appears to be, or at least resembles, adobe composition. There are many
windows, courtyards, gardens and fountains. Often a portion of the natural stream is diverted
to small terraced waterfalls within the temples themselves, the residents and visitors in the
Valley enjoy the company of many birds, a majority of which are most certainly not indigenous
to Tibet. There are parrots, cockatoos, redbirds (and of course “blue” birds). Peacocks grace
the grounds, along a myriad of small birds hidden in the trees. I was in one chamber that
contained an assortment of perches and birds of all types sitting patiently atop, as if awaiting
a yet unspoken command. There is obviously a purpose for such an abundance and variety
of birds in the Valley. There is much about the purposes of this haven I do not yet know.
After I had been going into the Valley for awhile, a female friend of mine who shares a “Blue
Star" heritage with me, disclosed some information she had acquired concerning a valley in
the Himalayas one strikingly similar to the "Origin" Valley of the Blue Star. She had read a
book by a woman who had physically gone there in the 1920's. No mention had been made
of the esoteric content of the valley, but only her prime interest, which were the rare blue
Chow dogs. A breeder of these unique canines, this woman had heard there was a valley in
Tibet where she could find many of the rarest of the chows - the blue. She was allowed
through the Waystation and far enough into the Valley to see a "herd” of blue Chows on a
green hillside! Blue Chows are supposed to be sterile, but judging by their number, this fact
did not hold true, at least not in this particular valley.
Chows, my friend, informed me have cat-like qualities (felines originated on the planets of the
star-sun Rigel). They all have feline-shaped feet and blue tongues. They are especially
gentle, loving and intelligent. If one has ever looked into the eyes of a Chow he/she is left
with the compelling sense that he has gazed upon some devic master. I questioned my
source about the "Chow" connection and they confirmed that the blue Chow was the Devic
guardian of the Valley of the Blue Star, having originally descended from one of the planets of
Rigel.
To the Temple complex once again, there are two central "bonding points" – places where the
bonding or rapport with the energy grid of the Valley is the strongest. They are the Origin
Flame in the Temple of Osiris and the Pool of Isis in the temple by that name. The Origin
Flame streaks blue like the jet of a powerful butane, emitted from what to me, resembles a
golden Frisbee. As amusing as this comparison may be, that is the closest description I can
give as to the shape of the vessel. However, its size is much larger, approximately 5 times
that size, with the blue flame ejecting about 2 feet into the air.
The room is Spartan, with a large window or veranda leading into a garden from the left of the
vessel. When I see the Origin Flame, I am so entranced that I do not notice the details of the
chamber. The Pool of Isis is a simple sky-blue pool. It appears as if the inside of the pool
has been coated with a slightly luminescent light blue coloration. It is opened to the sky, inset
within a white marbled floor, Egyptian columns surrounding it. The Origin Flame is, of course,
the Solar/male polarity and the Pool of Isis is the Moon/female response. When wishing
bonding and entrance into the Valley, begin by using the Origin Flame and then the Pool of
Isis as your meditation signals.
Those of you who feel drawn to bond with the Valley of Origin in the Orion/Pleiades/Sirius
Triad, should find mental and possibly astral voyages there inspiring and enlightening – both
personally and as a Light worker on a planetary scale. Should any of you wish to share your
"Blue Star Valley" experiences with me, you are welcome to do so. Please state if you wish
your information to be kept confidential.
The Mountain and the Sea
By James Dillet Freeman
When the mountain meets the ocean, do they talk of heights or deep? Can a mountain
Think of motion or an ocean think of steeps? In myself what ocean thunders and what
Endless waters roll while I wander and I wonder on what silent peaks of soul, and on
Heights too high for going I touch deeps to deep to know, and from deeps to deep for
Knowing reach toward heights too high to go - O' matchless mystery of me that is the
Mountain and the sea!
"MAGII FROM THE BLUE STAR - The Spiritual Drama and Mystic Heritage of Elvis Aaron
Presley", by Christine Hayes, with major contributions by Wanda June Hill... This work is
presently available exclusively through TREDS for $18.00pp.
1987 Cottonland Tours announcement: "Cottonland Tours (of Memphis, TN.) is incorporating
the King, Elvis Presley, with the ancient King, Ramesses the Great. In honor of the
Ramesses Exhibition visiting Memphis from April 15 - Aug. 30, 1987, we have put together
several tour packages including one highlighting Ramesses and Elvis. Both kings have
strong ties to Memphis, TN. Ramesses the Great ruled ancient Egypt when Memphis was
Egypt's capitol; while Elvis Presley started his career and lived in the present day Memphis.
We will be offering this special one day tour including admissions to the Ramesses Exhibition,
Graceland and lunch throughout the length of the exhibition."
The special "Two Kings" tour will be in progress during "Elvis International Tribute Week", the
10th anniversary of Elvis' death being August 16th. International Tribute Week is held each
year memorializing this date, as many thousands of 'pilgrims' come from all corners of the
Earth to share memories and tribute to the “the Man from Tennessee”. Ironically, in a past
incarnation, Elvis, a Blue Star Solarian, was an architect of Ramesses the Great.
Communication from the Guardians in January 1987:
What we wish to disclose to you at this time will be difficult for you to fully understand. Much
of its deeper content we will not attempt to bring into your consciousness for now, lest you
become too distracted by intracies of the grander matrice.
We begin with Atlantis, in the Age of its fullest enlightenment, when it was AT-ONE with the
Mother Empire (Lemuria) and AT-ONE with beings of other worlds and dimensions. Even in
this enlightened Age, Earth's inhabitants were not aware that the etheric charge of the planet
was diminishing, which would eventually cause catastrophic changes on the Earth, Atlantis
was at the forefront of this awareness because of her technological mastery, together with her
space-time communions with other world constructs. Lemuria was more the retreat, the
garden. It was Leumria's attitude that life would unfold asa it should and that mankind's hope
lay in keeping the “Pure Thought”. While most Atlantean minds agreed that the pure of spirit
would (eventually) inherit the Earth, they also believed in mental and physical application of
spirit. Some were too aggressive in their forms of application, yet others sought to strike a
balance between spiritual surrender and human will.
The most sacred and secret of programs with this endeavor in mind, was begun in a temple of
Atlantis called ALISA. The ALISA was established by five priests, and four priestesses of a
larger temple grouping. This new sect, broken off from the main branch, were somewhat
outcast from the rest of the intricate templaric system of Atlantis. The ALISA was an
abbreviation of the word "alisaphane", for which a meaning in modern-world languages is
difficult to approach. It ascribes to the ancient principle that whatever is removed from one
space, so something else must fill that space in return, even if the substance is not visible to
the human eye, For instance, if a cup of waster is poured into a well, the then-empty cup is
not truly empty. It not only contains space, it is left with a charge or quality of the well into
which the water was poured. Further, if a bird looses a feather in mid-flight and it lands upon
the earth, that looses a feather in mid-flight and it lands upon the earth, that small pinion
mirrors the entire bird, but also the spot of earth where the feather lies is reflected in the bird
whose body was once grace by the feather. The meaning of alisaphane, then is that of
perfect exchange, perfect balance, perfect oneness. For everything that is taken away,
something is given, tithed from that source of point to which the substance is taken.
Thus the Temple of ALISA was raised for the purpose of just such a tithing. The ALISA
priests and priestesses had established a synchronistic contact with a grouping of tribal
relationship from Orion, the Pleiades, and Sirius. To establish such contact was not unusual
for Atlanteans in that period, but the intended purpose was unique. It was known by most
knowledgeable Earth tribes in that time that other-world beings could not simply migrate here
(in a direct physical sense) and become part of Earth's life-wave. This had been done in the
distant past, before the etheric bonding of the planet was set, but no longer was this possible.
Understand that other-world tribes could and sometimes did settle upon the Earth in that
period, but they could not do so in any large number, nor could they maintain their
power/spirit frame for any great length of time. This was due to the fact that Earth's etheric
bonding caused all species existing in this karma-reality frame to seek a common level. Not
an exact sameness, but a commonality of basic grounding in order for the planet as a unit to
progress, rather than having extreme karmic situations working out their scenarios in the
same reality frame together. As diverse as this world may seem, there is a commonality
holding you together. Without that, no karmic order could be progressed among parts of the
whole.
It was the purpose of the ALISA and their other-world counterparts, whom they named the
ONATA, we call here the ABACUS-MAXIM. To quote the World Book Encyclopedia, the
abacus "is a device used to add and subtract. Beads or balls strung on wires in a frame
represent numbers... each wire of beads on an abacus corresponds to one column of figures
in written numerals... In the abacus, the beads strung on the extreme right wire represent
numbers 1 to 9. The beads in this row above the horizontal bar count 5 each, and those
below this bar count 1 each. Beads in the next row represent tens (10 to 99), those below the
bar 10 each, and those above it, 50. The third row from the right represents hundreds and
the next row thousands, and so on. To add on the abacus, beads are moved toward the
horizontal bar."
Now picture the nine ALISA as beads below the horizontal bar, in the extreme right column.
Above the horizontal bar, in that same column, see the ONATA. There is established an
alignment of energy between these specific individuals – those below the bar carrying the +
charge and those above carrying the – factor. Through the accumulative will of these
participating individuals, a reciprocity is developed which brings forth a charge of commonality
within the horizontal bar. The horizontal bar (or factor) then, acts as a battery that is receiving
both positive and negative charges. Were these two very extreme charges to attempt
bonding without the bar or "zero factor" between them, they would destroy one another in a
burst of anti-matter as a matter reversal would occur at the point of enjoinment.
Whenever two or more parallel matter universes come together they must discharge their
mechanism or bonding principle, creating an in-rush of opposite charge or “phantom lock",
which is the conversion of electrons into positrons (anti-matter) faster than the mind or central
reactive mode of the atom can recognize the release. Thus, a phantom image remains of the
electrons, after their conversion into anti-matter. This causes the "mind” of the atom to collide
its matter form with its own phantom barriers. Ironically, this is much like the mind of mankind
colliding with barriers of its own cerebral consciousness, which are phantoms of a removed
reality - one no longer in the realm of the fast-changing future perspective.
Back to the abacus scenario, we see the ALISA and the ONATA creating their own etheric
bonding, their own mini-universe- an amalgam of both worlds, using the horizontal bar as the
point of commonality. It is a safe register that is neutral to either force's “mind set”. Once the
commonality is established, an alisaphane exchange of the highest order beings to take place.
The ONATA, having access to the power field of the ALISA, transfer a portion of their Light or
power to the ALISA. The ALISA must seek balance with this new energy, thus they give to
the ONATA an energy from their state of being. In order to accomplish this entire exchange,
the sentient forms on both sides of the "horizontal bar” must work as units of specific quantum
registers. There must always be more ALISA in the unit than there are ONATA in order for
the balance to be met. For 9 ALISA there is 5 ONATA. This exchange must be doubled in
the next sequence – there must be 14 ALISA and 10 ONATA. As the sequences progress,
there are certain other processes which we will not explain at this time in order to maintain as
simple a format for you as possible, but this Light transport does arrive at a zero factor where
a reversal is triggered, at which time this energy exchange begins to manifest on a physical
level on the + side of the "bar".

In accomplishing the full “game” or program of ABACUS MAXIM, the ALISA and ONATA
hoped to bring into the Earth's continuum large amounts of pure state energy, spiritual yet
powerfully dynamic energy to infuse the planet for a more advanced life-wave, closer to its
original Threshold. Because of certain negative elements which destroyed their project (the
small yet infamous League of Marna – a satanic supermaoist band) they did not achieve the
success they had striven toward. Nevertheless, before their demise they were able to
poisitively effect their age through using this energy bonding for healing, transmuting of plant
life into upgraded cycles, creating new crystal forms for multi-light uses, etc. In Egypt, under
THOTH RAISMES (Hermes), more work was done with the ONATA as these same souls re-
grouped with full memory of their past efforts. Again, however, the full projection was not
achieved, this time due to the evil Amun priestcraft.
In the Valley of the Blue Star, there is a similar frequency to the “zero factor”, where many
different frequencied beings may share their commonality in a physical/etheric experience. In
attuning to that latitude in consciousness, one may abide with the currents of communion that
make such inter-connectedness as ABACUS-MAXIM viable in the past, present and future.
That which allows this transfer ( of alisaphane), the thought or inbreath/out-breath that carries
all energy exchanges, is the SOMIS. The ONATA Master who co-ordinates the ABACUS-
MAXIM is identified as NUM-SOMIS – he who represents the Somis.
For use as a meditative contact point, see yourself and your Light-minded companions in a
starship, racing toward a sphere of common bonding in which your radiant counterparts await
you. Know that the more advanced actual starship vehicles are powered by the culminative
psi power of its occupants. See yourself and your companions experiencing the rushing of
united senses soaring through you and the ship as one, causing the manifestation of speed,
flight, dimensional expansion - to implode your senses as a streaking rainbow of brilliant color
and life. For the first time, aboard your starship, you are experiencing LIFE. The momentum
of spirit engaging flesh, contacting and accelerating electricity within the atoms of being is that
coming of age for the Earth-bound, when they break free from the infrequent rumblings of
distant fortunes and penetrate the whirlwind.
PREVIOUS INCARNATIONS REVEALED. Revolutionary do it yourself method. Complete
course comprising 3 step – by – step instruction manuals. $15. Jeanday Publicactions, 238
Davenport Rd. Suite 363 Toronto, ONT M5R1J6 Canada.
Saturday July 25, 1986
CHERNOBYL REVISITED
Political, economic, health fallout still rains on Soviet life
By Serge Schmemann
New York Times, News Service
MOSCOW - A prominent Russian writer recently produced a tattered old bible and with a
practiced hand turned to the Apocalypse.
"Listen", he said, "this is incredible: 'And the third angel sounded, and there fell a great
star from heaven, burning as it were a lamp, and it fell upon the third part of the rivers and
upon the fountains of waters and the name of the star is wormwood; and the third part of the
waters became wormwood; and many men died of the waters, because they were made
bitter."
In a dictionary, he showed the Ukranian word for wormwood, a bitter wild herb used as
a tonic in rural Russia: Chernobyl.
The writer, an atheist, was hardly alone in pointing out the apocalyptic reference to the
star called chernobly. With the uncanny speed common to rumor in the Soviet Union, the
discovery had spread across the Soviet land, contributing to the swelling body of lore that has
shaped the public consciousness of the disaster at the Chernobyl atomic power plant in the
Ukraine.
"HE HAS MADE EVERYTHING BEAUTIFUL IN ITS TIME; ALSO HE HAS PUT ETERNITY
INTO MAN'S MIND." ECCLES. 3:11


<!-- END FILE S87-01.md -->

---
title: The Source Issue 2-87

# Combined OCR Output

The Source
ISSUE #2-87
In meditation I saw a clearing in a forest where tall green grasses grew. Attached to these
grasses were Light Beings whose forms were gene-like in that they had head, upper torso
and arms, but their lower trunk was a swirl of light, funneling into an undetermined point.
Their "hair" was like a flame, rising from the head. The faces were fairy-formed in that they
appeared child-like yet wisened, with a faint oriental turn of the eyes, which in this scenario,
were closed. Their arms were crossed over their chests and they seemed asleep or in a
chrysalis state. The forms began gently weaving, as if stirred by a breeze. This motion
slowly increased until they were actually spinning in an easy motion, still attached to the
grasses.
The next night, in that twilight between sleep and waking, I saw Beings of the same type
again. However, this time they were golden and quite awake. There were thousands of them,
their arms out before them, hair or flames streaking as they formed a giant wave of golden
light. I saw the Earth beneath them as they rushed over its surface. Their mouths were open
and they emitted a singing that was one tone in harmony – one vibrant sound that filled me
with expectation.
Still another day I was outside meditating with my crystals, allowing the sun and sky to merge
within me and fill the empty spaces. In my mind's eye, the Beings revealed themselves to me
once again. There were several around me. The time had come for them to identify
themselves. They did not speak, but communed nonetheless. I was told by them that they
were what was known by Native Americans as “Kachinas”. They explained that the term
encompassed two form―types of being. One was the people from other worlds of a high
spiritual energy – the ultra-terrestrials. But, the majority of Kachina contact made through the
ages with Shamans has been their kind, who, they told me, were the highest of devic
"cosmorphic" beings on the Earth. I knew “devas” were nature spirits of all types, and that
"cosmorphic" meant the angelic counterpart in the Nature Kingdom. Yet, the Kachinas are
apparently the most advanced of these cosmorphic forms.
They have specific functions, at this time being to awaken latent Earth-energy sources
areas clogged by physical, mental and spiritual abuse, and to begin regeneration of the
ancient "calendars" of time-frames, from which we, as a planetary whole have become
separated. In the Ancient Days the dwellers of Terra were harmonized to a Divine Order,
balanced in the workings of the cosmic clock. It was a rhythm each sentient human contained,
pulsing within his/her genetics, attuning that being to the celestial timepiece of the universe.
Because of the many re-programmings mankind has since submitted to, only a faint ticking of
this motion is left within their biology.
© copyright 1987, Christine Hayes
Although not "physical" like our ultra-terrestrial brethren, the devic Kachinas were star born,
formed from particles of the divine Living Lights or Archangels within the star-suns. They are
the ABRHION (aa-br-hon). In the first stages of Earth's creation they are formed a bonding
for Light-balanced matter. As seeds or programs of creative potential, the ABRHION were
delivered into the center of the Earth. Within the Central Sunn Atomas they were germinated,
quicken within the womb of the Mother. Their birthing was a deliverance of fully formed
ABRIHION into the central cavity of the planet. The Kachinas-Abrhion were the guardians of
all Light-balanced matter within and on the Earth. As they arose to the surface of our world, it
was they who were known as the “Elohim” in the Bible, for they were the co-creators of life-
forms, in that they brought together the archetypal patternings from the Creator's Mind into
physical conformity.
As ages passed and mankind populates the planet, the Kachinas were forced to withdraw
from the surface of the Earth, maintaining themselves within the more illuminated interior
world which they share with the Central Earth Tribes. However, even within the "Sacred
Hollow" there is only need for a few of the ABRHION to be active, as without the dynamics of
a complete world, the ABRHION cannot serve their purpose of sustaining the Light Dynamics
of this sphere. Thus, most of the ABRHION are in a chrysalis state, as I saw them, in small
colonies within the forest lands set aside for them within the inner Earth.
The Kachinas, Abrhion who visited me in my crystal meditation, told me that in my second
vision I had foreseen the future when they would create a rushing of light, as their radiant
forms swept across the Earth, changing the frequency of all matter-bonded substance to the
radiation of the Creator's Light. This would be enacted when the world reached “LP-40” –
something I have known about for several years – that moment when this planet quantum-
leaps into another dimensions, taking with it those who open their heart-chakras to the
Sounding. I had heard this great and moving harmony in my meditations before, but as the
Kachinas communed with me, I realized it was the who would be issuing the sacred clarion.
When the Culture Holders reactivated the devic centers on their DREAMPATHING (issue nos.
3&4), they prepared the way for the awakening of the Kachina. Only a few at this time are
awakened, but more will follow in select groups of “matas”. Each mata contains ABRHION of
the same patterning. Apparently there are many different pattern groups, each conforming to
a specific "Doctrine of Signature" or creation bonding. There are matas that work with the
archetypes of the air, others that work with the sea natures, still others that weave the star
radiation into the heart of the planet. There is a mata that serves only cetaceans, another that
works with the tectonic plates of the Earth. There are other devas, both the higher
cosmorphus and the lesser spiriti, that work under them, but they are the zenith or utmost
Spirit Guardians of the Nature Realm. Now that the Kachinas are being awakened they will
begin to re-form the nature veil or etheric imprint of nature about the planet that has been so
torn and mutilated. I do not see this all
happening overnight, nor is it occurring slowly. There is a definite urgency to accomplish
among them.
A dream I had experienced the night I saw the "Rushing” – the waves of singing ABRHION,
was then interpreted for me by my small group of Kachinas. In the dream, I had been leading
a band of seven or eight people through a green countryside. I was taking them toward a
great misty cloud that settled low on the land in the distance. As we progressed upon our
journey, the landscape changed. It became a dark red earth, barren of all but the fewest
shrubs. The sky grew tainted with an orange-red color and we began to hear an almost
deafening low roar. As we entered the misty cloud, the land which we were traversing began
to wind upward, with only a narrow path to guide us. We now ascended an ominous red
mountain or giant rock. Although, there was foreboding, there was also a strange sense of
belonging and spiritual rapport. As I experienced it, the dream was sending me confusing
signals. Somewhere near the summit of this giant boulder I instructed my band to turn around.
I told them we could no longer continue upward as it would be impossible for us to withstand
the increasing sound. We must retreat and “prepare further” for this mission before returning.
Thus, we headed back down the martian-like mound with some difficulty.
The Kachinas told me that I had been seeing into the future when the dimensions of the world
began to shift and, as in the past, various inter-dimensional portals would open wide ( as they
did in the time of AVALON, only in the future age this will occur to a greater extreme). The
sound we heard was not demonic, but their bonding. The location was Australia, and it was
Ayers Rock we were attempting to ascend. (This is where the "Christ KA" ascended from the
planet in 1986.) Ayers Rock will be one of the main locations where a "hole” will exist
between dimensions through which many embodied souls will seek to pass, leaving behind
the dissolution of the one world – the decaying past, into the "New Heaven and Earth" that will
then exist on the other side. It is the time that my sources have spoken of when there will be
"Two Worlds". When the "LP-40” shift occurs the dimensional splitting will take place
(although it will bend a little before then) and there will be the world of destruction and
catastrophe on the side and a world of New Birth on the other. The band of people with me
were those on the New Earth side, attempting to “rescue” some souls who had changed their
destructive course at the "Eleventh Hour". They were attempting to cross through, but without
the aid of our + polarity to ground their – charge, they would not be able to accomplish this
goal. I turned the band around when I realized we had not come prepared. We ourselves
could not withstand the tremendous discrepancy between the vibrations of these two world
poles, evidenced in the roaring of the ethers. The message was that we need to prepare,
through soul-work and meditation, so that our etheric bodies will be strong enough to endure
the enormous strains of this splitting, not only for ourselves, but for the weaker embodied
whom we must not fail to help across in that last hour.
Recent News Article: Six Soviet cosmonauts said they witnessed the most awe-inspiring spectacle ever
encountered in space – band of glowing angels with wings as big as Jumbo Jets. According to "Weekly World
News", cosmonauts Vladimir Solevev, Oleg Atkov and Leonid Kizim said they first saw the celestial beings last
July, during their 155th day aboard the orbiting Salyut 7 space station. "What we saw," they said, "were seven
giant figures in the form of humans, but with wings and mistlike halos, as in the classic depiction of angels. Their
faces were round with cherubic smiles." Twelve days later, the figures returned and were seen by three other
Soviet scientists, including woman cosmonaut Svetlana Savitskya. "They were smiling,” she said, " as though they
shared in a glorious secret."
When the Dreampathers ritually walked the planet this past year, they touched the moon-
fragments buried beneath all the great ancient structure (the Great Pyramid of Giza,
Stonehenge, Machu Pichu, Gateway of the Sun, etc.) These fragments are remnants of our
planet's second moon, destroyed by the comet that plunged Atlantis' last islands ( by then no
longer a complete land mass) into the sea. This fallen moon was named "Mayah" by the
Atlanteans (meaning "in likeness of Light”). Our remaining moon was Obrigon" (meaning
"desert sun" - having been deserted by its “Twin Flame”).
Mayah was the feminine charge with Obrigon carrying the masculine pole. With the Earths
feminine charge short - circuited, the masculine ray controls the cosmic activity, the stellar
dynamics in the Earth, and the mental plane of mankind that causes them to strive for the
stars via technology. Without the masculine mind, the Earth and its inhabitants could not
produce in a dynamic consciousness. They would become stagnant dreamers, never able to
realize their visions.
The feminine charge on the other hand, projects and nurtures the Nature Kingdom. It is the
Song of the Mother, resonant and pure, that calls into the heart of every living thing. This
feminine aspect opens the emotional plane to mankind, bringing to each sentient soul the
knowledge of love and belonging. While the Earth itself contains each of these charges within
it, the two moons acted as diodes, balancing and sustaining the pulsing between these
opposites. When the “beloved Mayah was torn from the satin breast of the Morning Dove," so
the Atlantean verse extols, “she was ground under the heel of the mighty warrior (comet) and
left to languish a broken heart, as a rose cut from the vine looses color and dies." Yet, the
broken pieces of her body remain. Like sacred relics, they contain the living charge of their
once-risen host. The Madonna of our Heaven lives in each of these fragments, buried under
the supervision of knowledgeable priests and priestesses, aligned to a magnetic axis of pre-
destined measure. "Ye whose face is enchanted with Light - ye art the diving mistress,
whose fallen grace shall mark with shadows the paths of the sun."
In the last week of December, 1986, a rare alignment of the Earth, its' moon and sun occurred,
causing tidal shifts on the planet reported by the news networks. This alignment, as the
ancients had predicted, created subtle magnetic differences in the planet that triggered the
moon-fragments' feminine signals. It was this signaling that was the key turning in the lock for
the awakening of the Kachinas. As the feminine Nature charge
was so strongly resonant at the time, the ABRHION were able to open the door and begin the
Awakening.
It was after relating much to me concerning their existence and future purpose, the ABRHION
asked me to dance with them. In the dance we were awakening yet another series of mata
from their chrysalis state. I do not understand why they have chosen to communicate with me
and include me in their dance, but I do feel that the more surface Earth humans who respond
to them at this time, the better the Kachinas will be able to fully awaken into their designs or
patternings of conscious direction.
The Kachinas spoke to me of the regeneration of “ancient calendars” – on August 16th of this
year a vital shift in our time cycle will occur. The following information on this occurrence was
submitted to "THE SOURCE” by Jason Leen, a talented channeler and guide into the "Infinity"
workshop.
THE MAYAN SUN-STONE: THE COMPLETION OF AN AGE
"An event is approaching us in August of this year that will have a profound and far-reaching
influence upon our entire planet, while conceivably creating a 'spatial inter-face' with the
awaited Golden Age.
A timing sequence of vast proportions is coming to completion. The physics of this
completion are far to complex to fully elaborate upon here, but the heart of the matter is held
within an Ancient Mayan term for this coming event – 'The End of the Counting of Days'.
The Mayans utilized a method of computation that enabled them to create a calendar that
prefectly chronicled this sequence. This computation system allowed them to accurately
describe events hundreds of millions of years in the past, and to prophecy the actual day that
Cortez would land at Vera-Cruz; but it would not allow them to see beyond August 16, 1987.
A vast alteration of time destine for that date shall enfold the Earth and the beginning of a new
age shall be upon us.
In preparation and celebration of this coming event, I, Jason Leen, will be conducting a
workshop tour through some of the most important Mayan sites connected to the creation of
the Sun-Stone calendar, as well as exploring new revelations concerning its' true purpose in
several unique workshops designed for this tour. The tour will be conducted during the nine
sacred days of transition beginning near Cancun on August 16 and completing in Mexico City
on August 24. Limited Space is available, early registration please."
CONTACT: Jason Leen, P.O. Box 164, Selma, OR 97538
I have heard glowing reports on Jason's previous workshop-tours.
THOTH HERMES ON PENETRATION OF EGYPTIAN PYRAMIDS BY SOUND WAVES
The project now being employed by the Japanese to penetrate the Giza pyramids and land
area with sound waves is very much apart of the process to awaken the latent energies of this
ancient complex. Understand that the Giza complex, since the time of its first inception, has
been a continuously working system, acting as a giant receptor and distributor of inter-
dimensional grid factors – most of this is beyond, the Great Pyramid and its accompanying
complex is a multi-functioning devise as well as a repository of records. Mystics of this age
tend to think of this repository as being solely written texts, but the more important information
is to be released in vibration, much like playing a phonograph record, only there will be no
audible sound. It will be a process of inter-penetration of dimensions in consciousness. The
sound waves that are now penetrating the complex are triggering release of certain seals,
there being many seals or shields keeping these energy records intact. Although, those
involved do not realize their roles in this releasing, they are nevertheless serving a prophetic
unfoldment. However, these sound waves are interfering with the present function of the
complex, disrupting "Old Guards" - energy forms created by the ancient priests set the guard
the seals. This is a necessary negative aspect to the ultimate positive release. Most of the
guardian forms were created by Aton or Light priests, yet some were set into motion by the
Amun or Dark forces.
There will be certain images set loose from both these aspected guardian form types as they
are disturbed. Some of the less anchored ones (of both types) will disintegrate entirely. This
will send their shattered “bodies" into the astral plane, where again, they can affect the souls
of Earth in their dreams, visions, and emotions - but only for awhile as, not being ensouled
but entirely energy constructed, they will dissipate completely in weeks or months. The
effects will for the most part, be only slight, but those entities on Earth who are carrying a
related karma to these astral forms will be affected more strongly.
Thus, in the short term certain disruptions and disturbances will result because of the sound
wave penetration of the pyramid complex, but in the ultimate view, it is the first major step in
breaking through certain long-contained shields, some of which never should have been
imposed. This unfoldment is synchronized with the awakening of the Kachinas, for it is they
who brought the first knowledge – form to Earth, placing it in the central sun of this planet. IT
is the Kachinas or ABRHION who will activate, through Ezekiel Wheel (issue #4-86), the New
Axis within the pyramid complex, releasing the records. Certainly, as prophesied, physical
humans will be the discoverers, but only after the ABRHION have activated the New Axis,
which is another bi-polar grid within the complex, separate fro the lesser one in which it
operates now.
During this period of fragmentation, as many souls are affected by the sound-wave
penetration of the sensitive pyramid planetary complex, individuals and groups may wish to
utilize special shielding and light action in order to keep centered. However, the Aton
guardian energy forms that are shattering and those simply being activated enough to give off
pulses of imaging, can be useful to the initiatory process, for they were Light conceived, and
thus radiate spiritual impetus. Nevertheless, it need be understood that they were created to
guard specific knowledges and locations of those knowledges. They are not sentient beings,
but robots of energy. Consequently, when receiving transmission from them one needs to
realize the limitations imposed. The Amun guards are, of course, to be avoided. If some of
this fragmented energy touches you, simply invoke the opposite charge. Calling upon the
Egyptian Archetypes of THOTH, ANUBIS, ISIS, BASDT, NEPHYTS and/or SEKEMET would
bring especially assured results, since each of these Archetypes projects a specific type of
protective focus, assimilating all six together would be quite effective.
FROM ONMI, April 1987:
..new research has turned up at least one surprising analogy between inner and outer Earth:
Parts of the inside, say Thomas Jordan and Kenneth Creager, may feature massive, mobile
structures roughly similar to the continents on the surface. Jordan and Creager borrowed
from modern medicine a technique called computerized axial tomography and used CAT
scans to peer inside the inner earth in much the same way a neurologist scopes inside a
human brain. With this tool they were able to profile the planetwide vibrations set up by large
earthquakes; they used that profile to draw three-dimensional maps of the earth's interior.
