# Combined OCR Output

"THE SOURCE"
Issue # 1-88
1988-89 Listing of Planetary Grid System Education Materials
For price list, send SASE to:
Conservative Technology
105 Wolpers Road
Park Forest, Illinois 60466
**EarthStar – Our full color, 17x22 inch map of the planetary grid. Printed on
durable cardstock, it shows grid lines, zones of seismic activity, major ocean
currents, river systems, and climatic zones. Available pre-punched for folding
EarthStar's base
into an 8 1/2" earth crystal or unpunched for wall-mounting.
includes basic information on the grid suitable for beginners (and elementary
school children!) and shows how the grid can be used to very easily calculate
distances between different places on the planet. Also, includes an EarthStar
geometry fact sheet and a standard mercator map with the latitude and
longitude for all major planetary grid intersections.
**Grided World Globes – We use both 9″ and 12" Replogle brand globes and add
the planetary grid lies in transparent graphic screen tape.
**
*Poster: World Grid/Sefirotic Tree - Printed on 17 x 22 inch parchment paper, we
have superimposed the ancient Sefirotic Tree of the Kaballah on the continent of
Africa to reveal a dramatic correspondence to the Planetary Grid as well as what
may once have been an ancient pilgrimage map.
**Basic Geometric Models Kit – Five geometric forms (crystalline shapes) – the
tetrahedron, cube, octahedron, icosahedron and dodecahedron – have been
proposed by ancient cultures and modern science alike to be the building blocks
of creation. The kit includes patterns for each of these forms, complete
instructions, and the meanings of each form as ascribed by the ancient Greek
mathematicians. Construction takes about half an hour, and the only materials
required are tape and scissors.
**"
*“Detailed Grid” Products – If EarthStar is the planet's most basic "energy
skeleton", there is certainly a more elaborate and detailed network of energies
that can also be proposed. Using geometries and energetic models proposed
by the late R. Buckmeister Fuller (Inventor of the geodesic dome), we have
developed the following:
**
*Acetate Overlay Card - a clear plastic wallet sized card that fits over
the diamonds of the EarthStar map to reveal the more detailed grid.
*United States Map – The hundred plus intersections of the United States'
detailed grid are mapped with increasing detail on a 11 x 17 inch map, a
34 x 52 inch Rand McNally map, and a Rand McNally Road Atlas. Grid
lines in the Road Atlas are color coded, with a complete geometric
meaning for each type of line. Detailed maps of individual states are also
available.
*Slide/Tape Program - A one hour introductory talk by Dr. Bethe
Hagens, Professor of Cultural Anthropology at Governors State University,
exploring the many facets of planetary grid lore - from ancient cultures
and "out of body" experiments, to contemporary microbiology and
superconductor theory. Accompanied by an optional slide show of 10,
25 or 50 slides.
**Article Reprints - All include bibliographic references, illustrations.
**Special Educators'Kit – includes prepunched EarthStar package; basic
geometrics model kit; acetate overlay card; 11x17 inch detailed United States
Map; comprehensive bibliography; Chris Birds' "Planetary Grid" article; Bethe
Hagen and Bill Becker's article " The Planetary Grid: A New Synthesis"; and four
coloring sheet masters.
"THE SOURCE"
Issue # 1-88
It is a
Welcome to our Journey in the Rainbow for 1988.
path I look forward to sharing with you. In this issue we will step
inside two separate culture experiences bound together in the
wisdom of the Rainbow Serpent.
This is the undulating, rhythmic flow of spiritual birthing that
proceeds that proceeds from the womb of all creative matrices.
feminine in function and masculine in activation.
It is
As most of you know, I work under the guidance of an
“Illuminari” from the inner Earth, THOTH OF RAISMES. There are
others with whom I work under his capstone, but until now, he
has been my major contact within The Circle of Guardians. With this
issue you will be introduced to a new entry into this 'Guardianship',
apparently of equal standing in the Circle to THOTH. This person is
also an inner Earth Illuminari, but of the feminine side of polarity.
She is the Crystal Woman, and like THOTH was one of the five
souls of MERLIN (for reference: see issues 3&4/87). As with all
Illuminaries she is able to shape-shift, not only into various animal
forms, but through her entire catalog of incarnations – past, present,
and future. Her main body, however, is that of her first Earth
incarnation in the First Dreamtime of Australia.
This issue contains insights and revelations from these two
illuminate sources: THOTH & CRYSAL WOMAN. We begin with
THOTH, in the "Capstone Transformation Ceremony of PA-
HANOK". This ceremony was given to me as part of a recent
seminar in San Antonio, Texas entitled, The Pyramid Initiation,
presented by the Head of the Coptic Fellowship.
Their presence
among our circle here was inspiring. Together we built a
harmonious center of Love in our Passion for Spiritual Truth and
Unity.
The following is the text of the Capstone Transformation
Ceremony preceded by my introduction. I have given this
ceremony in full, as it may be utilized by individuals in written form as
well as in group visualization.
For those of you who are not familiar with my work and
methods of receipt, I channel primarily from the entity who calls
himself, THOTH OF RAISMES, rather than by his Greek name of
Hermes Tresmegistus. Tooth was an Egyptian architect, physician
and alchemist, amongst other crafts to which he contributed. He is
now in re-assumed embodiment within the Central Earth. In addition
to THOTH, I also work with various other entities, all of which are
embodied in some dynamic form, either within the Central Earth or of
Ultra-Terrestrial origin. All of these beings come under the
umbrella of Enochian Masters. Most of my written work however,
it obtained from the recording crystals of the Earth, known also as the
etheric Hall of Records. The guided initiation of the Capstone
Transformation Ceremony presented by me here today is a result of
the combined above sources, correlated with basic Egyptian.
symbology. (as given in Murry Hope's "War of the Cartouche")
This segment of the Pyramid Initiation is called 'PA- HANOK'-
Pillar of Enoch. To quote N. Spencer Lewis in The Symbolic
Prophecy of the Great Pyramid:
"The oldest of the writings of the Ancients referred to the Great Pyramid as
the 'Pillar of Enoch'. Turning to the Bible we find references to Enoch's life are
given as having covered 365 years. This being symbolic of the number of days in
the year is typical of other references to a year of years which was called by the
ancients the Phoenix Cycle. The word 'Phoenix' is the Greek word for the
Egyptian work 'Pa-hanok', which means the House of Enoch, having been built by
the Phoenicians who were the descendants of Enoch."
This quotation gives an important correlation with the fact that my
sources refer to the highly evolved souls who work on a special
frequency with Earth as Enochian Masters. These souls, they say, are
being brought into the Center of the Earth once again through the
Great Pyramid, which acts as an assimilator for their high frequencied
envelopes of being. There is much to be said about these Enochian
Masters, and their present mission on Earth, but this would stray from
the purpose of our Capstone Transformation Ceremony. (see issue#
4-87). Yet, I feel it is important to realize that one of the functions of
the Great Pyramid was and is the assimilation of energies from supra-
conscious sources of both eclectic and random natures. This
assimilation is, of course, with the earth as all created elementation
from Humanity to the smallest grains of sand.
The Capstone Transformation Ceremony of 'PA-HANOK' is
given in the form of a guided visualization, yet its properties are very
real and cohesive with our present realities. We will be applying the
reality of Egyptian Archetypes for personal balancing and healing, as
well as extending this focus on a planetary level to all facets of our
world.
Before we begin an understanding of the word archetype, as it
is applied within this ceremony, should be identified. In Webster's
Dictionary, archetype is defined as: "an original pattern or model" yet
the word takes on a broader meaning in the psychology of Inner
Mystery Schools. The Ancients of Egypt understood the
dimensional quality of thought - that once emitted from a sentient
source it became an indestructible vibration. They believed that the
filaments or individual patternings of this vibration could become
even stronger if compounded - that is to say reinforced through
repetition. Through ritual procedure, building thought upon thought
in a specific direction of consciousness, an entity of powerful conduct
would be formed. This entity was not a soul, but a composition of
thought with strong one-purpose sensitivity. Perhaps, one-purpose is
a bit too constrained a term, as these thoughts compounds had layers
to them; but all these layers had one access point and one common
principle. It was this commonality that created the entities with
which the Egyptian Priests and Priestesses worked in tandem.
These Archetypes, with the exception of SET, were all light
imbued in that they addressed spiritual values and universal codes of
Divine Order. SET was a natural reflection of all darkness or
imbalance, and was thus not created by the ATON, Priesthood but
through entropy or chaos. The Dark Priesthood of the AMUN, who
sought to destroy the enlightened framework of that age, did employ
SET, as their destructive vehicle. What we work with here has no
connection to such negative aspects. We will be addressing and
quickening the Light-encoded archetypes of the ATON.
There are natural universal archetypes created from the
expression of Angelic Beings and Divine Order, into which all these
Egyptian archetypes are co-merged. By linking and working with
the Atonic Logos, we can build our own prototypes for healing
conductivity. It should be understood that these Archetypes are
responsive to the needs of souls who summon them, as they were so
programmed in the beginning of time and later reinforced within the
cultural frames of this world, such as Atlantean, Egyptian, Greek, etc.
However, each archetype is responsive only to the focus addresses
and will act only in a way that is in harmony with the Universal Codes
of Spiritual Morality.
One other mention about the Archetypes should be made at
this point. Most of the names for the Egyptian Archetypes were
taken from actual living beings who had exemplified the qualities of
these morphic energy forms. An example is the archetype
"THOTH", which is separate from my benefactor or guide Thoth. The
former is a thought compound attuned to an aspect of Divine
Command, and the latter was and is a living entity. Yet, both
represent the same spiritual purpose or directive.
As we work with these creative logos, it should be
acknowledged that together they form a concert of building thought-
energy patterns. In the days of antiquity, initiates worked on one
level, as other levels of initiates were working on levels below or
above them. It was something like a 'round' of eternal song, for
each intoning was done to strengthen and direct the visualized
manifestations. These radiant 'pictures' were set upon the etheric
wind in the Solar Boats of Mind and Spirit. Thus, there was a
continuous streaming forth of united thought forms, impacting and
co-merging, constructing a pyramid of balance, healing and
abundance.
There are two separate journeys to our capstone
transformation, which is a simplified version of the more ancient
matrix. On the sheets of paper handed to you ("Source" readers see
"pyramid" sheets in this issue), you will find one with an outline of
The Barge of Sirius and another upon which is drawn the The
Temple of Isis. Each of these depicts the identified levels through
which we will pass in our transformation process today.
At the end of each level within The Barge of Sirius, you will be
asked
to intone two syllables after me. These mantras will not continue
into the
Temple of Isis, as I was advised by my sources to dispense with the
more
powerful mantras of that temple. These progressed intonations are
considered too intense for us to attempt today.
You will be given approximately 3 minutes for each of the
combined 12 levels of the Barge and Temple.
Your part is simply to relax and follow my lead as you allow
yourself
to flow with the sea current of the greater ocean to which we all must
one
day surrender that passage of Light that binds us to Eternity and fills
our
Spirit with timeless enchantment. Visualize now the vast horizon,
forever
opening and enfolding, continuous in its pristine possibilities of
wonder.
In our Barge of Sirius we now begin with...
The River of the Scarab: The Scarab is the archetype of renewal
and transformational rebirth. When working on the RIVER OF THE
SCARAB, visualize the Sacred SCARAB as spreading its wings and
vibrating them to a sacred hummmm - a tone which quickens your
spirit to renew itself. ******Feel these signals enter the bottom of
your feet and vibrate upward through your form, especially resonate
within each major chakra it touches *** Once it has passed through
the Crown Chakra, at the top of the heard, see the SCARAB, fly out of
this point and into the center of the Earth. Feel the vibrating energy
stir the entire planet into a transformational rebirthing ***The Mantra
to intone is AMMM-NEEE.
The River of the Ankh: This archetype is the manifestation of life
force through a co-creative aspect with humanity. Life force is
unmanifest until it links with the human condition. The ANKH
reveals the cooperation effort as much greater than merely the
creation of the physical. Beyond this condition is the inherent ability
of the human complex (soul, mind and body) to interact with and
affect the greater Logos of Divinity. The ANKH addresses the
element within us that is God. We are co-creators with the universe,
and not victims of circumstances or celestial whim. The ANKH is
therefore, also, a symbol of Divine Love, manifest in the world but not
of it.
Visualize the ANKH as your body, arms outstretched with your
feet touching the sea (embryonic fluid) and your head (containing the
luminous intelligence of your God-self) merged within the Sun of our
Solar System ***Allow yourself to interact with the creative process as
the power of life feeds the Earth, through your ANKH -form. *** The
tonal expression of the ANKH is NUUU-RAAAMMMM.
River of the Winged Disk - As you flow down the RIVER OF
THE WINGED DISK on your BARGE OF SIRIUS, you enjoy the
emancipation of your soul from the Lesser World. The archetype of
the WINGED DISK is one of flight into the Greater Regions of
consciousness, where only the purity of flight itself is sustained. Any
thought heavier than a feather, acts like a boulder, tying the Initiate to
the gravity of his/her own mind. Within the embrace of the WINGED
DISK is found Divine Guidance and the inspiration needed to achieve
any spiritually motivated goal. When soaring with the WIN GED
DISK the Initiate receives the radiance and ecstasy of the true self-
expression. The formless mind set fee all inhibitions and accepts
only images and ideas that are illumined by Truth and Beauty. Fear
is no longer a boundary, for one has plunged into the depths of an
airy sea where such gravities are non-existent.
Visualize the expression of your spirit, loosened to the winds,
flying above your Barge as it pursues the Star Sea. **** Transfer this
weightless Spirit to the Earth and all who live upon it. **** The tonal
receipt for WINGED DISK is RAAY-MUUUN.
SEA OF SIRIUS: You, the Initiate have reached the SEA OF
SIRIUS Bright Star of the Great Bear. To the Egyptian Priesthood
this star was the Gateway to Illumination through the knowledge of
karma. In understanding karma and its personal hold on that
individual, one is able to transcend its bounds and receive grace.
Thus, SIRIUS is the Star of Grace, for once seen, it reflects this
understanding to your lower self, illuminating your entire being.
On your magical Barge you have passed through all the rivers
leading to this Radiant Source. Now you are received unto its
keeping. Visualize this receipt by surrounding yourself with a
beautiful turquoise sea, and upon the horizon a white star glistens
melodically, calling to your soul. *** You have found that center of
harmony for you and for your Mother Planet. *** Manifest this
thought as you intone AS-KAAA.
Now that you have traversed the Three Rivers of the Star and
are upon the SEA OF SIRIUS, you approach the Temple of Isis,
there in the midst of an isle in the Star Sea. Before you are allowed
to dis-embark from the Barge, you are given your Feather of Truth
from MAYET, the Guardian of Truth. It is she who weighs you
heart upon a scale. If the feather she places upon the opposite
balance is equal in weight and your heart does not tip the scale, so
you are worthy and ready to enter the TEMPLE OF ISIS. Visualize
this ritual of weighing – for yourself and as a representative for Earth
and all her inhabitants. *** So as MAYET gives you in ceremony
your Feather of Truth, experience your own personal
***
identification with karmic absolution, and as Planetary Ambassador,
for the world as well. With your Feather Badge you are free of
Self-judgment and ready to enter the Temple.
THE TEMPLE OF ISIS
Gate of Anubis - This is the first Gate through which you
must pass in gaining entrance to the TEMPLE OF ISIS. This
archetype is seen as the sleek hunting dog of the ancient Egyptians.
Anubis is the Opener of Ways, The Guardian, and its etheric form is
that of the Khaibit, or Shadow. His focus is one of protected
journeys and easy navigation through troubled waters. He is the
companion protector of the Initiate, and as such, should be
addressed by the Initiate with these words or sentiments: I, Initiate
of the Temple of Isis, doth summon thee, ANUBID, Opener of
ways, to my stead. Guide my journey through Darkness into
Light. Be mine artful companion who guides my soul-ship
away from the jagged rocks and sets my heart-sail into the wind.
Spend a few moments visualizing ANUBIS and experience the
**** Now you are
aura of his wise protection surrounding you.
ready to sit upon the first Seat of the Temple.
Seat of Bast - Bast is the Twin Sister of HORUS; she is the Goddess
of Joy and Patroness of Cats. Her etheric form is the BA or soul.
heart.
This archetype's focus is personified in the happiness of the fulfilled
She issues forth healing of the mind, devotion, protection
and generosity.
While on this level of initiation, visualize the Goddess as
dancing before you, whirling and bending gracefully as her symbol of
music, the sistrum (an ankh-shaped rattle), jingles a rhythm of joy in
accompaniment. As you watch BAST dance to the song of life, see
yourself in her, moving to the music. *** Then, with your Arms of Bast
, embrace the beautiful blue planet of Earth and infuse it with the
living beat of joy.
dove, soaring up into the eternal rays of RA.
Gate of Thoth.
Feel all the sorrows of the world life as a white
Prepare ye for the
***
Gate of Thoth - The Lord of Time, THOTH is also given the
prestigious titles of Keeper of the Akashic Records; Scribe to the
Gods; and Patron of Healers. His etheric form is the Ibis, a long-
legged water bird. This archetype focuses healing and health, the
law, education, and scholarship. He is in addition, the Gatekeeper of
Karma and Fate. Through THOTH, the Initiate is given the key to
his/her own authority and self-government THOTH represents the
God-self within us and to whom we must relinquish the control of our
lesser selves. In doing so we become, as the poem goes, master of
our fate and captain of our soul.
Visualize the Lord of Time as a Being who is the Gateway to
your own command. As he hands you the keys, begin to unlock the
doors within you that hold you back from ascending to the next seat
of the Temple. Say, I, the Initiate, doth summon THOTH, Master
Illuminate, to inscribe my name upon the Gateway of Time, so that I
may become enlightened to the traversing of my soul therein.
Allow yourself to feel the energies of this powerful archetype
imbue you with the strength of your own life mastery, transferring
that essence to mankind.** Now you are ready to sit upon the seat of
NEPHTHYS.
The Seat of Nephthys - The Hidden One, the Revealer...She is the
sister of ISIS and Mother of ANUBIS, who strikes the chord of
receptivity and mysticism. She conceals that which is not yet
ripened to fruition so that the fragile embryo will not be exposed to
the harshness of the world until it has had time to crystallize into full
form. This archetype also reveals that for which the time has come.
The energies that are now at hand to work for the Initiate come forth
from the mouth of NEPHTHYS.
Her emblem is a Chalice, for her
focus is upon the most Sacred Mysteries. When the force of Spirit
merge within the soul-initiate, these inner Mysteries will become a
mantle of Wisdom, placed by NEPHTHYS upon the shoulders of the
Spiritual Warrior - Knight of the Grail. The etheric form of
NEPHTHYS is the KA or etheric double.
Visualize the Goddess NEPHTHYS as a Grand Matron
surrounded by delicate veils of mist, extending to you the Grail of
the Inner Mysteries. Experience holding the Cup in your hands and
partaking of its awakening elixir. *** Feel the centers of your being
respond to illumination as the long-kept secret of Life is known to
you; perhaps not in words, but within the syllables of your heart. ***
Extend the Cup of the World.*** Proceed to the Gate of Horus.
He is also the Power
His focus is the Pure
Gate of Horus - The Son of ISIS and OSIRIS and brother of BAST,
HORUS is the Patron of Homes and Families.
of the Serpent to rise above the lesser nature.
of Heart and his virtues are courage, heroism, harmony, artistry,
beauty, and creativity, HORUS is a healer of the physical body,
offering aid also, to the spiritually oppressed. He represents that
bonding principle that is the essence of the harmonious family unit,
whether it be a single family or Family of the World - or the universe!
The etheric form for HORUS is the Sahu, or spiritual body.
Visualize the emblem of HORUS, an All-Seeing Eye. Allow its
non-judgment stare to penetrate your third eye. Know that you are
revealed to the center of the universe as a Child of its fold. As one
among the Family, so you are everyone of the Family. Feel all
loneliness dissipate within you, your weariness replaced with
knowledge that you are not alone - you are at the center of your
oneness with all souls, all radiant aspects of the one. *** Feel the
radiation of this knowledge infuse all lonely souls on the Earth,
imbuing them with courage and a sense of completeness within
themselves. *** Say, HORUS, Eye of the Divine Light, bring forth
thy sight for me and my kind. Enlighten us to the oneness of
the universe. ***Proceed now, to the Seat of Hath or.
Seat of Hathor - The ultimate feminine identity is personified by this
archetype. She is also attuned to astrology, organization, and
confidence. Through her Magic Mirror she radiates protection from
the 'Evil Eye', which is a symbol for psychic power of an adversary
nature. The mirror acts as a shield, allowing the initiate to see the face
of his attacker without an actual eye-to-eye contact. HATHOR'S
etheric form is the Sekhem, or Power. When in her most powerful
focus, she is transformed into SEKMET, the Lion-Headed Goddess,
who is the feminine Spiritual Warrior. HATHOER is the archetypal
nature of feminine balance - she is the Earth's perfect polarity -
opposite to the masculine/positive charge of the World.
Visualize HATHOR as this Perfect Feminine,
Women, Goddess of Beauty, Love and Strength.
Patroness of
See her warm and
radiant smile fill you with the blessings of the feminine aspect within
you.
Remember, men and women contain both gender charges,
with only one externalized. (In Australian Dreamtime, these two co-
existent forces within us are called the "sacred twins".) Reach within
your consciousness and see yourself in past experience as having
lived in both male and female forms. Draw the oneness of Man and
Woman into your heart and mind, seeing each as a compliment to
the other. Release any fears or resentment you may be harboring
concerning the female. *** Then do the same for the male. *** Accept
the Gifts of HATHOR, which are the gifts of the Goddess Earth to Her
Children. See the globe upon which we all live surrounded with the
Goddess' Love, melting away all enmity between the sexes.
Once you have mastered the Seat of Hathor you are ready to
receive your Buckle of Isis before passing through the final Gateway.
The Buckle of Isis is the Magical Knot signifying the union of forces
within the Initiate that have come together through Knowledge and
It is the Power and Protection, but also, this Sacred Knot
represents the understanding of our linking or binding with all
humanity. It is thus a karmic symbol as well, for along with the
rewards of Knowledge and Wisdom, so we are enlightened to the
sufferings of others and our obligation to nourish all souls along the
path we tread, even at a sacrifice to our own comfort and security.
See a hand maiden of the Grand Goddess ISIS bestow unto
you the Buckle of the Sacred Binding. ***As the gift is given you,
accept it also for the world – for all those upon your path who cannot
yet be awakened. *** Now you are worthy to pass through the Gate of
Osiris.
Gate of Osiris - He who Guardians this Gate is the God-King and
Lord of Light. His etheric form is the KHU, or Spirit. His emblem
is the Djed, or stylized tree. His virtues are wisdom, justice,
integrity, stability, and responsibility. When you come to his Gate,
your soul must seek the Flame of Self-Judgment - not its critical
stance, but as the Greater Sight which cuts through self-deception
with forgiveness, and releases true understanding. OSIRIS is the
Wise Council who reaches down into the mire of doubt and lifts the
Initiate into the unclouded sky. He is truly the Lord of Light, for
his strength is in the Initiate's faith in Divine Power, found anchored
within his Greater Self. This Divinity within is always accessible to
the lesser self, who has only to call upon it.
Visualize the archetype in the form of a majestic tree, with four
branches representing the FOUR SACRED ELEMENTS - Air, Fire,
Earth and Water. See OSIRIS as he who summons these Powers
forth from the Void to act upon your reality. From the Power of the
Elements you received your Life, and thus, you as a God-anchoring
entity, are empowered with the Wise judgment of OSIRIS. Feel the
infusion of his steadfast wisdom into your mind. *** See both yourself
and your planetary companions as units of measure within the
principle of Universal Law and Light. Say, OSIRIS, Justice at the
foot of the Throne, hear me. Cause thy integrity to act upon
me and loosen my tongue to speak thy wise council.
You may
now pass through the Gate of Osiris to sit upon the Throne of Isis.
***
Her
She is
Throne of Isis - You are now upon the Pinnacle Throne within the
Temple.. Here you receive from the archetype of ISIS
ISIS
wife of
OSIRIS, mother of HORUS and BAST, the Patroness of Magic.
symbol is a Throne and her etheric form is the AB, or heart.
the personification of compassion, maternal love, and perseverance.
Upon her lap is placed the supplications of all those who are heavy
laden. Into her keeping are the children of the word, whose life is
the hope of the future.
Visualize the Divine ISIS as the most regent of queens, in
stately posture upon her golden throne. Seek from her the
protection and nurturing of your children, all the world's children, and
the child in you. *** Know that ISIS shines through you, endowing you
with her Magic, which is tempered by her caring grace. You are a
Master of the Art, having at your command the secrets of
manifestation, renewal, and transformation. Yet, you are also
mindful of your spiritual responsibility and the laws of cause and
effect. See the Great ISIS give unto you her most treasured
substance. It pours like a drop of honey from her Sacred Heart.
Taking the form of a Bee, it tries its wings carefully, then flies into
your heart, by the Golden Bee of Wisdom.
Thus Ends your Initiation In the Temple of ISIS
I am Strength
I am the matrix that is the Earth.
I hold Fire, I hold Water, in the
Palm of my hand.
I am the earthenware from the
Potter's Wheel of the Sun, that never cracks.
The Day is strengthened by my embrace
I touch the wind and it becomes a whirlwind
For the Gods.
You are the Light, I am the Crystal.
Together, we create the World.
-Crystal Woman, 1988
I see Crystal Woman as a
Lioness in Winter, she is strong,
accustomed to barren places, yet she is also a fountain of the deepest
springs. She appears in her first Earth incarnation body, that of a
Golden One, from an ancestry in the stars who dwelt long ago in
the land that is now Australia. In most, if not all of her lifetimes on
this planet, she has been a Shaman, Wizard, or Witch (of the White
Craft). Although her Spirit Totem is a white wolf, she appears to
have a feline quality about her. Crystal Woman's hair is white and
worn long. She does not appear in old-age, as her skin is smooth,
golden, and without blemish, yet there is a wizened quality captured
in her countenance and the serene glint of her golden-copper eyes.
Her cheekbones are high, expression composed but determined.
There is a fasted posture in her stance, as if she grew like a desert
cactus, drawing every precious drop of nutrient from the dry sand, her
roots tunneling deep, seeking hidden moisture. Thus far, I have
seen her wearing an animal skin of white, soft and pure - almost a
contradiction of her lack of innocence.
But, this thought is, after all
One may be pure without
a figment of our concept of innocence.
innocence, or by the same token, innocent, yet devoid of purity of
spirit. Crystal Woman is purity in the embodiment of wisdom.
She has seen the faces of the Dreamtime, good and evil. Yet,
her Will has steadfastly honored her Spirit with Light.
Still
One morning I awoke to see her hand in front of
my face.
half asleep, I slowly focused my Third Eye on the golden globe she
held, half the size of a baseball that appeared at first to be a large
drop of honey, frozen in time. She informed me that it was a piece
of polished amber, hardened from the resin of the Wada, the
sacred eucalyptus tree that anchored the First Dreamtime to the
Earth. This marvelous amber drop was flat on the bottom, rising up
like Ayers Rock from the horizon, and rounded at the top in
somewhat beveled curve. I know that she gave it to me, but as of
this writing her reason for doing so has not yet been revealed.
The following is a visualization you may wish to enter -
an Initiation with Ayers Rock in Australia....
Ayers Rock is a sacred site, which through eons of time has
been programmed by other-dimensional beings as well as their Earth
dwelling counterparts. When the crack in dimensions occurred in
the most ancient past as it will again in the future (issue #2-87), it
began at this location on the planet, bleeding through into the linear
dimension. Through these opening, other-dimensional beings
merged with life in the area of the Rock, and empowered the
Amoutooui. These were a people whose ancestry was in the stars,
from the constellation of Cassiopeia. They were a race of gold-
copper eyed people, with fair, golden-tinged skin. They were 7 to 8
feet tall, and moved with a grace and carriage skin to dance more
than utility. By the time of the Crack, the Amtoutooui were no
longer pure Cassiopeian. They had blended with a Tribe of Primals,
thus called as they were not a "Star" Race, but a product of the Earth
Mother. There had also been a blending with some Blue Star
voyagers from Rigel in the constellation of Orion. Thus, the
Amoutooui were a mixture of these three races, with the dominant
strain coming from Cassiopeia.
The
Amoutooui acted as a medium or grounding channel
for the Amhownos - the other-dimensional Ones. The Amoutooui
saw the Amhownos as vestiges from their won race memory,
where in the world of their ancestors of Cassiopeia, whom they called
the Amktwa, such beings were a part of their Spirit Origin. The
Amhownos sought to direct the filtering process that had begun
due to the break in the whole etheric envelope of the planet. They
wished to control this energy in an orderly fashion, allowing the two
worlds to meet, to 'touch fingers in perfect balance' or asmuukno,
as the Amoutooui called it.
passage to be asmuukno,
This was the blessing, the right of
to be 'unadorned but for the touch of
the common spirit.' The Amoutooui believed this to be the
stripping away of all cultural ritual and honor, to be 'received only
through the respect of mutual spirit.'
mouth of
As centuries proceeded from the
Abakhem (Ayers
Rock), which was the timepiece of the meeting point between the two
worlds, so the Amoutooui grew fewer in number. This was the
inevitable fate for the People of Three Paths, or three race patterns, as
their delicate mixture could not bear the vibrational shifting occurring
with the dimensional crack. They were a finely tuned species, whose
bodies shivered with the twinkling of the stars, and whose hearts
pumped a watery -gold fluid that would become thickened by the
drop of etheric pressure, causing sterility and ultimately death. Yet,
before the Golden Ones passed from the Earth, so they appointed the
Kwaharri, later to become the Australian aborigines, as Keepers of
the Bridge of Abakhem. Gradually the dimensional crack healed -
all but a small rift that remains today. It is consequently an
especially sensitive dimensional portal, through which the
descendants of the Kwaharri travel through the Dreamtime of
today, but in the age of the Crack, it was a much more vibrant whirl
of 'touching fingers'. This was the passage of the First Dreamtime.
Between the
Amoutooui and the
Kwaharri there was
another people - a small number of them, yet important to the
transfer of power between the Golden Ones and their Black Earth
brothers. The Amoutooui chose select genetic groupings from
among the Kwaharri, to create a Bridge race that would link
Kwaharri,
the powers of the Golden Ones into the spirit flow of the
without disturbing the heritage of the Kwaharri as a whole. This
was done in agreement between the two Race-Tribes and the
individual parties concerned. It was not an experiment performed,
but a marriage between two Peoples who sought the same
preservation of inherent spirit knowledge and power. This was not
something that could be taught. It was necessary to transfer the
spirit in the blood from generation to generation. Thus, the
Quyammi, or Bridge People were born. Although the
Amoutooui no longer exist upon or in the Earth, the Quyammi, are
present as a remnant race within the Central Earth Tribes.
number no more than 200, yet they still act as a spirit link between
their ancestral Golden Ones and the present generation of the
ancient Kwaharri.
They
No doubt the names have changed through
the eons between the First Dreamtime and the one of today, yet
the Bridge People stir the Shaman Dreaming with the Sticks of
song, dappling the Dark Nothing with melted stars, singing the life of
the Golden Ones into the Land of the Sacred Dreaming.
Abakhem
ancient grid.
or Ayers Rock contains a whole interface with the
Since time is only a system of this reality, the other-
world beings and the Golden Ones still resonate within the weave
of the inner-universe, as they are forever becoming asmuukno.
From the bases of Abakhem to the space above it, so this rock is
a field of knowing, of etheric entrainment to simultaneous
consciousnesses.
Place yourself at the base of ABAKHEM and step inside Her.
She was known by the Golden Ones as "Mother Child" - Mother of
the Amoutooui and Child of the Amhownos. Begin your questing
of asmuukno, 'the touching of fingers, by experiencing the clay of the
Earth. This was the first touch-point of initiation for the seeking
Amoutooui and those they initiated after them. See the clay mixed
with the four colors of creation - Black, White, Red and Blue.
Begin to paint your body for visitation' as you superimpose the
images of the AMHOWNOS onto your body. Allow your Spirit-Sight
to reach into the DREAMTIME and draw the symbols that you need at
this time upon your body. Paint also with the color vibration of the
AMHOWNOS, which is Orange, and the color of the AMOUTOOUI,
The
being Yellow. Green is the charge of 'Complete Circle'.
Amoutooui believed that nothing could become reality without
'Complete Circle' – a concept difficult to explain, but no doubt
basically, it was akin to the alchemic process of one element's
consummation with its oppositely charged self – the serpent biting or
flaming its own tail. You, in the spirit of AMOUTOOUI, must
Receive the Breath of Life from the
become 'Complete Circle'.
nostrils of GAZNDRUU, the Great Sea.
Now begin your journey
upward into the Rock, into each layer of its memory coil, as you
proceed to the summit.
Remember, that in the Spirit of Amoutooui you can do
nothing, be nothing without passing through the creative systems of
every natural thing, and that a stone is equally dynamic to an eagle.
Take your time in this journey. I recommend as background music.
The Emerald Forest, soundtrack to the movie of that title, but any
music which you feel is in harmony with this initiation would be
appropriate for you.
As you reach the summit of ABAKHEM, you 'touch fingers' -
CELEBRATE LIFE!
came to me, and I experienced the
Golden Ones, I was drawn to read a book
After Crystal Woman
history-speaking of the
entitled, "Crystal Woman", by Lynn V. Andrews.
"Crystal Woman' is also about the Australian
Ms. Andrews
Dreamtime, and I
could not see it as coincidence that her book should come to be
placed into my reality at this time. In reading her revelations, I
found a striking similarity between the heritage and spiritual matrix of
the Australian aborigines and the Amoutooui of the First
Dreamtime. Previous to my reading of this book, my only linear-
world knowledge of the Australian Aborigines and the Dreamtime
had been the occasional glimpse on National Geographic or an
Australian travelogue. Yet, I do remember that on the day of the
Harmonic Convergence, I was suddenly and unexpectedly transferred
in my meditation, to the mouth of a large cave, around which stood
several aboriginal men, painted in white. They were around a
crackling fire, all staring at me, expressionless. I walked up to them,
and as I extended a leather pouch with some large, heavy objects in
it, I heard myself say, "I present you with the bones of my ancestors."
It was a vivid experience, and not at all what I had expected to
transpire on the day of the Harmonic Convergence.
I have not as yet read any other books of Lynn Andrews, but I
do recommend her book "Crystal Woman' to anyone interested in
pursuing further the passage of the Dreamtime.
LIGHT-WORKS
An Exercise in Consciousness
Insights '88 From the Oracle
VOYAGER
1988 Promises to be a powerful year, both as a planetary network and
within the fiber of the individual pursuit. This planet contains a light
function that will continue to expand in the coming 'power year' of
the double-eights. Eight is the power dynamic, and the Earth is a
Seven- the elements at rest. It is a cycle of Physical completion that
is without effort, embodying the union of spirit & matter. It is the
"sacred number" of perfected thinking. Together, they are Six, the
number of the World...actualization in space, symbolized by the
double trigrams of the Chinese I Ching, the hexagon and the Seal of
Solomon. The following insights were revealed for THE WORLD as a
"light Body" in 1988, applying VOYAGER Tarot
The Universe
The "Elohim/Kachina" factor is active within the Earth It is the state
of becoming, through which the individual Light Worker co-create
with mankind, forming a bridge into the Universe of both Macro &
Microcosm. It is form emerging from Spirit, living clay arising from
immobile stone. That which is at rest is becoming dynamic and
responsive to the Word, the mantra of Life. We, in our Kachina
bodies, create the weave for new forms coming after us. We have
been passed the Fire of "ELOHIM”.
Seven of Worlds
"BREAKTRHOUGH" - Activation of the Primal Fire, release of the
"Sacred Seven" from the center of the Earth. That which has been
dormant, is now active. As a volcano it will spew forth from the
genesis of our being, and stir the cauldron of purpose within us.
The World will respond to the need for urgency – that inner timepiece
which alerts us to the changing of the guards. The individual should
be ready to act in Spirit at a moment's notice, and not hesitate to
bide the inner command.
Devil's Play
The Dionysian initiation is one of testing - confrontation with the
Dark Side. Yet there are two faces to be revealed...That which
succumbs to chaos, and that which slays the "Beast". The World is
the testing ground in '88. It is the arena of the Dionysian gladiator.
There will be battles between the two Powers that will cause the
bones to be laid bare. The Beast will be transformed into the Spirit
Warrior of the Lion.
I would be remiss if I ended this issue without mentioning
another with whom I work – one who now dwells within the Earth as
the Rhama Azul. He is also known to me as Stardancer. In
past incarnations on this planet he has come before us as an Aztec
prophet; the Egyptian Ptah of the Sacred Harmonics; Orpheus,
Master of the Music of the Spheres; Myrrith, grandson of Merlin
of Galataine (issue 3-4/87) Sequoyah, creator of the Cherokee
alphabet; and most recently as Elvis Aaron Presley.
Working with Stardancer,
healings. This is something Elvis did in his lifetime - quietly and
infrequently, as he was cut off from the sources that would have
allowed him access to those most in need of his 'touch'. It would
seem that in both his Stardancer & Elvis forms he is now able to
provide the quickening inspiration for personal, wholistic healing.
I have witnessed several successful
As regular subscribers of the publication now know, since my
association and friendship with Wand June Hill, Elvis' friend of 15
years, I have written a book entitled, Magii from the Blue Star-The
Mystic Drama and Spiritual Heritage of Elvis Aaron Presley.
This book is profiled in this issue. Both Wanda and others who truly
knew the man outside that closed circle of 'friends constantly
surrounding him, find it tragic that the true personage who was
embodied as Elvis is not known to the world. Elvis had many friends
such as Wanda, whom he protected ad kept secret from his 'circle'.
He wished these special friends to be safe from the jealousies and
competition for his favors that were constantly focused upon him
from many (but not all) within that 'circle'. It was with these special
friends, whom he mostly communicated by telephone, that he shared
his innermost self.
It has been said, and rightly so, that all history is written by the
victors. The history-makers who pass from this mortal coil are
painted for posterity in the colors and hues of those who out-live
them, friend and enemy alike. It is often the enemies and the
indifferent who comprise the loudest voice in giving the world their
picture of an individual who is no longer able to alter this
presentation by his or her living presence. With the recent
television docu-drama on Elvis, this truth was especially evident to
The true story of Elvis Presley, if it were to be told from
me.
beginning to end as it was by him to his 'phone friends', would rock
the world. It can only be revealed in part within the pages of Magii,
and will probably have to wait for a full telling until those whose
special interests are to keep it buried, are themselves interred in the
earth. But, it will one day be told, as it has been recorded by those
who know the story. That which has been set down in secret will
one day be revealed.
It will then be seen as the history of a
hidden prophet, whom his daughter recently recalled as, "A very
powerful man, spiritually.”
The following are excerpts from Magii from the Blue Star,
much of which was taken directly from transcriptions of taped
telephone conversations between Elvis and Wanda Hill...
WANDA: You mean, your former life? Your eh-what did you call it?
ELVIS: My former entity- my home out there -where I am from.
WANDA: How did, I mean, when did you figure out that you are
from out there, as you say?
ELVIS:
When I was about ten they told me.
WANDA: Who?
ELVIS:
The two men who talk to me - have talked to me since I
was five when they first presented themselves to me and
said, "I am that I am and you are you - we will be with
you, as your Lord is with you, until you have no need of us
again." And they shoed themselves to me - as light
forms, and one of them touched me and I felt light inside
me-floating sort of, and the other one said, when he put
his hands on my head, "You are now and you will be for
all time. "I didn't understand then - I was scared, but they
said not to be and told me to speak of it to no one.
I told my mother and (he laughs) she washed my mouth
But,
ELVIS:
out with soap and spanked me for making up things and
lying. So, I never told her any more about them.
Some people are put on this Earth to help carry the load,
the strain, some are here just for show, some are here so
that others can come and do what they must do. I'm
here to bring as much joy, happiness, and comfort to the
population as I can, and if this causes me some strife,
some personal heartache, its alright, because I have the
privilege of seeing the happiness and joy I bring others.
It evens out - I get the greatest highs, the best memories,
and I have the knowledge that I can truly do something
for other people, especially when they need it. So, I'm.
happy, I don't mind. My petty problems are but tiny
thorns on the rose, understand?
LARRY GELLER: From the moment we first met, I knew Elvis had a
spiritual quality. I had never seen so much power in one
person. The effect he had on people was tremendous.
He could silence an entire room full of people just by
walking in. It wasn't just his fame that caused that
was his aura of power.
it
We were on a bus when he saw a man fall into the
gutter with a heart attack.
Elvis stopped the bus and I
watched as he put his hand on the man's chest. The
man said, "Its you, its you," and just got up.
