# Combined OCR Output

"THE SOURCE"
Issue #2-88
LABYRINTH/OBSIDIAN setting of the center crystal .... April
9/10, 1988:
Message received from Guardian Circle: from between the hours of 2:50
P.M., on April 9th to 3:50 P.M. on April 10th, 1988, the obsidian etheric crystal was set in
the center of the newly anchored RA-UM Labyrinth. Not only will the crystal be
centered, but by that act, so will the entire Labyrinth or Sacred Maze be activated to the
level of the Ra-Um, the sacred fire, which is the radiance of the Order of the Burning
Bush.
The Ra-Um is the signal charge, the spark of electro-static creation within the
center of the molecule. The charge is activated at various levels through interaction with
universal codes of the Divine Archetype. The purpose of this activation is to re-align an
elemental factor, ie, molecule or grouping of molecules, to the sacred or divine fire of
Perfection - that center of all consciousness, in which the Mind of what we identify as
God, exists. Because this re-alignment can be stirred on various levels, this directive
does not necessarily ordain instant Godhead to that molecule or collective molecules
(such as a human entity). The Ra-Um is more likely to be activated at a much lower
level, which would bring about a motion or acceleration of re-direction toward the nearest
degree of purity. This causes a 'free-flow' effect, as the Ra-Um graduates its elemental
host toward a consciousness change at the molecular level, disengaging this
consciousness from its previous modality and re-directing it toward a free assemblage
with Omni-thought, which encompasses all possible realities. In simple language, this
means that, when Ra-Um occurs at a very basic level within a human vehicle, that vehicle
is able to move through time realities, until the nearest pure form or pathway of most
harmonic Divine Order is accessed. This can occur in a dramatic way, such as is
witnessed by fire-walking or non-bleeding yogis impaled on nails, or in the
Transfiguration of Christ. But, it can also exist in more subtle modes, where the
individual finds a sudden ‘breakthrough' in events – as if the seas parted, the doors
suddenly were opened to him, and he/she is no longer in the trenches, but above the
conglomeration, free to choose his/her modality. One would perceive this as Spirit
effecting Matter, by spirit acting on matter, molding it to more divine and ordered
purpose.
This is only partly correct. Spirit does effect matter, but not by interfering with it.
Instead the 'charge' of spirit coming through matter, cuts the cord of dependence on
matter, and allows the initiate to dissolve time as a directional outcome, instead moving
through time, to choose the most ordered reality (‘ordered' from the standpoint of the
individual's divine destiny.).
The RA-UM Labyrinth is a tool for this principle of Spirit acting through matter.
There is much more to the whole of it than is explained here, but this Labyrinth is the
'touch stone' for many levels of planetary alignment necessary at this time in order ofr
the Transfiguration of the Earth.
From The Mystic Spiral, by Jill Purce: "Labyrinth and Dance.... The expanding
spiral that creates and protects the centre and the contracting spiral which dissolves it, are both
concepts implicit in the labyrinth. By the existence of the labyrinth, the center is created and
protected. When the labyrinth is penetrated, the centre is dissolved. Entry and dissolution occur
only under the right conditions: only with the knowledge of the way."
"Although often intricate in form, the labyrinth is a spiral, and one which returns. It is a
representation of the cosmos and all cosmoses, and hence of all ordered entities which correspond
on the descending scale of analogy. It is therefore, at once the cosmos, the world, the individual
life, the temple, the town, the man, the womb or intestines - of the Mother (earth), the
convolutions of the brain, the consciousness, the heart, the pilgrimage, the journey, and the Way."
"As the labyrinth crates and dissolves, expands and contracts, so it reveals and conceals.
It is cosmos to those who know the way and chaos to those who lose it. It is Ariadne's thread,
whose windings create the world and yet enable us to unravel it – or ravel it. This is the same
thread that runs through the argument whose clue (the 'clew' or ball of thread) we follow; and
when we do not lose it, it leads us to the point. Yet, it also conceals the point, disorients us, and
is the test of our endurance and knowledge."
"The spiral of labyrinth, depicted in ancient tombs, implies a death and re-entry into the
womb of the earth, necessary before the spirit can be reborn in the land of the dead. But, death
and rebirth also mean the continuous transformation and purification of the spirit throughout life;
the alchemists use the word Vitriol to stand for vista interiora terrae rectificando invenies
occultum lapidem. “Visit the interior of the earth' through purification thou wilt find the hidden
stone. Such a descent into the underworld (the kingdom of Pluto) is the theme of most initiation
rituals, and is comparable to the passage through the wilderness, or the ‘dark night of the soul',
which is experienced by mystics on their path. It is furthermore nearly always symbolized by the
spiral.
The RA-UM Labyrinth is one created by the Enochian Masters of the Order of
the Burning Bush. It is liken to an omni-universe made from 'cosmic string'*, with a
black hole at its center. This Labyrinth is brought into etheric/physical entrainment via a
high-order crystal computer in the Central Earth, known to this channel as the
Pymander. With this crystal computer, a matrix is set into the ethers and anchored to
the Earth. This matrix is filled with dot sequences of Ra-Um energy points to form a
labyrinth gridwork. On the computer, and thus in actual energy-frequency, a ‘slice' or bi-
section of the labyrinth ‘fill' resembles the complete cycle of the I Ching. Looking down
through the labyrinth from top to bottom, one would perceive the spiral. Attempting to
move from one level of this dimensional grid to the next would reveal the actual labyrinth
pathways.
(*Cosmic String is the latest cosmology theory which contend that remnants of the
energy released from the “Big Bang” of the universal beginning are to be found in this
cosmic strings 100,000,000,000,000,000 times smaller than a proton, with a gigantic
mass - several miles of string outweighing the Earth. Proximity to such string would
cause all kinds of dimensional chaos, unless, as my sources contend, one were to acquire
chaotic imbalance, and use the inner workings of the string to flow through time in
instantaneous ‘omnetics' (all-directional awareness) with Being ... thus is becomes
"Ariadne's thread.")
As the center of the RA-UM Labyrinth is ‘set', it is charged through the etheric
substance of crystalline frequency externalized in obsidian. Lightening branches are seen
(in etheric vision) to strike the tip of the obsidian point, as matter discharges its energy to
allow for the displacement of its mass by the free-float of the Ra-Um, whose essence
holds no allegiance to material bonding. Obsidian initiates 'transformation and mastery
over the physical plane.” However, this ‘mastery', as has been explained, is really better
defined as ‘co-existence' – striking a harmonic access to the desired elemental bonding.
As with all magical access, such a knowledge can be misused. Because of this fact, the
RA-UM Labyrinth is properly shielded. This till does not keep negative forces from
trying to enter it. The Obsidian center is a super-conductor that could empower in many
ways – good, evil and imprudent. Yet, it is guardianed by many layers of shielding from
the highest levels of Divine Command.
In the book Healing Stoned, by Julia Lorusso & Joel Glick, they state that
obsidian, which is a volcanic glass, "will remain static in its present state for another
cyclic block of time. It is in a period of total rest, a void, a cooling off time. So much of it
has been utilized for the lower forms of magic that it is impregnated with thought forms
of negativity. Yet, the potential for its growth is such that there lies the seed that must
wait for the right hour to develop safely, slowly, with positive and amplified power.
Most certainly its time has come, as the whole balance of the planet is awakened through
the 'obsidian factor' within the RA-UM Labyrinth.
The Labyrinth was set to the Ra-Um in the period of the Sun in Aries. From
The Symphony of the Zodiac, by Torkom Saraydarian, Aries is the transmitter of the
Cosmic Fire, which, my sources define as a product of the Divine or Sacred Fire. Mr.
Saraydarian writes of three transmitters of fire; Aries releases Cosmic Fire, Leo
releases Solar Fire, Sagittarius releases Planetary Fire. Master Djwhal Khul says that
these fires constitute the Yoga of Fire, it clears the way for resurrection. The Yoga of
Fire is the progressive at-one-ment with the inner fire... There was an ancient
brotherhood that used to worship fire. They had three kinds of fire: One was crated by
rubbing branches together – this was the fire of friction, the fire of matter. Only members
of the brotherhood could contact this fire. The second fire was lit by matches, or by the
sparks of rocks. This fire was analogus to the Solar Fire, and only initiates in the group
could contact it. The third fire could be approached by only the most holy ones or high
degree initiates and was kept burning forever. This fire was the fire lit by lightening. On
stormy days, they would wait until the lightening struck a tree and immediately run and
bring this fire to the temple. For each altar of fire, they provided such a flame. This fire
was kept burning day and night as the symbol of the flame of life within the heart, as the
link between the flame of the heart and the fire in Space. (italics mine-CH)
"These three fires manifest on this planet as seven flames:
The flame in the heart of each atom.
The flame in the seed of the vegetable kingdom.
The flame in the animal kingdom.
The flame in the heart of every man.
The flame in the heart of the Hierarchy – Christ.
The flame in Shamballa- Sanat Kumara.
The greater flame, the planetary source of Life"
My sources state that these Seven Flames are the 'tongues' of the Divine Fire.
Ra-Um is the right sequence of awareness that triggers the uniting of the Seven,
achieving omnipotent accord with all space-time realities. To continue on Aries
in The Symphony of the Zodiac: "All flames eventually come together and
form a fiery flower around the Central Fire of the Planetary Life.” (My sources
refer to the Central Sun of the Planet as the "Golden Rose.") "Such fiery flowers
eventually form the petals of the greater firer, and so on eternally. That is why the
whole of creation, viewed from a distant point in unbounded space, looks like a
fiery flower blooming in infinite space as a lotus in limitless water."
“Resurrection is the progress of each flame from one kingdom to the next,
from one plane to the higher one.”
"The flame in each form is the life center of that form, the heart of the
form. When the energy of the fire of Aries is released, each flame receives a
shock. This shock is an invitation and challenge to synchronize its heart beat with
the pulse of the cosmic heart... ‘The flame of the heart responds to the most
remote subterranean fires.""
“The Master Djwhal Khul says, ‘In Aries we have… the bringing together
of spirit and matter in the great creative activity in manifestation at the beginning
of the evolutionary cycle.' Aries is the beginning, as well as the end.
Resurrection is related to Aries. It is defined as going back to the former state of
being.""
In Regard to the RA-UM Labyrinth, it removes sequential time from our
path, from the path of Earth's karmic pacing, allowing us and our planetary field
to recover some of the lost stars within our own 'black holes.'
In taking a microcosmic look at the RA-UM Labyrinth, we will find that
it is much like a fine-tuner, activating a closer union with the center of Being. For
the individual, one need only to tune into its frequency (via TRIBELIGHT - issues
#1,#2, #3/83) and expand their imaging (imag-i-nation) to include other space
time modes. Working with the RA-UM Labyrinth is a major step within the ‘New
World' aspect of becoming ELOHIM, co-creators of a more perfected world.
RA-UM Labyrinth visualization:
(1)
(2)
(3)
(4)
Visualize a labyrinth – you may wish to use a picture of a labyrinth to
concentrate upon at first (see Chartes labyrinth/maze in this issue). An
excellent image to concentrate upon would be the whole I Ching pattern
(see I Ching in this issue).
Imagine yourself beginning at the outside rim, and moving inward toward
the center of the maze. This labyrinth contains your spiritual identity. As
you seek the center, what symbols, patterns, impressions do you receive?
Be aware of these 'messages', for they contain the keys to unlock your
true pathings in life.
Once you have found the center, place yourself inside the obsidian shield.
Then allow yourself to resonate with the entire labyrinth, as it becomes the
greater Labyrinth of the RA-UM. Your obsidian shield begins to become
luminescent, as it glows from the infusion of greater to lesser. You
become the Greater, merging with the Mind of free-flow existence. As
your shield becomes light, see your spirit colors wrap scarves of enfolding
rainbows about you all colors of your glorious soul-mandala. Feel the
resonate chord of harmony between your most centered self and the RA-
UM pulse of free-flow.
Once you have held this state of At-Oneness for a comfortable time (five
to ten minutes), you may ‘enter' your 'commands' into the matrix. These
commands should not reflect the persona, but the spirit. In other words,
you do not enter “I want” or “I need”, but instead that Divine Order be
established in a particular situation or condition: “Divine Order is
established within the vital condition of my body.” Or, “Divine Order is
established in my work place, my finances, my relationships, etc. “In this
way, you are not ‘conjuring' via your personal will, but instead you are
affirming that Divine Order does exist in one or more, or all aspects of
your life. You are freeing yourself from karmic-bonding, enabling you to
escape the gravity of one reality and accept the reality best suited to your
spirit journey. This process, of course, would work without the Labyrinth.
However, as we enter a new stage of co-creativeness on the planet, such
tools as the RA-UM Labyrinth (which is a very real dimensional grid) are
given to us to build the New World foundations more firmly.
Inner Earth...a matter of reality
In answer to a reader's question as to the physical reality of the inner
or hollow Earth, and its' attendant civilizations:
Yes, the Inner Earth is a part of the Earth's physical reality, but it is also
within a different dimension. Think of separate dimensions as being different
'houses' stacked above one another, occupying the same space, but a separate
order. They are distinctly different in that their sequential ‘programs' of energy
are not harmonic with one another. Therefore, in order to escape one complete
dimension and enter another, a drastic re-structuring of energy must take place in
your body, meaning that your body would no longer be existent as we understand
it - in other words you would ‘die' in the transfer. This is still, of course, not to
say that you wouldn't be ‘alive' in some form when you broke through
successfully by ultra-terrestrials in especially designed and operated starcraft, but
without such technology, the human form would most likely not survive (although
there would be exceptions we won't go into, for lack of space in this issue.)
To return to the condition of a hollow planet (all true planets are hollow,
with a central sun), we have a much different phenomena. Picture a house again,
but this time see yourself in one room preparing to walk into another. As you
begin your journey, you must traverse a long hallway to get to that removed
cubicle (removed from your senses). As you take this course one step at a time,
you are slowly changing your field of reference. So, as a human being were to
enter the inner cavity at the poles (or through one of the tunnels) he would slowly
begin to change (rather than suddenly be in another 'house' or dimension). This
change would be only slightly noticeable to him (if he did not descend at an
excessive speed) – he would experience a minor increase in pulse rate, some
hypertension, alternating with states of mild euphoria, etc; unless he were
encapsulated in the proper vehicle that allowed for integration between the two
fields of being. If he were to look into a mirror mid-way in the journey, he would
see his familiar form, as it would not have visibly changes. Chemically, however,
he would have already begun a transformation. To quote from issue #1-81 of The
Source: "As an atomic weight nears the core of a planet, it will decrease,
causing an increase in the occilation of the particles' atomic parts. This will,
when interpolated with several other factors, all interconnective to the same
stimuli, such as oxygen density, etc., cause an extension in the growth ration
of the life mass." Thus, humans who do make the journey successfully, (with or
without a sub-shuttle vehicle) must undergo certain ‘treatments' to enable their
system to withstand this increase in growth. (The average height of a
subterranean woman for instance is 6'2" to 6'3”).
As one approaches the center of their planetary sphere, they will be carried
along in a dimensional flow - much like following the pathing of the
aforementioned labyrinth (the labyrinth/maze is a symbol for the Inner Earth
Mysteries). The Voyager does not jump from one analogous house to another, as
in a true dimensional escape, for they do not experience a rearrangement of
sequential energy. Instead, they merely continue the line of order from point "A"
(surface of sphere) to point “B” (Center of sphere) – but they do not travel this
‘line' in a true linear fashion. They cannot, for there is no linear direction into the
center of a planet. By ‘linear' it is not meant that one cannot travel a straight line
through matter. What is defined by this word in this context is spatial linear
dimension. The line progressed to the Center of any planet is centrifying, in that it
evolves towards its center. Therefore: (1) to travel to the interior of your planet is
not to go away from one's ‘home' dimension, but to go further into it, and (2)
there is no other reality of the center, ie. molten mass at core, etc., although the
illusion of such could take place under certain conditions from a ‘surface bound'
perspective .. but that is another story, entering into the realm of ‘expected' false
realities produce through the imposition of belief structures.
Now to another important consideration – the natural openings at the
poles. They are dimensional vortices that play havoc with our senses. Some
people have actually gone through them accidently, as did Admiral Byrd, but
most simply go around the edge, perceiving they are traveling a straight line. We
so depend upon our senses to tell us what is up and what is down, flat, round, etc.
(and our machines are an extension of our conditional perception and thus well
within our self-imposed reality). Poor Admiral Byrd! Little did his adventurous
mind realize that when he photographed moving pictures of mastodons grazing on
tropical vegetation at the North Pole, and then released this astounding film to the
early 20th Century audiences across the country that the U.S. Government would
come down on him like a ton of wet cement! They threatened to declare him a
hoaxer, or worse, insane, if he did not keep quiet about what he saw and
photographed at the Pole. The movies of artic mastodons were quickly
withdrawn from public circulation, but there are a few individuals alive today
who have testified that they witnessed these startling motion pictures in the
theatres of that period. (Testimony of certain witnesses is found in a various
works of "Hollow Earth" investigators.)
Yet, truth has a nasty habit of re-appearing until it is accepted by the
majority, as with the most recent satellite photos showing mysterious dark
apertures at the Poles. Scientists explain this vaguely as some sort of
photographic/atmospheric illusion. Their grounds for conclusion are that these
dark spots are not always seen in the surveillance photos consistently taken of the
planet… nor would they be, as when dealing with the dimensional pulsing of the
grid at its foremost apertures, there is a ‘tide' effect, with the waves visible at
certain junctures of dimensional prominence.
Visualization: Superman, Lone Ranger, and the Seven Unicorns
This visualization will focus on the act of empowerment – that principle of
dynamic generation within a specific realm of initiation that brings about spiritual
communion and material sustenance. In other words, we shall explore the mantle
of authority, which is the initiate's at-one-ment with serving Spirit.
Because of some acquired worthiness, whether from past life efforts,
grace, or through ordeal, he/she is called by the Hierophant or Sacred Power
Guardians to become empowered in the service of Divinity. This empowerment
is always implicit and never vague; although it may be cloaked in initiatic
phrasing as a final lesson for the receiving initiate, before he assumes his dynamic
role. Examples of this empowerment are to be found in the comic strip characters
of Superman and The Lone Ranger. The former addresses direct contact with
Spirit, inherited from the past, via heritage (previous generations, past life,
accumulative resonance with Divine Order, etc.). Superman has inherited his
powers from his Race, but also, he must continually be worthy of these strengths
through serving humanity. The irony of a substance that is harmless to the fragile
Earthlings and deadly to Superman, it the reminder of vulnerability that threatens
any great power, should it be carelessly executed, or deliberately abused.
Underlying in this symbology is the knowledge that Superman is indestructible
not because of his physical prowess and other world heritage, but because like
Galahad, he is pure of heart. The Lone Ranger is also pure of heart, but his powers
do not surface in super human faculty. The two ‘heroes' do share the concealment
of their identity, which is essential to the empowerment, striking at the heart of all
initiatory processes. Once revealed in its entirety the power is violated, for the
alchemy has been lost between the forces of good and evil. One is never
completely revealed to the other, nor can Truth in its purest form be exposed to
the uninitiated at any level, least their ignorance create a distorted image of that
truth, ingratiating it to the dark side. Superman conceals his identity in the form of
Clark Kent, but unlike the Lone Ranger, he performs his mystical functions more
openly and therefore in subtle esoteric ways, is less empowered than his masked
counterpart.
The symbolism of the Lone Ranger addresses the act of empowerment
through tragedy. His was initiation by ordeal – the wounded Texas Ranger
surviving against the odds and giving up his former identity for the greater cause.
When an initiate is called to empowerment, he/she must surrender self-ego for the
most part, renounces his claim on personal identity. Like a celebrity, he is
suddenly cast under a different light, and can never be the same again. He must
learn to balance his personal emotions on a tightrope of personal humanity and
spiritual non-identity. That is why symbolically, the empowered initiate is
usually accompanied at some point by a being who recognizes and addresses his
human element, while encouraging his spiritual service. This being is most often
a non-empowered, yet dedicated human or animal. The Lone Ranger had both his
human Indian friend, Tonto, and the white horse, Silver, who also represented the
spirit or higher will of his mission. Superman found his humanity in the image of
his foster-parents. Lois Lane was somewhat mis-placed in that role, since she
never recognized the true initiate in the 'hidden' Clark Kent, while Tonto and
Silver always knew whom they served.
There is always the alternate empowerment of evil, but even this form can,
and is, often reversed at some stage to serve the Light. The number seven
contains the vibration of empowerment in its spiritual mode. Because, the
unicorn (a very real creature in some physical dimensions, including the inner
Earth) is an archetype of empowered purity and concealed truth, and also
symbolically is Guardian of the Labyrinth, we shall incorporate both the number
seven and the unicorn into our visualization. Create the reality in your mid of
seven unicorns who, when they form a circle touching their horns together, create
a charge of empowerment. You are that seventh unicorn. (There is a children's
story of similar content, in which the empowerment of an eight unicorn circle
transformed the wicked dragons, who munched on unicorns, into dragons of
spiritual purity.)
When you as the seventh unicorn, present your special service to the circle
what transpires for you? For the Earth? What empowerment is brought forth?
What revelation is given for you in the questing of the human spirit toward the
Source? Begin…...
Of Interest
From "Smithsonian Magazine" article on New York's mysterious underground
tunnels and treasures ... “It doesn't matter how carefully you plan, you're still
never sure what you're going to find," Voilmer says. “On the surface, short of a
hurricane, you're not going to run into any surprises. But underground, it's a
surprise when there are no surprises."... " The records will show a sewer or an
electrical conduit under a street,” Cornish adds, “but they won't give the specific
horizontal or vertical location. A manhole tells you where a line is but not which
way it goes. A lot of the time you're working by feel and intuition."
..
“Part of this perpetual uncertainty is the result of shortsighted record
keeping that failed to keep up with the city's growth… but other subterranean
revelations reflect the city's rich history... There are 18th Century ships down
there under filled land near the rivers, and mysterious vaults, the bones of Indians
and God knows who else, and the remnants of underground dreams that became
subterranean follies."
ઃઃ
"We were working on a condo job downtown one time”, Cornish recalles,
when we found a bunch of decorative wrought-iron columns eight or nine feet
high, arranged in a pattern. It looked like it might have been some kind of arcade.
This was three or four feet beneath the surface. We never found out why they
were there."
Another time Cornish and his crew come upon a hunk of foot-long black
hair in a test pit several feet down. “It wasn't a rag mop, I'm sure of that, “he
says. "I didn't look any closer. If there was a skull attached to it, I didn't want to
know about it.”
"Cornish, Moloney and other Vollmer engineers see themselves in Arnold
Vollmer's graceful phrase, as custodians of New York's tribal memory,
'underground division.”
Upon reading the above, one is reminded of my favorite television series,
Beauty and the Beast. Many years ago, my sources told me that New York sat
atop many natural honeycombs, some of which had been altered for use by the
Central Earth Tribes, as ‘outposts' for contact points above in the city. "Vincent"
of B&B, very much reminds me of the 'primals', a race of inner Earth people,
whose ancestory is from the Nature Realm, from which they intermingled with
the human element ages ago. They are not of the '12 tribes' (of Subterranea), but
are one of the exo-cultures (see SOURCE #1-80).
From “OMNI MAGAZINE”.. This past year the discovery of materials
that superconduct electricity at relatively high temperatures made headlines. And
now some geologists, including the University of Minnesota's James Stout, think
that portions of the earth may behave as a giant superconductor."
"The theory hinges on the recent discovery that most of the earth's mantle
― the 1,740 miles of inner Earth that lie between the centralized core and the outer
crust - is made up of rock that has been squeezed into a crystalline structure
known as perovskite. This structure, it turns out, is remarkably similar to that of
the newly discovered superconductors, leading Stout and others to speculate that
"superconductivity may be a natural feature of the inner earth." (italics mine -
CH)
"The theory could easily be tested by compressing perovskite rock to
mantle like pressures, then shooting electricity through it. “The general feeling,"
Stout says, "is that the rock would become more conductive.” That could mean
the earth's magnetic field, which is now thought to be produced by the roiling
motions of the molten iron that makes up the outer core, is instead generated by
superconducted electricity. This in turn could lead to a new understanding of the
dramatic reversals of the earth's magnetic field which happen every 10 million
years or so. With the next reversal predicted for only about 2,000 years from
now, such understanding might help society prepare for the global navigational
disruption that will undoubtedly occur when magnetic north becomes magnetic
south." ― Bill Lawren
This is most certainly accurate (at least according to my sources),
although there is much more involved, such as the piezo-electric effect of the
crystalline grid and the resonating cavity of the inner hollow (source #2-81). The
vacu-transits of Subterranea (Source #3-81), as well as the aforementioned sub-
shuttles, are both operated by the earth's superconductivity – in a far more
advanced mode than what is known of this science on the surface.
While the unicorn is the devic guardian of the ‘labyrinth' of initiation into the
inner Earth, the Lion is the devic guardian of the central sun, and its attendant
mystical properties.
Song of the Grail
In the Eventide of day, when the sun is passing from this world
to the next, the Gods of Time clasp hands and dance about the sky,
tempting dreamers to stray from safe havens. As I sit beneath the
Father Oak, bound in spell by nature's casting, I weary of the
netherworld in which I dwell - of things fragmented and torn, of
impenetrable stone and unkind sounds, of blank faces and stolen
hours. I see what is not there and know what I cannot see. I live in
frozen earth, my own body a heavy mass of clay, too unformed to
know space.
Yet, within the lump of earth that is me, in the cold wasteland
of my life, a flower, sweet and scented grows. As I ponder the fluid
petal coverlets of my soul-flower, I open the gates of my mind and
become undone, as golden tresses loosened from maiden days, when
life flowed gently to the sea. I am silkened current washing the sand
crystals into polished light. I sweep away the cluttered world, and
unravel the layers of time, tracing dreampaths through my spirit song.
On the surface of a pool fed by three springs, do I alight. I am
full of sensation and life. As the cold pure water, so am I. Silverfish
dart through the crevasses of my bones and lotus flowers engage my
heart to root therein. My limbs are the low branches of shading trees,
and the songs of the little frogs rises up from the depths of my swan
throat, that seems so long and perfect, as if it were the passage for all
melody. My eyes! They are the reflection of two blue stars blazing
their ancient light into the water-mirror of my rippling face. I breathe
with the breezes that soothe and awaken my spirit, and the slow
grinding power of my Mother beneath me.
As I immerse my being into the pool of Light and drink deeply
from my own origin, I see two golden serpents arising from the
waters, coiled about a Chalice of Perfection. The cup I behold is no
relic from the past, nor savior of the future. It is Life, transparent to
any shading or color or menace of hue that would taint its immortal
fire. It is nothing but perfection. The serpents of Gold are neither
living nor lifeless. They respond to that which seeks a path to the Cup.
The serpent of the right path has eyes of blue sapphire and speaks the
sacred word. The serpent of the left path beholds light through eyes
of ruby and sees with unveiled sight.
Up ascends the Grail through the center of my heart, where the
three springs rush together within my pool-self. I release longing and
offer my cup to the forest. As both the Seeker and the Quest, I have
come from far away in tomorrows to know, I am the Eternal Day.
Once
Far far
Upon
a time
Away....
Christine Hayes
AVALON
The Gathering
Oh, crystalline form of inner purpose,
What brings us to this space and time?
What love unites and whose hand,
Doth guide us.
From whence we were blown, thus we have grown,
To stand before you, in pure innocence.
Oh, men of old what secrets did you encode
Into this ring of stone?
Sing forth Sumitra, let your voice unfold.
Sound out our inner note as we all open
To the light of new awakening.
Psalm and sonnet have ye sung but none so potent
As this one.
Sing on the high redeemer, enchantress of the inner light.
Sing! Sing! Sing! The octave of unfoldment.
The key of which lies in your heart.
Dipping down in Heaven's endeavor, Seraphim and Cherubim,
Do this splendid site,
Come marching all in order-thus to build
An enclave of pure light.
New Age octave, in web-light woven,
Held in awe of all whom gather –
Symbol of new fertility.
Out of sound descended, pattern of the growing soul,
Out of sound ascended, glory to the great redeemer.
Magicians of the light come forth with
Your lance and shining blade.
All the darkness rent asunder.
Come forth and breathe the sound of new awakening.
Come drink your fill dear children,
Suppeth in the lasting draught.
All that drinketh from this deep fountain-
Shall will and want no more.
Transcribed by David Thorpe
Findhorn, Scotland 24/04/87
"The ancient Egyptians employed seals of warm cement, metal or stone for the purpose of
securing the doors of house or storerooms. The sealing instrument itself- usually pictured as an
inscribed cylinder with an attached rope that was worn about the neck or wrist – was also used as a
signet of authority. The highest office among such officials was the Divine Sealer, who was in
charge of temple treasures, and was attached to the services of the gods themselves." - Forgotten
Times/issue 4
In metaphysical terms, the art of rubber stamping is an act of sealing a vibratory form
representing an archetypal energy pattern, into a physical – plane awareness. Thus, when an artist
paints a picture, the placement of each pigmentation with his brush determines, via color and form,
a specific release of energy – Language – more than symbolic, but actualizing in elemental
function. Esoterically, the connection between form and energy reaches beyond the perimeter of
art.-L.C. Hayes
YOUR PERSONAL MYSTIC LIFE SEAL...
Hand-stamped through ceremony for the individualk using symbols & color
attuned to his/her Life Quest.
On 9”x12” imitation parchment - $28.pp.

# Combined OCR Output

"The Source"
Issue #3-88
"The candidate who had become an Initiate was found worthy to enter into the
presence of Osiris and to be numbered among the followers of Horus forever."
""Companions of Horus' are mentioned in earliest Egyptian texts as 'sky people',
said to refer to inhabitants of the mighty constellation of Orion.”
"Knowledge concerning celestial intercommunion between high Initiates upon
earth and Beings far off in stellar space was taught by Atlantean priests and passed
on to their neophytes and disciples in the early days of colonization in Egypt. "
-from "KA Bible Interpretation, Vol.I” –
By C. Heline (as excerpted from MAGII FROM THE BLUE STAR.) By
Christine Hayes
Offerings of Horus
"The child was given forth upon wings of the night, as a falcon searches the
wind with pinions of the golden dawn, hovering above a slate grey morning.
Quills dipped in scented musk, the great bird perfumed the air, coloring the sky in
amber swirls, penetrating the breath of RA with a Shrill cry of life:
Praise, praise him who reside within! For he is the son of the Sun!
Horus, thou art among us! From an infant of divine tidings arises a prince of
men. It is he who sits upon the throne of the sky, for yea, he is the First and Last
of the Race of the Star."
"Horus, bring thy offerings, child of Light, before the alters of Senna.
Enlighten the scribes with words of divine magic. Restore the Temple of thy
father, Osiris."
"Make way, make way, for he who is the bearer of the eye of RA. For he is
great among mortals, he is keeper of the flame."
"And thus was the child brought before the alters of Senna, to be received as
the Holy One of Kophera (Rigel). From his seed descends the races of the Gods,
the immortals of the Sky, upon whose outstretched hands is braced the temple of
the world."
The above quotation was channeled by me, and is from a lost text written
long before the accepted historical time of Egypt as an ancient nation. Historians
do not see past the dynasties that have survived notice among the fragments of
time. However, because the true doctrine of ancient Egypt was an esoteric,
initiatic, and magical one, little remains of the more enlightening works - nothing
from the "Age of the Gods", or the original star races from whom the known
dynasties descended. Such knowledge was not shared with the general public en
mass, nor was it given to all but those of the inner temple in written form. The
ordinary citizen received this knowledge in verbal and spiritual initiation on an
individual basis. Reading and writing was not widely known among the people.
When the star races (of Rigel in Orion, and some form the Pleiades and
Sirius) came into the ancient people then inhabiting that region, they did so with
great suddenness. It was not in the form of an invasion, for there was a willing
acceptance by the native populace to receive these emissaries from the stars. The
'natives' were not a primitive culture, but maintained a basic spiritual maturity of
thinking that promoted an easy acceptance of realms beyond their own. Also, they
had been pre-conditioned for the Star Dwellers through their Shamans who for
centuries before had been prophesying their coming.
Thus, when these exceptional human-linked beings akin to their own
physical constitution and spiritual connectiveness came amongst the people of
Egyptland, they embraced them as the 'Gods' of the realm beyond. This did not
imply that the natives believed these entities to be totally divine beings, but they
saw them as superior in intellect and spiritual harmony, and therefore of 'divine'
heritage.
The culture present at that time was simple yet substantial. They did have a
written language which some of the peoples employed, although it was mostly for
business records, and was primitive in its grasp of concept. The Star Dwellers or
"Divine Race" brought a new language and allowed the individual access to these
knowledges in a simpler verbal form. This was not a form of snobbery or an
attempt to keep a servant race in the dark. Several factors were involved. The
language, both written and spoken was far too difficult, too intricate, for the native
of the region to learn. Even of greater difficulty was the knowledge itself. Such
truths were dangerous in the hands of the uninitiated. Instead, the star race devised
ways to integrate this enlightened code within the genetics of the people. They
began inter-breeding with the original inhabitants. This was a process approved by
both parties. Through the years, this mixed race began to function with greater
natural awareness, as they contained the more advanced crystallex molecules
within their DNA, allowing a greater aptitude for spiritualized consciousness,
locked into the ‘race memory' of the star people. (A similar yet less intensified
seeding took place in the British Isles, during the Merlin period, see issues
#3/4-87). However, not all the mixed race were on the side of Light. Some used
their powers for the dark side, which began the struggle between the Aton (Light)
and Aumun (Dark) forces in Egypt..
The man Horus came upon the scene in a period when there had been a
break with the 'pure born' – those with the pure star genetics. There remained only
a mixed form of the star races among the people of Egypt, now a great kingdom of
‘giants' (so-called because of their mighty inheritance from the stars and also their
height, which was above average). Several problems were arising from the inter-
breeding of royal families (an attempt to keep the star races strong).
Horus was sent as a transfusion to the society. It was deemed necessary by
the hierarchy controlling the seeding and nurturing of Egypt, that another lineage
be begun. The lineage of Horus was from the “Blue Star”, Rigel, as had been the
first ‘race builders', but the more recent lineages had come from the Pleiades and
Sirius, so in this context it was 'new' to the last few generations. But, also, Horus'
line was a particular blend, different from any other Blue Star lineage that had
previously seeded among the Egyptians. On this planet there are many different
races.
On the worlds of Rigel, there are divergent genetic types. Yet all these
blends are of one race. They are more like family trees within the whole race
form. On Earth we have come to greater divisions among our kind.
From the lineage of Horus a new and stronger genetic type was integrated
within the present population. It was a more mutable patterning that allowed a
greater stability of carry-overs in “Blue Star” traits from generation to generation.
This brought the ‘new race' of Egypt to greater heights as they were more capable
of activating the Secret Knowledges for the good of the people.
But, Horus was more than a procreator. He was a wise and noble personage
who graced Egypt with a gentle benefaction. The people greatly loved him. He
was a gifted reconciler of differences and a just and foremost member of the ruling
council. In those days there were no “Pharaohs”. The rulership was in the hands
of a council composed of a mixture of peoples, all who had been initiated to a very
high level in the Temple of Senna – the uppermost temple of the Blue Star. At first,
this precluded the non-star inhabitant, as they were not intellectually and spiritually
capable of these innermost initiations, but as the star races infiltrated the Earth
races, few citizens of Egypt were without some trace of 'blue' blood. It need be
understood that the Blue Star Race who came into other cultures of this world, did
not wish to take over a territory, supplanting their race with another's. Instead, the
mandate was to re-assimilate. All people's of this Earth were originally from other
domains (with the exception of the 'primals' - a race inside the planet that stems
exclusively from the Devic (Earth) Kingdom, yet exists in the human spectrum).
Many from the well of humanity came from the Star Trinity of Rigel, Pleaides and
Sirius. In fact, this very planet was created as a streaming of cosmic energy from
these 'Living Lights'. The people with whom the Blue Star Race chose to conjoin
were, in very distant relations; their kindred brethren.
Through Horus, a greater closeness developed between the people and the
ruling council and priest/priestess cast, of which the ruling council was part. The
charismatic Horus, whose 'personal' name was Ahmanentet, went among the
streets and homes of the humble, and as an earlier-day Jesus, taught the word of
God. Although, Horus was not a bearer of the Christ, as was Jesus, he was
nevertheless “Christed”, or a vehicle of the Christ Ray; the difference being that
the Master Jesus was chosen to carry the full spectrum of the Christ, whereas such
personages as Horus are those who transmit a single ray of that entire divine field.
(As a footnote, Joshua Ben Josef, known by the Greeks as ‘Jesus', descended from
the Blue Star Race through the House of David. His lineage came through the
House of Horus, and was also re-constituted via a molecular transportation of two
infants from the Blue Star, into the Great Pyramid of Giza.)
Centuries after Horus the man, came Horus the Archetype. As discussed in
issue #1-88, the Egyptian Archetypes were force fields created by repetition in
thought rituals. They were/are active energy beings, but not ensouled entities.
They are simply (or complexly) a register or a particularly powerful thought focus
than can be activated when tapped by the initiated mind. Many of the Egyptian
Archetypes were given the names of once-living "Divine Ones" (of the Star
Races). They were more than just name-sakes however. The qualities and spiritual
identity of these living personages was woven into the mantras and rituals which
produced the final Archetypal version. Thus, the chosen person was inextricably
linked to his/her Archetypal Self.
Eventually, the Star Trinity races, including the lineage of Horus paled in the
glare of the Amun eye – the Eye of Horus reversed. What had been given forth by
the 'Gods' to the races of men, was applied a distorted posture by the Amun. Yet,
even unto the last days of ancient Egypt, the Aton remained the “Holy of Holies"
a strong underground influence. Most of the Pharaohs were secret initiates of
Aton, although some were plainly Amunists, within the houses of the Amun
royalty, could be found Aton loyalists. When the Pharaoh Akhnaton brought Aton
into the light of day for the first time since the Era of Enlightenment, he presented
it in a simplified version for the masses, and was destroyed in his daring attempt.
Despite the victories which the Dark forces have had over the spirit of this
planet, the Light never fails to find root in the deepest regions of the Earth. This
wisdom is guardianed by the Central Earth Tribes, ancestors of the Star Trinity and
our human coil, and blended finally through the veil of the Nature Kingdom.
When, we as a whole and true Spirit Race, come together on the surface of this
world beneath the solar "Eye of RA", so we will eradicate the conflicts within our
melting pot. It is then that we will align our heritage as one with the Living Lights,
from which we spawned and to which we shall return.
"I take up the rod of Horus and strike the Earth. So fire arises in the form of
a serpent, and I feed my soul from his light."
"Falcon of Horus doth consume the serpent and ingest his flame. From the
entrails of the Sky Soul is the serpent reborn unto man."
from the text of O-si-ra, one of the TEN SERPENT SCROLLS OF SENNA.
Translated (channeled) by Christine Hayes
The legend of hours, the sun-king
(from Murry Hope's, "The Way of the Cartouche, as excerpted from "Magii
From The Blue Star", by Christine Hayes)
“Horus is rather like a young, handsome prince in a children's story who is
cheated of his inheritance and has to regain his kingdom through his own wisdom
and prowess. He is raised among ordinary folk, has no social and cultural
advantages, and is aided in his quest through gaining an understanding of their
feelings, sufferings and skills. During the years of learning and trial, he is
sustained by the care and wisdom of his devoted mother. When he is deemed
ready he is able to go forth and right the wrongs of the past, free the oppressed, and
restore peace, order and harmony to the land,"
"Legend tells us that Osiris guided Horus from Heaven, always keeping in
touch with him in visions, dreams and mind-to-mind communication. One day
Osiris decided to test his son with the question, "What do you consider to be a just
and fair task in life?" to which Horus replied, “Helping Mother and Father in ill
plight." The answer much pleased Osiris and there after Horus, became patron of
the family and home."
"Horus was portrayed as a very handsome and charismatic personality and
because of his own frailty as a small child, which he so successfully overcame, he
was looked to as the giver of physical healing and protector of the young and
weak."
"Although all the arts were sacred to him, music was his special love.
Because of his symbol, the All-Seeing Eye, many designate him the god of
prophecy and therefore the patron of oracles."
“There is an ancient prediction that he will one day return to reestablish the
kingdom of his father, when the Golden Age will be restored and the lion will lie
down with the lamb. This is referred to come about during the Aquarian Age."
"Thus, I came up out of Egypt and stood before Sinai, and a power divine touched
my Spirit and gave it sight, so that I beheld many wonders. And from the sacred
mountain I heard a voice which said, “Knowledge is Love and Light and Vision."
Helen Keller
In August of 1988, some of our "Voyagers" - John Davis (from Michigan
and founder of the Coptic Fellowship), Delores Kemp (From San Antonion, Texas)
and Laurence Chisholm (of Aberdeen, Scotland) were given a directive to
accomplish in Egypt and the Sinai. This directive was channeled by me from
THOTH, the details of which composes many pages, but for lack of space within
this issue, will be capsuled as succinctly as possible.
These three traveled to Egypt and the Sinai with another, larger grouping of
New Agers. Yet, the particulars of their special service through THOTH'S
directive was to be carried out by them alone. The journey began on July 30th, and
ended on August 11th. While the major tasks were to take place at the Temple of
Edfu (Horus) in Egypt atop Mt. Sinai (of Moses and the ten commandments), other
sacred sites of great importance in this mission were:
The Temple of Isis on Philae Island, where there was an enactment of a
sacred rite for the women of the world (and the feminine principle of bother
genders in their spiritualized bodies.)
The Temple of Queen Hatshepsut ("Queen of Sheba"). Here a stelae once
stood, containing the 'star history' of Hatshepsut. Now destroyed, it was
restored etherically for a future purpose.
The Temple of Ramses II, in which certain personal transfiguration
occurred for each of the three, as well as a stirring of ancient seals, freeing
long-silent divine directives into a readiness for future action.
The Temple of Karnak at Luxor. A place of renewal and regeneration,
where, in future ages, ancient records will come to light. The ‘three' re-
aligned the 'membrane' of etherium about the temple, which had been
damaged eons ago.
Alexandria, the city of the famous and now lost libraries. Here, within a
most sequestered underground passage, beneath a pillar of granite, re-
alignments were made with the central axis of the planet.
In all of these sacred places, the Sun Key was fit into its ancient locks, and
turned to the calibrations of a New World. From the messages of THOTH:
7/5/88
"The gathering of souls who shall make this pilgrimage are brought
together as a unit of response to a greater dictate. Through (these three),
acting as synthesizers, so the Maze (see issue #2-88) is superimposed upon
the matrix of ancient command, frequencied in the common pulse of this
band of initiates."
"As they progress through the Maze, so they are attuning all they
touch, see and experience to the ancient grid which has been awaiting re-
activation. Understand that the Maze of which we speak here is the
Labyrinth of RA-UM, that energy vector which was first established in the
Earth in the Time of the Light, before the Adamic Race. Yet, it was never
given activation, for the Luciferian coil penetrated the Earth Shield and the
etheric veil of the planet was torn, as an angel's wing lanced by the spear of
darkness. Now has come the time to begin to repair the veil using the
blueprint of the Sun Bow Clan, the Master Builders of the First Generation.
This blueprint is the Labyrinth or Maze of the RA-UM, that which has been
re-created in myth and magic on and in the Earth through the generations of
man."
"There is much about the Labyrinth of which we cannot at this time
reveal, yet be aware that it is a vector for solvency. It is the alchemical
Philosopher's Stone, the cauldron of the molten sea, the Holy of Holies. It is
all these aspects of the whole. It is also that which heals. Through the
Maze, parts of the whole are reunited, made as one again, complete in the
Chalice of the Sun."
"And thus, for the pilgrimage to Egypt and Mt. Sinai, we have given
the symbolic reference of The Journey of the Sun Key. For the Sun Key is
that element of the entry into the fiber of wholeness, dynamism and vitality,
which is the essence of the Sun. It is also an actual rayship, released from
the center of the inner (Earth) sun, on July 4th, 1988. This rayship was
placed in the atoma (central sun) of the planet by the souls of the First
Migration (from the Blue Star), when they were beamed into the center of
the planet and then came through the labyrinth of the Earth to the surface of
their new world."
"On the Journey of the Sun Key, this rayship will be entered into the
sacred places - each containing a ‘keyhole' for the Sun Key. Look for the
keyholes, as these are specific forms. Once found, enter the SunKey and turn
the lock. Do this through the guidance given you. Know that it will not
necessarily resemble the actual jesture of placing a key in a lock and turning
it. Depending upon the keyhole, the entry and access will differ. You will
not personally be gaining access for the alchemical substance in the central
sun of the planet to re-animate the Golden Grid of the Master Builders of
Old. This will be a first step through the Labyrinth in achieving the re-
attunement of the entire planet to its true axis in etheric bonding."
“On July 4, 1988 the rayship or Sun Key came up from the center of
the Earth, being summoned from a shaman cave ion Australia, in which the
talismanic grid for this release had been set by beings of the First Dreaming
eons ago. The Sun Key was then beamed through the center point of the sun
disc etched on the Gateway of the Sun, at Lake Titicaca in the Andes. It is
for the Journey of the Sun Key to bring it into the keyholes beyond the
Atlantic."
"Remember that the RA-UM Labyrinth is also in the dimension of a
newly established energy grid set by the Pymander computer (inner Earth),
its base being the San Antonio/Austin area (of Texas) within the etheric
pyramid anchored there.”
7/20/88
"The Journey of the Sun Key is the first expression of the Awakening,
when the Seventh Seal shall begin opening. The Christ dynamic is working
through the HORUS archetype as it becomes in with SET/SATAN. Thus,
for (these three), they will be confronting the intense powers between the
polarities of Good and Evil. Yet, understand that this is not a dark journey.
Through the archetypal HORUS, the SUN is with the m as the SON. The
Blood of the Moon casts a wave across the face of the sun and it becomes
black, yet this is the alchemical seal, within which the process of
transmutation is ignited."
"The entity Rhama Azul carries forward the HORUS archetype as the
Illumined Eye (sphere) in his hand, which is manifest from the heart. The
element of blood is strongly connected to this Awakening, as it is the letting
go of the crucified state of consciousness, the release of the female sign of
sorrow (menustration), and the unbinding of the wound at the center of the
Earth/Heart chakra that was etherically pierced when Christ died on the
cross."
"As Aaron, brother of Moses, the entity Rhama Azul walked the path
of his brother up Mt. Sinai after Moses' ascension, and received five golden
shales of etheric Light. These ‘shales' were of a substance between matter
and spirit and were impressed into Aaron's auric envelope.. Rhama Azul
brought them into the heart chakra of the Earth. Now he will return them,
through the Sun Key, (coming from the center of the Earth) to the
mountain... The five shales of energy which, when united with certain
forthcoming calibrations, will restore the vibration of IS-RA-EL."
"Thy footfalls are even now proceeding thee to the Holy Places, where the
Angel of Living Waters awaits thy communion."
(7/28/88)
"To address the pomegranate as a sacred entity, it must be seen in its
true form. In etheric body, this bush is alive with the fire of receipt. It is the
'burning bush', from which the Order is named (see issue #4-87) and indeed
is the bush from whence Jehovah spoke to Moses. On the etheric plane the
bush of the pomegranate is the one remaining, ‘vine of Eden' meaning that
in the 'fall' or lowering of the etheric veil, this is the only plant that was able
to remain within its true form in the life wave of Earth. It is the ‘apple' of
Eden, and is thus still associated with lustfulness in some symbolic
reference. However, the pomegranate holds no such debauchery in its Earth
embrace. It merely receives Light
it manifests spirit into matter and
exchanges energies between planes of consciousness. If the heart is untrue,
filled with self-desire, the Light of the etheric ‘apple' eats away at the matter
element, destroying that which cannot abide in the Light. The seeds of the
pomegranate harbor the Light-contact potential of the plant. They are
energizing vehicles that allow etheric passage from the realm of ‘above'
(higher dimensional realities) to 'below' (the Earth Plane). And thus we give
you (three) the duty of planting three seeds of the pomegranate upon
Mt.Sinai. In this coursing, so shall the New Race begin its germination, not
from the biological constitution of these seeds, but from the sacred act of
planting and the register of the fire of the pomegranate in the ethers."
"Within the heart-frame of man is the Tetragrammaton. It is the lost
vowel of harmony. In the mantramic sound of the word 'p-om-e-g-ra-n-at-
e', is found the cadence of this syllable. When these vocables are entoned in
a precise manner, so the Tetragrammaton is temporarily activated. This was
accomplished by the Grand Initiates in the Order of the Illumined (from
whence all divine orders of the Earth receive their grace). The
Tetragrammaton can be formed by the encodes of the EM frequency, as the
Enochian Masters entone upon the inner planes. (see issue #4-87). This
entoning is accomplished through the vitalizing of the Sacred Fire within the
etheric heart chakras of these Masters who even without body, retain their
‘atoma' – the golden seed of the heart chakra."
"Addressing the duties to perform with the Temple of Horus, it is
here that the EM tone will be sounded and centered in the heart chakras of
those present, to be carried to Sinai, being the impetus for the release of the
five shales of Light carried by the Horus entity through Rhama Azul. Yet,
before the tone can be centered in the heart, a consecration must take place,
blessing the energy veil of the Temple and sanctifying the ground (of the
Temple) for the New Dispensation. For it is here that the Master Jesus was
embued with the Enochian Mysteries and entoned for his latter Christ
receipt... it is He (Jesus Christ) who reigns as the Divine Vanquisher, under
whose heel so shall SET/SATAN be kept until the day of Transfiguration,
when the Fallen Son will be brought up from the pit of Desire and once
again twine in Divine Cadence with the Holy Ghost of the Lord. In the
Temple of Horus doth begin the turning of the Sun Key... find the symbols
that are the lock, and using the entoning instrument (casio synthesizer), play
the notes as you visualize the release of the seals and the opening of the
heart vessel at the center of the etheric chamber of the Temple. Thus, set
free on the wings of the falcon, the LoveLight into the world."
THOTH also spoke of "MENON", the Master of the Enochian
Mysteries in Egypt, who was the teacher or chela of Moses.
It was
MENON, according to THOTH, that gave Moses his empowerment to part
the Red Sea, among other supernatural feats."
After THOTH's messages on The Journey of the Sun Key, I went to my
research books and found the following quotations:
From Manly P Hall's “SECRET TEACHINGS OF ALL AGES": "The Pomegranate is
the mystic fruit of the Elusian rites.. Jacob Bryant in his Ancient Mythology notes that the ancients
recognized in this fruit an appropriate emblem for the Ark of the Deluge, which contained the
seeds of the new human race. Among the ancient Mysteries the pomegranate was also considered
to be a divine symbol of such peculiar significance that its true explanation could not be divulged.
It was termed by the Cabiri ‘the forbidden secret'. Pomegranate capitals were placed upon the
Pillars of Joaquin and Boaz standing in front of King Solomon's Temple; and by the order of
Jehovah, pomegranate blossoms were embroidered upon the bottom of the High Priest's ephod."
In "A Dictionary of Symbols", by Cirlot, it is stated that "The Greeks believed the
pomegranate sprang from the blood of Dionysus”. Heline reveals in her NA Bible Interpretations
that Adonis, Dionysus and Osiris shared "a strange identity of principle and function, and their
Mysteries closely resembled one another."
Heline continues: "The Orphics in fact did identify Adonis with Dionysus; and we not in
this respect that the Essenian Brotherhood of Palestine was very closely similar to the Orphic
Brotherhoods of Greece, both in dress, rule and teaching, and the Master Jesus and His holy
Father and Mother were all Initiate members of this group."
“Orpheus seems to have been a Hierophant of the Mysteries of Dionysus, and it is
significant that early Christians depicted Jesus in the likeness of Orpheus in drawings in the
catacombs, indicating that they recognized a similarity between them."
"Again, it is related of Dionysus that, like Moses, possessed a wand which he changed
into a serpent at will, and his armies passed dry shod through the Red Sea. In India he saw the
Sun shining at night. The Orontes and Hydashes rivers parted their waters to give him passages,
and he arrested the course of the Sun and the Moon. He also wrote his laws upon two tables of
stone, and (again like Moses) he was anciently represented with a horn of horns (representing
light) issuing from his head."
"The Dionysiac Mysteries were nocturnal. Dionysus was the Light that Shineth in
Darkness, the Mystic Midnight Sun.”
Interestingly several nights before this material came into my hands, and before
THOTH's messages of the subject, I had a dream in which I saw a golden pyramid underneath a
'black sun' - a sphere of darkness from which issued a rim of brilliant light, as in a total eclipse
of the Sun. The sky around this extraordinary sight was midnight blue, lit with stars. John Davis
tells me that this is a vision of Revelations, foretelling the opening of the Seventh Seal.
New Age Bible Interpretations continues: “Each Initiate in the Adonis Mysteries, or the
Dionysiac Mysteries, became Adonis or Dionysus, as the Egyptian Initiate became Osiris....
Therefore, Hiram, the Initiate of Adonis, IS Adonis: he has a new name, that of God: Adonis-
Hiram, or Adoniram."
"It is said that Adoniram gave to the Perfect Masters in Jerusalem the Grand Word which
Moses had engraved on a triangular plate of gold. The Secret of this Name had originally been
revealed by God to Enoch, who was transported for this purpose to a high mountain where he
beheld a radiant triangle inscribed with the Word (Tetragrammaton). He was then taken to a
subterranean place, descending through nine arches, and in the innermost, or ninth, he again
beheld the same triangular plate. Here we have an esoteric reference to the Kabbalistic doctrine
of the Trinity, which Origen mentions as taught him by his Hebrew master. Again it exemplifies
the Hermetic axion, ‘as above, so below', defined by modern metaphysicians as the Law of
Reflection whereby the Supreme Intelligence is reflected in the Infinite Universe (the Ptolemaic
Spheres)."
"Later, Enoch constructed a Temple with nine arches one below the other in accordance
with this vision. Methuselah, his eldest son, had charge of the work which was performed here in
the land of Canaan, at Jerusalem, but even Methuselah was not permitted to know the secret
which his father concealed under the ninth arch. This was a duplicate of the golden plate
inscribed by Enoch, and erected on a pedestal of white marble beneath the lowest of the nine
arches. No one can pronounce the sacred Name of God which is inscribed on this golden triangle
until full spiritual equilibrium has been established in the higher consciousness. Moses hinted at
this divine consummation when he revealed the Name of God as "I AM THAT”. This is the
Mystic Cry of the Initiate, when, having explored the Nine Outer Arches of the Universe and their
reflection in the Nine Inner Arches of the self, he at last discovers THE ONE seated above the
highest arch to be the selfsame Identity as THE ONE below the lowest Arch; namely, "I AM
THAT".
"Warned of the impending Deluge (pomegranate associated with the ‘Ark of the Deluge'-
CH) and fearing that true knowledge might perish, Enoch built two Pillars upon the highest
mountain, one of bronze to resist water and one of brick to withstand fire. On the brick pillar he
recorded the hieroglyph that a precious treasure had been set beneath the subterranean arches. On
the bronze pillar was inscribed the esoteric truths concealed in Masonry. The brick pillar was
destroyed in the Deluge, but the bronze survived. Masonic antiquity dates therefrom."
“Enoch here is the same as Hermes Trismegistus, the Hierophant of the Egyptian
Mysteries, under the tutelage of Mercury. But, the SUBSTANCE of the Mysteries are forever
concealed and revealed in TETRAGRAMMATON, THE LOST WORD."
"After the Captivity in Egypt, the pronunciation of the Name was taught to Moses by
God, intimated in, ‘I AM THAT I AM." He was told of a day when his descendants would
discover it engraved on a plate of gold. Meanwhile, the pronunciation (or meaning) became
corrupted through succeeding generation.” (But is contained uncorrupted in a specific entonation
of ‘P-om-e-g-ra-n-at-e”-CH)
"Solomon was of course familiar with this secret teaching and in the construction of the
Temple, the remains of Enoch's subterranean cavern were found by his workmen. After the death
of the Grand Master, further examination of the vaults showed the ninth with its marble pedestal
and golden plate intact. This was removed into another vault where the three Grand Masters who
presided over the Secret Council met in conclave. This vault, which was also in the Earth, is said
to have held the Masonic Pillar of Beauty which supported the Holy of Holies immediately above
ground."
THOTH tells me that the Vault of Menon within Mt.Sinai (which I saw in a vision) is the
location of the TETRAGRAM-MATON, where it was placed by Moses, initiate under MENON,
Master of the Enochian Mysteries. The vault now contains, among other things, the crypt and
suspended body of MENON, his Mystery Chest, the TETRAGRAMMATON, and inscriptions of
the original tablets of Moses not the Ten Commandments, but the tablets that were taken back
by Jehovah. This vault was the original resting place of the TETRAGRAMMATON having been
anchored there by Masters of the STAR-TRINITY (Orion/Pleiades/Sirius).
-
SECRET TEACHINGS OF ALL AGES: "By arranging the four letters of the Great
Name (IH V H ( The TETRAGRAMMATON)), in the form of the Pythagorean Tetractys, the 72
powers of the Great Name of God are manifested."
Serpent in the Sky
By J.A. West (as excerpted from “MAGII FROM THE BLUE STAR)
-
"The myth is thus simultaneously science and theology, describing a natural process and at
the same time furnishing a model for spiritual struggle – for Horus in this content is the divine man,
born of nature, who must do battle against Set, his own kin, ultimately defeating him and being
reconciled to him. Set is variously the enemy... the destroyer."
"The same myth also provides insight into the two paths or ways of 'salvation' - the way of
Osiris and the way of Horus. The former is the way of reincarnation, of progressive dissolutions
linked only by the generative principle; the latter is the direct path, that of the warrior of the spirit,
out to subdue the enemy within himself by his own efforts."
THOTH on The Journey of the Sun Key (results), 8/30/88
Question:
Was the journey Successful? Was all accomplished?
THOTH:
Yes, all was accomplished within the expectations of Divine Order. Understand that the
very cooperation and conscious will of those involved in these services outweighed any distractions that
occurred. Within the etheric placement of this matrice, there was Perfect Order, which superceded the
SET/Chaos element present on the journey.
For a further understanding of what was accomplished on this voyage of Light and Dark, I
suggest you open the seals of Cartouche and find the answer you seek.
(CH- at this point I take THOTH's advice. I shuffle and draw four cards. THOTH tells me that this
represents the four cornerstones or keynotes of the venture. I then draw a fifth card, which is the central
axis, or resolution of the four archetypal forces (other four cards) involved.)
The following is the 5- card spread, and THOTH's interpretations:
Anubis - Wayseer of the journey, that which involves the wayfarer in the initiation of passage. The spirit-
form of Anubis is the sacred canine of Egypt – the temple guardian who not only guards but guides. This
archetype is so magically conceived as to be a cohesive force between the human and nature kingdoms. It
is therefore a gate between the realms of man and nature, including the 'nature' of all matter, from the
rose to the star. Thus, the archetype Anubis is evident in this revelation as the force which brought the
Journey of the Sun Key into its full spectrum by opening the passage for the rayship (sun key) from the
center of the Earth and beaming it into the homing devices (ancient sites) of its future calibrations.
Isis - The feminine wellspring of spiritual maturity; that which offers nurturing to the infant world. She is
the Goddess of eternal solace, but also she is a powerful force to be reckoned with, for her code is
absolute. No chaotic energy can distill her honor and grace. Once you have submitted yourself to the
embrace of this archetype, your focus must remain steadfastly in her service, which is the service of
healing and restoration. For the Sun Key, the meaning is one of completeness. That which has been
received by Isis is now in her care. While she will cast the disloyal from her Temple, she will always
protect that which has been placed unto her keeping.
Crook & Flail - This is a symbol of worldly authority in most circumstances, but within the context of
this reading it assumes the role of the guardian race of the 'Blue Star' Rigel (in Orion). The mission of
the Sun Key was radiant under this authority, and thus was evolved through eons of gradual cycles. The
final service conducted by those three upon the journey, was the capstone of many centuries of building
the structure, molding it, conforming it, to meet the union of the rayship from the center of the Earth.
Thus, what transpired on this voyage was the very final, but crucial stroke, leading to a new cycle of
events. The etheric emanations of Rigel played a major role in the process of receipt of the Sun Key to
these ancient sites, for it is from the 'Blue Star' that the Earth receives its 'First Generation cycle, which
must also become its last cycle in returning to the Source.
Lotus - The natural emblem of Divine Order, most especially expressed in the 1,000 petal lotus, the
Golden Lotus, or Divine Archetype of Perfect Order. Through the Lotus' Doctrine of Signature, the world
was brought forth from Chaos (SET), evolving into ordered continuity. Such order is a symmetry of
mind, and willingness to become one with Greater Mind or Order. For the Sun Key mission, this emblem
displays the kernel of solvency into which all chaotic occurrences (of the trip) were poured, to become
molded into a new form - one of Light and Perfect Order.
The axis card revealed is Water, seen in the Cartouche as Imsety, one of the four sons of Horus.
This is the element of purification. It is also the ebb and flow of cycles, the co-merging of divergent
ways, and the singularization of multiple realities. On the Sun Key journey, water is the eternal solvent
into which chaos was mixed to be poured into the Lotus, the symmetry of Mind. Water is also a
representation of the elixir of blood that is the ‘gift” taken to the mountain (Sinai) in the form of living
initiates, into whose veins is infused the spiritual blood of the Christ. This is the etheric charge of divine
consequence that rises like a dragon from the power center of the initiate when he/she is challenged into
action for divine service. It formalizes the crucifixion of elements into a living pattern of Immortal Spirit.
Voyagers of Horus has been given as the name for all Earth-healing work done under the
guidance of THOTH and the other Enochian Masters, via this channel. This work includes visualization,
energy projection, inner-plane, and physical participation. In the near future we would like to see this
take shape as a non-profit foundation for Earth-healing, in which field workers are sent to sacred grounds
and ancient sites, specifically for this Light Service and not as part of a larger ‘tour' group. Since it would
not be a profit-making endeavor funding would need to be forthcoming.
The name "Voyagers of Horus" come from an inner society, begun by the initiate Horus, and
continuing within the Temple of Senna, the doctrine of which was recorded in the Ten Serpent Scrolls of
Senna.
MAGII FROM THE BLUE STAR
The Spiritual Drama & Mystic Heritage of Elvis Aaron Presley
By Christine Hayes, contributions by Wanda Hill
$25 US & Canada /$38. foreign air
Elvis' mystical journey in his own words...
His belief in a "Star Heritage".
Nearly half of MAGII is taken from transcripted telephone conversations between Elvis and Wanda June
Hill, his friend of 15 years, taped ‘lectures' by Elvis in his home, and from letters and cards sent by him to
Wanda, her family and friends.
Elvis discusses his past lives, personal philosophy and visions of the future.

"The Source"
