ADVERTISING IN "THE SOURCE": $1. Plus .05 per word: business card size: $3; ¼ page:$10 ;
full page: $20
In this, the last issue of 1988, we will continue with the Voyagers of
Horus' journey into the Sinai, which will move us into a new discovery in the
world of etheric conductivity and crystals, 'magical' wands and spacecraft.
Firstly, let us begin with a summary on the Journey of the Sun Key to Egypt and
Sinai taken by the ‘three', which was covered in issue #3-88.
The primary theme or vector for the Journey of the Sun Key was the
dualistic nature of power, registered between the archetypes of HORUS and
SET. This dualism is exemplified in the CHRIST and LUCIFER/SATAN.
HORUS and SET are brothers, CHRIST and LUCIFER (SATAN in his
descended modality) are twin rays. Yet one (of each pair) is ‘fallen', descended
from the Light.
This journey then, was a confrontation with the Light/Dark aspect of
the divine in mankind; and also the emanations left behind from the Battle of
the Great Powers – known Biblically as the Battle of Heaven”. These
emanations are trapped in the circuitry of Earth, reverberating within the
karmic cycles of world struggle and personal testing. The Sun Key emancipated
the internal disorder of certain major areas, which had been sustained in this
aforementioned manner. It did not resolve the turmoil, but helped to regulate
the balance of power within those templaric sites and created a door for future
Spiritual Warriors to enter. The Sun Key mission also was a channel for re-
consecration of sacred ground, creating a greater resonance with past holy
presences at these sites.
The victorious archetype for this mission was thus HORUS, who is the
bearer of the 'force for good – the ultimate Spiritual Warrior. It was under
Horus the man, that the lineage of the 'Blue Star' was reinforced, beginning
the generations that would bring forth the genetics of the Master Jesus. It is
HORUS the archetype that is the keeper of the Divine Eye, the steady focus of
Rayships which weave this planet into a nest of Light, cradling the egg or seed
of divinity that is our eternal heritage.
The uniting symbol for the journey was the Ankh. This is the Staff of
Life/Light that is the infinite love of God. It is love in the form of power – a
power to transform, and a power that brings into Elementation that which is
divinely conceived.
The initiatic symbol of this voyage was the Eye of Horus, the emblem
of divine sight. The ANKH and EYE together form manifested vision
that
which is created in vision and brought forth into the firmament of the physical
world.
And now we return to Sinai, as I give to you the ancient truth of this
awesome place as it has so been revealed to me by Thoth.
In the first period of the Blue Star Race in Egyptland, Sinai was included
within the boundaries of Egypt. This 'first period' was the Age of Osiris.
The entitiy first known as Osiris began his lineage at Mt. Sinai, where he came
with his company, in the Ships of Light. His actual name was not Osiris, for
this is a title or identity of lineage given, and not an individual's name. There
would be other Osirises to come. This lineage was followed by the Age of
Horus. While there was only one Horus man of whom I wrote about in issue
#3-88, his children were many, and from these, other Horuses arose. Yet, the
one and first Horus was known to ancient historians as Horus the Great.
During the Age of Osiris, the Temple and surrounding city of Osiris
was to the east of Mt. Sinai, some 150 kilometers. It was a simple, yet
beautiful city, nestled in luxuriant gardens and sculpted mounds of images
visible to the heavens. The city was named Osirmektet.
In the Age of Horus, when Horus the Great was among the Egyptian
people, a new Temple was built for his lineage at the foot of Mt. Sinai. This
Holy structure was the Temple of Senna (where the ‘alters of Senna' had been
cut into the stone of the mountain's base, in a time long before the Osiris
Period.) While certain buildings of the holy order encircled the Temple, no
city was built around it, as had been done with the Osiris Temple. There was a
new city of Horus, but this was to be found in Egypt proper, near the Nile.
The city's name was Nir-Horaton. In Nir-Horaton, there was also a Temple of
Horus, but this temple was definitely lesser in power and focus that the grand
and magical ‘palace' temple as Sinai. The reasoning in not building a city
around the Temple of Senna involved the sensitivity of the region of Mt. Sinai
in that age, and the inability of the average Egyptian to cope with the intense
energies that were being manifest at this summit and down onto the valley
floor, into the Temple of Senna.
It was during the period of Horus the Great that the temple also was
built atop Mt. Sinai, extending into the mountain itself, and connecting to many
ancient chambers that had been hollowed out in a distant time, even before the
Osirian Age. This temple, which appeared small on the surface, was the
The Keepers of the Temple were a race all their own,
Temple of Sin.
originally from Antares, in the constellation Scorpius. They were not of the
"Star Trinity" (Orion, Pleiades, Sirius), but Antares, which is a double star
(giant red, and smaller blue), is very much apart of the Living Lights – the
Hierarchies which guide this planet. The Antarians of Mt. Sinai had
guardianed the chambers of the mountain for many centuries for several
purposes, most beyond the scope of this issue.
One very important destiny they awaited was the guardianship of a
divine power object, and thus the Temple of Sin was built to house this sacred
object. The construction was begun shortly after the infant Horus was ‘born'
from the egg of Light, atop the sacred mountain. The guardian race of Mt.
Sinai were known from that time on as Sinnenites. They still guardian the
mountain, although the surface structure of the Temple of Sin is no longer
there. In C. Heline's, N.A. Bible Interpretation, Vol. II, there is a brief
mention of "Sin”:
"So likewise, Mt. Sinai, whereon Moses was instructed by God, to which he brought the
Israelites to worship the true God, was a sacred area for the ancient Egyptians, where for centuries
they had worshipped the Mood god, Sin."
Once the outward manifestation of Sin was completed, the Ships of
Light came again, with the harmonic sounding of choirs, as their pulsing
emanations of sound and color filled the night sky above the sacred Mount.
The largest of these craft hovered over the summit, and beamed into the
Temple of Sin, the sacred power object that had be guardianed in Tibet since
its direct manifestation to this planet from the Blue Star Rigel. Now the sacred
power object, the Ark of Grace, was placed within its new casing, atop Mt.
Sinai.
As Horus grew into manhood, it was deemed time to raise upon the
valley floor, a living temple of light - one attuned to the resonant harmonies of
the mountain that companioned it, and radiating a signal of complete synthesis
with the entire Earth. So, began the building of the Temple of Senna.
Just before the Journey of the Sun Key was embarked upon, I channeled a
reading for Delores Kemp, one of the ‘three' on the voyage. In this reading
THOTH instructed her to look for something she was to bring back from Mt.
Sinai. He told her that it 'might be in four pieces". The exact description of the
object was not given. As Delores mastered the difficult climb that morning of
8/8/88, she suddenly remembered THOTH'S words, and looked immediately
at her feet. There, to her astonishment, lay a ‘tablet' in four pieces! There
was no time to absorb this happening - she quickly picked up the pieces,
wrapped them in tissue, and stuck them in her bag. Upon her return to San
Antonio, we unwrapped the fragments for a better look. There were indeed
four pieces of a tablet, with a very few raised symbols on them. The pieces did
not fit together perfectly, indicating there were other fragments missing. The
symbols are very rough, but definitely not made by nature. There is a border
to the tablet, found on all the pieces, and the only clear symbols are on one of
the four fragments, although another has a dot and a blurred image that
THOTH says was once part of a falcon-head (Horus). THOTH defines this
tablet as one of several which were attached to rounded dolomens of clay,
hollow, with large Boji Stones, from Atlantis inside them. (Boji Stones, known
by geologists as "Pop Rock”, will be discussed later in the issue.) The tablets
contained the 'magical' or meta-scientific formulas for performing specific
energy transfers between the meridian upon which the dolmen was aligned and
the Ark of Grace, within the Temple of Sin. The dolomens were erected on the
meridians of the mountain, placed there to work in synchronicity with the Ark,
to 'charge' and cut and lift the pink granite stones which would be used to build
the Temple of Senna on the Valley floor.
The precise mechanism was not elucidated upon by THOTH, but the
end result was a beam from the Ark hitting the dolomen, cracking it opne upon
impact and discharging the current into the grounding Boji Stone, which,
through some mysterious means, charged and cut and lifted out a specific
section of stone block from the mountain. Lawrence Chisolm, of the 'three'
was guided to hand Delores a fifth piece, which was a shale of (apparently) pink
granite, saying it 'belonged' with the four clay fragments. This shale is a chip
from the original cutting of that stone. For what purpose we have become the
guardians of these fragments, I do not yet know.
Weeks after the last of this information had been given me by THOTH,
I flipped open a book someone loaned me unsolicited, and which I had not yet
read. It was Initiation in the Great Pyramid, by Earlyne Chaney. As I
looked upon the page where I had instinctively opened the book, I read the
following:
"The Osiris and Isis of my time were supposed to have been 'Born' at Nyssa
(Mount Sinai) - which only means they landed there when they arrived in spaceships,
because we recognized them to be solar gods. Osiris was a god blended in man, and man
deified as a god. He was often referred to as Osiris-Eloh. We knew, too, of the enormous
landing site for spacecraft in the hidden vastness of Nyssa-Sinai. From there, they entered
Egypt. Almost all solar gods of antiquity – space gods – were 'born' a Nyssa, or Mount
Sinai.... And Thoth! – ah, blessed birthless and deathless Thoth. He was forever... It was
he who built Knut, our House of Light, and brought the Mysteries to our land. He came
from the Land of the Shining - wherever that was (Thoth told me many years ago he was
born in Tibet-CH) – and would appear intermittently on Earth till our lifewave was
immortalized. Through the rays of the Arks, the solid dimensions of matter could be
transmuted into the ethers of matter. The crystals and compounds of which the Arks were
constructed – the copper, brass-like substance, and pure living gold- were charged with
seven octaves of energy, from the materialistic charges of electric voltage up to the highest
spiritualized forces of celestial planes – pranic forces far beyond the voltage of Earth's
electricity. the rays, equalizing gravity, caused the massive stones (of the Great Pyramid of
Knut) to become temporarily weightless and easily levitated... The rays also polished the
great stones until the limestone shownlike glistened marble... With their Arks, they built not
only Knut, but also the temple of the lion-eagle-man-woman, the Sphinx.
...
They also dug the endless tunnels not only throughout Egypt, but throughout the
planet."
Ms. Chaney's visions correspond with THOTH'S revelations to me also
in regard to the fact that there were many “Arks”. The two that affected this
planet the most, THOTH says, are the Ark of Grace, which is the Ark Moses
brought out of Egypt, and the Ark of Karma - which was the one Moses was
instructed to build and take with him from Sinai when it was decided by the
Council of the Ark at the Mount that Moses' people were not worthy or ready for
the Ark of Grace.
But, let us back up a bit to the Age of Horus, when the Ark of Grace
resided in the Temple of Sin, sending its sacred Solaris Rays down into the
mountain, forming an arc with the oppositely charged Temple of Senna below.
Together this unit, the Ark, Sin, the Mount and Senna, formed a Staff of Light,
an Ankh of perfect resonance.
At some point after that Age, the Ark of Grace, was taken into Egypt
and given unto the guardianship of the Solarians, a branch of whom were the
Essenes. For many cycles of the Great Nile, this, the most sacred Ark, was
kept beneath the Temple of Light, or Temple of the Lion, as THOTH calls
it... Giza's Great Pyramid. It wasn't until the reign of the Pharoah Akhnaton
that the Ark of Grace was brought back to Sinai. It was entrusted to Moses
through his father, Akhnaton by the order of the Master Enochian, Menon.
And thus Moses came to the Mount, returning its most treasured entity. Here
began a testing, in which Moses and his company were brought into
confrontation with Good and Evil, laid bare at the feet of the Mountain. Had
the test been met to the fullest, the Ark of Grace would have continued from
Sinai with Moses, but this was not to be. Instead, it was decided that Moses be
allowed to create a new Ark - the Ark of Karma (so THOTH refers to it).
This Ark reflected the powers and weaknesses of those who interacted with it,
whereas the Ark of Grace was inviolate.
I was told some time age by THOTH that Moses was Aknaton's son.
Interestingly, just as I was gathering together my notes and messages from
THOTH for this issue, I was given an issue of a 1977 Rosicrucian Digest,
containing an article entitled, “The Egyptians and the Breath of Lift", in which I
found the following passage:
"This writer believes, as do others, that much of the Mosaic material originated in
Egypt, and also Moses was strongly influenced by the teachings of Akhnaton. It is even
conceivable that Moses was a student of the Egyptian Mystery Schools during the reign of
Akhnaton."
After THOTH'S information concerning the Ark and the Temple of Sin,
and the cutting of the stones for the Temple of Senna had been given me, I
was sent unsolicited, a book entitled Lithium – and Lithium Crystals. Nature
in Harmony, by Haroldine. The publisher had sent me a copy, requesting a
book review. I was not familiar with this publisher except that they had
previously sent me a copy of another one of their books, on Radionics. Since
I did not do book reviews and was involved with getting material for this issue
together, I started to put the Lithium book aside among a lot of other unread
material. Just as I began to toss it upon the pile, THOTH came through like a
thunderbolt, saying in effect: “Read that book! It will opne a new door for you, as
lithium is the element that bonds the physical plane to the etheric plane, and creates the
passage between the two." Suddenly, I became very interested in this book, even
though I had no previous knowledge as to what lithium even was (although the
word was vaguely familiar to me).
When I began reading Lithium, I found what THOTH has said to be
within its pages. But THOTH had also told me that lithium was the main
element that composed the Ark of Grace! This I didn't find in the book, but I
found a great deal of correlative material that was fascinating.
To begin with, Haroldine relates in her Lithium book, that lithium is
"Nature's lightest metal", and "is the first solid matter listed on the Periodic Chart and
appears to be the primary structure foundation base of all other matter in solid form." She
continues to say that lithium in its more pure form looks like a "white, powdery
substance" and it is never found alone in nature, but in combination with "other
elements described as lithium salts."
Lithium also can be found in crystals. There are three known
groupings for crystals: silicon (quartz), carbon (diamond), and lithium.
Whereas quartz crystals must be programmed by the mind, lithium crystals are
already programmed by nature. Unlike the silicon family, they are also self-
cleaning of imbalanced or negative energy fields/forms.
Haroldine states: “Lithium crystals do not give energy to the human; rather, the
lithium crystal(s) act as a non-invasive method of achieving balance for the individual by
removing barriers and clocks from the physical body wherein all incompleted emotional
trauma is stored. The removal of these barriers allows the individual to have more access to
his or her own energy supply for the natural process of recycling as Nature intended."
Lithium is a natural element of the human body, and in food, can be
found most abundantly in lemons, followed by limes. It is also in seaweed,
which would account for much of the "Light" properties of the algae products.
now on the market. The homeopathic 13th cell salt is lithium/beryllium and
was discovered in 1985 by Dr. Wm. G. Reimer from his research with the
Golden C Crystal containing lithium, beryllium, and gallium.
From Lithium and Lithium Crystals: "Sometimes referred to as the
ETHERIC ELEMENT, lithium brings light into the physical body through the spleen. The
spleen in turn nourishes the entire physical body directly bringing energy and strength to the
thymus gland. The immune system of a Human Being is directly connected with both the
spleen and the thymus gland…….. with adequate lecithin available in the body, on is able to
transmute the necessary daily requirements for lithium... The use of lecithin (oil, granules or
capsules) can provide an excellent source of bio-elemental lithium supplement… An
excellent food supplement called Coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10) is another excellent source of
bio-elemental lithium... Many mineral drinking waters contain trace amounts of lithium
though seldom labeled as such."
"Extending outward from Earth approximately 1300 miles radius in distance, there
exists a thin membrane -type sheath that entirely envelopes our planet – this appearance
is
quite similar to the thin invisible membrane that contains the yolk of a raw egg. Since early
grade school students have been taught our Earth's immediate atmosphere is composed of
20% oxygen, 78% nitrogen and 2% Noble inert gas. Ideally, this balance must be
maintained to afford some of the particular life forms of our planet. The membrane sheath
is not stationary, rather continually pulsing up/down and in/out in a paced rhythmic motion.
Interplanetary lithium constantly filters through this sheath as needed to contain the pressure
that maintains the oxygen/nitrogen/Noble Gas ration balance for the Earth's atmosphere
and floats downward. This fall out material mainly collects towards the North and South
Pole though portions sprinkle invisibly downward also to the land and sea masses of the
entire planet. During specific seasons of the Earth year this condition becomes more
activer and becomes visible to the naked eye because of the heavy concentration. It is
referred to as the Northern/Southern Lights or the Aurora Borealis. This is one of
Nature's System for continual vital energy and mineral nourishment for the planet."
THOTH has stated in the past that the Northern/Southern Lights were
a reflection of the inner Earth sun, trapped in the magnetic currents of the
polar openings... however, this new information is not contradictory (at least
SO THOTH now tells me), as he relates that it is this lithium fall out that
'carries the charge of the inner sun into visibility within its crystallic and
etherically sensitive particles."
Haroldine continues: "One could actually state that interplanetary lithium is the
essence/ether form carrying water to the Geosphere... The element lithium is able to
interact with normally inert nitrogen.. Lithium reacts vigorously with water and readily
transmutes into other elements chiefly sodium."
This is especially interesting to me since my first ‘mission' by my sources
was to move to Salt Lake City, a place I had never been to, but was to live there
four times, thus far, in the ensuing years. I was then told how important salt
(sodium) was in re-cycling energies of the planet.
Now let us review some lithium crystals. Two of the more commonly
available are kunzite and tourmaline. Haroldine states that, “tourmaline is the
second faster conductor of electricity upon the planet being surpassed only by the Human
Mind." She writes that black tourmaline contains all the color rays of the
rainbow including gold. THOTH tells me tourmaline, especially black, is an
alchemical stone, and that the esoteric Philosopher's Stone, although a sciences,
was also embodied (its knowledge infused) with a rare black tourmaline in
reversing the charge of the metal to its purest form (gold). But, as I
understand it, this requires much more than possessing a good piece of
tourmaline.
THOTH speaks of kunzite as being 'heart/mind' centered, allowing the
meeting of the heart and mind through a central flaming of the spirit. In other
words, it radiates the intelligence of love, rather than the impulse of it.
Another non-rare lithium crystal is lepidolite. All lithium soothes and
aligns the soul/body system, but lepidolite is especially effective in the
relaxation of the etheric boyd, expediting out-of-body experiences and inner-
plane harmony (within the soul/body system).
There is also Royal Azel. Haroldine states that this crystal is “activated
with spleen area and assists the intercomection contact to again activate the thymus gland
(youth gland) which greatly dissolves excess friction and supports whole nervous system."
But the most exciting lithium crystal of all appears to be the Golden C.
Thoth calls this the Golden Sea. On the surface of this planet, this crystal has
been found in what Haroldine describes as a 'freak deposit of nature. THOTH
says there are more deposits which will open in the future, and that this crystal,
while not commonplace, is much more evident within the inner Earth, in both
'soft' and 'hard' forms. Haroldine and her researchers (of Lithium Labs.,
LTD.) have discovered that Golden C will align all seven chakras within 24
hours or less when worn on the body. She reveals that it radiates pure golden
light and can rid the aura of all negative attachments, including actual negative
forms, releasing them into the Light. She lists many other benefits of Golden
C, but in a few words, it seems to be the ultimate crystal for everything from
warts to spiritual unity.
Golden C crystals, THOTH states, operate under the Archangelic
vibration of Michael. It was Golden C, in the form of a Golden Jasmine
subterranean crystal that was fashioned into the Archangel Stone, which has been
written about in previous issues of The Source. It was made clear to me,
however, that the Archangel Stone is a knowledge, a being, and a function, which
was infused into this particular crystal. The Archangel Stone as a crystal object,
was set upon a golden staff, which was attached to the Ark of Grace. When
Moses parted company with the “Grace" Ark, he was given the Staff to take
with him, but told not to attach it to the Ark of Karma. He didn't but an over-
zealous young priest did. There was quite a discharge killing several people,
maybe more than several. As a result, the ‘Karma" Ark was not destroyed, nor
was the crystal, but the Staff was burnt to a crisp. Thus, the Archangel Stone
went on with the Exodus, but as related (in past issue of The Source), that the
anti-Christ, now a teenager, is seeking. The Archangel Michael, through some
form of embodiment is trying to get to it first. A strange Star-Trek sounding
scenario, but THOTH has stuck to this story for several years now.
Apparently, "Michael" can't just take the stone... as the ‘stone' is also a
knowledge that is karmically bonded to humanity – something the Archangels
tread upon with wing-tipped feet, so to speak. So, it is all ‘sticky business’- the
stuff mini-series are made of!
The Golden Jasmine is a 'hard' version of the Golden C. The ‘harď
versions are found only in the inner Earth, and are a combination of carbon and
lithium, meaning they are a cross-over formation. The 'hard' lithium crystals
have not only the left and right polarity axis (as do the ‘soft') but contain a
dimensional axis as well. "Lithium is the only element created by Nature that affords a
directional rotation (for cell) of both left and right spin."– Haroldine. THOTH first
gave me information on the Golden Jasmine in 1976, but this was before I was
illuminated about Lithium, so this part was not mentioned until now. At that
time he also spoke about another inner Earth Crystal, which he called Lithus
Blue. Now he tells me that this is the hard version of what Haroldine refers to
as Lithium or Li-quartz. Although Li-quartz is not common on the surface, it
is not as rare as Golden C. The “Li” is the crystal with the most lithium
content. THOTH has this to say about it: “Lithium quartz collects
archetypal patterns of Mind, building into whole-structure Mind Forms. These
Mind Forms are somewhat like mini-archetypes unto themselves. They can be
identified as entities much in the same way as archetypes, in that they are
collective sentience, yet not imbued with a soul Archetypes and Mind Forms
are entities in that they have an ordered through structure that is activated by
ensouled interaction. In other words, contact with an ensouled being brings to life
the entity consciousness of the Archetype and Mind Form.”
There are various types of Mind Forms, some of which inhabit the giant
standing stones of the world, but these Mind Forms were magically directed
into the stones by the wizards of old. In Li-quartz, the Mind Form is there
through a natural attraction/bonding. Nor is it the same type of Form that is
placed in the standing stones. The Archetypes are the Grand Design, from
which all Mind Forms originate, but Mind forms assume identities which can
relate to places, persons, and things in a more distinct and personal way than
do the Archetypes, which are the sentient geometrics of universal design.”
“Li-quartz was often used (as were many lithium crystals) in the ancient
temples of Lemuria, Atlantis, and other 'children' nations.. the Li-quartz was
thickly layered over pink granite on the columns in the Temple of Senna and it
was present also in the Temple of Sin, as well as within the Ark of Grace,
which contained many variant lithium combinations.” The Lithium quartz
acts as a balancer of “Mind” within the individual. It can also be used as a tool
to project mental forms (good or bad) remotely.
When I contacted Haroldine, she was gracious in sending me the
Golden C, Li-quartz, and also a pretty little pink stone she calls “Odd Pink”.
This latter is so rare she only has a handful and knows of no place to obtain
more. No gemoligist can tell her what it is, only that it contains lithium,
several other substances, and 4% of something unknown to the planet. A psychic
once told Haroldine that the Odd Pink came from a mine in Mexico, and had
been altered by ET's. THOTH confirms this, only says it was UT's
(ultraterrestrials) from the Star Trinity, and not ETs. He calls the natural,
unaltered crystal maladine, and the altered or transmuted version, ty-maladine, as
it has been 'tycho-bonded'. This is a process of the Arks, and involves the
Tychon Flame (see issue #3-86). THOHT comments on maladine as being
under the creative action of the undines, which are nature spirits operating
within the humid (or liquid) ether. Certain undines work with the etheric
fluidium, which can be manipulated for such things as inter-dimensional travel
and time travel. The UT's 'bored a hole' through this fluidium at the place
where the Odd Pink was mined, creating a temporary vortex between time
frames. The vortex is barely there anymore, but the area was chosen because
of the maladine, which aided the process. The maladine that was employed
for this purpose was transmuted to ty-maladine. THOTH says that we could
think of ty-maladine as a ‘time machine', in that in its transmuted state,
maladine contains a 'record' of the proper sequential register for Theta, or free-
association with all time. Under the right conditions, such free-association can
include physical transference through time, but it is enough, he comments, that
ty-maladine can activate one to flow with time in the etheric state- not simply
for the thrill of connecting to various times strata, but to reverse, cancer cells,
breaks in bones, etc. Both maladine and ty-maladine, he also adds, is very
much aligned to the essence of spiritual oneness, since etheric fluidium is the
sustaining vehicle for divine love, when it is brought to the physical plane, via
vibration from the heart chakra.
Haroldine, also sent me another pink lithium stone. This one is un-
named by her, as she has found only one large chunk which she had sectioned
into small pieces. While it has the appearance of marble and agate, it is
neither. Again the gem specialists are baffled. THOTH on this lithium stone,
which he calls marabella:
"This stone was used in temples (such as Senna) for floors and
sometimes walls, as it is a great insulator from negative energies, unwanted
psychic penetration, and such natural phenomena as radon gas and erractic
energies produced by sun spots and gravitational irregularities. When one is in
the presence of a large amount of this stone (Especially surrounded by it) or
even a small piece, if the individual is meditating and focusing with it; that
person's auric and etheric bodies become insulated from outside influences.
This crystallic stone aids regeneration at a cellular level, which is true of all
lithium crystals, but with this crystal the regeneration is especially healing where
etheric and sometimes as a result, physical scarring has taken place. Etheric
scarring would be present where the entity had carried over a karmic trauma
from a past life, or even in that present lifetime, in the istance of some extreme
emotional situation which had left its mark on the etheric and thus often the
physical body. It is also excellent for the nourishment of the young -
especially infants and pregnant women."
"We shall call this lithium crystal marabella, which is its
Lemurian/Atlantean name. Atlantis was a major source for marabella and it
was Atlantean marabella that graced many of the floors and much of the
interior walls of the Temple of Senna at Sinai.”
A comment from THOTH on the soft and hard forms of lithium quartz:
"While the hard versions of these crystals contain the passages for greater divine
fire (access to divine mediums) the softer forms harbor the more mutable
properties which can be more easily integrated by the human element. So
both forms (soft/hard) are essential for the spiritual development of the
Human/Earth symbiosis.”
More of interest on lithium & lithium crystals:
Το quote Dan Winter, from the Lithium book: “Oxygen is the coil of
life, lithium is Light's staff or rod." Describing lithium Leadbeater: “Lithium is
a striking and beautiful form, with its upright cone or spike, its eight radiating
petals at the base of the spike, and the plate-like support in the center of which
is a globe upon which the spike rests. The spike revolves swiftly on its axis,
carrying the petals with it: the plate revolves equally swiftly in the opposite
direction."
Haroldine equates the lithium 'wand' with its dual spin, to an ankh of
Life/Light. She states that “Lithium is found widely distributed in the earth's crust as
lithium minerals in deposit, largely silicates, or pegmatite dikes on specific ley lines of the
Planetary Grid surrounding the globe." She told me that the Palomar mountain
range of California, and then on into Mexico, is one of the largest deposits of
lithium crystals in North America.
Both Haroldine and THOTH say that lithium crystals create a geometric
of a golden light spiral, which is the passage from the physical to the etheric
dimensions.
Lithium vibrates to the complete harmonic scale. Lithium absorption
(via crystals or ingestion) give you a 'natural high' - the opposite of depression.
(but to my knowledge, does not 'space you out', just relaxes and uplifts). Just
repeating the word 'lithium', as a mantra, over and over can effect you positively.
THOTH states that Mt. Sinai and the Sinai desert contain large amounts
of lithium. Haroldine writes in her book about the largest mining operation for
lithium in the U.S. at Trona (an Egyptain name) in Death Valley. This region.
bears a striking similarity to Sinai.
Haroldine also writes in her Lithium book that the residue product
remaining after the hydrogen and oxygen atoms are smashed together under
great pressure in the explosion of the atomic bomb is lithium! This ‘fall out'
was the one good thing the Japanese received from our blasting them to end
WW II. Haroldine speculates that it gave them that extra element of intelligence
they needed to become the wizards of technology they are today! Talk about
instant karma!
The Golden C crystal can ‘charge' water the following way: Take one
Golden C Crystal and place it inside a gallon of spring or distilled water. Let sit
for 24 hours. You may then use this water in an atomizer to spray on your
chakras, bruises, cuts, face (for younger, healthier skin). Also, over your head
and around your shoulders for cleansing your aura. Freshen linens, litter pans,
etc. Some of the above suggestions are from Haroldine's book, some are from
THOTH. While Haroldine has never personally drank any Golden C water, she
knows some people who have. These individuals feel it has affected them
beneficially. They have put a few drops in regular water 6/8 ounce glass, and
drink once a day. They determined the number of drops through using the
pendulum, but if you have your doubts, you might wish to try just one or two
drops per glass.
Ordering Information:
You may order the Golden C Crystal and the lithium quartz from
Haroldine. The prices are Golden C Crystal - $20. Li-quartz - $10. Because of
Haroldines' book she is fast selling her limited supply of these rare crystals —
especially the Golden C, which she estimates at this time, only 17,000 are
circulating on the planet, all mined from this one 'freak' deposit. She is really
not a retailer of crystals, but is simply selling the remainder of her stock leftover
from Lithium Labs, LTD. Research. Haroldine is the Director of that research.
If you order the Golden C alone, saying that you read about it in The
Source,
you I do not have to pay the $2 postage. If you order the Li-quartz,
because of their size and weight, you must include the $2 postage. But, please
do in any case tell Haroldine that you were made aware of her crystals through
this publication, as when I alerted her that I was going to be writing about her
book, research and crystals in my next issue, she offered to donate $5, of each
Golden C Crystal to TREDS. This was after the fact, and is not a
collaboration on our part to sell crystals. In fact, you can avail yourself of the
power of Golden C without having to have the physical crystal, as Haroldine
states in her book. Simply write the words “Golden C Crystal" in black ink on
white paper and wear it, or put if under a jar of water, following the same
procedure as you would a real crystal (don't put the paper into the jar, that
could get a bit messy). Her research volunteers have found it to be very
effective. I personally would prefer to have a real crystal but for those of you
who are adept at remote attuning, this other method should work equally well,
if you believe. Remote etheric interaction with any crystal is possible, but since
lithium crystals are especially sensitive to the etheric current, they are more
easily 'called upon' via meditation. You can effectively 'contact' any of the
lithium crystals mentioned in this issue by meditating upon their names and
properties.

About BOJI Stones:
As far as I know, Bojis or "Pop Rock" do not contain lithium, but
THOTH regards them as highly as he does lithium crystals. Bojis were created
in the first stages of primal emergence of this planet. THOTH calls them
'Dragon Stones', as he states that they were brought forth from the creation of
'dragons' (elaborate, primal devic beings created in the beginning of this planets
formation). And contain codings that transfer the Earth's lithium into specific
units of function, which in turn regulates the balance of power and life on
Earth (embodied in the Gaia theory). Without the Bojis, the 'network' and
direction of purpose and function could not take place. Boji stones were
'placed' by the Kachina/Elohim (co-creators of the Beginning Time) in certain
locations, where they are on the move, in that they actually travel through the
Earth, as etheric shifts take place. This serves to allow the lithium a wider and
more flexible range of function, since the planet is always changing in its path
of entropy and renewal. Bojis also ground the lithium. They act as a
mechanism to keep the etheric nature of lithium in check so that it can better
effect the physical reality.
As I understand it, one of the few places Boji Stones can be found near
the surface is around a mound/hill in Kansas. Since Bojis are no longer being
made by the planet, each one is a special rarity unto itself. As they come into
the hands of mystics, they find a new way to travel, to adjust to the motion of
the New Age'. However, Bojis can ‘die', as they are inhabited with devic
forms that are especially vital and sensitive to human contact. All crystals
have 'crystal devas' in them, but Boji devas are very attuned to guardianship of
the planet and will vacate the Boji element before it will allow itself to be
misused. Nor can it tolerate any extreme condition of negativity for a long
period without ejecting its devic spirit to serve elsewhere, in a less disorientated
environment. I have been told by a fellow mystic who has seen them in a
deceased state, that a dead Boji turns white (its natural color is dark grey/black,
with shiny sparkles, in a rounded shape), and crumbles! On a personal level,
Boji stones are wonderful ‘body balancers', grounding and energizing the
individual working with it. I have heard that if a person is really ‘out of whack’
chakra-wise, touching this stone for the first time will actually create a spark, as
the negative energy is immediately discharged! Bojis can be found in crystal
shops/shows, although they are becoming scarcer as their demand increases.
If you don't have any luck in finding one, send me a SASE and I will give you
information on where they can be obtained. Since this person (who sells
them) is not in the business of mail orders, I don't wish to print it in this
issue... try to find them on your own first!

WANDS OF THE SEVENTH SEAL
Coinciding with our preparations for the Journey of the Sun Key, I began
communicating with a craftswoman in Washington state, by the name of Susan
Plum. One of her handiworks is the sculpting of wands in pure silica (leadless
glass). While I have seen several sources of wands, all beautifully crafted,
Susan's were exceptional in the archetypal energy they embued. As I began to
interact with these wands physically, THOTH informed me that Susan was
working with the Seventh Seal archetypes in her wand-making. As Susan and I
began to join forces', THOTH stated: “The archetypal designs of these wands
is a focus of the Enochian Masters, through the Order of the Burning Bush, brought
into viability through Christine and overlayed with Susan's natural ability to
‘attune' to archetypal design. In other words, since Susan's contact with
Christine, the two units of channel have combined in focus in this particular
wandcrafting service, as to create a new vector for entrance of these Seventh Seal
manifestations.”
The Seventh Seal wands are a combination of several archetypal
structures, all linked through the Seventh Seal of Revelations - which is the
entrance of mankind into the “Kachina factor”, wherein humanity becomes the
Kachina-Elohim, the new co-creators of the next world of the helix of spiritual
return. The wands themselves serve as tools of this focus, and are imbued
with the EM charge or spark. This is the frequency of the Enochian Masters, that
which Light Bonds the entire Universe through sequential programs of Divine
Function. It also forms the constitution of matter."
"However, it need be understood that the wands alone are not miracles
of Light. They are sacred tools, they can only work within the Light structures
allowed by the Initiate. As previously stated, within this program of selection of
archetypal wands, there are various structures or levels. The 3 most vital
structures are The Ten Serpent Powers, The Seven Visions & The Five
Emblems Of Divinity. These names were given the Seventh Seal divisions
in the days of Lemuria and Atlantis (they were also called the Seven Heavens),
when the Enochian Masters, through the Star Trinity, brought the Wisdom of the
Heritage of One to the Lemurian and Atlantean Races, and perpetuated it again
through the Incans, Mayans, Tibetans, Egyptians and certain sects of Britons,
as well as through various other key culture frames."
THOTH has related to me that each wand which comes into existence
within this framework, will have both a name and a function. Thus, there may
be several wands under the same function.
When Delores was in the Temple of Horus in Egypt, I experienced a
visitation by HORUS, in which I was given a wand, named the Ankh-Horus.
Susan Plum later constructed this wand fro me into which was placed two of
the stones I sent with Delores on her trip- having been sanctified in the
Temple of Horus, and atop Mt. Sinai. These were a pink coral stone and a
small turquoise. It also contains a scarab bead from one of the tombs which
was given to me years ago. The Ankh-Horus is in the shape of an Ankh
with wings. I have been told by THOTH that this wand functions as a
capstone for all three of the aforementioned levels: Serpents, Visions, Emblems. Its
function is Divine Manifestation. This wand is at this time focused through the
Temple of Senna. There is another of Susan's wands with which I work
which is attuned to the Temple of Sin (although both focuses may later
change). It is a smaller wand with an ‘eight' design formed from two serpents,
one blue and one green. A clear quartz is atop the wand and an abalone forms
the center. This is the Serpent of the Sea- Star, and its function is Divine
Perpetuation.
with the help of
Most of these
There are six other Seventh Seal wands now manifested,
THOTH and Susan Plum's talent, and more are on the way.
wands are not being crafted until the person comes forward who is seeking a
wand. Then the wand is brought into elementation, named, and its function
given. It is hoped that a network of these wand workers can be realized for earth
healing, co-creating a better world reality, etc., in the near future.
Anyone interested in becoming a part of this interactive project send a
SASE to me. At this time, it would require that you purchase you own wand
(from Susan). I am hoping in the future a fund can be set up to help defray
costs for those who truly wish to participate, but are without funds to purchase
a wand. Susan has expressed to me her flexibility in the regard to price, for
those who honestly cannot afford to purchase a wand at its regular price. But, the
making of these wands requires expense on Susan's part, and she, like many of
us is not operating at this time in a financially stable situation. Thus, requests
for help in this regard would have to be reviewed on an individual basis. She
personally feels a responsibility to see that these power instruments are placed
into the right hands. Since The Source has a small circulation of especially
dedicated people who are working with high-initiatory material, we both felt
comfortable in sharing the Seventh Seal information through this medium,
trusting in the Source, that the energy of the mission will be directed into proper
channels.
At present the type of wand required for this project is between $125
and $200.
Additional last minute Lithium Crystal information:
As I was completing this issue Haroldine sent me some Pala Pink
Tourmaline, which I felt needed to be included in the Lithium Crystal list.
Haroldine says in her letter to me about this crystal: “Pala Pink Tourmaline is a
specific color gem stone found only in one place on this planet and that is Stuart Lithia Mine
at Pala Indian Reservation, (CA). The really beautiful faceted stones sell from $200-
$800 per carat and can be purchased at "The Collector", Live Oak Park Rd.
Fallbrook, CA 92028.
THOTH enlightens us on this crystal further: "Pala Pink Tourmaline is
another Atlantean Stone, now surfacing in California (like marabella) as there
are so many Atlantean souls in that region. It is a case of karmic attraction,
and also the Devic Kingdom's attempt to re-awaken certain lost harmonies to
the surface world. The word Pala' is Atlantean (and Lemurian as some of
their language was interchangeable), and means ‘centered' or 'at-one'. 'Mar' is
also from that root language, translating as ‘the sea of divine being'. Thus, the
‘Palomar' range has its distinct ancient calling, in tune with the crystals it offers
now, to the New Atlanteans' and to the world. A deeper perception of the
word 'pala' leads us to the center of the Earth, as it is also the byword for that
Mystery of which the hollow Earth is the crucible of Holy of Holies; so in that
context, 'pala' is especially sacred."
“Returning to the Pala Crystal it radiates the centering focus which
carries humanity to the twining with its ‘twin self. By this it is not meant one's
‘twin ray', as it is commonly called, but that part of the inner spirit that is a
reflection of the individual's part of the Godhead, the Source. This
understanding would need to be elaborated upon at depth in order to fully
comprehend it, but I shall say now that it is at the foundation of the Inner
Earth Tribes “Questing", for spiritual at-oneness. The Pala Pink Tourmaline
vibrates with this chord of knowing, as it was part of the crystallic
consciousness, (in etheric form), that brought the ‘twin self into existence as a
planetary consciousness. This 'twin' is also seen as 'twining' or wrapping of
energies, as in the helix of the DNA, which is the basis for the 'twin self' in
elementation. Thus, the Guardian of the Labyrinth to the Center of the Earth
the Unicorn is the Devic Being who resonates with the crystal lithium
principle, not only in symbol, but in the very real existence of Unicorns with
the inner Earth, and their ability to 'sound', or send signals of a high-pitched
frequency through their horns, attuning and stirring the crystallic grid of the
planet. The Pala Pink is the lithium crystal closest to the Unicorn signal, and
there is thus a harmony between them. This can create a twining focus for an
initiate of the Pala Pink, who desires contact with the twin self in the form of
the Unicorn the spirit embodiment of the spirit twin within mankind's universal-
chorded soul."
Aside from deposits of Pala Pink in the central Earth, there are no
other deposits on the surface at this time, except within the Palomar Mountain
Range, so says THOTH, concurring with Haroldine. However, there is a very
close relations, he states, that will be found in the future in Australia, which he
names here as Kouuram Pink Tourmaline. It has not yet been discovered, but is
within a Cavern area "of the south".
In conclusion, the Pala Pink is a crystal which centers one to their
'source', and to the center of the planet as well. It is a crystal that can call
upon
the unicorns for joy and healing, on a personal or planetary level. Like
many of the lithium crystals, it too is a heart stone'. Its function with this
chakra is to awakening the “Twins” of self to the Love-Balance of the
Universe.
